name: GOTV PAC
subject: We won in Wisconsin. Now let us tell you where we’re going next:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter,
We won't bury the lede: we just played an instrumental role in helping to win one of the most expensive state Supreme Court races in American history—by double digits!
Despite everything Elon Musk threw at Wisconsin... despite more than $20 million in misinformation, gimmicks, and even million-dollar checks handed out like party favors... voters saw through it.
Brad Schimel lost.
Susan Crawford won.
And democracy held the line!
This is a huge victory, not just for Wisconsin, but for all of us. Because what we saw in this race was a dry run for everything that's coming: billionaires trying to buy power, extremist candidates embracing conspiracy theories, and MAGA politicians counting on apathy to carry them to victory.
But it didn't work. And that's because you showed up.
You supported GOTV PAC, and that helped fund one of the most efficient and effective voter turnout programs in the country. One conversation at a time, you helped deliver a 10-point victory for Democrats in a state Trump won just a couple of months ago— and helped embarrass Elon Musk on a national stage!
Thank you. Truly.
Now, we look ahead. Our next stop: Pennsylvania. The Supreme Court retention elections there are already drawing attention from the same operatives and megadonors we just beat. If you recall, in 2020, the PA Supreme Court held strong against Trump's attempt to overturn the presidential election, and as we look to 2028, we need to know he can't install a wave of his personal sycophants to the court.
Then? Big ones in Virginia, New Jersey, North Carolina, and anywhere else, democracy is on the line, and our work can make a difference.
We're ready. We just need the fuel to keep going. So, will you chip in now to help us refuel? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04022025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=Email04022025] DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=Email04022025]
DONATE $60 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=60&refcode=Email04022025] DONATE $120 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=120&refcode=Email04022025]
OTHER AMOUNT → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04022025]
In solidarity,
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04022025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04022025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-UFTIeK5E0CCzhE2NytL8Q2?unsubscribedata=ET%2Fo1aKt3%2B%2Bkp5MjIKnP9N55GCdclJ%2BBtghGzwpFvfYbGEyjzGhmYZzDuIzPuOf4jfqy4nc%2BJVGqlKtQ3T8ZEWjZi%2B68yHAa0693FOIHyAEE9X9BVVSDlbAKeM1y2sgOr5SrJx4a45CrpHVd5yzdT%2FhvFhqeGlUMCuAmbKGOUn5gVc4UCuWyNJWeLWBX3bSSBKw7pCWT5BDz6RB5gMX636kx3D2793z8iHBn5TdAftHt1c7czPAlFzDvYm9iqm2LKEuDKpv0%2BB8ovTnZyJtXbT5N4mcNzrT1ysMe0vQbdnwZMu77xtW1L6aTqUNhB2rwtlFDaJojfcvkCdFuKSkzbOtuepVODtE1fxYQB2FdyBmgsKTvPS3yprMUcuMMbt2mWJ6vcdczXYL5gR9GG1UMc64i05A4iyz5lIeDkjD%2BKsA%3D .

name: Kimberly Bretches
subject: Please don’t let my three children grow up without their father
body:
I can't bear the thought of life without him| | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job.
---
| |
---
Dear Patriot, That's me and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches in the picture I've sent you...
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a86714b525ab45cd86538dde36731fb9&_e=rnkXd1NhDBLnHi8DESuwnJQJIVTzya2T4O-IEJD4pzR7NC1NHnpnvjoHC77dM_YpiJ7VdsR8R5CJFvw76xVE6hlzZv117VVFc5-tiUK-_6bZEPZPZQi1mtBaxG91bcL542jecGhMRHzQ6_kiJvEFD4Tro1mcpQxbQDXHPPrViNpV4TIVqRC5mZR3QRgnbKlyuO7lbWTdeUrhmxfJK9gkqNoIKccFzDCdR4Ks8i-1I9Yn_H5oKJx7mc3liDT0oMbH7kh4TAdlgWIChV3h3Grv5_MWvup9aPGguKv8OWDrTL7gPSj5-mBIy-Nq835ZFVpzgLcMq-yuv5CLWrzqMbFcR-hKOGKV1BbzpZLBohFqO4nPU3Y4cMYOEGKVJeg0dyciWiAKtlWV2UdwRvpEBPiTVQ%3D%3D)
---
...a picture we took on the day Chance received the Lifesaving Medal With Valor for rescuing a driver from a crashed car that had caught on fire. This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because in July, the same city that gave Chance this award... ...will try to lock him up for life for doing his job. I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were "mostly peaceful." It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars, and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn't restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same "beanbag guns" that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before it got out of hand. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. What I didn’t know then was that this nightmare wasn't over for us. Far from it. Unknown to Chance and the other officers on duty that night, an anti-police protestor was hit by one of my husband's non-lethal rounds. They claimed they were injured and lost part of their finger. And for that... ...the county prosecutor charged my husband with "aggravated assault by a public servant" -- a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, my emotions went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned that the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don't care if my husband is innocent. They'll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year police veteran. My husband is a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He's served on mission trips -- planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he's done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars and could be his "reward." Even if my husband's good name is cleared there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God's grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us -- the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policemen's best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes -- like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth -- without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they've agreed to help Chance. My friend, you've read my letter this far so I'm going to ask as boldly as I can: Will you help Chance, too? _**[Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have wrongly accused?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a86714b525ab45cd86538dde36731fb9&_e=rnkXd1NhDBLnHi8DESuwnJQJIVTzya2T4O-IEJD4pzR7NC1NHnpnvjoHC77dM_YpiJ7VdsR8R5CJFvw76xVE6hlzZv117VVFc5-tiUK-_6bZEPZPZQi1mtBaxG91bcL542jecGhMRHzQ6_kiJvEFD4Tro1mcpQxbQDXHPPrViNpV4TIVqRC5mZR3QRgnbKlyuO7lbWTdeUrhmxfJK9gkqNoIKccFzDCdR4Ks8i-1I9Y5FBgiOZ_cpTHX4rC4adbe2BkxsINHW98O-y_xVjggOCuJHHVjlasbpvVXkzxyKRptALc479sdBqUbcP5HYeSFybt_inHr23w5WovUIJQbom2joU2k5BPIoCqsFGrjWVFkvQ1p1ugoD-8oHf8H2LjOcrzF_f0hkChC8J4_DmlQbg%3D%3D)**_** ** You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. _**[So with that in mind, please know that any contribution -- be it $35, $100, $500 or even $1,000 -- is tax-deductible.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a86714b525ab45cd86538dde36731fb9&_e=rnkXd1NhDBLnHi8DESuwnJQJIVTzya2T4O-IEJD4pzR7NC1NHnpnvjoHC77dM_YpiJ7VdsR8R5CJFvw76xVE6hlzZv117VVFc5-tiUK-_6bZEPZPZQi1mtBaxG91bcL542jecGhMRHzQ6_kiJvEFD4Tro1mcpQxbQDXHPPrViNpV4TIVqRC5mZR3QRgnbKlyuO7lbWTdeUrhmxfJK9gkqNoIKccFzDCdR4Ks8i-1I9ZGAzTWLR4jWYS1qBhj-AZIMY69BBe3cnONJNDJAW3NGEtHc5N2Q18dokkz9Nx76t4R0W5E1r3UESv-OApN5HvNkUmyE8ROnPdHbApEuXj81ZTOIxbe0VlSVmtfQZ3Wsndu-eVIOBrOqtYitupgmW8rv7y6WsrHWxyTmq8PXgoDXw%3D%3D)**_ But whatever you feel led to give, please end it back quickly. Chance's trial starts on July 7th. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he'll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won't be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won't be able to walk our daughter down the aisle somebody... I can't bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. _**[So please, my friend, rush back your gift right away if possible.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a86714b525ab45cd86538dde36731fb9&_e=rnkXd1NhDBLnHi8DESuwnJQJIVTzya2T4O-IEJD4pzR7NC1NHnpnvjoHC77dM_YpiJ7VdsR8R5CJFvw76xVE6hlzZv117VVFc5-tiUK-_6bZEPZPZQi1mtBaxG91bcL542jecGhMRHzQ6_kiJvEFD4Tro1mcpQxbQDXHPPrViNpV4TIVqRC5mZR3QRgnbKlyuO7lbWTdeUrhmxfJK9gkqNoIKccFzDCdR4Ks8i-1I9Z8-6wluJwWdyFPhvZz8oolIuOiH3pp6zwEpL43DaQtRES0iDV2LgsLHD20OBSAYOc4RA91MP3svzOqu_w07y01BprWeU1ceiQP_djdpBLB9om4J1mQ2ehRfQWGyyHJCaqHkMnWuCXyeSTTBgkOR2E1MLJ3iVDmh3W821NXqci-5A%3D%3D)**_ With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, _**[your gift of $35](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a86714b525ab45cd86538dde36731fb9&_e=rnkXd1NhDBLnHi8DESuwnJQJIVTzya2T4O-IEJD4pzR7NC1NHnpnvjoHC77dM_YpiJ7VdsR8R5CJFvw76xVE6hlzZv117VVFc5-tiUK-_6bZEPZPZQi1mtBaxG91bcL542jecGhMRHzQ6_kiJvEFD4Tro1mcpQxbQDXHPPrViNpV4TIVqRC5mZR3QRgnbKlyuO7lbWTdeUrhmxfJK9gkqNoIKccFzDCdR4Ks8i-1I9aZEmNi8RcYHWetDLPgTnBIXVkZW_7_SfPYbqYQpQqwZXVEJ7Cb39aupY5myDwjmCWaJx3Jr_tpH4W0HkZmhmEFYC4G62yTw6A6DEyXlvH13jsQrI3eR5tMIJykGUwkFip01lV2hndhD4mg4IXCzq4deTOuj39a49HbrsRgR27Xcw%3D%3D)**_ \-- or any amount -- could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you -- in advance -- for helping my husband fight back.
---
With hope and thanks,
---
Kimberly Bretches
---
P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his "reward."And to make things worse, we're up against the deep pockets of a George Soros backed prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance's trial begins. Chance and I have three children -- and one more on the way. Please don't let them grow up without their father. _**[Thank you for any help you can send to LELDF today.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a86714b525ab45cd86538dde36731fb9&_e=rnkXd1NhDBLnHi8DESuwnJQJIVTzya2T4O-IEJD4pzR7NC1NHnpnvjoHC77dM_YpiJ7VdsR8R5CJFvw76xVE6hlzZv117VVFc5-tiUK-_6bZEPZPZQi1mtBaxG91bcL542jecGhMRHzQ6_kiJvEFD4Tro1mcpQxbQDXHPPrViNpV4TIVqRC5mZR3QRgnbKlyuO7lbWTdeUrhmxfJK9gkqNoIKccFzDCdR4Ks8i-1I9arpXmI__aRLY55BdytRC54a_WaRJaGXj-4TzNrfOk6wveL_EjP0kv8seUwcJd87gwMJUaMIgyWTcMgzE4wqwdQm4MKzx_h8Zd8lmmIlZSxLMy3sBfd2VCLT-wfHYmHbJ24I2KiT6kJ5C4sI9yn7cc09hTtku6JWxArWbNQEN0TuA%3D%3D)**_
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a86714b525ab45cd86538dde36731fb9&_e=rnkXd1NhDBLnHi8DESuwnJQJIVTzya2T4O-IEJD4pzR7NC1NHnpnvjoHC77dM_YpiJ7VdsR8R5CJFvw76xVE6hlzZv117VVFc5-tiUK-_6bZEPZPZQi1mtBaxG91bcL542jecGhMRHzQ6_kiJvEFD4Tro1mcpQxbQDXHPPrViNpV4TIVqRC5mZR3QRgnbKlyuO7lbWTdeUrhmxfJK9gkqNoIKccFzDCdR4Ks8i-1I9YDQ6tPfmxCCa1adoeS8F0fkswOufZrdyFC03rII4zHP5JRzRgjiEqelthcKnRR5SpBmrwBvt6cCXejpthSWaXF_4WFPXOaBM3pa5zDMxM-xkmvBjr0tmYMwmhAUabdCZa2inmNwNCSJo9zcjMl61w5KYUpaevUE9jfXeZgdjsraA%3D%3D)

clean_body: I can't bear the thought of life without him| | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job. | | Dear Patriot, That's me and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches in the picture I've sent you... ...a picture we took on the day Chance received the Lifesaving Medal With Valor for rescuing a driver from a crashed car that had caught on fire. This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because in July, the same city that gave Chance this award... ...will try to lock him up for life for doing his job. I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were "mostly peaceful." It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars, and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn't restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same "beanbag guns" that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before it got out of hand. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. What I didn’t know then was that this nightmare wasn't over for us. Far from it. Unknown to Chance and the other officers on duty that night, an anti-police protestor was hit by one of my husband's non-lethal rounds. They claimed they were injured and lost part of their finger. And for that... ...the county prosecutor charged my husband with "aggravated assault by a public servant" -- a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, my emotions went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned that the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don't care if my husband is innocent. They'll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year police veteran. My husband is a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He's served on mission trips -- planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he's done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars and could be his "reward." Even if my husband's good name is cleared there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God's grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us -- the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policemen's best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes -- like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth -- without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they've agreed to help Chance. My friend, you've read my letter this far so I'm going to ask as boldly as I can: Will you help Chance, too? You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. But whatever you feel led to give, please end it back quickly. Chance's trial starts on July 7th. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he'll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won't be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won't be able to walk our daughter down the aisle somebody... I can't bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, \-- or any amount -- could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you -- in advance -- for helping my husband fight back. With hope and thanks, Kimberly Bretches P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his "reward."And to make things worse, we're up against the deep pockets of a George Soros backed prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance's trial begins. Chance and I have three children -- and one more on the way. Please don't let them grow up without their father. | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

Hi Peter, You can see it and smell it when a big truck passes you on the highway or in our neighborhood—diesel truck pollution is a daily reality for Oregonians. Here in Oregon, 19 of 36 counties have diesel pollution high enough to increase your lifetime risk for cancer. But it doesn’t have to be this way. Clean, quiet, zero-emission trucks are hitting the road, protecting our health and our climate. Unfortunately, fossil fuel interests and some truck manufacturers are trying to derail that progress right as electric trucks are getting into gear. The Oregon Legislature is currently considering a bill (HB 3119) that would **rollback Oregon’s clean truck standards** , allowing more pollution in our communities. _We need your help to stop it._[**Will you contact your representatives today to stop this unfair rollback?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105069325/537260760/-666701194?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlMmE0YjQ5LTFmMTAtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CkzeN55nu3x8cxMGMuZFOjp-asEJqCTFjPqhMD-BT58=&emci=a4f9cc93-360f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ae2a4b49-1f10-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)

name: Cory Booker
subject: I’m tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent.
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105069760/537267462/-1723582506?&refcode=E12830-20250402-CoryBooker-Image-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODhhNWFlYTItMjAxMC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=l9bewzSOoMcYtX-Xu42HYzDuUikMueNW22KpHV_kJZ8=) Peter, it’s Cory. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. clean_body: This is a moment where we must all speak up. | | = Peter, it’s Cory. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- With love and gratitude, Cory *

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8438%2E5257348%2EZtePFm ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — If
you’re like me, you’re so unbelievably proud of Senator Cory Booker (and
maybe also wondering how the heck he did that).

My friend Cory stood on the floor of the United States Senate for 25
hours, sending a strong message heard by tens of millions who tuned in
around the country. I was proud to join him and talk about the imperative
of defending our democracy even as we fight for a big bold progressive
agenda.

We are not going to sit back while Donald Trump rips away our rights, our
benefits, and our democracy. We are going to be loud and fight back.

Voters are looking to Democrats to be vocal in speaking out. And Cory did
that.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-booker25.gMTtR1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250402_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1004&akid=8438%2E5257348%2EZtePFm ]Let’s show our support for Cory by pitching in to his campaign. Will
you split
$10 to
support our work to reach voters across the country with our powerful
message?

---------------- Forwarded Message ----------------
From: Cory Booker
Date: Wednesday, April 2, 2025
Subject: I’m tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-booker25.gMTtR1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250402_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=8438%2E5257348%2EZtePFm ]Cory Booker

Derek,
it’s Cory.

Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours
straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk
completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of
the American people.

I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the
Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must
speak up.

What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across
this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.

I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.

It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.

It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we
chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-booker25.gMTtR1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250402_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=8438%2E5257348%2EZtePFm ]If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice,
opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Adam
Schiff today.

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. name: Cory Booker
subject: I’m tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105069877/537270538/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250402_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGNjM2VjYS0yMTEwLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PmPQKgoz5qgwxP2PKI3xemqFoMOsAMOV4uGju1Jo7sk=)

Peter, it's Cory. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. **[If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Becca Balint today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105069878/537270539/234527571?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250402_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGNjM2VjYS0yMTEwLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PmPQKgoz5qgwxP2PKI3xemqFoMOsAMOV4uGju1Jo7sk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Cory Booker and Becca Balint will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105069879/537270540/234527571?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250402_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGNjM2VjYS0yMTEwLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PmPQKgoz5qgwxP2PKI3xemqFoMOsAMOV4uGju1Jo7sk=)

FROM: A proud supporter

**You made HISTORY on the Senate floor for over 25 HOURS defending our democracy!_WOW!!!_**

This is true heroism — and exactly the kind of leadership we need to defeat Donald Trump’s disgusting attacks on the American people!

As a proud Democrat, you have my word that I will join your fight and do everything I can to keep electing incredible Democrats like you.

**We know Trump and Musk will _lie, break the law,_ and do _everything possible_ to bring our country backwards — but they don’t have an army of grassroots support behind them the way that you do!**

name: Deb Haaland
subject: My journey to sobriety
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
You must face hard truths if you want to make change.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1094%2E400544%2EWZXHSU)
I want to tell you about an achievement I’m proud of: **I have achieved 35 years of sobriety.**
Most people running for office wouldn’t choose to speak candidly about alcohol addiction. But I’m not like most people running for office. My story is different.
I was about 23 years old when I made the brave decision to get sober. It was a struggle at first, but I persevered because I was committed to doing all I could. I went to AA meetings and probably read 20 books on addiction.
My struggles made me fierce, which is why I chose to speak openly about my sobriety in my very first campaign ad when I ran for Congress. And I’m so glad I did. I'll never forget the day we went to the Marigold Parade in the South Valley, and people came up to me right and left and thanked me for saying that in my ad. They shared stories about themselves, their parents, and their loved ones struggling with addiction, and it brought tears to my eyes that people felt represented by someone like me.
**My journey to sobriety taught me that you must face hard truths if you want to make change, which is why I’ll never shy away from the tough fights that lie ahead for New Mexico.**
Crime, poverty, homelessness, and addiction are weighing heavy on our state, and I intend to tackle those challenges head-on as governor. I promise to be honest about topics other politicians might try to sweep under the rug, because I believe if we’re honest, we can make progress.
Thank you for hearing my story. That’s how we’ll win this race – by sharing our stories, lifting each other up, and being fierce enough to fight for the bright future all New Mexicans deserve. **[If you can, I’d be grateful if you’d pitch in $5 before our first public state reporting deadline on April 7. Your support today will help us show the level of grassroots support we have and build a strong campaign that can reach every New Mexican.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250402_2_sobriety?amount=5&refcode=em20250402-1094&refcode2=1094_400544_WZXHSU&akid=1094%2E400544%2EWZXHSU)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250402_2_sobriety?amount=5&refcode=em20250402-1094&refcode2=1094_400544_WZXHSU&akid=1094%2E400544%2EWZXHSU)**
Thank you for everything,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250402-1&t=2&refcode2=1094_400544_WZXHSU&akid=1094%2E400544%2EWZXHSU)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=1094%2E400544%2EWZXHSU)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=1094%2E400544%2EWZXHSU)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: My statement on the Wisconsin Supreme Court election results:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We go on from here to reclaim our nation.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105070394/537285559/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5MGM1ZDNlLTI0MTAtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=730T0BDPAV7aQ25FHw-URDYi7n9L3cvMgpXwi-vn6Lg=&emci=773ead20-f60f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=590c5d3e-2410-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)
---

## **A message from Attorney General Eric H. Holder, Jr. on the Wisconsin Supreme Court election results:**
Peter, Votes are more powerful than dollars. This election was a battle between Musk Money and democracy, and this victory is a testament to the real power of the people. When Republicans — and the billionaires they are beholden to — tried to buy an extreme right-wing majority on Wisconsin’s highest court to act as a “support network” for Trump, Wisconsinites said hell no. **Here is the lesson from Wisconsin: we, the citizens of this great country, have the actual power.** We can protect economic rights, voting rights, reproductive rights, and we can protect our democracy as long as we participate in the electoral process. **We go on from here to reclaim our nation.** — Eric H. clean_body: This is President Trump with an urgent msg I need you to see. Trust me, you won’t regret it, that much I can tell you. | | | | | From the Desk of the 45th and 47th President of the United States Donald J. Trump To: Trump Patriots From: President Donald J. Trump Re: Liberation Day (Personal & Private) Date: April 2, 2025 My fellow American, In just these first few months of my Presidency, we’ve already accomplished many tremendous and historic things. We’ve exposed the rampant waste and fraud in numerous government agencies with DOGE, and more importantly, we’ve ELIMINATED it. Now we are implementing HISTORIC TRUMP TARIFFS to create new, high-paying jobs and to bring manufacturing back to America. We’re going to do it in RECORD TIME. Believe me! IT’S LIBERATION DAY IN AMERICA! We’ve returned our Great Nation to a position of the utmost power and strength on the world stage, and long gone are the days where other countries dare to take advantage of us. The Democrats are now polling at depths never before seen in the history of our country. They’re struggling very badly, and they deserve it just as much. Meanwhile, our movement of America First conservatives is doing quite well. We’re very unified, and rest assured, we aren’t done winning yet. That much I can tell you. But the disgraced “ journalists ” in the fake news media and the so-called “ experts ” will soon start telling you the party in power always does badly in the midterm elections. Mark my words , they’ll double the amount of fake stories with “ anonymous sources ” attacking your favorite President, me, and it’s all to drive down my incredible poll numbers and the historic inroads we’ve made with voters of all different backgrounds and demographics. These “ journalists ” are all the same, and they’re all complete and total disasters! They’re just nasty, very nasty people who want to do nothing except tear our country apart and destroy everything we’ve accomplished simply because they hate Trump. Last November we defeated the radical left and the fake news media. We absolutely humiliated them. I have no doubt that with your help today, we’ll continue doing the exact same and much, much more! Thank you! MAGA! -President Donald J. Trump | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Dear Peter:
The Center for Effective Lawmaking, a nonpartisan group, just released a report detailing the most and least effective lawmakers in Congress and the Senate.

I was listed as a freshmen lawmaker who has **exceeded expectations** in the 118th Congress. That is saying something considering I was elected into a Republican majority Congress and have been standing up their shenanigans since Day One.

You can [read the full report here](https://sydneykamlager.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=f8ff5cd438&e=e6ba7d1bc4).

---
|
---
|
It is nice to be recognized for doing the work, getting things done, delivering for my district and suffering no fools; it is even nicer to be able to deliver.

We are handling the business because there is no time for foolishness.

Just wanted to share,

subject: 🚨ICYMI: Pekau Loses in a Landslide as Voters Deliver ‘Madman’ Mayor Humiliating Defeat
body:
view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/92f888a6be1b/exclusive-donald-trump-jr-draws-large-crowds-receives-lifetime-membership-10351809?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=c9b86a8527) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&t=b&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=c9b86a8527)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
This IR e-Blast Powered By:
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823

Dear Peter,

We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking conservative news story.

Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump.
http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 IllinoisReview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
Keith Pekau Loses in a Landslide as Orland Park Voters Deliver ‘Madman’ Mayor Humiliating Defeat in Election Night Disaster (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/04/keith-pekau-loses-in-a-landslide-as-orland-park-voters-deliver-madman-mayor-humiliating-defeat-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/04/keith-pekau-loses-in-a-landslide-as-orland-park-voters-deliver-madman-mayor-humiliating-defeat-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau, left, talks to supporters April 1, 2025, after conceding his race for a third term to former trustee Jim Dodge. (Mike Nolan/Daily Southtown)
By Illinois Review

Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau – known for publicly harassing and intimidating constituents, lost his re-election by a landslide as voters sent a clear message – electing former trustee Jim Dodge by a 15-point margin, 57-42.

In a statement released on the Orland Park for All facebook page, Dodge declared victory, but kept to a non-partisan tone.

“This is the first day, or the onset, to a return to dignity where we will bring back respect, transparency, and civility to Orland Park. Together, we will breathe new life into our community, ensuring that every voice is heard and valued.”

Dodge’s slate, Orland Park for All swept election night, as voters resoundingly rejected Pekau’s People Over Politics slate. Mary Ruan Norwell was elected Clerk, while Dina M. Lawrence, Joanna M. Liotine Leafblad and John Lawler easily won their trustee races.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/04/keith-pekau-loses-in-a-landslide-as-orland-park-voters-deliver-madman-mayor-humiliating-defeat-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Orland Park Mayoral candidate Jim Dodge celebrates with District 135 school board member Nicole Browner during the election night party at Blissful Banana restaurant in Orland Park on April 1, 2025. (James C. Svehla/for the Daily Southtown)
Pekau’s entire slate of trustee candidates were all defeated, including incumbents Brian Riordan and Sean Kampas. Carol McGury also lost by six points.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/04/keith-pekau-loses-in-a-landslide-as-orland-park-voters-deliver-madman-mayor-humiliating-defeat-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Kampas became infamous (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/witnesses-keith-pekau-harasses-intimidates-female-orland-fire-dist-candidates-follows-them-in-his-car-while-they-knocked-on-doors.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) after this publication revealed in March 2023 that he was heckling and following a group of Orland Fire Protection District candidates in a vehicle as a form of harassment and intimidation while they knocked on doors.

The driver of the vehicle harassing the off-duty firefighters and volunteers? Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau.

Joining Pekau in his gray Dodge Durango, and riding shotgun was Kampas – an ally and close confidante who’s known for rubber stamping anything Pekau presented during Village board meetings.

And during community events, Kampas, an IT consultant, was often seen wearing an official Orland Park Police Emergency Services polo with an official police badge attached to his belt – giving the impression that he is a member of law enforcement. In Illinois, it is unlawful to impersonate a police officer, and a Class 4 Felony, punishable by up to three years in jail and $25,000 in fines.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/04/keith-pekau-loses-in-a-landslide-as-orland-park-voters-deliver-madman-mayor-humiliating-defeat-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau, top right, walking to the front to address a nearly-empty room at the Orland Park Public Library on March 22, 2023. (Source: Illinois Review)
In February, the Illinois State Board of Elections ruled unanimously (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/02/state-election-board-vindicates-illinois-review-in-6-0-vote-as-mayor-pekau-allies-fail-to-silence-conservative-voice.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) 6-0 in favor of Illinois Review after allies of Mayor Pekau filed a frivolous case in 2023 meant to intimidate and silence the state’s largest conservative news publication.

During a hearing in downtown Chicago this past winter, ISBE general counsel Marni Malowitz characterized the complaint against IR as “impinging on First Amendment rights.”

On August 1, 2023, Illinois Review broke
news (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/08/mayor-keith-pekau-was-running-federal-congressional-campaign-raising-money-from-city-contractors-from-taxpayer-funded-village-hall-foia-requests-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) that Pekau and his village trustees were using taxpayer-funded village resources to run his failed congressional campaign against incumbent U.S. Rep. Sean Casten (D-IL).

Days later, William Healy, an Orland Park village trustee, filed a complaint against Illinois Review General Counsel Scott Kaspar. Healy, a CPA, remains under
investigation (https://www.chicagotribune.com/2022/10/12/column-complaint-accuses-orland-park-mayor-keith-pekau-of-using-mayoral-campaign-funds-for-congressional-bid/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) by the Federal Election Commission for allegedly comingling state and federal campaign contributions relating to Mayor Pekau’s failed congressional bid, where he served as treasurer.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/04/keith-pekau-loses-in-a-landslide-as-orland-park-voters-deliver-madman-mayor-humiliating-defeat-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Ramzi Hassan and Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau. Hassan is a major campaign donor to both Pekau and then-Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot. (Facebook/Edwards Realty)
At a preliminary hearing in October 2023, the ISBE hearing officer found that Kaspar and IR editor-in-chief Mark Vargas had done nothing wrong – and that Illinois Review was an independent and long-standing news organization not under the purview of the Board’s election authority.

For the last several years, IR has published dozens of
articles (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/tag/keith-pekau?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) highlighting and exposing Peaku’s attempts at a power grab, how he favored big donors and city contractors over residents, his bullying tactics and how he used fake news websites (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/mayor-keith-pekau-used-fake-news-websites-to-control-the-narrative-ensuring-favorable-coverage-publishing-over-70-stories-since-2017.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) to control the narrative and ensure favorable news coverage.

Speaking to a small group of supporters on Tuesday evening, Peakau
conceded (https://www.chicagotribune.com/2025/04/01/orland-park-mayoral-race-results/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) .

“I got shellacked.”

The defeated mayor continued,

“I did what I could. Obviously, the people spoke.”

Beth Damas Kaspar and her Orland Park Fire Protection District Board of Trustee candidates including Donald Jeffers and Bridget Tolan had a big night as well. For the last several weeks, Pekau and his allies, including Cook County Commissioner Sean Morrison viciously attacked the candidates and their families on social media.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/03/il-gop-funds-mailer-opposing-trump-delegate-as-state-party-remains-target-in-federal-postal-service-investigation.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
A mailer indicating that it is “Paid for by the Illinois Republican Party” endorsing certain preferred candidates against Republican incumbent Beth Damas of Orland Park, Illinois. (Source: Illinois Review)
The Illinois Republican Party even paid for a mailer (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/03/il-gop-funds-mailer-opposing-trump-delegate-as-state-party-remains-target-in-federal-postal-service-investigation.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c9b86a8527-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) supporting Pekau’s slate of candidates running against Damas’ slate. But even that fell short on election night.

In a big way.

Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump. Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () Keith Pekau Loses in a Landslide as Orland Park Voters Deliver ‘Madman’ Mayor Humiliating Defeat in Election Night Disaster () Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau, left, talks to supporters April 1, 2025, after conceding his race for a third term to former trustee Jim Dodge. (Mike Nolan/Daily Southtown) By Illinois Review Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau – known for publicly harassing and intimidating constituents, lost his re-election by a landslide as voters sent a clear message – electing former trustee Jim Dodge by a 15-point margin, 57-42. In a statement released on the Orland Park for All facebook page, Dodge declared victory, but kept to a non-partisan tone. “This is the first day, or the onset, to a return to dignity where we will bring back respect, transparency, and civility to Orland Park. Together, we will breathe new life into our community, ensuring that every voice is heard and valued.” Dodge’s slate, Orland Park for All swept election night, as voters resoundingly rejected Pekau’s People Over Politics slate. Mary Ruan Norwell was elected Clerk, while Dina M. Lawrence, Joanna M. Liotine Leafblad and John Lawler easily won their trustee races. Orland Park Mayoral candidate Jim Dodge celebrates with District 135 school board member Nicole Browner during the election night party at Blissful Banana restaurant in Orland Park on April 1, 2025. (James C. Svehla/for the Daily Southtown) Pekau’s entire slate of trustee candidates were all defeated, including incumbents Brian Riordan and Sean Kampas. Carol McGury also lost by six points. Kampas became infamous () after this publication revealed in March 2023 that he was heckling and following a group of Orland Fire Protection District candidates in a vehicle as a form of harassment and intimidation while they knocked on doors. The driver of the vehicle harassing the off-duty firefighters and volunteers? Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau. Joining Pekau in his gray Dodge Durango, and riding shotgun was Kampas – an ally and close confidante who’s known for rubber stamping anything Pekau presented during Village board meetings. And during community events, Kampas, an IT consultant, was often seen wearing an official Orland Park Police Emergency Services polo with an official police badge attached to his belt – giving the impression that he is a member of law enforcement. In Illinois, it is unlawful to impersonate a police officer, and a Class 4 Felony, punishable by up to three years in jail and $25,000 in fines. Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau, top right, walking to the front to address a nearly-empty room at the Orland Park Public Library on March 22, 2023. (Source: Illinois Review) In February, the Illinois State Board of Elections ruled unanimously () 6-0 in favor of Illinois Review after allies of Mayor Pekau filed a frivolous case in 2023 meant to intimidate and silence the state’s largest conservative news publication. During a hearing in downtown Chicago this past winter, ISBE general counsel Marni Malowitz characterized the complaint against IR as “impinging on First Amendment rights.” On August 1, 2023, Illinois Review broke news () that Pekau and his village trustees were using taxpayer-funded village resources to run his failed congressional campaign against incumbent U.S. Rep. Sean Casten (D-IL). Days later, William Healy, an Orland Park village trustee, filed a complaint against Illinois Review General Counsel Scott Kaspar. Healy, a CPA, remains under investigation () by the Federal Election Commission for allegedly comingling state and federal campaign contributions relating to Mayor Pekau’s failed congressional bid, where he served as treasurer. Ramzi Hassan and Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau. Hassan is a major campaign donor to both Pekau and then-Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot. (Facebook/Edwards Realty) At a preliminary hearing in October 2023, the ISBE hearing officer found that Kaspar and IR editor-in-chief Mark Vargas had done nothing wrong – and that Illinois Review was an independent and long-standing news organization not under the purview of the Board’s election authority. For the last several years, IR has published dozens of articles () highlighting and exposing Peaku’s attempts at a power grab, how he favored big donors and city contractors over residents, his bullying tactics and how he used fake news websites () to control the narrative and ensure favorable news coverage. Speaking to a small group of supporters on Tuesday evening, Peakau conceded () . “I got shellacked.” The defeated mayor continued, “I did what I could. Obviously, the people spoke.” Beth Damas Kaspar and her Orland Park Fire Protection District Board of Trustee candidates including Donald Jeffers and Bridget Tolan had a big night as well. For the last several weeks, Pekau and his allies, including Cook County Commissioner Sean Morrison viciously attacked the candidates and their families on social media. A mailer indicating that it is “Paid for by the Illinois Republican Party” endorsing certain preferred candidates against Republican incumbent Beth Damas of Orland Park, Illinois. (Source: Illinois Review) The Illinois Republican Party even paid for a mailer () supporting Pekau’s slate of candidates running against Damas’ slate. But even that fell short on election night. In a big way. name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: I’m running to fight for you in the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Today, I’m launching my campaign for the U.S. Senate. Point blank, we need new leaders in Washington who will call out the BS
#
_You are receiving this email because of your past support for Democrats in competitive races. If you would like to unsubscribe,[please click here to opt out.](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee?t=1&akid=8864%2E614464%2E5LlEHf)_
---
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87635?refcode=em20250402-8864&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8864%2E614464%2E5LlEHf)
Peter,
**Today, I’m launching my campaign for the U.S. Senate. Point blank, we need new leaders in Washington who will call out the bullshit.**
**[I’m going to share more about why I’m running. But before I do, if you’re like me and are done with the BS coming from Washington, please split a gift between our campaign and State Democrats Committee now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87635?refcode=em20250402-8864&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8864%2E614464%2E5LlEHf)**
Now I want to tell you a story. I never thought I’d be in politics. But after the 2016 election, like a lot of us, I was fed up. Politics should be about service, not self-interest. And not building up your own power by tearing others down. So I googled _“how to run for office.”_
Seriously.
I took on a state Senate race in Michigan no one thought we could win. I took on an incumbent state Senator who _refused_ to do anything about the epidemic of gun violence, who sided with corporate polluters over protecting our clean water, and who didn’t represent _us_.
Democrats and Republicans counted me out because I was young. Because I had never run for office before. Because it **_“wasn’t my turn.”_** But with the help of over 500(!) local volunteers, I swung a Republican-held state Senate seat 20 points and flipped a district that included Mitt Romney’s hometown. That victory sent me to the Michigan State Senate.
**_My approach in the Michigan State Senate is the same approach I’ll take in the U.S. Senate: no bullshit._**
Voters know BS. I’ve called BS out in the State Senate and that’s what I’ll do as U.S. Senator.
Right now, we’re at a crossroads. Donald Trump and Elon Musk are trying to overwhelm us. That’s their plan; they want us to feel powerless. **But we are not powerless.**
The reality is there’s a lot in common between this moment today and that moment in 2016 when I googled how to run for office. But what that means is that we know _exactly_ how to rise to this moment.
This is not a moment for weakness. This is the time to put our heads down and get to work. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. This moment, and what happens next, is on all of us. I will never try to convince you that I have all the answers. Just voting for the right person isn’t going to fix everything. But together, I know we can show Michigan — and the rest of the country — how powerful we really are. Let’s create the future we want to see, together.
**[So please join me in building that future: make a contribution of whatever you can, split between our campaign and State Democrats Committee to become a founding donor of my campaign for U.S. Senate.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87635?refcode=em20250402-8864&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8864%2E614464%2E5LlEHf)**
**[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87635?refcode=em20250402-8864&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=8864%2E614464%2E5LlEHf)**
Thank you,
Mallory

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=6&akid=8864%2E614464%2E5LlEHf).

name: California Dems
subject: Schiff and Padilla join Cory Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Dear friends — did you see this?
Yesterday, Senators Alex Padilla and Adam Schiff joined Senator Cory Booker in holding the Senate floor to stand up to President Trump, Elon Musk, and this chaotic administration.
As you may know, Senator Booker broke the record for time holding the Senate floor with his over 24-hour marathon speech. This demonstration gave voice to the millions of Americans being harmed and ignored by the Trump Administration.
Our own Senators Alex Padilla and Adam Schiff joined the filibuster-like event, both asking questions during the speech that allowed Senator Booker to take breaks.
Senator Padilla praised Booker for his passion and empathy and highlighted the consequences of the President’s reckless actions for healthcare, disaster aid, and the climate crisis.
Senator Schiff described how the Trump administration's actions are an attack on American democracy.
This is what it means to be California Strong. Standing up to bullies and standing with your friends.
Will you rush a donation right now to help us fund and support our California Strong leaders like Senator Padilla and Schiff? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april25?refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april25?&refcode=&amount=]Here’s a little bit of what Adam Schiff said on the Senate floor:
“We look at institution after institution, and we see the guardrails of our democracy coming down. We see an assault on the rule of law unlike anything we have seen in modern history, maybe in the entire history of the United States of America, and why? Because they can. Because they feel that they can.”
And here’s a little bit of what Senator Padilla said:
“I know I’m angry with so much of what’s going on, and the American people have every right to be angry with what’s going on because none of what we’re seeing come out of the Trump White House is normal. But every day, this approach of ‘flooding the zone’ with more and more extreme actions runs the risk of making people grow numb to these attacks. And we certainly can’t surrender to the feeling of just being overwhelmed by their tactics. ”
We couldn’t agree more. We can’t let ourselves be overwhelmed. We can’t surrender.
That’s why the California Democratic Party has been hitting the pavement this past month. We arranged massive phone bank campaigns to hold Republicans accountable for trying to gut Medicaid to pay for billionaire tax cuts.
We even held a town hall in one of the most vulnerable GOP-held swing seats in the state.
But we’ve heard this call to action from Senator Booker and our own Senators Padilla and Schiff. We resolve to do even more.
Will you help? Please pitch in $ or $ to fund our organizing campaigns up and down the state. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april25?refcode=&amount=]

CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april25?&refcode=&amount=]Thank you!
- CADEM

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=&amount=20.24]
Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.
If this email was forwarded to you, please sign up for our email list here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zWMh-KAhmUiJYxMzOxKADQ2]
We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, let us know here to sign up for fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/60txJAHUg0OznGGaWVwO_A2]
And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.cadem.org/p/BZcF64X0Zkie6fv4FEU9PQ2?unsubscribedata=S%2BKsLi2K%2FRyRkjRwTAL8n4O1GhfK%2BflMm5nc49%2BQn2e%2BM%2BG5rPDals1qIXWq2FYAtvQCnMm1atCwsJfR6pYRqxWRRiEWnJBeqfsCv7%2BbytQwPjByEWQljI9zaYuzS8K7hX0utLySKuJFr0gaw3TT1aylX6JNDrlwvuK8bSpK8jEmLXUf3NPS%2BlY2%2BYwXDOIH%2BtWv%2BL2O%2F1tav48qPrdF42mn2nvC%2BwNwdzfFCJszwOPk9PIHi9tYl2j6eGDrYFp%2BQvWKWDYpsLpGntNNJmcGVqaSkNMIiNbKOF9TsCkIOJTYLbj%2BByS9mAjujB5unwWllK6x%2B1SddlLS4%2B7MO%2Bc62a8DWgyF1mOLKpYhwOCFI8XybxEl%2FYSH8tnpO4AP2JGhbzHAM3E7dS7gyf%2BGzw5xOGNuuBxxCZiU2Jp9YqVztSk%3D .

One of the agencies DOGE helped cut was a nest of corruption:
🚨 The agency's director pretended to be on a years-long business trip--so YOU paid his meals and expenses.

🚨 Employees "unblocked" their government credit cards to lease BMWs, cover their spouses' cell phone bills, and fund personal luxuries.

🚨 Top officials commissioned expensive portraits of themselves--one even used taxpayer funds to buy artwork painted by his wife.
**[One agency. Billions wasted.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/4CFUOnRY73udHR3PQrgScQ~~/AAVLBhA~/J9UgkHo9_CZeIh5jP1qdEHDvYUtXT8lyIsMW62vqFNUe1lYMA4XY1_3Yp29HG0D81FPbGM-DeBSknHhEGLV4Zr6gWDhVq29BUwD6-ljQYwgkbu_iWL2hb8jqIc97nrUyX8jkxIA4zKic3yU1hzKV-a3EyqWtN40CQ9LH6PgaXk8X4lEf_XhzgHzqMfGqmo7ulYWWlXicHMaDrAZbeAQMKi6-aqM8XKVoe1wadNje0szB5E-tJx9jODF4PFTkYrwnvHpSdo8jWL5r0jMZsqmHFzTCLRWA7zuWuz0FI-83LYCArhicGIHfNzdWwvWDed_4Hiam6Zaf5U0pUtbX196nc-JDIWfvGHDF00jNg1rXf8E~)**

name: Judicial Survey (via NRSC)
subject: What does your ideal federal judge look like?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend,

We're now seeing the consequences firsthand of having radical, leftist federal judges...
* _An Obama judge just blocked a major part of President Trump 's immigration policy_

* _A Biden judge issued a "temporary restraining order" against DOGE_

* _A Clinton judge blocked President Trump from firing executive branch employees_

When Democrats can't win at the ballot box, they resort to legislating from the courts!

Republicans will do everything in our power to **[FIGHT BACK](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/4r8AFc9WhvRo8xfSQkgZeQ~~/AAVLBhA~/7EG0t10X32j-zdU2cpkY7ooyTxhcDCFEjqOCt4s62R2pABpOHWYh3gTCyqCMCqP24X1BeMEBrQgqIeixFd48C29mvtPD-b1bDUtdTFS75-rOeIytS88RZyQ3qSTPvzlu4CMIQHBiSc9fmV_Spqqpa4WAo3Ddw99RE-llJOy2ERrUL80l_zuw-neZEUJS_NJ53JLN7wsiLGGHbqSX0-skh7WI9tpmZnUYaumj57x3TGFldxojuZ0abprD70pOGsoeMg0YkhweUNh_VM3fjrp2krjkUx6Sk1EHaTIyihMHmbmn3UB-mNGBFp_v3lMTDGnBp8wkA-1mV-SueVqVzs7B9zPmkM-QyJ_WQS0H4__OTsL0Xdbfh593DiAmqrONLIou)** against this blatant overreach.

But we can't stop there. We need to think bigger and more long term than simply playing _defense_ against these Democrat activists. _We need to go on the offensive!_

**[Our Senate GOP Majority must spend the coming years reshaping the federal judiciary by confirming as many new conservative judges nominated by President Trump as humanly possible!](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/4r8AFc9WhvRo8xfSQkgZeQ~~/AAVLBhA~/7EG0t10X32j-zdU2cpkY7ooyTxhcDCFEjqOCt4s62R2pABpOHWYh3gTCyqCMCqP24X1BeMEBrQgqIeixFd48C29mvtPD-b1bDUtdTFS75-rOeIytS88RZyQ3qSTPvzlu4CMIQHBiSc9fmV_Spqqpa4WAo3Ddw99RE-llJOy2ERrUL80l_zuw-neZEUJS_NJ53JLN7wsiLGGHbqSX0-skh7WI9tpmZnUYaumj57x3TGFldxojuZ0abprD70pOGsoeMg0YkhweUNh_VM3fjrp2krjkUx6Sk1EHaTIyihMHmbmn3UB-mNGBFp_v3lMTDGnBp8wkA-1mV-SueVqVzs7B9zPmkM-QyJ_WQS0H4__OTsL0Xdbfh593DiAmqrONLIou)**

But before we do, we want to give _YOU_ the chance to weigh in by sharing what qualities you want to see in a federal judge.

_Do you agree that any federal judicial nominee must respect the separation of powers, the Constitution, and most importantly, the will of the American people?_

**[Please complete the NRSC's "Judicial Nominee Survey" to tell us what YOUR ideal federal judge looks like.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/4r8AFc9WhvRo8xfSQkgZeQ~~/AAVLBhA~/7EG0t10X32j-zdU2cpkY7ooyTxhcDCFEjqOCt4s62R2pABpOHWYh3gTCyqCMCqP24X1BeMEBrQgqIeixFd48C29mvtPD-b1bDUtdTFS75-rOeIytS88RZyQ3qSTPvzlu4CMIQHBiSc9fmV_Spqqpa4WAo3Ddw99RE-llJOy2ERrUL80l_zuw-neZEUJS_NJ53JLN7wsiLGGHbqSX0-skh7WI9tpmZnUYaumj57x3TGFldxojuZ0abprD70pOGsoeMg0YkhweUNh_VM3fjrp2krjkUx6Sk1EHaTIyihMHmbmn3UB-mNGBFp_v3lMTDGnBp8wkA-1mV-SueVqVzs7B9zPmkM-QyJ_WQS0H4__OTsL0Xdbfh593DiAmqrONLIou)**

Elon Musk and DOGE are under relentless, **VICIOUS ATTACKS** from the Radical Left. All because they exposed the **LARGEST FRAUD** in American history – **_Social Security._**
The current Social Security Program has **MORE** members than U.S. Citizens and participants who are **120+ years old.**
No other explanation besides **FRAUD**.
The Left is supposed to be the party of caring, peace, and acceptance – yet all we are seeing is **VIOLENCE, HATRED, AND DESTRUCTION** since the fraud exposures.
Elon and Doge are delivering on their promises to the American people, but now have targets painted on their backs because of it.
The Woke Mob is incapable of providing Americans with honest answers because let’s face it – criminals don’t snitch on themselves.
**_Elon Musk has done God’s work for America, to note a few:_**
* **SAVED BILLIONS** of taxpayer dollars.
* **EXPOSED** corrupted politicians and Democratic Elites.
* **BROUGHT** an American **HERO** home from **SPACE**.
* **SINGLE-HANDEDLY FOUGHT** to **PROTECT** your **FREEDOM** **OF SPEECH.**

So what does the Left do? They’re **DESPERATE** to paint Elon as a villain.
Those who shout the loudest have the **MOST** to hide. And the Woke Mob is **HOWLING** like never before!
This is a **CRITICAL** moment. Don’t sit back and let the Left do this to Elon.

[STAND WITH ELON NOW>>](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJyEkMGunCAUhp8Gdxo8INqFi7ZmmrZJc2_vpnc1QcCRqYBzwLHz9o3WzLbb___gO-dIN092eLSk_kQARqsjASDsIwG4va8Ol6v7_iUP335V-U38cNXWwucDvcMT9kr-vL-8mZc_bzLq99evN8Ff7-UTT4_ZPOFDWhgn7bSldZfplg2a8sy0Zc2Z4E3DmmxsqahYL2ll-kHSD7xX_cCakvZcNarsqyqzLVCoKKeMQgXACyFoz5qhlo3SqmmAcLp7CukMWiXLmFaJGIIrVHDZ1I4pzXEf7ETgFI1a0BSr9Wj0RhA4Ofvb5KNEq8McphDzIWCugr-giXHrr2M-Y5zzXZSbKfg8Jol9kKi3b9lpSe7sjLaLI6zbMTQ-yYmA2KpkcCtWLI8ghgWVIayL_ZEo6WZpL56w7ti4PLvreP6P_N_b4JPxibBOBy-TISCkC8ueAC2gIiBwWxytvxDWJVxMhq2eVztNNoqacHrZj7id7N7C3wAAAP__wDO2aw)
