name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: Ready for an April of action / Listos para un abril de acción
body:
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
In the streets for the rights and dignity of our nation's immigrants
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/2025%20Dallas%20Mega%20Marcha%20-%20pic%20collage.jpg]
We saw power in numbers over the weekend, as TOP members and staff joined thousands in downtown Dallas to march for dignity and respect for our nation’s immigrants. ALL people who call this country home — regardless of their race, nationality, or preferred language — deserve to have their fundamental rights upheld. TOP was proud to take part and be a sponsor of this Mega Marcha [https://www.megamarcha2025.com/] hosted by LULAC.
WATCH video of the march here. [https://www.cbsnews.com/texas/news/thousands-march-through-downtown-dallas-for-the-mega-march-2025/]
As Trump and MAGA try to demonize our immigrant friends, family, and neighbors, we're rejecting their white nationalist hate by showing up for one another with unwavering solidarity. It's one way how we build a bigger, bolder people-powered movement for change to meet this political moment.
For more information on TOP's participation in this march, email Iman at ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
A win for Harris County workers and our movement
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Harris%20County%20living%20wage%20raised.jpg]
WORKERS' RIGHT WIN: Harris County commissioners raised the minimum wage for county employees last week as part of a new living wage policy. This policy also raises wages of workers on county-contracted jobs.TOP members joined local labor allies to speak in support of this needed wage increase at Thursday's commissioners court meeting.
Read more about how this development will positively impact Harris County families. [https://www.houstonpublicmedia.org/articles/news/harris-county/2025/03/27/517068/harris-county-commissioners-approve-wage-increase-for-county-employees-contractors/]
Study after study has shown how higher wages for workers leads to improved worker well-being. And as the cost of everyday goods goes up (looking at you, Trump tariffs), fair labor compensation is a MUST.
For more on this policy victory, email Tiffany at thogue@organizetexas.org [thogue@organizetexas.org] .
THERE'S STILL TIME:
Demand Congress reject all Medicaid cuts
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Stop%20the%20cuts.jpg]
It’s crunch time in the federal budget process. Republicans in Congress are proposing over $2.3 TRILLION in cuts to Medicaid — cuts that will devastate working families, children, seniors, and people with disabilities. Take action with us NOW to call out these reckless cuts and spread the word about how they will harm Texans of all walks life.
If Medicaid has helped you or your family — or if you’ve seen firsthand how it supports your community — speak up and share your story!
1. Go to TOP's Instagram post [https://www.instagram.com/p/DHo__H2REdR/] and tag your member of Congress ( find out who they are here [https://www.house.gov/representatives/find-your-representative] ) to demand they reject Medicaid cuts and protect Texans' access to healthcare. Comment: 'No Cuts to our Care! #SickofitTX'
2. Fill out this quick form [https://everytexan.salsalabs.org/ProtectMedicaidandSNAPNow/index.html] to call your member of Congress and send them an email demanding they oppose these drastic cuts.
At TOP, we not only believe healthcare is a fundamental human right, we fight for it year-round through our healthcare justice organizing work. Contact Irie at ihoward@organizetexas.org [ihoward@organizetexas.org] to learn more about our efforts.
TOP Tip: Apply to join #TeamTeal
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/We%20are%20hiring%20-%20English.png]
If you or someone you know cares deeply about social justice and transforming our state so Black and Latino Texans have the political power they deserve, then check out TOP’s current job openings [https://organizetexas.org/about-top/employment/] . Don't hesitate to connect us to any talented and passionate community members you may have in mind. Feel free to email recruit@organizetexas.org [recruit@organizetexas.org] with any questions or to apply.
Español
En las calles por los derechos y la dignidad de los inmigrantes de nuestra nación
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/2025%20Dallas%20Mega%20Marcha%20-%20pic%20collage.jpg]
Durante el fin de semana, vimos la fuerza de la unión, cuando miembros y personal de TOP se unieron con miles de personas en el centro de Dallas para marchar por la dignidad y el respeto de los inmigrantes de nuestra nación. TODAS las personas que consideran este país su hogar, sin importar su raza, nacionalidad o idioma preferido, merecen que se respeten sus derechos fundamentales. TOP estuvo orgulloso de participar y patrocinar esta Mega Marcha [https://www.megamarcha2025.com/] organizada por LULAC.
VEA el video de la marcha aquí. [https://www.cbsnews.com/texas/news/thousands-march-through-downtown-dallas-for-the-mega-march-2025/]
Mientras Trump y MAGA intentan demonizar a nuestros amigos, familiares y vecinos inmigrantes, rechazamos su odio nacionalista blanco apoyándonos mutuamente con una solidaridad inquebrantable. Es una forma de construir un movimiento popular más grande y audaz por el cambio para afrontar este momento político.
Para más información sobre la participación de TOP en esta marcha, escriba a Iman a ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
Una victoria para los trabajadores del condado de Harris y nuestro movimiento
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Harris%20County%20living%20wage%20raised.jpg]
VICTORIA LABORAL: La semana pasada, los comisionados del Condado de Harris aumentaron el salario mínimo para sus empleados como parte de una nueva póliza de salario digno. Esta póliza también aumenta los salarios de los trabajadores contratados por el condado. Miembros de TOP se unieron a aliados sindicales locales para expresar su apoyo a este necesario aumento salarial en la reunión del tribunal de comisionados del jueves.
Lea más sobre cómo este avance impactará positivamente a las familias del Condado de Harris. [https://www.houstonpublicmedia.org/articles/news/harris-county/2025/03/27/517068/harris-county-commissioners-approve-wage-increase-for-county-employees-contractors/]
Estudios tras estudios han demostrado cómo un aumento salarial para los trabajadores se traduce en un mayor bienestar. Y a medida que aumenta el costo de los bienes cotidianos (nos referimos a ustedes, los aranceles de Trump), una compensación laboral justa es IMPRESCINDIBLE.
Para más información sobre esta victoria política, escriba a Tiffany a thogue@organizetexas.org [thogue@organizetexas.org] .
TODAVÍA HAY TIEMPO:
Exigir al Congreso que rechace todos los recortes a Medicaid
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Stop%20the%20cuts.jpg]
Es un momento crucial en el proceso presupuestario federal. Los republicanos en el Congreso proponen más de $2.3 billones en recortes a Medicaid, recortes que devastarán a las familias trabajadoras, los niños, las personas mayores y las personas con discapacidad. Únase a nosotros AHORA para denunciar estos recortes imprudentes y difundir cómo perjudicarán a los tejanos de todos los ámbitos.
Si Medicaid les ha ayudado a usted o a su familia, o si ha visto de primera mano cómo apoya a su comunidad, ¡alce la voz y comparta su historia!
1. Visite la publicación de TOP en Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/p/DHo__H2REdR/] y etiquete a su congresista ( descúbralo aquí [https://www.house.gov/representatives/find-your-representative] ) para exigir que rechace los recortes a Medicaid y proteja el acceso de los tejanos a la atención médica. Comente: "¡No a los recortes en nuestra atención médica! #SickofitTX"
2. Complete este breve formulario [https://everytexan.salsalabs.org/ProtectMedicaidandSNAPNow/index.html] para llamar a su congresista y enviarle un correo electrónico exigiéndole que se oponga a estos drásticos recortes.
En TOP, no solo creemos que la atención médica es un derecho humano fundamental, sino que luchamos por ella todo el año a través de nuestro trabajo de organización por la justicia en la atención médica.
Comuníquese con Irie en ihoward@organizetexas.org [ihoward@organizetexas.org] para obtener más información sobre nuestros esfuerzos.
Consejos de TOP: Solicita unirte al #TeamTeal
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Spanish%20-%20we%20are%20hiring.png]
Si a ti o a alguien que conoces le importa la justicia social y la transformación de nuestro estado para que la comunidad negra y latina de Texas tenga el poder político que merece, consulta las vacantes actuales de TOP [https://organizetexas.org/about-top/employment/] . No dudes en ponerte en contacto con cualquier miembro talentoso y apasionado de la comunidad que tengas en mente. Si tienes alguna pregunta o quieres postularte, escríbenos a recruit@organizetexas.org [recruit@organizetexas.org] .

Texas Organizing Project
700 S. Zarzamora, Suite 212
San Antonio, TX 78207
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=KmpHtjoEq%2FKcdpMN1MhnOvhjdafU0%2BK8rPZd6aaFzqEMS1CYNZtLx%2BbM3W3y%2B1FmlBYVEHQd8yzq9nKuIad9dPWWgK4uWnqcFigr4u3YZm123sfPdWE0beaWKV9W5OiMHPc1Txu9Zv%2BMmC8bfj9Lo4OZNRGogw7MWBZRy6lj51rQkIdYshu%2FV8L2fLfRIIzncY2YK3YtEnvw9M2s9wZGUDqGBvOUOOFJnCgcATHVd7nTNo8KRYbmWAAlnm40uJswmCSQea%2FUzxU%2FEttfxDHB1H%2FuuRQe%2BwI1RP%2FAfxGDLpkyVEnVgI3jGhakdSpcus2TvskNPL72wW%2BLSU1kMZh7l2Sppx8t05xL%2B5odfjW5odZCA6N0LYq9pY0mnP1b3odzt7qlRLtM02C9geSWx47UlSdWIQwEPhj31Wv3GlCfDcA%3D .
clean_body: Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español] In the streets for the rights and dignity of our nation's immigrants [] We saw power in numbers over the weekend, as TOP members and staff joined thousands in downtown Dallas to march for dignity and respect for our nation’s immigrants. ALL people who call this country home — regardless of their race, nationality, or preferred language — deserve to have their fundamental rights upheld. TOP was proud to take part and be a sponsor of this Mega Marcha [] hosted by LULAC. WATCH video of the march here. [] As Trump and MAGA try to demonize our immigrant friends, family, and neighbors, we're rejecting their white nationalist hate by showing up for one another with unwavering solidarity. It's one way how we build a bigger, bolder people-powered movement for change to meet this political moment. For more information on TOP's participation in this march, email Iman at ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] . A win for Harris County workers and our movement [] WORKERS' RIGHT WIN: Harris County commissioners raised the minimum wage for county employees last week as part of a new living wage policy. This policy also raises wages of workers on county-contracted jobs.TOP members joined local labor allies to speak in support of this needed wage increase at Thursday's commissioners court meeting. Read more about how this development will positively impact Harris County families. [] Study after study has shown how higher wages for workers leads to improved worker well-being. And as the cost of everyday goods goes up (looking at you, Trump tariffs), fair labor compensation is a MUST. For more on this policy victory, email Tiffany at thogue@organizetexas.org [thogue@organizetexas.org] . THERE'S STILL TIME: Demand Congress reject all Medicaid cuts [] It’s crunch time in the federal budget process. Republicans in Congress are proposing over $2.3 TRILLION in cuts to Medicaid — cuts that will devastate working families, children, seniors, and people with disabilities. Take action with us NOW to call out these reckless cuts and spread the word about how they will harm Texans of all walks life. If Medicaid has helped you or your family — or if you’ve seen firsthand how it supports your community — speak up and share your story! 1. Go to TOP's Instagram post [] and tag your member of Congress ( find out who they are here [] ) to demand they reject Medicaid cuts and protect Texans' access to healthcare. Comment: 'No Cuts to our Care! #SickofitTX' 2. Fill out this quick form [] to call your member of Congress and send them an email demanding they oppose these drastic cuts. At TOP, we not only believe healthcare is a fundamental human right, we fight for it year-round through our healthcare justice organizing work. Contact Irie at ihoward@organizetexas.org [ihoward@organizetexas.org] to learn more about our efforts. TOP Tip: Apply to join #TeamTeal [] If you or someone you know cares deeply about social justice and transforming our state so Black and Latino Texans have the political power they deserve, then check out TOP’s current job openings [] . Don't hesitate to connect us to any talented and passionate community members you may have in mind. Feel free to email recruit@organizetexas.org [recruit@organizetexas.org] with any questions or to apply. name: House Republican Leadership
subject: SCREAMING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This really isn’t good

|
---
| | | Friend - we're trying not to scream.

We told you once. We told you twice. **But still, not enough patriots have stepped up to help us meet our FIRST end-of-quarter goal TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT.**

The truth is, we're falling SERIOUSLY behind, and we may have to tell leadership that the House Republican majority MISSED our end-of-quarter goal.

_The last thing we want to have to do is to go to leadership with our heads hung low in disappointment._

This is our last and FINAL chance to meet this goal. That's why generous Republicans who know how important this deadline is have agreed to **2X MATCH all contributions until midnight tonight!**

But if you don't chip in, this incredible opportunity is POINTLESS!

_**[Things are coming down to the wire. Can you chip in before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to activate your match and help us CRUSH our end-of-quarter goal?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zp6oorhuhhk3ocemdf3sj4f7fsoq29euht3nt998_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm2ob5cph2bs "Things are coming down to the wire. name: MAGA Update
subject: Trump is Unleashing a Taxpayer Gold Rush.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the West Virginia Republican Party**
body:
TRUMP IS COUNTING ON YOU TO ACT RIGHT NOW!

| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zot3gm3h1d2mlhfdrco1c06t1e549625soujblr8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm2pb4c1h2bs)
---

# _**TAXPAYER GOLD RUSH!**_

### President Trump just rolled out a **TAX-CUTTING MASTERSTROKE** to put serious cash back in the pockets of hardworking Americans like **YOU**.

His plan?

**_Wipe out taxes for anyone earning under $150,000_** : a lifeline that could mean thousands more for your family, your bills, your freedom.
###

### But here’s the gut punch: Radical Left Democrats in Congress are hell-bent on **BURYING** it.
###

### These elitist swamp-dwellers are throwing every dirty trick in the book to block this game-changer—because they’d rather keep **YOU** broke and dependent than let Trump score another win for America.
###

### If they succeed, your shot at financial relief goes up in smoke, and the Left continues to waste your **HARD-EARNED MONEY**!
###

### We are calling on _150,000 fired-up MAGA patriots_ to **SLAM** the Radical Left blockade by signing our emergency petition to **FORCE** these tax cuts through Congress!
###

### **_TRUMP IS COUNTING ON YOU TO ACT RIGHT NOW!_**
###

### The stakes are sky-high.
###

### If we don’t crush this resistance **TODAY,** the Radical Dems will choke out Trump’s vision to save America, and we’ll all pay the price.
###

#

[SIGN OUR PETITION HERE!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr5ffauuvbser7vv9qet2isncavsauu9tujrimqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm2pb4c1h2bs)

name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: We can win in California again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026
body:
Kamala Harris is gearing up for the California Governor’s race.

| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff. As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over one billion dollars.It’s a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my home safe is the best job in the world.
---
| | Throughout my career in law enforcement, I have fought back against the pro-criminal policies coming out of Sacramento. We have held the line and kept Riverside County safe. Now, the threat that the Democrat leadership poses to our communities is graver than ever before.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt870r8pcm09vpej1q7eva6n8h19ejlaqd4ideco_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm2ob5cph2bs)
---
| | That’s because Kamala Harris is positioning herself to run for Governor of California. **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat radical Kamala Harris in the race for California Governor.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqrku3biue091n1vroe0llcbnd01r1kk5bsbep10_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm2ob5cph2bs)** Californians are waking up to how disastrous these years of Democrat rule have been. There is no better way to highlight that failure than putting myself, a Sheriff who has spent decades defending law and order, up against Kamala Harris, who as Attorney General oversaw the severe decline in public safety that we are living with today.Kamala Harris, Karen Bass, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff want us to forget the harm that Democrat rule has caused to California.But you know how these years have been:
---
* Democrats’ lack of preparation and water management allowed wildfires to ravage the state, while Karen Bass and Gavin Newsom were nowhere to be found.
* Despite Democrats spending hundreds of millions to “fix” it—crime, homelessness, and drug addiction skyrocketed.
* Democrats wasted billions of dollars on “high-speed rail” with nothing to show for it.

---
As they say: fool me once, shame on you... Fool me twice, shame on me.Well Californians ought to be ashamed.There’s rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is unbearable...Californians are being taxed to death just to watch their hard-earned dollars go towards fighting against Trump’s common-sense policies like wildfire prevention, immigration reform, and water storage improvement.These California Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they _welcome_ the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And I wouldn’t blame you if you said, “Chad, I’m afraid California’s best days are behind us.”But listen, here’s something you need to remember...**_Republicans turned things around_ by electing Ronald Reagan as Governor of California.****_And we can do that again_**. **But there’s no way I can pull it off without you.****[That’s why I’m asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5ujt84f8sd58indul4bb18qr93pmog92pf7apuo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm2ob5cph2bs)** More and more everyday Americans are waking up to the harm that years of Democrat rule has caused them, and they are turning their backs on the party that betrayed them. A recent statewide poll showed Gov. Gavin Newsom's approval rating among likely voters at 44%. The number for the state legislature is even lower, with a 40% approval rating. Fewer than 20% of L.A. residents give Mayor Karen Bass high marks for fire response. Six in 10 voters said they felt the state was going in the wrong direction. The polling for Republicans has never been stronger in 20 years because of the dissatisfaction with the Democrats controlling their government.The time is right...But California is massive. We need to ignite a massive grassroots movement to compete across all 163,696 square miles and in all 58 counties. **[**When you rush your Bianco for California contribution of $35 or more...**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8qstv3c1vt4h3d3sbfelnq0s8esjuomqpspd430_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm2ob5cph2bs)**...you’re helping us fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: _You don’t have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free.__**We rely on everyday Americans like you**_ — _Not liberal Hollywood elites_ —to fund this campaign. **[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in to my campaign and give us the resources we need to go up against the Kamala Harris fundraising goliath.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5r9f9vib2ei8dknfs9s9nhnc7l9mvnc2410flro_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm2ob5cph2bs)** The Democrat machine that raised a billion dollars for Kamala Harris is going to come out in full force in her home state of California. But people are fed up with her, with her incompetence, and with the years of Democrat rule.Even if she outraises me 10-to-1, I’ll have a good fighting chance.This race is the toughest in the nation. But I have been doing something just as tough—tackling crime in California.Here is what Democrats don’t understand about the crime problem: when someone breaks the law or is a violent repeat offender, you put them in jail. It’s not a systemic or societal problem. Or a racism problem. It is an accountability problem.I’ve been wrangling criminals without help from these Democrats for years.And despite Liberal politicians and the local media trying to get rid of me, I’ve won two terms as Sheriff.That’s how you can know I’m the man for the job.Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win statewide in California as a Republican.When we win here... defeating Kamala Harris for the second time......we become the line of defense against these failed liberal policies spreading to the rest of the country.And we stop Kamala Harris, or whoever the Democrats put up for Governor, from using California as a liberal launchpad for their extremist agenda.It all depends on you!
---
| | [ **DONATE **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zshi19tmdk1sikohob4nd8b8a7fjbenfpmmlu7qo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm2ob5cph2bs)
---
Thank you and God Bless,Sheriff Chad Bianco

body:

|

name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: We can win in California again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026
body:
Kamala Harris is gearing up for the California Governor’s race.

| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff. As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over one billion dollars.It’s a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my home safe is the best job in the world.
---
| | Throughout my career in law enforcement, I have fought back against the pro-criminal policies coming out of Sacramento. We have held the line and kept Riverside County safe. Now, the threat that the Democrat leadership poses to our communities is graver than ever before.
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z26p8dqjhl2sl61ean4vj855i667s8am4tnhak20_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjmapj6c9h2bs)
---
| | That’s because Kamala Harris is positioning herself to run for Governor of California. **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat radical Kamala Harris in the race for California Governor.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z22igt7eupgtgf1m9f12b7cb7ok0q5gi6tpnuseg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjmapj6c9h2bs)** Californians are waking up to how disastrous these years of Democrat rule have been. There is no better way to highlight that failure than putting myself, a Sheriff who has spent decades defending law and order, up against Kamala Harris, who as Attorney General oversaw the severe decline in public safety that we are living with today.Kamala Harris, Karen Bass, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff want us to forget the harm that Democrat rule has caused to California.But you know how these years have been:
---
* Democrats’ lack of preparation and water management allowed wildfires to ravage the state, while Karen Bass and Gavin Newsom were nowhere to be found.
* Despite Democrats spending hundreds of millions to “fix” it—crime, homelessness, and drug addiction skyrocketed.
* Democrats wasted billions of dollars on “high-speed rail” with nothing to show for it.

---
As they say: fool me once, shame on you... Fool me twice, shame on me.Well Californians ought to be ashamed.There’s rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is unbearable...Californians are being taxed to death just to watch their hard-earned dollars go towards fighting against Trump’s common-sense policies like wildfire prevention, immigration reform, and water storage improvement.These California Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they _welcome_ the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And I wouldn’t blame you if you said, “Chad, I’m afraid California’s best days are behind us.”But listen, here’s something you need to remember...**_Republicans turned things around_ by electing Ronald Reagan as Governor of California.****_And we can do that again_**. **But there’s no way I can pull it off without you.****[That’s why I’m asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj9sblqicb1ahj4ggc9e13dsm887aapdfjmauqo8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjmapj6c9h2bs)** More and more everyday Americans are waking up to the harm that years of Democrat rule has caused them, and they are turning their backs on the party that betrayed them. A recent statewide poll showed Gov. Gavin Newsom's approval rating among likely voters at 44%. The number for the state legislature is even lower, with a 40% approval rating. Fewer than 20% of L.A. residents give Mayor Karen Bass high marks for fire response. Six in 10 voters said they felt the state was going in the wrong direction. The polling for Republicans has never been stronger in 20 years because of the dissatisfaction with the Democrats controlling their government.The time is right...But California is massive. We need to ignite a massive grassroots movement to compete across all 163,696 square miles and in all 58 counties. **[**When you rush your Bianco for California contribution of $35 or more...**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztrpk13cpbn0q8bp4cljq875cv4c2nlugn31o6no_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjmapj6c9h2bs)**...you’re helping us fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: _You don’t have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free.__**We rely on everyday Americans like you**_ — _Not liberal Hollywood elites_ —to fund this campaign. **[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in to my campaign and give us the resources we need to go up against the Kamala Harris fundraising goliath.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlkljf6qnat3jb8opioamafkkvfsj2oqpg38iuto_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjmapj6c9h2bs)** The Democrat machine that raised a billion dollars for Kamala Harris is going to come out in full force in her home state of California. But people are fed up with her, with her incompetence, and with the years of Democrat rule.Even if she outraises me 10-to-1, I’ll have a good fighting chance.This race is the toughest in the nation. But I have been doing something just as tough—tackling crime in California.Here is what Democrats don’t understand about the crime problem: when someone breaks the law or is a violent repeat offender, you put them in jail. It’s not a systemic or societal problem. Or a racism problem. It is an accountability problem.I’ve been wrangling criminals without help from these Democrats for years.And despite Liberal politicians and the local media trying to get rid of me, I’ve won two terms as Sheriff.That’s how you can know I’m the man for the job.Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win statewide in California as a Republican.When we win here... defeating Kamala Harris for the second time......we become the line of defense against these failed liberal policies spreading to the rest of the country.And we stop Kamala Harris, or whoever the Democrats put up for Governor, from using California as a liberal launchpad for their extremist agenda.It all depends on you!
---
| | [ **DONATE **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqd9n67944l5ig8dvbsueegijtutg22ovntn09r8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjmapj6c9h2bs)
---
Thank you and God Bless,Sheriff Chad Bianco
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zovsoal1nprs6c0ct9cslc8kf2f9i4s78ko0goig_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjmapj6c9h2bs)
---
Chad Bianco For Governor
---

---

---

But people are fed up with her, with her incompetence, and with the years of Democrat rule.Even if she outraises me 10-to-1, I’ll have a good fighting chance.This race is the toughest in the nation. But I have been doing something just as tough—tackling crime in California.Here is what Democrats don’t understand about the crime problem: when someone breaks the law or is a violent repeat offender, you put them in jail. It’s not a systemic or societal problem. Or a racism problem. It is an accountability problem.I’ve been wrangling criminals without help from these Democrats for years.And despite Liberal politicians and the local media trying to get rid of me, I’ve won two terms as Sheriff.That’s how you can know I’m the man for the job.Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win statewide in California as a Republican.When we win here... defeating Kamala Harris for the second time......we become the line of defense against these failed liberal policies spreading to the rest of the country.And we stop Kamala Harris, or whoever the Democrats put up for Governor, from using California as a liberal launchpad for their extremist agenda.It all depends on you! | | Thank you and God Bless,Sheriff Chad Bianco Chad Bianco For Governor | | Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026 PO Box 706Riverside, CA 92502 Pop Acta Media | Update For America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Defeat DEI Survey
body:
DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications.

This sponsored message from First Look is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0t3curgld0a63n29fv02fg6tnlp6qcbn3fcr4qg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm1o34chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zabksoi8hd0av6ckso1li6uvvcq8od7fgbe5dc38_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm1o34chh2bs).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3qc0munjujcmltgjd3o1cjibhn3cj8kfsehnlao_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm1o34chh2bs)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

name: Leader Scalise
subject: We need to talk about Tuesday’s election…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m not making a mountain out of a molehill here.

| |
---
| | | We need to**** talk about Tuesday's election...

First off, I want to personally welcome MAGA warriors Jimmy Patronis and Randy Fine to our House Republican ranks. They will play an essential role in passing President Trump's agenda. _**[Now I need to level with you for a moment. That's why I'm coming to you with three pressing updates:](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdvv7l89rkr756n7aj317i9evgpiokf38tcr8ano_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm1o32cph2bs "Now I need to level with you for a moment. That’s why I’m coming to you with three pressing updates:")**_
1. We got shellacked in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race - the Liberal outspent the Conservative candidate by DOUBLE
2. Multiple House seats in Wisconsin are now in serious jeopardy - our Conservative Majority is barely hanging on already
3. The Florida Special Elections were sobering - the Democrat in FL-06 outraised us TEN-TO-ONE

I'm not making a mountain out of a molehill here.

_President Trump 's entire legislative agenda comes to a SCREECHING HALT if this keeps happening._ We have the better ideas, we have the better candidates... but none of that matters if our message is drowned out by a wall of false and misleading Democrat attack ads.

We either rise to the occasion right now or we give up and let the Democrat Machine steamroll everything we've worked so hard for.

So that's why I'm doing something I've never done before.

I'm setting up an emergency one-million-dollar fundraising blitz between now and the end of the week. I'll need your help to get there. It's an ambitious goal but I have faith in this team. **This will help send badly needed reinforcements to the key races in Wisconsin AND fortify our defenses in other must-win races too.**

**[All I ask is that EVERYONE who recognizes the seriousness of Tuesday's elections pitches in SOMETHING!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvknccnuvdbeneqklv2rvrvlnlkfp6kmdnk7niu0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm1o32cph2bs "All I ask is that EVERYONE who recognizes the seriousness of Tuesday’s elections pitches in SOMETHING!")**
---
| | | [DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN $100](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8sror592841rarqll817rkf9jv5e048ttd3fcb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm1o32cph2bs "PITCH IN")
---
| | | [DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN $50](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zial0ltsrek4lm7f5nrmo0lgiafj3e0jt34lssog_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm1o32cph2bs "PITCH IN")
---
| | | [DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN $25](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrg5t5qrp6hrjqs3qijgk3or6fsj7penf6ri36vo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm1o32cph2bs "PITCH IN")
---
| | | [DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN $10](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvap4ngev5csijd8fnd3q8u6518qogrdh3psmhn8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm1o32cph2bs "PITCH IN")
---
Look:

If we let the Democrat Fundraising Machine keep outraising and outspending us, we're finished. It's over for our House Majority.

President Trump's ENTIRE legislative agenda hangs in the balance so I'm not holding anything back._That 's why I'm personally asking for your support today._

Unfortunately, this can't wait until next year - it can't even wait until next week.

**[Tuesday was a wake-up call for our Conservative movement so we need to move right here and right now. Can you please save the day?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z41i7o1cgqofc0eo6c3ih2k61pa1lle7b0tp46l0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm1o32cph2bs "Tuesday was a wake-up call for our Conservative movement so we need to move right here and right now. Can you please save the day?")**

I sincerely hope so.

Thanks for all you do,
- _Steve_

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

---
| |

clean_body: I’m not making a mountain out of a molehill here. | | | | | We need to** talk about Tuesday's election... First off, I want to personally welcome MAGA warriors Jimmy Patronis and Randy Fine to our House Republican ranks. They will play an essential role in passing President Trump's agenda. "Now I need to level with you for a moment. That’s why I’m coming to you with three pressing updates:" 1. Multiple House seats in Wisconsin are now in serious jeopardy - our Conservative Majority is barely hanging on already 3. name: Ron Johnson
subject: We can’t keep mortgaging our children’s future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson for Senate Inc
body:
This issue can’t be ignored

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo49tr0f5ccc66l5gt9sg179k3a23c2ftoinhgv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm1o32cph2bs)
_" I come from the private sector, and I know the time, effort and detail businesses put into preparing budgets... When it comes to spending American taxpayer dollars and the money we borrow to cover massive deficit spending, the analysis and oversight by lawmakers is woefully inadequate."_

Friend,

I first ran for Senate to use my experience in the private sector to find the conservative solutions for the issues that impact working families most - including the national debt.

**[Over the last few years, we've seen federal spending SKYROCKET for no good reason at all. That's why I'm calling for investigating all spending increases since the COVID-19 pandemic and turning DOGE's findings into actual law that debloat the government.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsi7jadlt12h7ostuvnc8fuadrj3co2rlkg5fp18_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm1o32cph2bs)**

But I need to know where you stand:

We can't keep mortaging away our children's future. **[So please - take 30 seconds or less to answer my one-question poll as we move forward on our agenda.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcudsrmui69vkjrg1ntjpfdl1ii78uj4k2aig8co_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdjm1o32cph2bs)**

Ron Johnson

name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: WisGOP Post Election Recap
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-chhlduy-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot,I'll be blunt -- yesterday did not go the way any of us wanted. Our candidates, campaigns, the state party, county parties, and outside groups gave this everything we had. I want to thank all the candidates up and down the ballot who stepped forward to represent our Conservative values on the ballot this spring, along with YOU, the grassroots, for the support network you provided to the party and our candidates.This election was the most expensive Supreme Court race in history. In 2023, the Democrats transferred millions to Protesiewicz, but Republicans did not utilize this method. In 2025, Republicans made massive strides to close the gap with Democrat spending, including transferring a record $11 million to the Schimel and Kinser campaigns. Coming off a successful November, where the win in Wisconsin put President Trump over 270, we knew the April elections would be challenging, so the party made unprecedented efforts to assist our candidates. The WisGOP maintained field staff and expanded minority outreach with four dedicated staff members focused on coalition building. We also invested in 3 targeted radio ads geared towards Hispanic and African American voters, made over 2.5 million voter contacts, and invested nearly $110,000 towards our Farm Team Initiative to win local races.In other positive news, our nationally recognized Election Integrity efforts have continued to make progress. We scored a huge victory winning the Voter ID Constitutional Amendment. Our team set a Spring Election record with over 2,700 election observer shifts filled. They addressed 370 reported election integrity issues between early voting and Election Day and worked closely with municipal clerks and counties to ensure that polls remained open despite power outages in Northern Wisconsin. I want to thank Brad Schimel and Brittany Kinser, who stepped forward to represent our Conservative values on the ballot this spring. Conservatives scored upwards of 100 victories across the state in local elections, and our campaign to enshrine Voter ID in the Constitution was recognized around the country. Looking forward, in 2026, we have the opportunity to remain united and make a stand against Tony Evers' far-left agenda and defend President Trump's America First policies. We need to keep fighting, continue strategizing, and bring victories for Republicans in the future. Keep up the fight, Chairman Brian Schimming | **PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. www.WisGOP.org Republican Party of Wisconsin **|** 148 E. Johnson Street**|** Madison, WI 53703 [Preferences](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.updatemyprofile.com/y-chhlduy-931243C5-didthutlhu-y) | [Unsubscribe](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-u-chhlduy-didthutlhu-j/)
---

name: Office of U.S. Senator Raphael Warnock
subject: Senator Warnock’s Passport Services Day
body:
|
---
Georgia,

I wanted to be the first to let you know my team is working with the Atlanta Passport Agency to host an in-person Passport Services Day in Atlanta. This one-day-only event will take place on **Thursday, April 24. Registration is required to receive in-person passport services, and appointment times will be provided upon registration.** Members of my staff and the Atlanta Passport Agency will be ready to assist with passport renewals or help first-time applicants to get the assistance you need to connect with loved ones abroad, travel for work, or simply enjoy your next great adventure.

Georgians interested in attending our Passport Services Day should scan the QR code below or register at [Warnock.senate.gov/contact/passports](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16924.21068903.7844880.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fpassports%2f&redir_log=204095048977349). Please note there is a limited availability of time slots, and registration is on a first come, first served basis. Registration will close once all time slots are filled.

As your United States Senator, providing Georgians with quality, accessible, and personable constituent services will remain a top priority for me. Please do not hesitate to reach out to my office for more information. We are ready to serve you and your families, and we hope to see you there.

**What:** Senator Reverend Warnock's Passport Services Day
**Who:** Constituent service workers with Senator Warnock's office and the Atlanta Passport Agency
**When:** Thursday, April 24 (registration required to receive an appointment time)
**Where:** Atlantic Station; 201 17th St. NW, Atlanta, GA 30363

Keep the faith, and keep looking up,

U.S. Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock

| This is official correspondence from the Office of Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock. If you have any questions, please contact our office [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16924.21068903.7844880.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fcontact-form%2f&redir_log=51402161759365).
If you need help with a federal agency, please click [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16924.21068903.7844880.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fcontact-form%2f%3fpath%3dhelp&redir_log=904232600857435).

PRIVACY POLICY: Your e-mail address will not be shared with anyone else or sold in any way.
TO UNSUBSCRIBE, PLEASE CLICK [HERE](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16924.21068903.7844880.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fnewsletter-signup%2funsubscribe%2f&redir_log=564209011866492).
---

name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: We can win in California again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026
body:
Kamala Harris is gearing up for the California Governor's race.

| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend, You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff. As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over one billion dollars. It's a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my home safe is the best job in the world.
---
| | Throughout my career in law enforcement, I have fought back against the pro-criminal policies coming out of Sacramento. We have held the line and kept Riverside County safe. Now, the threat that the Democrat leadership poses to our communities is graver than ever before.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3f3d51908640476f8ca6b3f91d9e949f&_e=G-k2u06oCcf7ne_5zYenfYdkB-4__CrRrK81K1FPF9ZfyuQOgwZeBnIJRZbanFYrrptWeO6ap6lXFK4HpjFoim8b-60Qg_8ROK3QReiLhaqgBmsrQmnbRwCcgMrcVN36Lv4OaYa3khoNGcaYzlZkVQzmXBgB_kIp8T2gkXicAW7lmBlE7uPo69H2tCdRxctG-uwskI3pCaqQti8mwr7yGmGSgNm8t0HztJGjjaDgx6kB2H7jonqNJEHG0_2RwOK2F3r_-bG1frbbeGZ8yldhCZBIziUldIM2RqoNNJtTwnG5dskZYeQ9SwjeiRoGWrx1nBWAQv0vs4AlY_K5NzjjIhYywB5JYeF-h5Reqol8EbRf5zcoQn0ZDGcFxwScheOJwjzh2_OozE_CuHz-5fUm-g%3D%3D)
---
| | That's because Kamala Harris is positioning herself to run for Governor of California. **[Today, I'm asking you to help me defeat radical Kamala Harris in the race for California Governor.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3f3d51908640476f8ca6b3f91d9e949f&_e=G-k2u06oCcf7ne_5zYenfYdkB-4__CrRrK81K1FPF9ZfyuQOgwZeBnIJRZbanFYrrptWeO6ap6lXFK4HpjFoim8b-60Qg_8ROK3QReiLhaqgBmsrQmnbRwCcgMrcVN36Lv4OaYa3khoNGcaYzlZkVQzmXBgB_kIp8T2gkXicAW7lmBlE7uPo69H2tCdRxctG-uwskI3pCaqQti8mwr7yGmGSgNm8t0HztJGjjaDgx6kB2H7jonqNJEHG0_2RwOK20mjao4Ku8PqXEi3_MGLH58svKv0uXJ_ElV-PG2IicrKRALYJgIc7rvZgCEYEwI8PA7RrRaoBRlHVH9uaI5Th3ScBIs3SaaHAdafn0rmrtE_CTdovsaKr_B01YjbhsDS1vhKJWkIyMdjUJB3m7HmA3Q%3D%3D)** Californians are waking up to how disastrous these years of Democrat rule have been. There is no better way to highlight that failure than putting myself, a Sheriff who has spent decades defending law and order, up against Kamala Harris, who as Attorney General oversaw the severe decline in public safety that we are living with today. Kamala Harris, Karen Bass, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff want us to forget the harm that Democrat rule has caused to California. But you know how these years have been:
---
* Democrats' lack of preparation and water management allowed wildfires to ravage the state, while Karen Bass and Gavin Newsom were nowhere to be found.
* Despite Democrats spending hundreds of millions to "fix" it--crime, homelessness, and drug addiction skyrocketed.
* Democrats wasted billions of dollars on "high-speed rail" with nothing to show for it.

---
As they say: fool me once, shame on you... Fool me twice, shame on me. Well Californians ought to be ashamed. There's rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is unbearable... Californians are being taxed to death just to watch their hard-earned dollars go towards fighting against Trump's common-sense policies like wildfire prevention, immigration reform, and water storage improvement. These California Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they _welcome_ the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And I wouldn't blame you if you said, "Chad, I'm afraid California's best days are behind us." But listen, here's something you need to remember... **_Republicans turned things around_ by electing Ronald Reagan as Governor of California.** **_And we can do that again_**. **But there 's no way I can pull it off without you.** **[That's why I'm asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3f3d51908640476f8ca6b3f91d9e949f&_e=G-k2u06oCcf7ne_5zYenfYdkB-4__CrRrK81K1FPF9ZfyuQOgwZeBnIJRZbanFYrrptWeO6ap6lXFK4HpjFoim8b-60Qg_8ROK3QReiLhaqgBmsrQmnbRwCcgMrcVN36Lv4OaYa3khoNGcaYzlZkVQzmXBgB_kIp8T2gkXicAW7lmBlE7uPo69H2tCdRxctG-uwskI3pCaqQti8mwr7yGmGSgNm8t0HztJGjjaDgx6kB2H7jonqNJEHG0_2RwOK2iVwjKa7GNLZ5c8yKg1JPM4ishVdDZyPPfw6Yd5dNcyYqpP0Rb0SdyNk4q34A3iPaplJdhX1ArhYIYSl0usKaRDJCXK1X8YncLtp5TGTU15gOm-m-cRqVb2Yavx9eNZ2iTbNrFl3yE6rcOdB9OyzaYQ%3D%3D)** More and more everyday Americans are waking up to the harm that years of Democrat rule has caused them, and they are turning their backs on the party that betrayed them. A recent statewide poll showed Gov. Gavin Newsom's approval rating among likely voters at 44%. The number for the state legislature is even lower, with a 40% approval rating. Fewer than 20% of L.A. residents give Mayor Karen Bass high marks for fire response. Six in 10 voters said they felt the state was going in the wrong direction. The polling for Republicans has never been stronger in 20 years because of the dissatisfaction with the Democrats controlling their government. The time is right... But California is massive. We need to ignite a massive grassroots movement to compete across all 163,696 square miles and in all 58 counties. **[**When you rush your Bianco for California contribution of $35 or more...**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3f3d51908640476f8ca6b3f91d9e949f&_e=G-k2u06oCcf7ne_5zYenfYdkB-4__CrRrK81K1FPF9ZfyuQOgwZeBnIJRZbanFYrrptWeO6ap6lXFK4HpjFoim8b-60Qg_8ROK3QReiLhaqgBmsrQmnbRwCcgMrcVN36Lv4OaYa3khoNGcaYzlZkVQzmXBgB_kIp8T2gkXicAW7lmBlE7uPo69H2tCdRxctG-uwskI3pCaqQti8mwr7yGmGSgNm8t0HztJGjjaDgx6kB2H7jonqNJEHG0_2RwOK2dX7UOrCttSUMu579i9-8LLQ-CJyuB2dq6HqwVFjzzcwH-QOjcdijZC87gceqlFIrBeWxZF3NkcPILAzU6xj3qCoaQryjUtc_-tkr636bw6jjN60ZXTet2MZREbk3FIUZ4qEXi1SaqJbKB5QulSqOXA%3D%3D)** ...you're helping us fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: _You don 't have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free._ _**We rely on everyday Americans like you**_ --_Not liberal Hollywood elites_ --to fund this campaign. **[That's why I'm asking you to chip in to my campaign and give us the resources we need to go up against the Kamala Harris fundraising goliath.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3f3d51908640476f8ca6b3f91d9e949f&_e=G-k2u06oCcf7ne_5zYenfYdkB-4__CrRrK81K1FPF9ZfyuQOgwZeBnIJRZbanFYrrptWeO6ap6lXFK4HpjFoim8b-60Qg_8ROK3QReiLhaqgBmsrQmnbRwCcgMrcVN36Lv4OaYa3khoNGcaYzlZkVQzmXBgB_kIp8T2gkXicAW7lmBlE7uPo69H2tCdRxctG-uwskI3pCaqQti8mwr7yGmGSgNm8t0HztJGjjaDgx6kB2H7jonqNJEHG0_2RwOK2Ep2i8L1t_pHeAca5nkbO-r5iauL6kChJNGSH_kocvgfwMBVC8ylOhKIhygfg0ntynxKFwcsFTuKeIUMGi8RZ8Q3ohY1tnZWLFboMO4cXL3QGPEoQ59ikullzezryXjdmG0VYVD6dZvpjE3LQzo8dbA%3D%3D)** The Democrat machine that raised a billion dollars for Kamala Harris is going to come out in full force in her home state of California. But people are fed up with her, with her incompetence, and with the years of Democrat rule. Even if she outraises me 10-to-1, I'll have a good fighting chance. This race is the toughest in the nation. But I have been doing something just as tough--tackling crime in California. Here is what Democrats don't understand about the crime problem: when someone breaks the law or is a violent repeat offender, you put them in jail. It's not a systemic or societal problem. Or a racism problem. It is an accountability problem. I've been wrangling criminals without help from these Democrats for years. And despite Liberal politicians and the local media trying to get rid of me, I've won two terms as Sheriff. That's how you can know I'm the man for the job. Now I'm ready to do the hardest thing in American politics -\- win statewide in California as a Republican. When we win here... defeating Kamala Harris for the second time... ...we become the line of defense against these failed liberal policies spreading to the rest of the country. And we stop Kamala Harris, or whoever the Democrats put up for Governor, from using California as a liberal launchpad for their extremist agenda. It all depends on you!
---
| | [ **DONATE ** ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3f3d51908640476f8ca6b3f91d9e949f&_e=G-k2u06oCcf7ne_5zYenfYdkB-4__CrRrK81K1FPF9ZfyuQOgwZeBnIJRZbanFYrrptWeO6ap6lXFK4HpjFoim8b-60Qg_8ROK3QReiLhaqgBmsrQmnbRwCcgMrcVN36Lv4OaYa3khoNGcaYzlZkVQzmXBgB_kIp8T2gkXicAW7lmBlE7uPo69H2tCdRxctG-uwskI3pCaqQti8mwr7yGmGSgNm8t0HztJGjjaDgx6kB2H7jonqNJEHG0_2RwOK2fTNjpINah1ngS1ugGPRmC0CSHw-PSlfbnJm-k9aEv8yfaYrC6caxdrU8J6sKFHDrwjP1CA6n6nk_5Jzbl8YPyLwEa5dtAaGNxEjqYVCgXn8oFk2mRnPsu7mxz7VZLeARIOOsicD-yun6K0v8Le6jZg%3D%3D)
---
Thank you and God Bless, Sheriff Chad Bianco
---

This is our last and FINAL chance to meet this goal. That's why generous Republicans who know how important this deadline is have agreed to **2X MATCH all contributions until midnight tonight!**

But if you don't chip in, this incredible opportunity is POINTLESS!

clean_body: This really isn’t good | | | | Friend - we're trying not to scream. We told you once. We told you twice. But still, not enough patriots have stepped up to help us meet our FIRST end-of-quarter goal TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT. The truth is, we're falling SERIOUSLY behind, and we may have to tell leadership that the House Republican majority MISSED our end-of-quarter goal. The last thing we want to have to do is to go to leadership with our heads hung low in disappointment. This is our last and FINAL chance to meet this goal. That's why generous Republicans who know how important this deadline is have agreed to 2X MATCH all contributions until midnight tonight! But if you don't chip in, this incredible opportunity is POINTLESS! "Things are coming down to the wire. ## Trump’s ‘Liberation Day’ Tariffs Take Effect
President Trump formally rolled out his “[Liberation Day” tariffs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3OozAQRZ_GdBMZY35SuNiGLttuiSb2OMzK2AhPEvH2K7b_mtsc6Uj3_HksD-TE-fUbN3ISy2K06UFb0N0SkNO52Ca4SGSoa8i1o-2G0fajblYX7F17fx-mafKh1VNLXbBPDNjZAWmMDbvLpq3uWq2N7W-mH62Ofd9TpBCerbKaAks5bn8LZ1kpprN86Lj5sjXJrSJ7Vd0vZWZl5nzupcqFlJkvsTKzttcYZeZ3hUzfqswsx3vboSbcK6BAIqwCrQbBg2OsUDJgSsDbXg6pwBkC-YQHCpcMJQL5ksvGHjgH2ikHyp5gxRQv-l1RQFY6wZd3CvAkZebmcGH_ckpch1FZ_dqQ0_8X8lPVjzP_AgAA___t-nre) Wednesday, imposing 10% levies on nearly all imports from more than 20 countries starting April 5. Higher country-specific rates will kick in on April 9 for nations listed in an annex to the order. Key targets include China (34%), Vietnam (46%), and Taiwan (32%). Trump has said tariffs could go to zero if companies move operations to the U.S. Trump cited unequal tariff rates, non-tariff barriers, and wage-suppressing policies by trading partners like China, India, and the EU as threats to U.S. supply chains and military readiness. Key exemptions to the tariffs include defense goods, critical minerals, energy, and goods from Canada and Mexico that meet North American trade rules. Read [the full executive order here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kTEPmzAUhH8NbA8ZY4dkYOjClq4do4f9DK9ybGQ_gvLvK6quXU-n7-50v56vJ3LktP7EN00S8ksrbUEZUMPLI8fvy7R-CkSahpamfjTDbTR2VO023e9aP5yi8Y7e9u7mXb-g7R96cfgYb0vL00VTRg29UtrYTtvRqGCtpUDeL31jFHmWXLrfmZNsFOI3f6h0Lr_bOG0ie22GH42eGz2f59mdGwtt-ajUrfnT6HkvVNlTEsYI6IRzqo2er9xGz8o0ei60HhGF0wr83nORCifLBgiFHO8lO4wgWDgEkHyJwuELUtAT7OWCOqogGwq4nKTwcghd1ohlJcDkYadSuQolAUzpwAhHYiEPVVCowpqzr_-QngI7lqtmWya_nxwj19vYGLW-kePf8fK_Mz6T_hMAAP__43-Syw).
## Amazon Bids on TikTok at Last Minute
Amazon made a [surprise last-minute bid to acquire TikTok](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOtCAUBeCnwY4JXkBmCoq_oZu_3dKgXEZWFCPX2bhPv3H7bU5zki8n5-PZP33KaX399wtaiqUHAZoLxYXsg0_57FUTbEQElA3a1ijZGaWNaCYbxxikvLfmcfdtFzs5isHgHeCBQxt8aJK9NKGEbIUApW-gjRJRa40RQxhapgSGRGW_fZa00oQxn-WN-20sS5PtRLRVJv8xcAzcem6l0lUxcBfMwAl1BTBww1HTirUycH7x32Xli5-x8jqVcebZV-JLWg9CPqTAqfDhODmlmcrMd9zKTgxcs9uwfaWcU-0MU-K1-JR_x9Bf57wt_AQAAP__a5pmZg) ahead of the April 5 deadline set by the Trump administration for ByteDance to divest its U.S. operations or face a nationwide ban. President Trump is [weighing multiple bids](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0jzFvgzAQRn-N2UCHfcZh8NCFLV07Igefk2sMRrYblH9f0b3bJ33Se3pf1_nqOPJ2_3Qr2RrSLEHqFrAFNXvH8T1j420gkqQasr1BNRjUBpqHNeOIl2VEj0NQZrhpNBcPI3k9mEtPumF70gBB9QASdSe1QQhaawrk_a0XCOS5ptx9J97qg0J8pxflbklrE-2j1r0I9SHkJOR0HEe33MpGRzl_IadzCjnV_LPu7ZK2wp5yG3hzsa38rOnZ7jntqbgo5NRk6_eDY-QyGIFwXx3HP1P9r_xl5W8AAAD__y_LW2c), including a proposal from OnlyFans founder Tim Stokely. Stokely's new company, Zoop, has partnered with a crypto-currency foundation to develop a monetization-focused model. Existing U.S. investors like Susquehanna and KKR aim to take majority control, with Oracle expected to expand its role in data oversight. Andreessen Horowitz and [Blackstone are also ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00D9vgzAQBfBPYzaj47BDMnjowpauHZGDz-Ea_0HYDeLbV3Tv_KTfe3pf9-luOXB6ftpIpvo8IaCWoCT0k7Mcjkk1zngipL4h0w2qvwxKD9As5nYh6GjwaNHCrVPagrp2t-7qAPzDqobNqYGCvgNApVvUgwKvtSZPzj06oYAc17y135lTXciHI79pa-ccm2CWWtci-g-Bo8Bx3_d2PWKq5YwFjon2InAseWYb5JxjpG0mgePZKnB8BDu_Ss2J5EZr3iq5cMid-LkUyelNpUZKVXKSlV81v-TP6TWbcevOIXC5DELBM1oOf4vqfw-9Df4GAAD__9UeaYo)[interested](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00D9vgzAQBfBPYzaj47BDMnjowpauHZGDz-Ea_0HYDeLbV3Tv_KTfe3pf9-luOXB6ftpIpvo8IaCWoCT0k7Mcjkk1zngipL4h0w2qvwxKD9As5nYh6GjwaNHCrVPagrp2t-7qAPzDqobNqYGCvgNApVvUgwKvtSZPzj06oYAc17y135lTXciHI79pa-ccm2CWWtci-g-Bo8Bx3_d2PWKq5YwFjon2InAseWYb5JxjpG0mgePZKnB8BDu_Ss2J5EZr3iq5cMid-LkUyelNpUZKVXKSlV81v-TP6TWbcevOIXC5DELBM1oOf4vqfw-9Df4GAAD__9UeaYo). ## Actor Val Kilmer Dies at 65
[Val Kilmer, the celebrated actor](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00D9vwyAUBPBPgzesZ_6YemCoWrlTuna0CO-R0GITAXGUb1-5e-ff6XS6r9NycjHF7fLpVrIt5EWA0BwUB7mgi-m5qA5tIBIkO7KDUXI0ShvorlYGJ1BK773R4wAKJ0-GBgwY9DROL120RxsokAOAULoX2igIWmsKhHgemALC2HLpv3Pc2pVCeuadSu_z2iV7be1WmXxlYmZidme_0aP2l3wwE_PH6ZC3e2r3QkfAt1z47hL_iWmlwmtzhZ9dW93GQy60U-GYc6kcI1Um5tpyeTI5R2TyfQAxTeMAuisWb4-YUqyjYQouq4vpb1L776Ldit8AAAD__1xTaDU) known for his roles in _Top Gun_ , _The Doors_ , _Tombstone_ , and _Batman Forever_ , has died at age 65 in Los Angeles. Kilmer had battled [throat cancer](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQxvGngS3WAUdOGRi6eEvXjhaGI6bCJrJRHPfpK3fv9kmf9JP-X_fh7nPJy-PTz-xaqoMGbS-AFzBD9LkcA8roErNmI9kpQnMltARyckZ5ugVGGpkAx2A46kSKVCAbVQKZ3akBglEAGm2nLSEkay0njnFUAoFjbnXtvmte2sSpHPXFaxfqLIubWntuwnwI3Qvd7_vejWM4P6H7hfdN6N6vLYfC5wyHXQ_7vr1_oMrVxeeeS8nblQTCY_a5_Kntv8qX078BAAD__2DBU88) since 2014 and underwent a tracheotomy that affected his speech. A Juilliard-trained actor, Kilmer rose to stardom as “Iceman” in _Top Gun_ and earned acclaim for portraying Jim Morrison and Doc Holliday. He reprised his role as Iceman in _Top Gun: Maverick_ (2022), his final credited role. See his [life in photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAQgOGngQ4zwCBuQXGN3V57pVEZ1rlDMUq87Ntf9vqt_-RL_q_7cB858_b4HFcKNZXBgHEKUIEd4sj5OaCMIREZspKC9mhbj86DXEI3dU6bhDC3ETt9m82tSzZGj1OM4FFyeGmAYDWAQdcY5xGSc44SxThpgUCRazma78JbXSjlZ7noaOayyhyWWvdT2A9hemH6ncqe6ZWE6a8xqx_OKx0qcyLFm9qXUsuptPbgndfyCHH_5Zz5bL1AeKwj53-4vhu9gvkLAAD__wjVU-M).

| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...

| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. _" I come from the private sector, and I know the time, effort and detail businesses put into preparing budgets... When it comes to spending American taxpayer dollars and the money we borrow to cover massive deficit spending, the analysis and oversight by lawmakers is woefully inadequate."_

Friend,

I first ran for Senate to use my experience in the private sector to find the conservative solutions for the issues that impact working families most - including the national debt.

**[Over the last few years, we've seen federal spending SKYROCKET for no good reason at all. name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Across the Country: April 3rd, 2025
body:
RFK Jr. is already feeling the heat as the leader of HHS. The anti-science platform is costing MAGA, and it is hurting the entire country.
| | | | | |
---
**_Across the Country_**
---
Hello, friend! Welcome to _Across the Country_ , the newsletter that cuts through the noise and gets to the heart of the policies shaping American lives. These aren’t just headlines—they’re the battles defining wages, workers' rights, and the future of our democracy. I’m Zoltan Nemeth, and every Thursday, I break down the political and economic forces impacting everyday Americans. From high-stakes policy fights to the power of grassroots activism, _Across the Country_ keeps you informed, **so let's dive in.**
---
| | | | **RFK Jr.’s War on Science Is Putting American Lives at Risk**
---
|
---
Dr. Peter Marks resigned from the FDA. He spent more than a decade protecting the vaccine approval process, ensuring the safety and effectiveness of life-saving medicine. Now, he is gone, and he did not leave quietly. In his resignation letter, he made it clear: **truth and transparency are no longer welcome under Trump and RFK Jr. Science does not matter. Only loyalty does.** RFK Jr. has spent years profiting off anti-vaccine rhetoric, disguising his dangerous misinformation as "skepticism." Now, he has put **a known vaccine opponent, David Geier, in charge of a sham study at HHS,** a deliberate effort to revive the long-debunked lie that vaccines cause autism. This isn’t science. **It’s an orchestrated attack on public trust in medicine.** We’re already seeing the deadly consequences. **Measles outbreaks are surging nationwide, with Texas and New Mexico reporting a 20% increase in just three days.** Texas alone has 400 confirmed cases and two deaths, caused by a disease that was eradicated in the U.S. in 2000. The cause? **Declining vaccination rates, fueled by conspiracy theories and reckless rhetoric from figures like RFK Jr.** Public health experts warn that without immediate action, this outbreak will continue to spread, putting thousands, especially children, at risk. But vaccines aren’t the only target. Trump and his MAGA allies **just laid off 10,000 scientists, doctors, and researchers at HHS,** gutting the very agencies meant to protect public health. Their next move? **Challenging drug safety regulations, including the approval of mifepristone, a critical medication for abortion care.** This isn’t about safety. **It’s about control.** **Public health is under siege, and we cannot afford to sit on the sidelines.** We must mobilize, organize, and fight back with everything we’ve got. That means calling out these attacks at every turn, supporting leaders who will defend science, and building a movement powerful enough to stop Trump, RFK Jr., and the entire MAGA machine from dismantling our health institutions. **Join us in this fight, America needs voices to stand up to this rhetoric. Thank you for joining us this week, and stay informed with NDLB!**
---
|
---
-Zoltan Nemeth
---
| [Chip in $10](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x01dn-w26c9q-kyd76rh4/)
---
| [$26 for 2026](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x01dn-w26c9r-kyd76rh5/)
---
| [Chip in $50](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x01dn-w26c9s-kyd76rh6/)
---
| [RUSH $250](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x01dn-w26c9t-kyd76rh7/)
---
We appreciate your support in this pivotal time.
---
| | | | |
---
**No Dem Left Behind PAC** P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003
---
|
---

name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: We can win in California again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026
body:
Kamala Harris is gearing up for the California Governor’s race.

| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff. As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over one billion dollars.It’s a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my home safe is the best job in the world.
---
| | Throughout my career in law enforcement, I have fought back against the pro-criminal policies coming out of Sacramento. We have held the line and kept Riverside County safe. Now, the threat that the Democrat leadership poses to our communities is graver than ever before.
---
| [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1pQ4w3R_8_32PC_AlPCDOA~~/AARclBA~/EtJhseXh_tbDwPXVnCXdwNt6BJLXggM8yKVoTcJiP6735J5-tuRzpW5lbX1q3j8cYHWeGRx310vDOK5l3YA27QCoqebTsp-xGfS0zdLULQBlzWsynRRe34DR9er3DOr5LvPTPM67z7J9yoHDf5aUEWJ_kRkbxnINoAZ3SeitezbvC0hzGNDhVTaj6Y9QCWGCm8nDn8JVU2ZmbbthVzQcd6o_rMexq-FGliu5L9nvYMxsvU7wPUeenmTp-lIeMhhWh7UptfS3mDWm6PGaIW6zZfbtuodjdAI_H9oenhaldhKiYdfcVHA1wW52BuwOur10)
---
| | That’s because Kamala Harris is positioning herself to run for Governor of California. **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat radical Kamala Harris in the race for California Governor.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1pQ4w3R_8_32PC_AlPCDOA~~/AARclBA~/EtJhseXh_tbDwPXVnCXdwNt6BJLXggM8yKVoTcJiP6735J5-tuRzpW5lbX1q3j8cYHWeGRx310vDOK5l3YA27QCoqebTsp-xGfS0zdLULQBlzWsynRRe34DR9er3DOr5LvPTPM67z7J9yoHDf5aUEWJ_kRkbxnINoAZ3SeitezbvC0hzGNDhVTaj6Y9QCWGCm8nDn8JVU2ZmbbthVzQcd6o_rMexq-FGliu5L9nvYMxsvU7wPUeenmTp-lIeMhhWh7UptfS3mDWm6PGaIW6zZfbtuodjdAI_H9oenhaldhKiYdfcVHA1wW52BuwOur10)** Californians are waking up to how disastrous these years of Democrat rule have been. There is no better way to highlight that failure than putting myself, a Sheriff who has spent decades defending law and order, up against Kamala Harris, who as Attorney General oversaw the severe decline in public safety that we are living with today.Kamala Harris, Karen Bass, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff want us to forget the harm that Democrat rule has caused to California.But you know how these years have been:
---
* Democrats’ lack of preparation and water management allowed wildfires to ravage the state, while Karen Bass and Gavin Newsom were nowhere to be found.
* Despite Democrats spending hundreds of millions to “fix” it—crime, homelessness, and drug addiction skyrocketed.
* Democrats wasted billions of dollars on “high-speed rail” with nothing to show for it.

---
As they say: fool me once, shame on you... Fool me twice, shame on me.Well Californians ought to be ashamed.There’s rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is unbearable...Californians are being taxed to death just to watch their hard-earned dollars go towards fighting against Trump’s common-sense policies like wildfire prevention, immigration reform, and water storage improvement.These California Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they _welcome_ the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And I wouldn’t blame you if you said, “Chad, I’m afraid California’s best days are behind us.”But listen, here’s something you need to remember...**_Republicans turned things around_ by electing Ronald Reagan as Governor of California.****_And we can do that again_**. **But there’s no way I can pull it off without you.****[That’s why I’m asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1pQ4w3R_8_32PC_AlPCDOA~~/AARclBA~/EtJhseXh_tbDwPXVnCXdwNt6BJLXggM8yKVoTcJiP6735J5-tuRzpW5lbX1q3j8cYHWeGRx310vDOK5l3YA27QCoqebTsp-xGfS0zdLULQBlzWsynRRe34DR9er3DOr5LvPTPM67z7J9yoHDf5aUEWJ_kRkbxnINoAZ3SeitezbvC0hzGNDhVTaj6Y9QCWGCm8nDn8JVU2ZmbbthVzQcd6o_rMexq-FGliu5L9nvYMxsvU7wPUeenmTp-lIeMhhWh7UptfS3mDWm6PGaIW6zZfbtuodjdAI_H9oenhaldhKiYdfcVHA1wW52BuwOur10)** More and more everyday Americans are waking up to the harm that years of Democrat rule has caused them, and they are turning their backs on the party that betrayed them. A recent statewide poll showed Gov. Gavin Newsom's approval rating among likely voters at 44%. The number for the state legislature is even lower, with a 40% approval rating. Fewer than 20% of L.A. residents give Mayor Karen Bass high marks for fire response. Six in 10 voters said they felt the state was going in the wrong direction. The polling for Republicans has never been stronger in 20 years because of the dissatisfaction with the Democrats controlling their government.The time is right...But California is massive. ## 40 Arrested in Tren de Aragua Raid
Authorities arrested more than [40 suspected Tren de Aragua gang members](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPtCAUAH8NdpgnomhB8TV2-7VXGpSHckHYwNt13V9_2euvnmQyma_bfDM--Lj9Nwdqerk0CxAdB8mhna3x4ZplZfUCdmwq1I2Sba8GGPtq16IDO7puHaSwsgeplG2NcEJ1bkGz2srrjwwktA10Awx1M7rGOdm7oVMghoZJQOsp5Zp2JHyZ4sKVnpjrNR1V0DvRvbD2HxMTE9N5nrVLr4hn-XAmpnsKnvxamJhsemMs3OSMhdDyw3ynzJeULWZeyBDy5VGIk8kbko8bX0JKlnafC138iRHfDwwm8s3Ercra3k8fgi-9YhK2w_jwG0V_Xnpq8RMAAP__JdxuDw) and associates at an undisclosed Hays County residence yesterday morning. A news release from the Texas Department of Public Safety (DPS) said the agency’s Special Response Team executed the arrests after [receiving FBI intelligence](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3u4yAQxJ8Gd1hrIP4oKK5xl2uvtDawxOiwiVgSx29_8vX_ZpoZzW80f-7LHWOK-_M3bmTrN-RFgbpJMBL04jGmczGNtw_wU9eQ7Qaj-2GEqW9Wq4dpgm7S_QjgAgwOfCA9uqDNAGhcE-1VBgZ0B7cRxrabQheC6cN4G0CNnTBAPtZc2rpSpS9ySGf-UGld3ppk11pfLPQvoWah5uM42r-M9TKFmnc6WKg5ZYdJqPlCCTWDuUQJNRuQ_OYXuUpe1kK79CSx4PONcqPtQYUlMmcXsRJLLIX4isZdrniydPm911OGR5SM54VqivWvI6YUuR-EgeeGMf2fWn_87mPVvwAAAP__rpRwQQ) about a potential gathering. The Hays County Sheriff’s Office, ICE, and Homeland Security Investigations also participated in the operation. Minors were reportedly among those arrested, and agents confiscated narcotics from the residence. State and federal charges are pending, [according to the release](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO6yAQheGnwR3WgDHgguI27nLbLS0chpgVMRbMxsnbr5J--6PvSP_XZbn4lNN---_v6OgZyyJBjhwUh2EJPuXXorrgVgiT6NAJowZtLEy625zxcY3jGFBjGLxZYRQTRtQ2ehvNsHbJvTFQMAgYLdheTFHEqHS0owFpBVOAIVGpPW1I-PQt5ld5YO2v5d5ltxEdjQ3_mJyZnM_z7MPR-s-wv5UHk_OOZ2Ny_i5pJ07B83Jg9ZTKziu2n0yNvz2ugPtasVHjm381fi1ddeE4U86pacMU3O4-5c8v_Rni4eRvAAAA__9LSWJn). Gov. Greg Abbott [praised authorities](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z79u6yAUgPGngS3W4c8xMDBk8Z1yp0rtZoEBGwnXkX2aOm9fpXvXb_hJ3_ttvIXa6uf8P6zZ01m2UYLEC-gLqDGF2p6j5slHSE7w7IXRqjcWXM8XHyeBU0hZIKKIxblea4zFFJQuxGJ59S8MNCgBaMF2whVRiu6LRQPSCqYhp0rb3tGSKZ_hKO25PfLeTdvKm1-I7gdTVyYHJofzVZkc_u15vsa4EY1vH0wOBwX6OpgchAODCqx01git0GnLd5_u37W1evSGaZjXUNuvTn_uPrz8CQAA___iI1QY) for their “great work” on social media. “ _Tren de Aragua tried to set up shop in Texas. But we won't let this ruthless gang take root in our state_.”
## 84 Texans Make Forbes Billionaires List
Eighty-four Texans are among the world’s 3,028 billionaires, according to the annual _Forbes_ list of the world’s richest people. Their combined worth is a [staggering $966.1 billion](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGutCAUhJ8GO83hAIoFxd_Y7d_e0qAcVhIUA2Tdffsbt7_NNDOZyXw_j_lhQwzH87_dydS3TzMCqhZkC2J2NsTPLBtnFnAjb8jwQYp-0DD2zWY0inVVig-Ca2sdeYmgvFoFSk1qoSaYuwwkCA5Kg-746Ln3svdaDYCaMwnkQk25qxtVetvi4ye9KHdr2ptotlrPwsQ_hhPD6bqubt1yOm6X4XTQVRhONtewRmI4-ZQXKu0SYgzpsCFTaWMotf1-ukXwkXfndjbZuPO6c6UfmITnbkP8jtY_KbwM_gYAAP__fEddxg). Leading the way is Elon Musk, the [world’s richest person](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuu4yAYhJ8Gd78FGN8Kimi17rLtlhYOPzYKFwtIHL_9kdOfcjTSN5rv_32-K-tsWP8pj7J8TJw55S1QAbSZtbLunEWl5UL1yCqUrBdN1w907KpN4tJ2o-GD0qxpmKLiYbqxGfjYaYWcmcrKC0YFbRhtBzrUbDTMGNGZoe0pHxgRFLUtMdVlw4IflY074xtT_Yi-cnIrZc-kuRE-ET4dx1H7HK6O8AkDvDLhk48BT8Kngo8tRBfXK2yAsIBR3roT0MUA_pWfoHwMK3yHYLHO2RiUTZghBjAxLZghqfC0YYVo4IjJachwoHJls5gL7Bh3h4RPKsHtxv6otP6tktT7cdFy1xNBV6-s-x4ovxp9S_4TAAD__y_EezE), who has accumulated $342 billion as the founder of Tesla, SpaceX, and artificial intelligence company xAI. Walmart heiress [Alice Walton is 15th on the list](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2u4yAQhZ8GdxMNY_xD4WIbd3fbLaMBD9dI2ETAXidvv0r6rc-n8-mcP1_3L44pnt-_-ZClPUO-E9IAaAD7-8Yxve6m2xaHm9WdLHoy_TjNaMduX-zkJ8eebOBZvEejhUwgFIMu9EPo4vIuQ4O9xmHG-aZt0CGYMczDhDRrZVC22HK5tV2aPLmG9Mo_Um4-H11a9tYeVfW_FK2K1uu6bldgfoeKVi4t-iSK1iOf8lK0ur81nlKrojXk4qRCkSRcpULLDyBEcDGlmE-ORSqkWBucubQdPnI4-XizOzc4eBNou3wgRSvNE1hGEW09jGINmMACVnCCwTEP2vbBeenKsj2ut6WOkzL4fXBMnzntv__-LPQvAAD__-A_fWo), with a net worth of $101 billion. Dell Technologies founder and CEO Michael Dell is No. 17 ($97.7 billion), Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones is No. 127 ($16.6 billion), and Houston Rockets owner Tilman Fertitta is No. 220 ($11.3 billion). Other notable Texas billionaires include Fisher Investments founder Ken Fisher (No. 224, $11.2 billion), H-E-B chairman Charles Butt (No. 230, $10.8 billion), [Kinder Morgan chairman Richard Kinder](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00D2P8yAQBOBfgzus5cM2Lijexl3e9kqL4CVeCYcINl___pRrrrr-0cxovk7rKVCm6-V_ONDzK5VVgx4kWAlm3QLl92q7zZ9hm1WHXk3WjJODeex2HwfcXAAd52AGTIOzs03ORGvnaTRWdeQ_YWDBKBgcuF7NSaVkx-SGCbRTwgJuxKX2vCPjK7SU3-WBtY_l6LLfmW9NmH9CL0Ive7k3Ltc-3jPfKx7h9mFCL1d8NqGXSPyWmRL-WpmwMjEHmUo9Y5OV4o6N5WeY0EtX_XZ7Us7UxklYuByB8k85__nGw-vvAAAA__8JmGIu) (No. 248, $10.6 billion), and former Mavericks owner Mark Cuban (No. 620, $5.7 billion).
## Rangers Pitcher Throws a 'Maddux'
Texas Rangers pitcher Nathan Eovaldi [threw a complete-game shutout](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOgzAQBb8GOqPFGLALF9eky7VXoiW245UMjvAmTv7-xPVXveJJM9L8XJcrUqL9_o2bt_wOeZEgRwFKwLA4pPRZVOvsCs70rbf9rIZp1mCmNtrR4Q2dNwh-MhLnATDMKuBq3KpRq5bsCQMFQw-jBt31JvQhqCnocQap-0aBd8T56Dh69m8sIX3yyx_dLW9tspH5UZrhq5GXRl5qrd2W1vNr5GX3tZyDHHEXPr8wORIcj1yLMEY8iG9RlPjk_GRBuzhwv_ujiEp7e1j3qJQSlWluFNw3pPTn5H8jvKz8DQAA__-P7mDA) Tuesday, leading his team to a 1-0 victory over the Cincinnati Reds a day after their lineup clobbered the Rangers in a 14-3 blowout. Eovaldi [threw just 99 pitches](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDHvpCAUxD8NdhhAFC0orrHba680TwV9OYQNvNXdb39Zc-2_nZnMbzJ_HtMDMGDcfsPhLL19mpRQLReai2ZaAcNn0tVqZ7EOsnJWGt10phdDV-3WqGX2zSK9hH4Qg1FNNzdGt53Sc2uErNB-y4QWjRRtL_paDl56rzvft0aoXjIt3IqUck27I_eG4sMnnS7XSzqqYHeiZ2HNL6ZGpsbruuqCX4up0UOMQJgiU-MR5lspNEMITI07Fkr5w9QYgXaI3KUTwor8gL-u8JvEM8TN5cL_h_mFtPMlHc_gyPENDsfL_qL0In4WvmBc8Eby7NZSZbs-LwwBS2eYFtsBGO7V9OONp1X_AgAA__-VsHgp) in the “Maddux”—a complete game of less than 100 pitches—a nod to the efficiency of Hall of Famer Greg Maddux, whose older brother Mike is the Rangers’ pitching coach. It was only the 11th such game in the past five seasons. Eovaldi’s fastball was slower than normal, and he only threw it for 20% of his pitches, a career low. Of his 99 total pitches, 70 were strikes. He notched eight strikeouts while giving up four hits and no walks. “ _He’s as good as I’ve seen as far as a pitcher performing under pressure_ ,” [said manager Bruce Bochy](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00D3LpDAUBeBfE7srSYxfRYphwW623VLumKsG8iFJRmf-_eLbv92BAw-H8-85P9E6G7a_6EmXzxpnyWULXAFvZoPWfWdVGf3iZhQVadGrpusHPnbVrpt2wBHHsXuhWNTYKilbbgYpUWCztk1l9Y1xxRvB24EPtRhXsa6qW4e253IQTHEytsRUl50KfTCv7htPSvUSfeX0XsqRWfNgcmJyuq6r9jncHZMTBXhnJqd8xFTuEMtOickpYNkxAMUTnbGw2ZMyJAwbpQw5eiq7DRvkgxaLDi5bdliiPxwVgg09gUdj3h84MyQyN40JHg_xp88Bq6TNcVnnbO56pvjm0bqfueXX_04t_wcAAP__GXZ0OA). “ _He’s a tremendous competitor. And he wanted to finish that one_.”

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I’m in the fight
body:
And they’re moving against me harder than ever

| | | | |
---
Friend, I wanted you to hear this straight from me.
_**After much thought, I’ve made the decision to stay in the House of Representatives, right here fighting for the America First agenda.**_
Serving as U.S Ambassador to the UN would have been a great honor and I was humbled when President Trump asked me to step up and serve in his administration in that capacity.
But I knew from the start that serving the American people and fighting for America First would come with sacrifices. So, when it became clear that I was needed most in the House of Representatives, **_my decision to stay on and keep fighting for the America First agenda was easy_** _._
With President Trump back in the White House and our House GOP majority razor-thin, every single vote counts. I couldn’t walk away from the fight to **secure our borders** , **strengthen our economy** , and **protect our values from the radical left’s attacks**. President Trump needs every fighter in the House that he can get, **_and I am here to deliver_**.
But here’s what’s happened since I made that choice: the left has come after me harder than ever. They see me as a threat, a conservative _**willing to do anything and everything necessary to get America First across the finish line**_. They’re pouring resources into smear campaigns, flooding dark money into efforts to take me down, and plotting to flip my seat in the next election.
**_They’re desperate to silence me because they know I’ll keep fighting for you._**
The problem is this: **I haven’t been fundraising recently** _._ I’ve been preparing for the next phase of my life and getting ready to fight for President Trump in an entirely new way. **_But with the left’s attacks ramping up, I need to rebuild our resources now to counter their moves and keep our momentum strong._****____**
**__[That’s why I’m reaching out to you today](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/agzP/?__vbtrk=MjgzNDkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzNDkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_._**
_**We just passed the first quarterly deadline of 2025 and the Democrat running against me has already raised $2,000,000.**_

[STAND WITH ELISE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/agzP/?__vbtrk=MjgzNDkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzNDkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**__[I’m asking you to stand with me today by making a critical donation to my efforts to defend the House](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/agzP/?__vbtrk=MjgzNDkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzNDkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_._**
Thank you for your time and continued support.
_Your fellow patriot,_
**Elise Stefanik**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/agzP/?__vbtrk=MjgzNDkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzNDkyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
