name: History Facts
subject: Wait, snake oil actually works?!
body:
In the popular lexicon, “snake oil” refers to a scam product or bogus claim, particularly related to health.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68ep20hcqepa19m5icqyq5hbseswioha96sgzpykzkfqrv9m28jcpmxne6h506h2p9w85n37rvp9qs8z49x0928swfhcdg0w1n21t81qbrob6g4z2ru7psif71j53s4ivig4hxaygozqaenjq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su52tr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Snake oil wasn’t always a scam.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su52tr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Science & Industry](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su52tr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su52tr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| I n the popular lexicon, “snake oil” refers to a scam product or bogus claim, particularly related to health. That connotation originated with one of history’s most notorious American hucksters, Clark Stanley, who sold “snake oil” he claimed would cure pain and rheumatism in the late 19th century.
---
Stanley would [demonstrate](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su52tr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) to audiences how he would kill and boil a rattlesnake, letting its fat rise to the surface. But his Snake Oil Liniment was, to be clear, a scam. Not only were his claims about rattlesnake fat unverified, but the actual product he was selling didn’t even contain snake oil — it was a combination of capsaicin from chili peppers, mineral oil, turpentine, and tallow, probably from beef.
If Stanley’s supposed cure-all _had_ contained a specific kind of snake oil, it might have been at least somewhat effective. Oil from Chinese water snakes has been used for centuries in traditional Chinese medicine to treat arthritis and other joint pain. Railroad laborers who immigrated to the U.S. from China shared it with other workers after long, painful days, which may have contributed to the popularity of generic snake oil as a treatment.
Modern [research](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su52tr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) has shown this particular Chinese snake oil may indeed have health benefits. It’s packed with more omega-3 fatty acid than salmon, and may help with improving cognitive function, reducing blood pressure, and lessening inflammation. Genuine rattlesnake oil, on the other hand, is, well, snake oil — in every sense.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su52tr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su52tr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---

## Snakes evolved three times faster than lizards.
Today, we have snakes in just about every kind of habitat, from the ocean floor to deserts to treetops, and in sizes ranging from a few inches to several yards long. On an evolutionary timeline, snakes achieved that diversity much more quickly than other species, and on a grander scale, according to [research](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su52tr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) completed in 2024. More than 100 million years ago, some prehistoric species of lizard started losing their legs, and snakes became snakes practically overnight. And it wasn’t just universal snake traits such as flexible skulls that came in rapidly. Over the next 66 million years, snakes also went through what evolutionary biologists call adaptive radiation, developing traits highly specialized to their environment. (For comparison, it took hundreds of millions of years for _Homo sapiens_ to evolve.) Some snakes were able to eat prey that lizards couldn’t, some developed infrared vision, and some became venomous. Despite their common ancestors, snakes evolved as much as three times faster than lizards.

clean_body: In the popular lexicon, “snake oil” refers to a scam product or bogus claim, particularly related to health. | I n the popular lexicon, “snake oil” refers to a scam product or bogus claim, particularly related to health. That connotation originated with one of history’s most notorious American hucksters, Clark Stanley, who sold “snake oil” he claimed would cure pain and rheumatism in the late 19th century. Stanley would to audiences how he would kill and boil a rattlesnake, letting its fat rise to the surface. But his Snake Oil Liniment was, to be clear, a scam. Not only were his claims about rattlesnake fat unverified, but the actual product he was selling didn’t even contain snake oil — it was a combination of capsaicin from chili peppers, mineral oil, turpentine, and tallow, probably from beef. If Stanley’s supposed cure-all had contained a specific kind of snake oil, it might have been at least somewhat effective. Oil from Chinese water snakes has been used for centuries in traditional Chinese medicine to treat arthritis and other joint pain. Railroad laborers who immigrated to the U.S. from China shared it with other workers after long, painful days, which may have contributed to the popularity of generic snake oil as a treatment. Modern has shown this particular Chinese snake oil may indeed have health benefits. It’s packed with more omega-3 fatty acid than salmon, and may help with improving cognitive function, reducing blood pressure, and lessening inflammation. Genuine rattlesnake oil, on the other hand, is, well, snake oil — in every sense. | By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our and . By the Numbers | | Fine levied on Clark Stanley by the U.S. government $20 | | Length (in feet) of the longest recorded snake 32.8 | Length (in feet) of the longest recorded snake 32.8 | | Chinese immigrants who built the Transcontinental Railroad 15,000-20,000 | | Grams of omega-3 fatty acid in 1 tablespoon of flaxseed oil 7.26 | Grams of omega-3 fatty acid in 1 tablespoon of flaxseed oil 7.26 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Snakes evolved three times faster than lizards. Today, we have snakes in just about every kind of habitat, from the ocean floor to deserts to treetops, and in sizes ranging from a few inches to several yards long. On an evolutionary timeline, snakes achieved that diversity much more quickly than other species, and on a grander scale, according to completed in 2024. More than 100 million years ago, some prehistoric species of lizard started losing their legs, and snakes became snakes practically overnight. And it wasn’t just universal snake traits such as flexible skulls that came in rapidly. Over the next 66 million years, snakes also went through what evolutionary biologists call adaptive radiation, developing traits highly specialized to their environment. (For comparison, it took hundreds of millions of years for Homo sapiens to evolve.) Some snakes were able to eat prey that lizards couldn’t, some developed infrared vision, and some became venomous. Despite their common ancestors, snakes evolved as much as three times faster than lizards. name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Another Win for Common Sense: Wisconsin Voters Embrace Voter ID
body:
Wisconsin just delivered a powerful reminder: common sense still matters.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/05650e182681/when-we-vote-we-win-14762859?e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | ““The right to vote is the crown jewel of American liberties, and we will not see its luster diminished.” ” _**President, Ronald Reagan**_
---
|
---
| **Another Win for Common Sense: Wisconsin Voters Embrace Voter ID**
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=c6a8fc4b31&e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
| **Opinion | Election Integrity**
**Score One for Common Sense:****Wisconsin Voters Embrace Voter ID**
**—By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator**
In an era where trust in American institutions seems increasingly scarce, the voters of Wisconsin just delivered a powerful reminder: **common sense still matters**.
On Tuesday, Wisconsin citizens voted to enshrine their existing voter ID law into the state constitution, affirming—by a comfortable margin—that securing our elections with valid government-issued identification is not only prudent, but essential. With **62% support and rising** , the message from voters is crystal clear: **they want elections they can trust**.
The fact that it took a constitutional amendment to reinforce what should be a bipartisan no-brainer is, sadly, a sign of the times. Despite overwhelming national support—**poll after poll shows voter ID laws enjoying 70% to 80% approval across all demographics** —Democratic-aligned interest groups like the **ACLU** , **Common Cause** , and others scrambled to oppose this measure. Their argument? That the amendment “sets a troubling precedent.”
What’s troubling, frankly, is the persistent refusal by Democratic leaders and their legal proxies to acknowledge what the American public intuitively understands: **elections require both access and accountability**. One without the other breeds chaos—or worse, apathy. When citizens feel that their vote may be canceled out by fraud, manipulation, or poor oversight, they begin to disengage. That’s the **real threat to democracy**.
Let’s call it what it is: this is another example of the **Democratic Party choosing to fight against an 80/20 issue** —putting ideology and partisanship over the will of the people. The same groups that argue you should need an ID to pick up concert tickets or board a plane somehow believe it’s unreasonable to ask for one when electing the leaders of the free world.
Voter ID is not about exclusion. It’s about **basic election hygiene** —a fundamental layer of defense that builds faith in the process for everyone, regardless of party affiliation. The left’s insistence that it is a form of voter suppression has been eroded by time, data, and now, the will of Wisconsin voters.
To their credit, **Wisconsin Republicans** saw the writing on the wall and moved proactively to codify voter ID into the constitution, ensuring that no future legislature can sweep it away in a partisan overreach. It was a **simple act of political maturity** , supported by **former President Trump** and embraced by voters from Green Bay to Madison. It represents the kind of **blocking and tackling** we need to **restore trust in our electoral systems** —slow, deliberate, and grounded in principle.
The battle for election integrity is far from over. But Wisconsin’s vote is a **significant step in the right direction** —a quiet, decisive stand for **accountability at the ballot box**. For those of us who believe that **trust in elections is the foundation of a functioning republic** , this week’s result offers both validation and a glimmer of optimism.
Score one for common sense.**Now if only we could bring some Wisconsin common sense to Connecticut!**

* * *

---

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 4/2/2025
body:
Rewriting the rules: Wolves, federal reform and a lawsuit from rural Colorado
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/s4t170dccb4)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/s1o65379806)**
| | Hi folks,
Listen to today's **Mountain Minute Podcast** [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/s1m1ac8b108), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/sfqda0f44db) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/sfu12f976e3)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** Colorado Democrats are advancing [multiple attacks on TABOR](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/scmd3ec9912), with new bills and a potential lawsuit aiming to strip voters of their right to limit taxes and spending. In parallel, [SB25-086 is raising constitutional alarms](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/s4t5db53ae1) for requiring social media platforms to police users on behalf of the state—without due process or oversight. Also, a bill targeting “junk fees” is headed to Gov. Polis after passing both chambers with [zero Republican support](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/scvdb2062fb) and full Democratic backing.
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Rural Coloradans are pushing back against the state's controversial wolf reintroduction. A lawsuit claims the release [violated federal law](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/s6l744c52cb) by skipping required environmental reviews, while ranchers warn of rising livestock losses and bureaucratic stonewalling on compensation. Meanwhile, an editorial calls out state leaders for [gutting road funding](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/s0i6d23ff46) while wasting transportation dollars on EV chargers and empty bike lanes—despite Colorado’s crumbling highway rankings.
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** Attorney General Phil Weiser is drawing fire for using taxpayer resources to [fight Trump’s executive orders](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/s3p1eb69b21), including those targeting sanctuary cities and irreversible gender surgeries for minors. Meanwhile, Republicans [flipped two U.S. House seats](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/sbqb05be715) in Florida, expanding their razor-thin majority and boosting momentum ahead of 2026. But Democrats scored a [big win in Wisconsin](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/sare45bb0ce), holding control of the state Supreme Court in a race likely to tip congressional redistricting in their favor.
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, April 3, 2025.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Rewriting the rules: Wolves, federal reform and a lawsuit from rural Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/s5u07ff95ba)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/sfi012c1b18)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/sft85b465e6)
Late last year, five wolves were airlifted from Oregon to Colorado under a plan voters narrowly approved—but few knew one of them came from a pack with a history of livestock attacks.
Fewer still knew the move may have violated federal law.
At the center of the controversy is a growing belief that Colorado’s wolf reintroduction bypassed environmental law and public transparency.
And a federal lawsuit now threatens to unravel the entire plan.
The National Environmental Policy Act, or NEPA, is one of the country’s cornerstone environmental laws — meant to ensure that federal actions don’t proceed without full environmental review and public input.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/s3p83c653b1)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/s2q99eb1b91)
|
---
**[Phil Weiser puts politics over Constitution in legal war against President Trump](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/s2iebd9988d)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/sdl02534718)
* Colorado Attorney General Phil Weiser is facing backlash from conservatives for using taxpayer resources to file lawsuits opposing President Trump’s executive orders on border security, gender surgeries for minors, and sanctuary cities.
* Critics argue Weiser is prioritizing progressive politics over constitutional duty, especially by defending controversial policies like gender-neutral bathrooms and birthright citizenship for illegal immigrants.
* Weiser’s actions—amid his announced run for governor—are seen as aligning with far-left agendas, raising concerns about the politicization of the Attorney General’s office and its impact on public safety and parental rights.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/s8i180a2444)**
|
---
**[Gaines: Colorado Democrats blew the budget and now they want your TABOR refunds](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/sbu0b689881)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/sbs362ea3aa)
* Cory Gaines warns that Colorado Democrats, after mismanaging the state budget, are now targeting TABOR—the taxpayer bill of rights—for elimination, calling it a barrier to “a republican form of government.”
* Multiple new bills, including SB25-173 and SB25-270, aim to reclassify revenue and expand exemptions, allowing lawmakers to bypass voter-approved spending limits without technically raising taxes.
* Gaines urges Coloradans to fight back against what he calls a shell game to strip away fiscal restraint and hand unchecked power to a progressive legislature.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/s9p8c8ec333)**
|
---
**[Hancock: SB25-086 tramples the Constitution in the name of control](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/s1p4dc742ea)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/s8hd53f2744)
* Michael Hancock argues SB25-086 is a dangerous overreach that violates the First, Fourth, and Fifth Amendments by forcing social media platforms to act as state enforcers—monitoring, judging, and banning users without due process.
* The bill mandates platforms hand over moderation protocols and user data to the government, creating what Hancock calls a backdoor surveillance state and a chilling effect on free speech.
* He warns that while the bill is framed as a safety measure, it opens the door to censorship, government overreach, and the silencing of dissenting voices online.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/sbm4f8a4d93)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Polis greenlights nuclear power as Colorado rejects “Green New Deal”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/s8n0f16c923)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/s3s326e2fe3)****BY RMV STAFF****| STATE | APRIL 1** _After years of progressive opposition to nuclear energy, Colorado Governor Jared Polis has signed House Bill 25-1040 into law, officially recognizing nuclear power as part of the state’s clean energy portfolio._
__
**[Cole: Colorado’s gender bills sideline parents and rush kids into harm](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/s7hf1a5ae41)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/s1m90674aac)****BY SHAINA COLE | COMMENTARY | APRIL 1** _On Friday, March 28, Colorado legislators introduced House Bill 25-1309 and House Bill 25-1312, proposals crafted to safeguard transgender youth. Their aims are well-meaning: one mandates insurance coverage for gender-affirming treatments such as hormone therapy and surgeries, while the other anchors gender identity within custody law to protect vulnerable children._
__
**[Education Department cracks down on schools that keep secrets from parents](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/sfk7948c4ba)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-51Fg/sbhf7b10849)****BY RMV STAFF | STATE | MARCH 31** _The U.S. Department of Education under Secretary Linda McMahon has announced a sweeping effort to enforce existing federal laws that protect parental rights in public schools. The March 28 directive reaffirms parents’ authority over their children’s education and mental health records—specifically targeting public school policies that have kept parents in the dark._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|

Here is a summary of today's top stories: 🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates... Colorado Democrats are advancing , with new bills and a potential lawsuit aiming to strip voters of their right to limit taxes and spending. In parallel, for requiring social media platforms to police users on behalf of the state—without due process or oversight. Also, a bill targeting “junk fees” is headed to Gov. Polis after passing both chambers with and full Democratic backing. 🏔️ Here in Colorado... Rural Coloradans are pushing back against the state's controversial wolf reintroduction. A lawsuit claims the release by skipping required environmental reviews, while ranchers warn of rising livestock losses and bureaucratic stonewalling on compensation. Meanwhile, an editorial calls out state leaders for while wasting transportation dollars on EV chargers and empty bike lanes—despite Colorado’s crumbling highway rankings. 🇺🇸On the National Stage... Attorney General Phil Weiser is drawing fire for using taxpayer resources to , including those targeting sanctuary cities and irreversible gender surgeries for minors. Meanwhile, Republicans in Florida, expanding their razor-thin majority and boosting momentum ahead of 2026. But Democrats scored a , holding control of the state Supreme Court in a race likely to tip congressional redistricting in their favor. This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, April 3, 2025. – Heidi Ganahl | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY JEN SCHUMANN, Late last year, five wolves were airlifted from Oregon to Colorado under a plan voters narrowly approved—but few knew one of them came from a pack with a history of livestock attacks. Fewer still knew the move may have violated federal law. At the center of the controversy is a growing belief that Colorado’s wolf reintroduction bypassed environmental law and public transparency. And a federal lawsuit now threatens to unravel the entire plan. The National Environmental Policy Act, or NEPA, is one of the country’s cornerstone environmental laws — meant to ensure that federal actions don’t proceed without full environmental review and public input. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | Colorado Attorney General Phil Weiser is facing backlash from conservatives for using taxpayer resources to file lawsuits opposing President Trump’s executive orders on border security, gender surgeries for minors, and sanctuary cities. Critics argue Weiser is prioritizing progressive politics over constitutional duty, especially by defending controversial policies like gender-neutral bathrooms and birthright citizenship for illegal immigrants. Weiser’s actions—amid his announced run for governor—are seen as aligning with far-left agendas, raising concerns about the politicization of the Attorney General’s office and its impact on public safety and parental rights. | Cory Gaines warns that Colorado Democrats, after mismanaging the state budget, are now targeting TABOR—the taxpayer bill of rights—for elimination, calling it a barrier to “a republican form of government.” Multiple new bills, including SB25-173 and SB25-270, aim to reclassify revenue and expand exemptions, allowing lawmakers to bypass voter-approved spending limits without technically raising taxes. Gaines urges Coloradans to fight back against what he calls a shell game to strip away fiscal restraint and hand unchecked power to a progressive legislature. | Michael Hancock argues SB25-086 is a dangerous overreach that violates the First, Fourth, and Fifth Amendments by forcing social media platforms to act as state enforcers—monitoring, judging, and banning users without due process. The bill mandates platforms hand over moderation protocols and user data to the government, creating what Hancock calls a backdoor surveillance state and a chilling effect on free speech. He warns that while the bill is framed as a safety measure, it opens the door to censorship, government overreach, and the silencing of dissenting voices online. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ RMV STAFF| STATE | APRIL 1 After years of progressive opposition to nuclear energy, Colorado Governor Jared Polis has signed House Bill 25-1040 into law, officially recognizing nuclear power as part of the state’s clean energy portfolio. name: Dr. Chad via Your America News
subject: Avoid these 5 common hydration mistakes…
body:
(it's really that bad)

Hey Friend... it's me--your bladder!

I'm trying to help you out here.

I've noticed less water coming through lately... and you might think that will make those occasional leaks and urges better...

But the truth is, too much water is NOT the cause of your bathroom struggles...

In fact, it's the opposite.

Once you hit 50, a few things got out of whack.

**Kidneys stopped filtering fluid as well as they once did** \- causing concentrated urine that irritates your bladder and causes spontaneous urges.

**Thirst signals slow down, causing you to drink less** \- making bladder muscles lazy and causing occasional leaks.

Luckily, US Army researchers decoded a shockingly easy water trick with two ingredients that can improve muscle strength by 36%, improve bladder health by 58%, and give you control back...

All by targeting _the true cause_ of bladder problems**.**

PLEASE...

[**> Try this simple Army-discovered water trick to help strengthen me and reduce my constant nagging.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq8mlub12r7d8cmscs3apipjqbm9rrjo0kqaerqo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdieeo72c5h2bs)

We're going to be feeling GREAT soon,

Your Bladder
****

Pop Acta Media | Your America

subject: Elon Musk sheds a tear & sends a warning
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOD, FAMILY, COUNTRY PAC
body:
Democrats want to take DOGE to the woodchipper

| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdv85sidmkdp0nkrsojfblggdgrkkf7lmr5v7sd8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdieeo72c5h2bs)
---
**ELON MUSK’S MESSAGE TO EVERY AMERICAN ABOUT THE FUTURE OF DOGE THAT EVERY TRUMP VOTER HAS TO READ BEFORE THE DAY IS OVER:**
**_"All we're trying to do is restore the will of the people through the president. There's a vast unelected Federal bureaucracy that is opposed to the President and the cabinet. _**
**_DC voting is 92% Kamala, that's a lot. That's basically almost everyone. If the will of the President is not implemented, and the President is representative of the people, that means the will of the people isn't being implemented. _**
**_That means we don't live in a democracy we live in a bureaucracy. I think what we're seeing here is a thrashing of the bureaucracy while we try to reestablish democracy and the will of the people."_**
—---
Thank you for taking the time to read Elon’s message.
The heartbreaking fact is, even with the control of the White House & Congress, the entrenched federal bureaucracy is doing everything possible to take out Elon Musk for good.
A corrupt network of Obama-appointed activist judges has already ruled against President Trump’s most ambitious executive orders.
**_And now, Democrat members of Congress are calling for street violence against Elon Musk and EVERY Trump supporter._**
President Trump & Elon are doing everything they can, but the fact is, they can only do so much.
The real power lies with grassroots Patriots like you.
Your response - _right here, right now_ \- will send a message loud & clear that **WE THE PEOPLE** stand with President Trump & Elon at this critical moment in history.
But it has to be immediate, and it has to be massive.
Because anything short of an overwhelming response will be a failure.
**[So before Democrats levy their next round of attacks against DOGE, can we count on you to go on the record and say I STAND WITH DOGE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm5aev8r6pmjl407s2stmmume831f0p0hvp76uio_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdieeo72c5h2bs)**

[STAND WITH DOGE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5tf6p0ai339cac7igt0asc3tis8ri3mo0qcfgpg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdieeo72c5h2bs)
Please. This is the single most important thing you can do today.
Please don’t be silent at this most critical moment.[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9410dcdmvrdjql3j7mgoearod42h9k2q70nbsqo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdieeo72c5h2bs)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: This revival mission needs you!
body:
It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.

| | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate...
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate......to Jesus.And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created _Saving the Easter Bunny_ , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "_Mouse in the House_ ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ big-time. **[And today I'm hoping you'll help them kick it into high gear before orders start pouring in by rushing back your best "Prepare the Way" gift.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9t2uha8t3k0sa0ku1p4mj1lqrlafbplkngdvl8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdie1pr6c5h2bs)** No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done:
---
>>> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ and a 17-city church tour.
---
And listen to this...**[**Your "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100 or more, not only helps fund this revival campaign that makes Jesus the reason for the Easter season once more...**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zlvivcega54vmm4buomni4hoh21i2qc3kqjphddg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdie1pr6c5h2bs)** Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you **[contribute $100 or more to the "Prepare the Way" revival](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z8mk5p04ej27l23afn51qfs9v8g291a9nl4q0lgo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdie1pr6c5h2bs)** , Brave Books will send you _Saving the Easter Bunny_ absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep _Saving the Easter Bunny_ for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. **[**What's most important is that you rush back your best "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100, or more right away.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z8lobns5eut204m0jqvvk947kjg1frtusbhbf6eo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdie1pr6c5h2bs)** Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America.
---
May God bless you this coming Easter season,
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpbb4c27bjec7kbaqinpv22ta1fe6vgab3dqg99g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdie1pr6c5h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zul91phm32ic8ndgqls26sugnfkjgp7d0bqmd768_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdie1pr6c5h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. Brave Books is focused on sparking historic revival this Easter! They've launched a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate -- to Jesus. **[**Please help us point families to the empty tomb this Easter with your gift of $35, $50, $100, or more.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zt4qhotl3q5cql536lfblfgsogn2ojekh78tcb8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdie1pr6c5h2bs)** As a special thank you for your gift of $100 or more we'll send you your very own copy of Saving the Easter Bunny for your family. Thank you!
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z7htkasp893c87ugjavded25fnsb0t1orkjnggb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdie1pr6c5h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | As we start the New Year, I have big news to share with you. But first, I want to say something about the victories you helped us accomplish in 2024.
---

Pop Acta Media | National Republican Polling
---

body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62575959-b1f8-45cb-a613-5c35aa5c0eeb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, have you seen any Republican representatives lately? Apparently they're missing... Take a look at some recent headlines: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T99271c67-2973-403a-b335-62f7c6f71311/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [If you’re tired of Republicans ignoring their constituents’ concerns, please chip in $20 now to help us elect REAL leadership:](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td09ff52f-1dd6-4d65-9a58-e16f951e7507/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $20 →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T66223c8d-6aa7-4e1b-8183-c686f3abf5de/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Democrats have been spending the last couple of weeks holding town halls, taking accountability, and listening to thousands of people about issues on their mind – even in Republican-elected areas. It's clear that Americans are sick and tired of Trump and his MAGA allies taking actions that directly hurt everyday people like you. People are TIRED of worrying about their Social Security and Medicare benefits being on the chopping block. People are OUTRAGED about our government services and workers being gutted under the excuse of "government efficiency." People are MAD that our national security and intelligence are at risk because of incompetent leadership. The people are READY for real fighters to step up and stand for the people, and this means showing up for the thousands of Democrats who have been visiting these missing Republican's hometowns and learning about what is concerning them. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: gold-star@uso.org
subject: Remember. Respect. Honor.
body:
Show support for Gold Star Spouses
[](https://www.uso.org)
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/4NKwHK_gN3sd/ZE43Tkd0bTI4REVOdjRIc29QdVJPaktSNjlXQXluRDhrSVg4bnhROEJIcU9sTSt5K3VyakJVRkJzNGY2eVdybXNQSlZlbGw3RmdrelM4RHhmRmpYY0hnNUlBVUx6azd0Vm5SWEJBNTVtY3M9S0/OHorMlU3d1ZMU1pDOEVsOUxwYm0zUXdKOC9KbkJFTVVnSGtTVzFnWE01eHhsQ3p3b25KdCtiUUR1RnIvS2RVT1dRcENiTVUvdC9qV0V0NWt6RE1IZU8rUGZzbE90eDdMS0)
---
A difficult day is almost here. On April 5, we come together to recognize Gold Star Spouses Day -- a day to honor the spouses of military members who have made the ultimate sacrifice for our country.
When families receive that dreaded call, their lives are forever changed. Through your compassion and generosity, the USO can continue programs such as the Families of the Fallen program, which has supported every dignified transfer of lives lost at Dover Air Force Base for the past 33 years. We help arrange travel and lodging for families to stay at Dover and witness the return of their loved one, providing around-the-clock support every step of the way.
**Today we 're asking all of our supporters to show their compassion and care for the thousands of Gold Star Spouses across the country right now. [Will you sign the USO's card to honor our fallen heroes, Gold Star Spouses and all who serve?](https://links.e.uso.)***
[](https://links.e.uso.)
---
| [PLEASE SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Thank you,
--The USO
*The USO has set a goal to obtain 25,000 signatures of support via email and text message through April 5, 2025.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Most politicians lie to you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
That’s not how I operate. I’d rather tell the truth and lose than lie and win.

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._zvK3_kAu9oH-8PQ)Here's the ugly truth about politics today:
Most politicians lie to you, Peter.
I'm sure you've seen this in your own life. They tell you what you want to hear. They dodge hard questions. They poll test answers before speaking up. It probably drives you crazy. It bugs me too because that's just not how I operate.
**I 'd rather tell the truth and LOSE than lie and WIN. So here's what I know to be true:**| ** 1. **| God is real.
---|---
** 2. **| There are two genders.
---|---
** 3. **| Fossil fuels are a requirement for human flourishing.
---|---
** 4. **| Reverse racism is racism.
---|---
** 5. **| An open border is not a border.
---|---
** 6. **| Parents determine the education of their children.
---|---
** 7. **| The nuclear family isn't a bad word, it is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
---|---
** 8. **| Capitalism is the best system known to man to lift us up from poverty.
---|---
** 9. **| There are three branches of government, not four.
---|---
** 10. **| And the U.S. Constitution is the greatest guarantor of freedom in human history.
---|---
Some people reject what I know to be true. And that's okay.

I'm not running to win the approval of the media or the political class. I'm running to lead Ohio to be the greatest state in the country AND set an example for the other 49 states - leading with truth, grit, and courage in our convictions.

[**If you agree with me on these fundamentals, then this isn 't just my campaign - it's your campaign too, no matter where you live.**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._76tzFFsEZAivkyw)
[JOIN THE TEAM
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
We're building something real. Something grounded. Something unapologetically American.

_A nd we're just getting started._

Onward,
Vivek
Candidate for Governor of Ohio
[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._6tZfQ)
| |
---
| | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
---

350 E 1st Ave
Ste 100
Columbus, OH 43201

[Privacy Policy](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)

Vivek Ramaswamy for Ohio, [click here](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._5ngXJCoSPLowA)

name: Dr. Chad via Update for America
subject: Avoid these 5 common hydration mistakes…
body:
(it's really that bad)

Hey Friend... it's me--your bladder!

I'm trying to help you out here.

I've noticed less water coming through lately... and you might think that will make those occasional leaks and urges better...

But the truth is, too much water is NOT the cause of your bathroom struggles...

In fact, it's the opposite.

Once you hit 50, a few things got out of whack.

**Kidneys stopped filtering fluid as well as they once did** \- causing concentrated urine that irritates your bladder and causes spontaneous urges.

**Thirst signals slow down, causing you to drink less** \- making bladder muscles lazy and causing occasional leaks.

Luckily, US Army researchers decoded a shockingly easy water trick with two ingredients that can improve muscle strength by 36%, improve bladder health by 58%, and give you control back...

All by targeting _the true cause_ of bladder problems**.**

PLEASE...

[**> Try this simple Army-discovered water trick to help strengthen me and reduce my constant nagging.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z9cl48l15s1fhbunc8ir7gum77lirug5n2rjcch0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdie9or4c5h2bs)

We're going to be feeling GREAT soon,

Your Bladder
****

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: This revival mission needs you!
body:
It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.

| | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate...
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate......to Jesus.And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created _Saving the Easter Bunny_ , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "_Mouse in the House_ ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ big-time. **[And today I'm hoping you'll help them kick it into high gear before orders start pouring in by rushing back your best "Prepare the Way" gift.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0eggeq0sk11s9tikqtd58a3rdf8p8ua7b1hm45g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdie9or4clh2bs)** No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done:
---
>>> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ and a 17-city church tour.
---
And listen to this...**[**Your "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100 or more, not only helps fund this revival campaign that makes Jesus the reason for the Easter season once more...**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmern64i5o298a0o7mke4a8vkpbosgroqfstr30g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdie9or4clh2bs)** Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you **[contribute $100 or more to the "Prepare the Way" revival](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z89gr60qe3gmcn99o9ku75bcv2p6mh8eahum6bq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdie9or4clh2bs)** , Brave Books will send you _Saving the Easter Bunny_ absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep _Saving the Easter Bunny_ for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. **[**What's most important is that you rush back your best "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100, or more right away.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znbs311jv0gjeem2g78niaf940tfnle3s1kt2e90_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdie9or4clh2bs)** Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America.
---
May God bless you this coming Easter season,
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfno197t2i5qq20d71ar1vcrli0au90dogg6eb48_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdie9or4clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znj756h5vgqhaeijrn8bc3iocs3mfcrk5m1qlh78_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdie9or4clh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. Brave Books is focused on sparking historic revival this Easter! They've launched a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate -- to Jesus. **[**Please help us point families to the empty tomb this Easter with your gift of $35, $50, $100, or more.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkog5s27g151ejbcj8g1lbcoob1le3k5n3rbd6bo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdie9or4clh2bs)** As a special thank you for your gift of $100 or more we'll send you your very own copy of Saving the Easter Bunny for your family. Thank you!
---

When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "Mouse in the House ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of Saving the Easter Bunny big-time. No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done: >> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of Saving the Easter Bunny and a 17-city church tour. And listen to this... Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you , Brave Books will send you Saving the Easter Bunny absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep Saving the Easter Bunny for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America. May God bless you this coming Easter season, | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. Brave Books is focused on sparking historic revival this Easter! They've launched a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate -- to Jesus. As a special thank you for your gift of $100 or more we'll send you your very own copy of Saving the Easter Bunny for your family. Thank you! | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | As we start the New Year, I have big news to share with you. But first, I want to say something about the victories you helped us accomplish in 2024. Pop Acta Media | Pro Life Update PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

| Peter, The Easter season is here! That means it's the perfect time to help your kids remember why we celebrate Easter: The ultimate sacrifice that Jesus made, and His glorious resurrection! If your kids are like most, they look forward to Easter morning with eager anticipation! The joy of receiving baskets of goodies and sweet treats is enough to make any child excited. But with all the excitement, it's easy for kids to forget why we celebrate Easter: The resurrection of Jesus Christ.

# [Megyn Kelly GOES OFF at NY Times reporter trying to dig up Trump's past](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=160492694&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwNDkyNjk0LCJpYXQiOjE3NDM2ODcwNTYsImV4cCI6MTc0NjI3OTA1NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.hogrmEaN7BCZ2V2Xi29ZKQQczN2YMSilFf_KvbmZKag)
### "I don't give a SHIT about Trump getting handsy with somebody 20 years ago!!"
Apr 3
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=160492694&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwNDkyNjk0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0MzY4NzA1NiwiZXhwIjoxNzQ2Mjc5MDU2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.DUTQNs-EvUZH3KppSzOtNI903IrDSwWgBk-rDvc2tjU&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=160492694&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwNDkyNjk0LCJpYXQiOjE3NDM2ODcwNTYsImV4cCI6MTc0NjI3OTA1NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.hogrmEaN7BCZ2V2Xi29ZKQQczN2YMSilFf_KvbmZKag)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/megyn-kelly-goes-off-at-ny-times?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Megyn Kelly **[refused to fall into New York Times reporter Lulu Garcia-Navarro's trap](https://substack.com/redirect/2315d6ad-269c-4ed0-8ac7-177ec2afcd35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** about sexual assault allegations against President Trump's during a tense interview.
She handled this perfectly...
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2315d6ad-269c-4ed0-8ac7-177ec2afcd35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2315d6ad-269c-4ed0-8ac7-177ec2afcd35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I just want to understand something clearly," Garcia-Navarro told Kelly. "Donald Trump was found liable for sexual abuse in a civil court. He's been accused by many women. You don't believe any of that?"
Kelly **[fired back with a brutally honest answer,](https://substack.com/redirect/2315d6ad-269c-4ed0-8ac7-177ec2afcd35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "I think the most serious thing I've heard about him is the E.Jean Carroll allegation,... and I don't believe one word of that."
Garcia Navarro protested, saying that there were many women who accused Trump of sexual misconduct.
**["I've interviewed some of them,"](https://substack.com/redirect/2315d6ad-269c-4ed0-8ac7-177ec2afcd35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Kelly fired back. "But look, the things I heard included that he got handsy on a airplane. Do find that a deal breaker for a possible politician, not really. At least I reported on their stories and did them the courtesy of bringing them to air in front of millions of people and letting the audience make up its mind."
[Watch the video](https://substack.com/redirect/2315d6ad-269c-4ed0-8ac7-177ec2afcd35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Kelly turned the tables, telling the reporter that there were far more important things that Trump is addressing, like the chaos at the border that has victimized so many Americans, than the several decades old allegations.
"My own personal opinion is that most of the allegations against him are much more complicated than the mainstream media would have you believe," Kelly explained. "I don't think Donald Trump is a rapist,..."
"It's just about so much more than that, we are talking about how many people dying at the southern border because of the invasion that we;ve suffered under Joe Biden,... I don't give a shit about Trump getting handsy with somebody 20 years ago!!" she snapped at the reporter.
Watch her take down this left wing reporter's line of questioning with her brutally honest take on Trump's past:

* * *
# Tesla protester SMACKS DOGE hat off of the wrong guy, instantly regrets it...
A nutjob Tesla protester **[smacked a DOGE baseball cap off of a man](https://substack.com/redirect/8c79a860-5436-455c-b220-a800ddc7cc7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a street-side protest, only to find out the hard way that he was a Jiu Jitsu brown belt.
A fight broke out immediately, and it didn't go well for the guy who started it...
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8c79a860-5436-455c-b220-a800ddc7cc7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

The DOGE supporter took the instigator down to the ground using a Judo throw, then putting him into a triangle choke using his legs as bystanders tried to help but didn't know what to do.
I consulted my longtime friend and a former UFC fighter Dale Hartt to help me break down the situation and decide whether the DOGE brown belt did the right thing.
"He's lucky these were a bunch of wimps,... if this were in eastern Europe he'd be dead!" Dale explained.
Watch the wild clip and our our conversation about it here:

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: This revival mission needs you!
body:
It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.

| | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate...
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate......to Jesus.And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created _Saving the Easter Bunny_ , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "_Mouse in the House_ ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ big-time. **[And today I'm hoping you'll help them kick it into high gear before orders start pouring in by rushing back your best "Prepare the Way" gift.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8dtihqr2qiemuc7igj03e8b1qqllsv8ku41e3tg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6ctg60pb2clh2bs)** No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done:
---
>>> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ and a 17-city church tour.
---
And listen to this...**[**Your "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100 or more, not only helps fund this revival campaign that makes Jesus the reason for the Easter season once more...**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zenqkrmlf0huplbgbae28n9ndb911rr9bejkg8r8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6ctg60pb2clh2bs)** Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you **[contribute $100 or more to the "Prepare the Way" revival](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5hi89pn18vaq28rirjr3539d8jm2b9olk2o72r8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6ctg60pb2clh2bs)** , Brave Books will send you _Saving the Easter Bunny_ absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep _Saving the Easter Bunny_ for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. **[**What's most important is that you rush back your best "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100, or more right away.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgll6qv43imvm1jgsbvkff2bv91hrehok5c9sk80_rp22sh2s8i6eob6ctg60pb2clh2bs)** Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America.
---
May God bless you this coming Easter season,
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zseq3psjjrur32jdsf4a0gpstvdgrg10o6u5pa58_rp22sh2s8i6eob6ctg60pb2clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zskolqfspksvpig1jsotkf25e52r64ajkm8ra838_rp22sh2s8i6eob6ctg60pb2clh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. Brave Books is focused on sparking historic revival this Easter! They've launched a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate -- to Jesus. **[**Please help us point families to the empty tomb this Easter with your gift of $35, $50, $100, or more.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z05suru8av9p8rfoef7124pv1tu7na8b8ehqvp50_rp22sh2s8i6eob6ctg60pb2clh2bs)** As a special thank you for your gift of $100 or more we'll send you your very own copy of Saving the Easter Bunny for your family. Thank you!
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zghq18s78025ghbq3tclmks56vfhp76v0kqcf3s0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6ctg60pb2clh2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---

body:

Hi Peter,

**Last week, the Trump administration abruptly pulled funding for a research grant working to protect pregnant women from domestic violence. They categorized it as a “DEI” study.**

According to _HuffPost_ , the goal was to design a training program for OB-GYNs, public health researchers, and other clinicians to spot the link between domestic violence and pregnancy. This research could have saved thousands of women’s lives **as homicide by an abusive partner is the leading cause of death among pregnant and postpartum women in the U.S.** , and, according to _HuffPost_ , “perinatal women are more than twice as likely to be _murdered_ than to die from sepsis, hypertensive disorders, or hemorrhage.”

Without even thinking about the consequences, the Trump administration has eliminated funding for this critical study because it used the terms “women,” “female,” and “inequity.”

**We are sick and tired of male politicians creating policies that put women’s lives in real – and truly preventable – danger.** [**This is yet another reason why America NEEDS more pro-women women in office to defend our rights and create policy that will protect American women. Join our efforts to elect more women to government by rushing $20.25 or more today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105087733/537336418/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250403leading_N_CB_90DO_7_G_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzMjg1ZWQwLThmMTAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NycRsD1AaKeUMJ-DxcZ8zDm6xWHIBEMonumlISLl3zw=)

An estimated 324,000 pregnant women are abused each year by an intimate partner – and that number is likely to increase as more women in abortion ban states are forced to stay pregnant. **Since the fall of _Roe v. Wade_ , the National Domestic Violence Hotline has experienced a 2x increase in calls about reproductive coercion.**

name: Updates For Great Americans
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0mlh0bepchbt06o9h6nqhhdlvnadv6f3gnd44jg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6ctg68ob4c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zci6u8bvp0f0a4jelpf4dg643nksbh9pe176qjv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6ctg68ob4c3h2bs)_
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zs3ta2pjumjfcj9ubplhl3fen19dta1oacgcc5l8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6ctg68ob4c3h2bs)
---
| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zr7k8oa0siohf9tdbbfm89gbsdntk76e59fq82go_rp22sh2s8i6eob6ctg68ob4c3h2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" _****now.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhmikr9d7kpeq2cc2v2ta713c7ib3rkv0bqchn7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6ctg68ob4c3h2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

body:

---
**ELON MUSK’S MESSAGE TO EVERY AMERICAN ABOUT THE FUTURE OF DOGE THAT EVERY TRUMP VOTER HAS TO READ BEFORE THE DAY IS OVER:**
**_"All we're trying to do is restore the will of the people through the president. There's a vast unelected Federal bureaucracy that is opposed to the President and the cabinet. _**
**_DC voting is 92% Kamala, that's a lot. That's basically almost everyone. If the will of the President is not implemented, and the President is representative of the people, that means the will of the people isn't being implemented. _**
**_That means we don't live in a democracy we live in a bureaucracy. I think what we're seeing here is a thrashing of the bureaucracy while we try to reestablish democracy and the will of the people."_**
—---
Thank you for taking the time to read Elon’s message.
The heartbreaking fact is, even with the control of the White House & Congress, the entrenched federal bureaucracy is doing everything possible to take out Elon Musk for good.
A corrupt network of Obama-appointed activist judges has already ruled against President Trump’s most ambitious executive orders.
**_And now, Democrat members of Congress are calling for street violence against Elon Musk and EVERY Trump supporter._**
President Trump & Elon are doing everything they can, but the fact is, they can only do so much.
The real power lies with grassroots Patriots like you.
Your response - _right here, right now_ \- will send a message loud & clear that **WE THE PEOPLE** stand with President Trump & Elon at this critical moment in history.
But it has to be immediate, and it has to be massive.
Because anything short of an overwhelming response will be a failure.

name: Keith
subject: Thank you for stepping up
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

I can’t thank you enough for everything you’ve done to support our campaign. Because of you, we hit and even exceeded our latest end-of-quarter fundraising goal.

This has always been a people-powered movement. We rely on donations from supporters like you—people who want to help Minnesotans afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect—not powerful special interests.

When the stakes are high, I know I can count on this grassroots team. None of my work is possible without your continued support.

We have a lot of work ahead of us, but as long as you’re with me, I know we can take on whatever challenges come our way.

Thank you for being part of this movement.

Thank you,

Keith Ellison

name: Joe Biden
subject: It will take all of us:
body:
---
Derek, Setbacks in life are inevitable, but giving up is unforgivable. And the measure of us as Americans is not whether we get knocked down, but how quickly we get back up. Well, it’s time to get back up! As tough as things seem, though, I also know this: The America of our dreams is always closer than we think. [But it will take all of us to step up in these moments when it feels so dark. What do you say, Derek? name: Tim Kaine
subject: We just had a major victory in the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2025]
Folks, this is big. Last night, we had a major victory in the U.S. Senate: My legislation to un-do Trump’s massive taxes on Canadian goods PASSED!
I’ve been fighting hard to push this through because the American people have made it perfectly clear — they want lower prices, not higher ones. They want stability, not chaos. They want economic growth, not the threat of a recession.
These tax hikes from Trump — the largest in history! — would accomplish nothing aside from squeezing Americans’ wallets even tighter.
I’m so glad to have been joined by four Republicans who voted in favor of my legislation, and grateful to have had co-sponsorship from Republican Senator Rand Paul as well.
This was a chance for the GOP to put their constituents and the American people ahead of Trump’s ill-advised trade war and worst impulses. Not all of them took that chance — 48 Republicans still voted to pander to Trump and keep higher taxes — but getting this legislation passed on a bipartisan basis is a real win nonetheless.
What comes next? Well, the House will have to vote, and we know that’s an even tougher hurdle than the Senate. But we have to fight — so I strongly urge my colleagues in the House to do everything they can to see this through.
This was a huge step forward, but we have a long way to go — and we know there will be more challenges to come. I’m not going to stop fighting to lower costs and stabilize our economy. I’ll use every legislative tool at my disposal, and I’ll keep pushing back against this lawless and reckless Administration.
But I can’t do it alone. Will you chip in any amount right now to support common-sense leadership? The Senate needs to focus on creating jobs and economic opportunity, not staying mired in partisan bickering. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2025]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2025?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2025?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2025]
We can move this country forward — together.
Thanks for your support. I’ll keep you updated on what’s next.
-Tim Kaine
