| | Dear Peter, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a35c580e1ef9471da7dd5c6c34a6f9bc&_e=8k7P9yNmEgkrqq1e_FY6TqNn-cUgGdnHZjD6IdASD-v_SNLtVAIQ7C1NggR8C8iP6sKeX_9j-zWhYqAdsHwAYBXqsllQSICFgWddCiSEyz1b60OM4DxCT2VX0V_hOcTdFxuvFP7fmoqU63sM3UWB_My6jQiVaPzoUP8JaMfwXe5ldkTLPG4VeRXhMAHQTjDPetZ2TxKR98cjFVlq7wTj9bjRAC6h00IaTwuvTpgE-dwoXNOUSOyZgO64yRsSoW17gYGNkLNWE4BjWcmsd1c4n_OYwa130SO4JmNDYk_KtHh_XVicgYnQmYUtdSxTActtT5l-qr9ozVRrrGyaNVfX3qBeqrL0PqGPu-cw9XB2BKudIqdLtD0rXGrAEDvN0705XyPPQ6Q4NPWJj7bJxFSPeb3SwdY6ohli3KzSry-iKHf8_izDJ3DTfATVvCV5pfSW)" which you can now own on DVD.

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a35c580e1ef9471da7dd5c6c34a6f9bc&_e=8k7P9yNmEgkrqq1e_FY6TqNn-cUgGdnHZjD6IdASD-v_SNLtVAIQ7C1NggR8C8iP6sKeX_9j-zWhYqAdsHwAYBXqsllQSICFgWddCiSEyz1b60OM4DxCT2VX0V_hOcTdFxuvFP7fmoqU63sM3UWB_My6jQiVaPzoUP8JaMfwXe5ldkTLPG4VeRXhMAHQTjDPetZ2TxKR98cjFVlq7wTj9bjRAC6h00IaTwuvTpgE-dwoXNOUSOyZgO64yRsSoW17gYGNkLNWE4BjWcmsd1c4n5RapHZS-ZEALbUirELYyMAiEVLeb14u3nPcMa_PP8hR12amf_FNY0hsnVnsk5zrUjUeShrgWT4TH3G5X2uv6_D3in1n7C-3RtaqYHCFSHswytUJJw8Rh86msiAePAxAxtCUXD1NRUgLX2CfVwz1mSKe39_C5ybCmSe2tR2hJXdx).

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: What's next for markets and the economy?
body:
| Hi Peter, Markets have been on a roller coaster, and investors are asking:1 Is a bear market on the way?
---
|
---
Let's dive into what's happening and what it might mean for your portfolio. **
What's driving these market swings?** In a word: uncertainty. Anxiety over a potential trade war is causing a significant shift in business sentiment, with many corporate leaders bracing for a potential recession later this year.2 It's a dramatic (and concerning) change from the outlook just a few months ago.
Three key worries seem to be driving markets: **1\. Tariff uncertainty is causing anxiety** \- Analysts are concerned that widespread tariffs could increase costs and disrupt many industries. However, recent remarks from the administration hint at a more flexible approach to negotiations that could blunt the full impact of tariffs.3 **2\. Sticky inflation persists** \- Many economists don't expect us to hit the Fed's 2% target until 2026 or later.2 If inflation doesn't moderate, the Fed may get cold feet about lowering interest rates further. **3\. Consumer spending is slowing** \- Fresh data shows Americans are tightening their belts as inflation and economic worries bite.4 Since consumer spending drives nearly 70% of the economy, this pullback raises real concerns. **
Are there potential bright spots despite the noise?** The recent market bounce tells us something important: investors are ready to respond positively to policy clarity. The push to strengthen domestic production could also unlock new opportunities in some sectors of the economy. Our job is to spot those opportunities and stay nimble enough to use them when they emerge. **
What could this mean for your portfolio?** Market volatility can be unsettling, especially alongside economic uncertainty. It's perfectly normal to feel concerned when headlines turn gloomy. We don't know what will happen next, but I know this: Emotional reactions to market movements often lead to missed opportunities. If you're worried about what's going on, please reach out—my role is to be your guide, thought partner, and a source of reassurance and perspective. **
Your investment strategy was designed to account for market fluctuations.** I'm not suggesting we put our heads in the sand. My team and I are watching these developments carefully and considering whether tactical adjustments make sense. Would you like to talk anything through? Just hit "reply" to this email and we'll find a time that works for you. Sincerely,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6Im5ONjdmVjJMV3NyZUwzZyIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)
* * *
---
P.S. Is anyone in your life concerned about how markets might impact their portfolio or retirement timeline? I hold a few slots each week for the people who are important to my clients and I'd be happy to meet with your loved ones. I can't promise that I'll be able to help them, but I'll give them my honest perspective on their situation. Just hit "reply" and let me know.
---
Sources: 1\. [https://www.cnbc.com/2025/03/24/stock-market-today-live-updates.html](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cuY25iYy5jb21cLzIwMjVcLzAzXC8yNFwvc3RvY2stbWFya2V0LXRvZGF5LWxpdmUtdXBkYXRlcy5odG1sIiwiaGFzaCI6Im5ONjdmVjJMV3NyZUwzZyIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9) 2\. [https://www.cnbc.com/2025/03/25/recession-is-coming-pessimistic-corporate-cfos-say-cnbc-survey.html](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cuY25iYy5jb21cLzIwMjVcLzAzXC8yNVwvcmVjZXNzaW9uLWlzLWNvbWluZy1wZXNzaW1pc3RpYy1jb3Jwb3JhdGUtY2Zvcy1zYXktY25iYy1zdXJ2ZXkuaHRtbCIsImhhc2giOiJuTjY3ZlYyTFdzcmVMM2ciLCJjb250YWN0X2VtYWlsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20ifQ) [](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cuY25iYy5jb21cLzIwMjVcLzAzXC8yNVwvY25iYy1kYWlseS1vcGVuLXRydW1wLXdpbmtzLWF0LWdlbnRsZXItdGFyaWZmcy1ib29zdGluZy1tYXJrZXRzLmh0bWwlNUMlNUMiLCJoYXNoIjoibk42N2ZWMkxXc3JlTDNnIiwiY29udGFjdF9lbWFpbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0)3\. [https://www.cnbc.com/2025/03/25/cnbc-daily-open-trump-winks-at-gentler-tariffs-boosting-markets.html](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cuY25iYy5jb21cLzIwMjVcLzAzXC8yNVwvY25iYy1kYWlseS1vcGVuLXRydW1wLXdpbmtzLWF0LWdlbnRsZXItdGFyaWZmcy1ib29zdGluZy1tYXJrZXRzLmh0bWwiLCJoYXNoIjoibk42N2ZWMkxXc3JlTDNnIiwiY29udGFjdF9lbWFpbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0) 4\. That’s what I’m asking you to donate to my campaign to become the next governor of New Mexico. | | | |

**$10, friend.**
That’s what I’m asking you to donate to my campaign and NV Dems today.
Why? Because I’m facing the _first_ public fundraising deadline of my race for governor of New Mexico on April 7.
**$10** will help us reach our ambitious $150,000 goal.
**$10** will help us send a fierce message to the MAGA forces trying to flip control of our state government that momentum is on our side.
**$10** will help us show we’re **a real movement** ready to win and bring change to New Mexico.
****[**_But we still need a lot of supporters to chip in $10 between now and our big deadline on April 7, team. clean_body: That’s what I’m asking you to donate to my campaign to become the next governor of New Mexico. | | | | $10, friend. That’s what I’m asking you to donate to my campaign and NV Dems today. Why? Because I’m facing the first public fundraising deadline of my race for governor of New Mexico on April 7. $10 will help us reach our ambitious $150,000 goal. $10 will help us send a fierce message to the MAGA forces trying to flip control of our state government that momentum is on our side. $10 will help us show we’re a real movement ready to win and bring change to New Mexico. **** Thank you so much for your support, Deb The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. name: Cory Booker (via DLCC.org)
subject: I spoke for over 25 hours straight on the Senate floor.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up. | | |
---
| |
---|---
[](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_lRZx-nDGSdSX6aWkY8UezAjrQ6sZ48pBM0xeBfDngMMKc411qWbS6QqGRm5nf94P5QKB3aZfHGfVuJMLwGO2Qn5I-D2lGDPkH9yTPKZZxJ77GCiXTVJvMpl2c_YcmOl04Z_OJh45PF-gO2i8QnrN955fv44dRdaC2D37MiNJrAFi0mV9jyhhsZQ1452Zccjfgw_4MAuvMFVxZ2TCfCB6lrJSn5Bi72ZXqV4gLQJm1OaanCrVrsfu9y4hfyrHhN8jQPHy2ir8HpL1VMKYnCSZ4SSulVpaIWGzE73OGBVNM-EMAZcc3i8W_ILjqlYEzZM5fINrKArCUrDkz5vuo6hOhc7qKu2K7dhfvVz5X4ptwCA30P1qu7ii5AVCD_3VxF0Y12gWk6olt7opHp9izV2MfQ/4fc/1GQgTNNMRQmPY572ZxFSig/h0/h001.hbqo5FQ8blfGrNDl2adUHoeuxFliAUbugEkD5j5v74o) It’s Cory. On Tuesday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight – because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. clean_body: This is a moment where we must all speak up. | | | | | ---|--- It’s Cory. On Tuesday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight – because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Cory Booker and DLCC PAC. | | | | | | With love and gratitude, Cory | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. subject: We won. Now, Let’s Make It Count.
body:
The Left isn’t backing down – neither can we.

We’re going to fight to secure the border, end reckless spending, defend our freedoms, and push back against the Left’s woke anti-American agenda. _But to do that, we need to build our war chest now – and show the Left that this movement isn’t going anywhere._ [**_Help us strike first. name: Chris Pappas
subject: I’m heading for Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I’ll always put New Hampshire first.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4641%2E35263%2E0u7siz)
Peter, I'm Congressman Chris Pappas, and Tammy Baldwin said I could reach out with some big news: **I’m officially running to be New Hampshire’s next U.S. Senator.** I’m going to share more about why I’m in this race, but if you’re already on board, **[split a contribution to my campaign and Tammy today.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4438?c0=stb-partner_ms_cp_em_baldwin.gybQ1l&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250403_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4641%2E35263%2E0u7siz)** I’m running for Senate because at this pivotal moment, our economy, our democracy, and our way of life are on the line. New Hampshire deserves a Senator who is grounded in the people, places, and values of this state – and one who is ready to lead on day one. Our country is at a crossroads, and the decisions we make now will have generational impacts. You can count on me to continue taking on big fights and to confront the Trump Administration, self-dealing billionaires, and extreme politicians who are threatening our future and our ability to get things done for New Hampshire. **[Peter, can I count on you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign with a $10 contribution, split between my campaign and Tammy right now? We can’t win this race without major grassroots support.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2533?c0=stb-partner_ms_cp_em_baldwin.OcyrX_&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250403_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4641%2E35263%2E0u7siz)** **These fights are deeply personal to me.** My family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in Manchester 108 years ago, a small business that remains at the heart of the community today. Running that small business showed me the power of hard work and serving others, but the opportunity that my ancestors and so many others like them sought has never been further away – and the Trump Administration is too busy cutting deals for their billionaire buddies to give a damn. I’m also openly gay and happily married to my husband, Vann. With the current wave of hateful policies leveled at the LGBTQ+ community, I know how important representation is at this moment. **If elected, I’d be the first openly gay male U.S. Senator in history** – a badge of honor I’d wear proudly as I advocate for full equality. I am the proud product of public education, and I come from a family of business owners (_my grandfather invented the chicken tender at the restaurant – seriously!_). I understand firsthand the need to support neighborhood schools and small businesses in our community. **These are the lifeblood of our economy and the pillars of opportunity for everyone.** My life experiences are what led me to successfully run for four terms in Congress and win in one of the “swingiest” districts in the nation. Before I won my election in 2018, no one had managed to hold the seat for more than one term for more than a decade. I’m no stranger to tough electoral fights. **Now I’m ready to take on the fight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue.** We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines of the big fights ahead – not with so much at stake, from the rising costs debilitating working families to the threats to the future of our democracy. We’ve taken on big fights together in Congress. Now it’s time to win this critical Senate seat so we can keep standing up to the Trump Administration and the self-dealing billionaires threatening our future. Can I count on you to join the fight? **[Peter, if you’re with me, let’s make a powerful statement together and prove that we’re ready to win this race. Become a Founding Donor with a $10 donation to my campaign and Tammy now.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4438?c0=stb-partner_ms_cp_em_baldwin.gybQ1l&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250403_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=4641%2E35263%2E0u7siz)** Thank you again to Tammy for letting me reach out today. With gratitude, Chris [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-partner_ms_cp_em_baldwin.v9y-oI&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250403_AM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=4641%2E35263%2E0u7siz)
---
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=4641%2E35263%2E0u7siz) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=4641%2E35263%2E0u7siz)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---

name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Senator Alsobrooks Newsletter -- April 3
body:
|
---
Friends and neighbors,

President Trump deemed it "Liberation Day" yesterday as he imposed sweeping tariffs against our allies and countless other countries.

I have to ask, who is this liberation day for?

Because the fact of the matter is that it will be middle class families who foot the bills for these tariffs. Just like it will be middle class families who foot the bill for the tax cuts for billionaires.

Over the last few months, we've watched this Administration tear down everything and yet it remains unclear what they actually hope to build. It is reckless. It is unserious. And it is actively harming middle class families just like the one I and so many Americans grew up in.

I introduced the Tariff Transparency Act. It's a bill that simply asked this Administration to put their money where their mouth is. If they believe that these tariffs will benefit the American people, prove it. My bill would require the International Trade Commission to conduct an investigation of the impact the tariffs on imports from Canada and Mexico will have on consumers, businesses, and U.S. employment and force the Trump Administration to release the data about the impact of these tariffs to the public.

Yesterday afternoon, I went to the Senate floor to ask unanimous consent for my Senate colleagues to pass the commonsense Tariff Transparency Act. Republicans blocked the legislation.

And we know why. They know these tariffs will harm middle class Americans. People who voted for this president. People who didn't. And people who didn't vote at all.

The president readily admits that these tariffs will disrupt the economy, but he claims two things: that there will only be a minor disruption and says they will cause 'a little bit' of pain. Maybe it will only be minor to those who are billionaires. But to everyday Americans? To the people who go to work every day to provide for their families? The families like the family I grew up in, a blue-collar family, a father who was a car salesman and the mother who was a receptionist. Families like mine can't afford any disruptions and they cannot afford any further pain. You deserve instead to know the truth about the Trump tariffs on the front end.

Economists are expecting the president's trade war will cost American consumers and businesses billions of dollars, but I will continue fighting for Marylanders. I will continue to push back against this administration. While I will work with my colleagues in the Senate to do what I can legislatively, I want you to know in no uncertain terms that the most powerful voice in this nation is yours. So speak out.

**Senator Booker Made History on Our Behalf**

Earlier this week, Senator Cory Booker held the Senate floor for more than 25 hours, speaking in support of our great nation and in defense of our democracy. It was very emotional, and I am so proud of my friend and colleague.

He did our nation a great service. He stood on the floor for more than a day, and sacrificed his body to break the record of a man who stood in that same chamber to defy and block the Civil Rights Act. Unlike Strom Thurmond, Senator Booker did not hold up Senate proceedings to block the freedoms of others, but instead he used that time to talk about the greatness of America. He reminded us that we all have a collective responsibility to the American Dream and that every single one of our family members have the opportunity to achieve that dream. It was quite a contrast, and it's absolutely what we need right now in our country. We need unity, not division.

Senator Booker's message was one of healing and I hope that each of us vows to take up the torch. We don't have to agree on everything, but I think we can agree that every American should have access to quality and affordable health care, education, and true economic opportunity.

In that moment, I dare say, Senator Booker was our ancestors' wildest dream. **Stay Informed** I know these are difficult times. Just this week, hundreds of dedicated civil servants lost their jobs at HHS, with more promised by the Trump Administration. But please know that I will continue fighting for you every step of the way. We will not give up. We will not give in to this Administration, and I ask that you continue to fight alongside us. Please continue to reach out to us. You can call the office, connect with us, or find resources for those who have recently been laid off at [alsobrooks.senate.gov](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14176.6649271.5219421.7190525&report_id=&redirect=http%3a%2f%2falsobrooks.senate.gov&redir_log=983830187668200). You can also follow us on [Bluesky](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14176.6649271.5219421.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fweb-cdn.bsky.app%2fprofile%2falsobrooks.senate.gov&redir_log=255136950764383), Instagram, Facebook, Threads, YouTube, and X. We are in this TOGETHER. Sincerely, Angela Alsobrooks
United States Senator
[Click here to Unsubscribe.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/EForm.aspx?__cid=SenAlsobrooks&__fid=100022&__crop=14176.6649271.5219421.7190525)

Senator Booker's message was one of healing and I hope that each of us vows to take up the torch. We don't have to agree on everything, but I think we can agree that every American should have access to quality and affordable health care, education, and true economic opportunity. In that moment, I dare say, Senator Booker was our ancestors' wildest dream. Stay Informed I know these are difficult times. Just this week, hundreds of dedicated civil servants lost their jobs at HHS, with more promised by the Trump Administration. But please know that I will continue fighting for you every step of the way. We will not give up. We will not give in to this Administration, and I ask that you continue to fight alongside us. Please continue to reach out to us. You can call the office, connect with us, or find resources for those who have recently been laid off at . You can also follow us on , Instagram, Facebook, Threads, YouTube, and X. We are in this TOGETHER. Sincerely, Angela Alsobrooks United States Senator

body:
It's a national sales tax that will cost every American household $4,200 per year | | |
---
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38peowJInzAd3BIg73nmw4WaxcHcKZBmjtJEi_yluiiuHeqU3c3x17EFL8QBBHK96BDKAALsIjDQxOVAFpqLi-5mmV0EjvipOaohAYHeoqEcE79k7y1k2A1CDIKKLJq6i6PTassTx0eyuW9BMEV8jkQ5w8AjpHxC76YbdAGI7BKwFBvVPTty8IX9fKdITzB1h1d1Jdiu0ogf27acnfryzwF90-92kq4gjy-NYMsaR1ldO4SfgYsR6ah6hVgPWPI390vFa_7Lm63dv3uwDMDlQtiIEMpDo5HXhwaNc3DXRf0Og/4fc/CB0qjyJKRa62BzHRwP1pgA/h0/h001.7xb1f14miXhO_RByvxp0meJuME1iGDGevm_CvZgm_FI)Hi Friend, Yesterday Trump announced massive global tariffs - and **stock markets are crashing as predicted.** **Trump ran on _reducing_ costs - but his tariffs will _increase_ the cost of everything we buy:** food, housing, medicine, clothes, electronics, cars, housing, and more. **It's a**[**national sales tax that will cost every American household $4,200 per year.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMfF5X7cN-ykzuKqMRAE46Iihmq2NMfXVsb3ZT4ar09IOgPx5QE0jAruuews7cFopH1bmu4G1YSDOPyM7f7NUT2W3o2EMdkN6ajhtKG53dIIvUW2AHhtoMqPvtLRmOdpWQBBaaZzJsoBcnaiGAlxKqbAqflsXLx8zsCEE8eL4DU_4uXs7bxXtnLlw-qhtWdR7yc15UZ76MhuMXRns1qDPqfx91l8OcwV40knpD9b497ZN3NWo7PTkAA9aDXrW08tOZ_NBGtS2XP5PlZzCK1lEdxgOrlt5fb-UJMufvFB-dnNrZ1bflyd2vZEF0lJUiwfTcyMSgUYYKhV672G1dbtyR2PCK4t8Pe8JjiPSBRN6fCPO/4fc/CB0qjyJKRa62BzHRwP1pgA/h1/h001.oJ18r2tpZWSpVIcmtbLCCbRporR1bVyxQUDbh8tBdw4) [Tell Congress: Repeal Trump's Tariffs!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38peowJInzAd3BIg73nmw4WaxcHcKZBmjtJEi_yluiiuHeqU3c3x17EFL8QBBHK96BDKAALsIjDQxOVAFpqLi-5mmV0EjvipOaohAYHeoqEcGh62Y4s5VInEnrfryPAg5tCWMjydKZUPBz4yBfMsrgDg0g-3AJPJm6xBC8r-HGnoXT0hZnS746BAVgSqLkU47t-iaq10BJmvimnx7EQMP4Ukv-4JmOgBJ6XRUsb6zGinf76qevvA5L42mZYOZi9Kl0uO-gNLWsaq0uIoSh0W2bhZkxxhQpXoq0oTNzmfN9HSw/4fc/CB0qjyJKRa62BzHRwP1pgA/h2/h001.dAWQYJfJXJdHyn_LxAWNZegQwrV5m6gT86zcpjz73hc)
And that's just the start if the economic pain. Consumers will buy fewer products, so businesses will make fewer sales - which will force them to **slash jobs**. And our trade partners will retaliate with tariffs against American products, so **export-led jobs in manufacturing and agriculture will be slashed as well**. **Widespread job cuts will cause a deep recession** \- and a trade war could cause a **global depression.** **But here's the good news: Congress can repeal Trump's tariffs!** [Tell Congress: Repeal Trump's Tariffs!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38peowJInzAd3BIg73nmw4WaxcHcKZBmjtJEi_yluiiuHeqU3c3x17EFL8QBBHK96BDKAALsIjDQxOVAFpqLi-5mmV0EjvipOaohAYHeoqEcO3QyUptHCHw0WY1oZCVDY06qbrhs2xQNuIjB31dAZKLDeLUWnnuKCNaBUrnWntnkhrMRscoL8RIXoagvCfMaXJmhjRN1zw7mVXsyKBuasf-vKrEPA1RXctMoKFayRBWGtXyI0v46Pe-t5n2vtowdX3i3dkWORdP3CnduhQKQZJQpafh3SBYWDiVzPtX8FaIwg/4fc/CB0qjyJKRa62BzHRwP1pgA/h3/h001.L8tL6OkLS-swQM4adnqN2JvP297AebVLU2sY_OUgOHk)
Last night in the Senate, **[47 Democrats and 4 Republicans voted to repeal Trump's tariffs on Canada](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbHQPX4zlW5LTF7Twtz6WVI-Ljijtbq1_k-4m0VXx-QjbPKbfJaF49aJbZh_N6IYhkMVwxIS49ZBX6g66W1fhcGQ2YiZPuh_OIhl4FU3MLgjbadtiEnjLzVytmq_mUc4rFmkRXXIpqyiDagn0f7O779uXV69LMNZsybmY0VjHRvu_u4Hf2ZkVqLOAn0LplhiMeItBgSCOBTp36gR7oF0UtLMTMZZ6-jkCAesJQOdbmnnJKZnXlc4qq4-tu0hk-6uPBylPrZwysfl6fRq-IHeU1T8g4wCTmRNXKyjywmOLai1w0YqvekP-po8WYbte-mgJCd-I_2F8n1Iohp2cZgZPkxq9wq4i1tF_RBG3Fe9RMmSbv94HIU7liVsDTRdTw6eTrR6gtwDegoiDj3dxg4nXXM/4fc/CB0qjyJKRa62BzHRwP1pgA/h4/h001.n4eHFfX-88d_sV10HiOeG5C-8X4iBFNNv8jYAscJbb8).** How? Peter,
Sinclair Broadcasting is one of the largest and most influential forces in American media. Disguised as local news, it’s actually a nationwide propaganda machine—spreading far-right narratives through nearly 200 stations across the country.
**Now, Sinclair is activating that network to help launch a coordinated, under-the-radar smear campaign against ActBlue—piggybacking on the broader MAGA effort to dismantle the infrastructure that fuels Democratic campaigns.**
**[We’ll expose how they’re doing it in a moment. Last year, Sinclair executive chairman David D. Smith bought The Baltimore Sun, one of the nation’s oldest and most respected newspapers. His partner in the purchase?
Armstrong Williams, a far-right commentator with close ties to Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas.
Today, Williams is the public face of The Sun. His columns run regularly. His interviews are republished as news content. And his commentary is broadcast across Sinclair-owned TV stations nationwide.
**This week, Williams used his platform to publish a column smearing ActBlue—falsely linking the Democratic fundraising platform to terrorism, foreign interference, riots, and elder abuse.**
And Sinclair got to work amplifying it.
From FOX affiliates in mid-Michigan and CBS stations in Texas to the pages of The Baltimore Sun, these lies are being presented as legitimate journalism all over the country. See for yourself:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105098849/537362146/-1581427288?refcode=20250403_SinclairRS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDgwZTJhMGQtOWMxMC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KgzePU0Cxm-99ULEBjHaU9j62tFvaNk5jZG-H0pnWJo=)

clean_body: COURIER is exposing this attack for what it is — not local news, but a coordinated political attack designed to discredit and dismantle Democratic infrastructure. Peter, Sinclair Broadcasting is one of the largest and most influential forces in American media. Disguised as local news, it’s actually a nationwide propaganda machine—spreading far-right narratives through nearly 200 stations across the country. Now, Sinclair is activating that network to help launch a coordinated, under-the-radar smear campaign against ActBlue—piggybacking on the broader MAGA effort to dismantle the infrastructure that fuels Democratic campaigns. = = Last year, Sinclair executive chairman David D. Smith bought The Baltimore Sun, one of the nation’s oldest and most respected newspapers. His partner in the purchase? Armstrong Williams, a far-right commentator with close ties to Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas. Today, Williams is the public face of The Sun. His columns run regularly. His interviews are republished as news content. And his commentary is broadcast across Sinclair-owned TV stations nationwide. This week, Williams used his platform to publish a column smearing ActBlue—falsely linking the Democratic fundraising platform to terrorism, foreign interference, riots, and elder abuse. And Sinclair got to work amplifying it. From FOX affiliates in mid-Michigan and CBS stations in Texas to the pages of The Baltimore Sun, these lies are being presented as legitimate journalism all over the country. See for yourself: = COURIER is exposing this attack for what it is — not local news, but a coordinated political attack designed to discredit and dismantle Democratic infrastructure. Our 11 state-based newsrooms reach millions of Americans with factual, values-driven reporting in the same places where right-wing propaganda spreads. We tell the truth, hold power accountable, and protect the freedom to organize, speak out, and stay informed. = = Thank you for standing with us, — The COURIER Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

subject: We Cannot Ignore the War on Free & Fair Internet

Ajit Pai is back, and with him a wave of corruption that could undermine free speech for all of us--yet corporate media continues to ignore it

# [We Cannot Ignore the War on Free & Fair Internet](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=159995040&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5OTk1MDQwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDM2OTI1NzIsImV4cCI6MTc0NjI4NDU3MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zoV2wk84OgdtYUAlZsRBZtt_Ui2VvVW8nUaRYu0zNsQ)
### Ajit Pai is back, and with him a wave of corruption that could undermine free speech for all of us--yet corporate media continues to ignore it
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Apr 3
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=159995040&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5OTk1MDQwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0MzY5MjU3MiwiZXhwIjoxNzQ2Mjg0NTcyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.W4fEsSi-ijVDd_8YnSbbAoiK4jzHXsXV73Of32LoTzk&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=159995040&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5OTk1MDQwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDM2OTI1NzIsImV4cCI6MTc0NjI4NDU3MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zoV2wk84OgdtYUAlZsRBZtt_Ui2VvVW8nUaRYu0zNsQ&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=159995040&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5OTk1MDQwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDM2OTI1NzIsImV4cCI6MTc0NjI4NDU3MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zoV2wk84OgdtYUAlZsRBZtt_Ui2VvVW8nUaRYu0zNsQ)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/we-cannot-ignore-the-war-on-free?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)

There's a war on a free and fair Internet, and if we lose this battle, we effectively lose our free speech rights forever. This isn't hyperbole, it's one of the biggest stories corporate media is largely ignoring.
Poke around Trump's first term and you'll come across the name Ajit Pai. If that name sounds even vaguely familiar, it's because Pai was the Trump appointed FCC Chair who helped Trump kill net neutrality, gut protections for low-income broadband users, and weaponize the FCC against free expression.
Now Pai's back--not to fix the damage he caused--but to profit from it.
This is the result of a deeply broken system that allows public officials to dismantle consumer protections, reward corporate monopolies, and then walk straight into high-paying jobs with the same industries they just deregulated.
If that feels like horrific corruption, it should. But in today's political climate, it barely registers. Here's what you need to know and what's at stake. **Let 's Address This.**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7edd2db9-4d19-4812-8825-a9a3f9f25311?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump and Pai
## **The Net Neutrality Fight We Lost**
In America, power doesn't just corrupt. Too often, it cashes in. It's no surprise, therefore, that Donald Trump's former FCC Chairman Ajit Pai is back in the spotlight as the new President and CEO of CTIA, the top lobbying group for the wireless industry.
But let's take a quick step back to understand how we got here.
Remember net neutrality? The idea that your internet provider should not control what websites you access, how fast they load, or how much you pay to reach them?
Ajit Pai repealed those protections in 2017. He ignored overwhelming public opposition and sided with telecom giants like AT&T and Verizon. Even worse, the courts upheld his decision. The predictable result has been higher prices, throttled speeds, and fewer consumer protections. Corporate gatekeepers now decide what we see, how fast we see it, and how much it costs.
This isn't democracy, it's a road paved towards dictatorship.
Net neutrality was about fairness, free expression, and opportunity. Pai threw all that away. And now, as head of the wireless industry's top lobbying group, he is positioned to make sure those protections never return.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..4yLgXo-Tr03t9qzI_u7uKFYPQ51zejyVo6Thbf5Bj2I?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159995040)
## **Pai 's War on Free Speech & Marginalized People**
Pai used his power as FCC chair to target free speech, immigrants, already marginalized communities, and waste taxpayer dollars meant to expand broadband access. Here's how:
1. **Gutting Free Speech:** In 2020, Pai aligned the FCC with Trump's political agenda by attacking something called Section 230. This is the part of the law that protects online platforms from being held liable for what users post. That law is a pillar of free speech on the internet. But Pai tried to reinterpret it through FCC rulemaking, setting the stage for government control over digital content.
2. **Anti-Immigrant Hysteria:** That playbook is alive and well in Trump's second campaign. What Pai started could become the legal foundation of a future censorship regime, one that punishes dissent while claiming to protect free speech. In fact, we're already seeing numerous examples of the Trump regime abducting and disappearing immigrants, green card holders, even U.S. citizens for their "crime" of criticizing the Trump presidency online. Thus, unsurprisingly, Pai is profiting from anti-Immigrant hysteria. After leaving office, Pai joined Searchlight Capital, a private equity firm known for cutting jobs and squeezing communities. One of Searchlight's major investments: TelevisaUnivision. That same Univision recently ran Trump-era DHS deportation ads targeting Latino audiences. Immigrant rights groups condemned the ads as fear-mongering. Pai said nothing. But silence, especially from someone in power, is a statement. And in this case, it says the check cleared to justify targeting already vulnerable communities.
3. **Targeting Low Income Communities:** And speaking of the most vulnerable, Pai also tried to gut the Lifeline program, which helps low-income families, seniors, and veterans afford broadband and phone service. At a time when access to the internet is essential for school, work, and health care, Pai treated it like a luxury. The digital divide did not happen by accident. It was created by decisions like these.
4. **Taxpayer Dollars Wasted:** Pai oversaw the 9.2 billion dollar Rural Digital Opportunity Fund, designed to bring high-speed internet to underserved communities. Instead, the money went to unqualified providers. Projects stalled. Communities that were promised broadband got nothing but paperwork and delays. The Biden administration had to pause the program just to stop the damage.

As you hear Musk's so-called "DOGE" claim they're making government more efficient, you'll notice Pai's immense waste at the FCC escapes their list. This is how billionaires and corporations are protecting themselves while robbing the American people. Thus, Ajit Pai is not an outlier. He is part of a larger pattern.
A pattern of consolidation of power between big corporations and government that has erased the line between public service and private enrichment.
It is the same playbook Elon Musk is now using: Billionaires reshaping federal policy in real time, without transparency or accountability, to deregulate agencies who hold them accountable, eliminate competition and opposition, and privatize control over public entities like the Internet, USPS, and Social Security.
Here's the bottom line: This is not about Democrat or Republican. Conservative or Liberal. It is about power and the consolidation of it amongst a select few, and usurping the rights of the many. Who gets power, who keeps it, and who pays the price. This is where we must stand united as Americans to stop this injustice--because autocracy is a one way street we cannot afford to travel down.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..4yLgXo-Tr03t9qzI_u7uKFYPQ51zejyVo6Thbf5Bj2I?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159995040)
## **What 's Next?**
The bottom line is that we must stop pretending people like Ajit Pai are neutral bureaucrats. They are political actors. And their actions have real consequences for real people, especially those already pushed to the margins.
Yet, if you google the name Ajit Pai, aside from a press release announcing his new role as CTIA's new CEO, there's zero mention of him in corporate media. No mention of his apparent self-dealing, no mention of his destructive deregulations, no mention of his targeting of already marginalized communities. Not one single article in 2025.
This apathy is nothing short of journalistic malpractice.
So let's call this what it is: regulatory corruption hiding in plain sight.
This is why it is critical we remain informed of this corruption, and use that knowledge to instead push for policies that protect people, not profits. That protects free speech, not throttles access. Pai is back to target our rights and to further undermine already marginalized communities. Except now he has even more money, even more power, and even fewer constraints.
The fight for a free, open, and affordable internet is not over, but corporate media is sadly already throwing in the towel. We cannot afford to lose this fight. That's why as a human rights lawyer I follow these developments closely--because our rights matter. You can count on me to continue to elevate these critical realities, especially because billionaire owned media hasn't and won't.
Keep your eye on Pai, and watch this space closely as I will continue to update you on these overt attacks on our free speech rights.

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Why vote early?
body:
Peter, 69 days until the June 10th primary election here in New Jersey. Have you made a plan to vote early? There are two ways to vote early. Early in-person: June 3, 2025 – June 8, 2025, Open Mondays-Saturdays: 10 am–
| | [ ]()
---
Peter,
---
**69 days** until the June 10th primary election here in New Jersey. Have you made a plan to vote early? There are two ways to vote early.
1. **Early in-person:** June 3, 2025 – June 8, 2025, Open Mondays-Saturdays: 10 am–8 pm; Sundays: 10 am–6 pm; Find details and your county’s locations [here](https://xtz223.keap-link013.com/v2/click/26453ad5ba5e720b3665b72cfbb416f7/eJyNkE0PgjAMhv9Lz8DkQw_cjDGGgB6Mns0ijU5xW7YCouG_O9R40sRj26dP8_YOhJJLykpI4Uq3KIrBA4N7oQVKmilJfP-cRuMkjEMPKiHPC6NqDen96_IHGNrJJEw8oE6jQzbr6SzPVotdka1yR2pu3I2_POPRJPp45stpVkDf_xTjRdC8cW4LKZkah0SlcKloayrHH4m0TRlr2zaQp-CgGmaJEzKsHCOUtKxRhH7st7yzPil_KAN7pEvl9FxrlOX7Nzl2ryP9A05Dbc4=).
2. **By mail:** Apply [here](https://xtz223.keap-link013.com/v2/click/a070e2161e183ad36dded1c5c9e30f3c/eJyNkEFvwjAMhf-Lz22zFuihN4QQqgocEDujjBrIliZRYlo61P-O2Sa0wyZxtP35PT9fgdBIQ2UNBVzoM8tGEIHHvXIKDc2sIbn_mmaTcTpKI9DKfCy8PTsorn8uP4B7e5yneQTUO2Rku5nOqnK92C3LdcWkk549ntKZvOTZQ2e-mpZLGIZ_hbFRNG9ZO0BB_oz3RLXiVPTqNfMnIhcKIbquS8x7crStCCQJBWpmlDVByBCQgnD1QRysb0LcWsL4rY8bqbT4XcRojlqFU8Ise0vn0NQ_j6uw_75guAF5SHjJ).

Here’s why it’s CRITICAL.
* **Beat the establishment at their own game.
** The establishment counts on running up the score before Election Day. It’s time for us to beat them at their own game. We need to FLOOD the ballot boxes with Common Sense votes before June 10.

* **Don’t risk last-minute Election Day problems.**
You never know what could happen day-of to making voting challenging or impossible. By voting early, you’ll have the peace of mind that your vote has already been cast and your voice heard.

If you do one thing for our state and our future today, please make a plan to vote early OR apply to vote by mail. Together, when we make our voices heard as a Common Sense majority, we will kick the lemons out of Trenton. It starts June 10. Thank you. For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader

Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsense.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsense.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.

Peter,
Hope Walz here - Governor Walz’s daughter!
My dad’s birthday is this Sunday, and I want to surprise him with something special: a virtual birthday card signed by his strongest supporters.
You probably know my dad as a teacher, a veteran, a championship-winning football coach, and, above all, a public servant who never stops fighting to improve people’s lives.
He’s all of those things, but to me, he’s just Dad—the guy who taught me to stand up for others, tells the worst dad jokes, and never stops cheering me on. I’m so proud of him and grateful to be his daughter.
My dad doesn’t like to make a big deal about his birthday, but I know it would mean a lot to him to get a card signed by the people he fights for every single day.
[**Would you take a moment to sign his birthday card and maybe leave a personal note?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105101142/537368098/273701049?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWY3ZmE2OS05ZDEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L3iJJfWpCq7o9Hqvg8d0TU82r97Tb7wxWDKqC-GMzOI=&emci=e9f7fa69-9d10-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=eaf7fa69-9d10-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=11244133)

Thank you,
Hope Walz** **

Fellow American,

As you know, Monday was the first real stress test of the 2026 election cycle - _**and we failed it.**_

Out of the more than 20,000 emails I sent asking for help, _**just nine supporters answered the call.
**_
I’m not here to make anyone feel bad; the point of my email today is to remind you that I don’t email for the sake of emailing. **[We’re reaching out because we really need help.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=14c1c9021e3f4fd9a6d00568ce320dfd&_e=p3PoPeEXKvSvUOlusjyX6nCEVaI3QGff1BfrYZlA7T0hy6eQo5-L8CBMG7Y8OKV6n5huVQEVdJ1ELdmRb4vJ2bR052ViWChxjigsEqDmLaOecaB9PD79SMOnFNYY1pvsa-yQgJMre2XmJpU0aLMDzPTaJ2pgjuWLe3xC9ciwRvs1MetSWv80PbQixY6N7PUqPVTOIzbGg-WZdRbW4rZaZSsrh7_rtCjeXNLT3_KJ_VxYpMlWw4fIsV8KXeE-3I8MjukYSdvJziUCM5dm6jXpMoKcbyxGYZHYZ3NszxWUoLEQwfcgAPewZ9v2Nbsthn20nIe0ZoIrTAncJ6awjzB6Y9Ge7KhapPxqM5UXffpmVMf26gbMlB3fMs8Drrf0Ev3p4RzED5iX13Y9uhftn9BxMvmh8dMRhozv8mi1901J4KgprJihIwX8MzlMX3dqjmdEWQbfla6J9tzb7hPgu6HJ-A%3D%3D) **

If you can, please make a generous donation right now to help compensate for the lack of participation in Monday's fundraising drive.

As I said to you then and am repeating now, **[I’m being targeted by George Soros, and my re-election isn’t a certainty.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=14c1c9021e3f4fd9a6d00568ce320dfd&_e=p3PoPeEXKvSvUOlusjyX6nCEVaI3QGff1BfrYZlA7T0hy6eQo5-L8CBMG7Y8OKV6n5huVQEVdJ1ELdmRb4vJ2bR052ViWChxjigsEqDmLaOecaB9PD79SMOnFNYY1pvsa-yQgJMre2XmJpU0aLMDzPTaJ2pgjuWLe3xC9ciwRvs1MetSWv80PbQixY6N7PUqPVTOIzbGg-WZdRbW4rZaZSsrh7_rtCjeXNLT3_KJ_VxYpMlWw4fIsV8KXeE-3I8MjukYSdvJziUCM5dm6jXpMoKcbyxGYZHYZ3NszxWUoLENRngvEdkaoOCy4v8gcMTag3ynczIIpj-pwNthPLl3wL6MTYWfWxOPzqw3CSe5y6gmWFX1AEa1icVgUrdukRkcvCy-cAoPKPQEp4HhCRVVEjq7GenmXaQcYX6nKWwmgl3wJbN_XTkjSoAn4v2Fc9FnZ_QBWeQ5D2v3HnocCUtjkA%3D%3D) **

Sincerely,
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=14c1c9021e3f4fd9a6d00568ce320dfd&_e=p3PoPeEXKvSvUOlusjyX6nCEVaI3QGff1BfrYZlA7T0hy6eQo5-L8CBMG7Y8OKV6n5huVQEVdJ1ELdmRb4vJ2bR052ViWChxjigsEqDmLaOecaB9PD79SMOnFNYY1pvsa-yQgJMre2XmJpU0aLMDzPTaJ2pgjuWLe3xC9ciwRvs1MetSWv80PbQixY6N7PUqPVTOIzbGg-WZdRbW4rZaZSsrh7_rtCjeXNLT3_KJ_VxYpMlWw4fIsV8KXeE-3I8MjukYSdvJziUCM5dm6jXpMoKcbyxGYZHYZ3NszxWUoLHL_YqQa7JKCJJEm128dHwpHCbnNJmXWdIaXvsTYiAccQdtxq5PYwB1gl9Yo6XbgPWKKoUVvlhXBW0H_r0ZbUQz9x6bLdB3IeNNy9CyzbHLgq-9A_F6D6FR1YFILAZeKx6CNz5BMVOkyaL72KLDKtU91cpePw-0wNtDdFy_zwVNIw%3D%3D)
Beth Van Duyne
Member of Congress, TX-24

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration?

**Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.**

She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country.

**Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans.

name: Karen Tallian
subject: What Tuesday's results mean for Indiana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/67635/images/IDP%20logo.jpg]
Peter ,

Republicans are in disarray after the political earthquake that struck across America on Tuesday.

– Democracy prevailed in Wisconsin after Susan Crawford defeated her Trump and Musk-backed opponent to keep a liberal majority on the State Supreme Court.

– Democrats overperformed in Florida by 20 percent in the congressional special elections.

– Senator Cory Booker gave a record-breaking 25 hour speech on the floor of the Senate to tell Americans the truth about Trump, Musk and DOGE.

What’s clear is that Americans are fed up with the disaster in Washington, and Democrats are fired up and ready to see change.

However, we can only make this moment matter if we harness this momentum.

We know it’s been a brutal last few months. The headlines, the constant back-and-forth on tariffs, and the uncertainty of what comes next.

Tuesday’s results should give us great hope. If the results hold across the country in next year’s midterms, Democrats would flip over 50 seats and claim a large House majority.

We’ll be going around Indiana in the coming weeks and months to do our part in making that 2026 success a reality. We need just four more State House seats to break the Republican supermajority. We can do it next year.

Help us reach more Hoosiers and grow our Party stronger going into the 2026 cycle by making a donation today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rebuild2025]

Thanks,
Chair Karen Tallian

name: Chris Pappas
subject: I’m running for Senate
body:
I’ll always put New Hampshire first. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105103497/537374402/-1812448514?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjFhMjMyNi1hMTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vi3oSHAe62_e-lloY4QsGClEgwJus7Mwsk39T8wwoJQ=)
Peter, I’m Congressman Chris Pappas, and Eric Sorensen said I could reach out with some big news: **I’m officially running to be New Hampshire’s next U.S. Senator.** I’m going to share more about why I’m in this race, but if you’re already on board, [**split a contribution to my campaign and Eric's today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105103498/537374407/-1650119418?refcode=em-4.3.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjFhMjMyNi1hMTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vi3oSHAe62_e-lloY4QsGClEgwJus7Mwsk39T8wwoJQ=) I’m running for Senate because at this pivotal moment, our economy, our democracy, and our way of life are on the line. New Hampshire deserves a Senator who is grounded in the people, places, and values of this state – and one who is ready to lead on day one. Our country is at a crossroads, and the decisions we make now will have generational impacts. You can count on me to continue taking on big fights and to confront the Trump Administration, self-dealing billionaires, and extreme politicians who are threatening our future and our ability to get things done for New Hampshire. [**Peter, can I count on you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign with a $3 contribution, split between my campaign and Eric Sorensen's right now? We can’t win this race without major grassroots support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105103499/537374412/-1650119418?refcode=em-4.3.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjFhMjMyNi1hMTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vi3oSHAe62_e-lloY4QsGClEgwJus7Mwsk39T8wwoJQ=) **These fights are deeply personal to me.** My family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in Manchester 108 years ago, a small business that remains at the heart of the community today. Running that small business showed me the power of hard work and serving others, but the opportunity that my ancestors and so many others like them sought has never been further away – and the Trump Administration is too busy cutting deals for their billionaire buddies to give a damn. I’m also openly gay and happily married to my husband, Vann. With the current wave of hateful policies leveled at the LGBTQ+ community, I know how important representation is at this moment. **If elected, I’d be the first openly gay male U.S. Senator in history** – a badge of honor I’d wear proudly as I advocate for full equality. I am the proud product of public education, and I come from a family of business owners (_my grandfather invented the chicken tender at the restaurant – seriously!_). I understand firsthand the need to support neighborhood schools and small businesses in our community. **These are the lifeblood of our economy and the pillars of opportunity for everyone.** My life experiences are what led me to successfully run for four terms in Congress and win in one of the “swingiest” districts in the nation. Before I won my election in 2018, no one had managed to hold the seat for more than one term for more than a decade. I’m no stranger to tough electoral fights. **Now I’m ready to take on the fight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue.** We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines of the big fights ahead – not with so much at stake, from the rising costs debilitating working families to the threats to the future of our democracy. We’ve taken on big fights together in Congress. Now it’s time to win this critical Senate seat so we can keep standing up to the Trump Administration and the self-dealing billionaires threatening our future. Can I count on you to join the fight? [**Peter, if you’re with me, let’s make a powerful statement together and prove that we’re ready to win this race. clean_body: I’ll always put New Hampshire first. | = Peter, I’m Congressman Chris Pappas, and Eric Sorensen said I could reach out with some big news: I’m officially running to be New Hampshire’s next U.S. Senator. I’m going to share more about why I’m in this race, but if you’re already on board, = I’m running for Senate because at this pivotal moment, our economy, our democracy, and our way of life are on the line. New Hampshire deserves a Senator who is grounded in the people, places, and values of this state – and one who is ready to lead on day one. Our country is at a crossroads, and the decisions we make now will have generational impacts. You can count on me to continue taking on big fights and to confront the Trump Administration, self-dealing billionaires, and extreme politicians who are threatening our future and our ability to get things done for New Hampshire. = These fights are deeply personal to me. My family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in Manchester 108 years ago, a small business that remains at the heart of the community today. Running that small business showed me the power of hard work and serving others, but the opportunity that my ancestors and so many others like them sought has never been further away – and the Trump Administration is too busy cutting deals for their billionaire buddies to give a damn. I’m also openly gay and happily married to my husband, Vann. With the current wave of hateful policies leveled at the LGBTQ+ community, I know how important representation is at this moment. If elected, I’d be the first openly gay male U.S. Senator in history – a badge of honor I’d wear proudly as I advocate for full equality. I am the proud product of public education, and I come from a family of business owners (my grandfather invented the chicken tender at the restaurant – seriously!). I understand firsthand the need to support neighborhood schools and small businesses in our community. These are the lifeblood of our economy and the pillars of opportunity for everyone. My life experiences are what led me to successfully run for four terms in Congress and win in one of the “swingiest” districts in the nation. Before I won my election in 2018, no one had managed to hold the seat for more than one term for more than a decade. I’m no stranger to tough electoral fights. Now I’m ready to take on the fight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue. We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines of the big fights ahead – not with so much at stake, from the rising costs debilitating working families to the threats to the future of our democracy. We’ve taken on big fights together in Congress. Now it’s time to win this critical Senate seat so we can keep standing up to the Trump Administration and the self-dealing billionaires threatening our future. Can I count on you to join the fight? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you again to Eric Sorensen for letting me reach out today. With gratitude, Chris = | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. name: Katie Porter
subject: This is what fighting back looks like

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39608%2E3422442%2E9YQDmY)
Derek, did you see Senator Cory Booker’s record-breaking speech this week?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250403_1_ak?refcode=em20250403-39608&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39608_3422442_9YQDmY&akid=39608%2E3422442%2E9YQDmY)
He held the Senate floor for over 25 hours in protest of Donald Trump dismantling the federal government. And, he broke the record for the longest Senate floor speech ever, beating out Strom Thurmond’s pro-segregation filibuster of the Civil Rights Act.
As Sen. Booker said during his speech, “I’m here because as powerful as [Sen. Thurmond] was, the people are more powerful.”
**This is what fighting back looks like—using whatever power you have to press for change.**
It’s the same mindset I embodied when I questioned Trump’s CDC Director in the early days of the pandemic. It didn’t matter that I had no seniority and was the last to question; I didn’t take no for an answer until the nation’s top doctor agreed to make COVID testing free to all Americans.
Sen. Booker is right. **You have power, Derek.**
Now is the time to speak up, get loud, and send a clear message that we aren’t going to let right-wing extremists win.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250403_1_ak?refcode=em20250403-39608&refcode2=39608_3422442_9YQDmY&akid=39608%2E3422442%2E9YQDmY)
Onward,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250403-39608&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39608_3422442_9YQDmY&akid=39608%2E3422442%2E9YQDmY)**

name: Chris Pappas
subject: I’m running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I’ll always put New Hampshire first.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87667?refcode=em20250403-8865&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8865%2E614464%2EwWJTqj)
Peter, I’m Congressman Chris Pappas, and Heartland Patriots said I could reach out with some big news:
**I’m officially running to be New Hampshire’s next U.S. Senator.** I’m going to share more about why I’m in this race, but if you’re already on board, **[split a contribution to my campaign and Heartland Patriots today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87667?refcode=em20250403-8865&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8865%2E614464%2EwWJTqj)**
I’m running for Senate because at this pivotal moment, our economy, our democracy, and our way of life are on the line. New Hampshire deserves a Senator who is grounded in the people, places, and values of this state – and one who is ready to lead on day one.
Our country is at a crossroads, and the decisions we make now will have generational impacts. You can count on me to continue taking on big fights and to confront the Trump Administration, self-dealing billionaires, and extreme politicians who are threatening our future and our ability to get things done for New Hampshire.
**[Peter, can I count on you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign with a $10 contribution, split between my campaign and Heartland Patriots right now? We can’t win this race without major grassroots support.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87667?refcode=em20250403-8865&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8865%2E614464%2EwWJTqj)**
**These fights are deeply personal to me.** My family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in Manchester 108 years ago, a small business that remains at the heart of the community today. Running that small business showed me the power of hard work and serving others, but the opportunity that my ancestors and so many others like them sought has never been further away – and the Trump Administration is too busy cutting deals for their billionaire buddies to give a damn.
I’m also openly gay and happily married to my husband, Vann. With the current wave of hateful policies leveled at the LGBTQ+ community, I know how important representation is at this moment. **If elected, I’d be the first openly gay male U.S. Senator in history** – a badge of honor I’d wear proudly as I advocate for full equality.
I am the proud product of public education, and I come from a family of business owners _(my grandfather invented the chicken tender at the restaurant – seriously!)._ I understand firsthand the need to support neighborhood schools and small businesses in our community. **These are the lifeblood of our economy and the pillars of opportunity for everyone.**
My life experiences are what led me to successfully run for four terms in Congress and win in one of the “swingiest” districts in the nation. Before I won my election in 2018, no one had managed to hold the seat for more than one term for more than a decade. I’m no stranger to tough electoral fights. **Now I’m ready to take on the fight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue.**
We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines of the big fights ahead – not with so much at stake, from the rising costs debilitating working families to the threats to the future of our democracy. We’ve taken on big fights together in Congress. Now it’s time to win this critical Senate seat so we can keep standing up to the Trump Administration and the self-dealing billionaires threatening our future. Can I count on you to join the fight?
**[Peter, if you’re with me, let’s make a powerful statement together and prove that we’re ready to win this race. Become a Founding Donor with a $10 donation to my campaign and Heartland Patriots now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87667?refcode=em20250403-8865&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8865%2E614464%2EwWJTqj)**
Thank you again to Heartland Patriots for letting me reach out today.
With gratitude,
Chris

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---
Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_heartland-patriots/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_heartland_patriots/?t=5&akid=8865%2E614464%2EwWJTqj). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:

A woman who started microdosing with Mighty Micro recently went to see her doctor after she used this:

https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuegwjIteknop5I0ITm91s6gdh&s=BOEMMIANOGFMBGNE (https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuegwjIteknop5I1ITm91s6gdh&s=BOEMMIANOGFMBGNE

clean_body: [] Team, I wanted to take a moment and say thank you . Thanks to your grassroots support, we were able to reach our big $25,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal! 🎉 This team continues to get stronger with every passing day. And I'm so grateful for the support I received from every single person who has supported our people-powered campaign. Virginia is ready for a leader who will fight for your families, fight for reproductive freedom, and defend our democracy. And folks, this race is just heating up. My opponent, MAGA loyalist Jason Miyares, should be worried about the grassroots movement ready to retire him. That means our team can't slow down especially if MAGA Republicans see Miyares as vulnerable and start to fund him a warchest to keep this seat. So before you close out of this email, will you chip in $10 or more to build our campaign's momentum? [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE MORE [] Thank you again, Jay Jones Jay Jones for Virginia 1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

subject: Reconvene, I-81 Survey, Silent Book Club, and more!

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Email%20Logo.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Sam%20Headshot.png]
ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/sam%20and%20trish.jpg]
Canvass for Sam and Trish!
*this is a place holder until the new facebook event is created*
Join us Sunday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on September 3rd at the Williamson Road Library, 12:00pm.
Located at 3837 Williamson Rd, Roanoke, VA 24012.
IN THE COMMUNITY
https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424 [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke River Contamination Settlement Reached Roanoke Young Democrats Canvass Tailgate
Without current regulations, the water contamination caused by these companies could have been so much worse. Come out to support Roanoke Valley Democratic candidates!
Read More [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] The Roanoke Young Democrats will be enjoying pizza, coffee, donuts and more before canvassing to knock for Trish White-Boyd, Sam Rasoul, Lily Franklin, Samantha Newell, Jade Harris, & Nancy Horn. Door knocking will begin about 12:30 pm!
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke EnVision Center Kids Movie Night - Sept. 28 Fall Harvest Festival
The movie is free and there will be snacks and much more! Fall into wellness at the Harvest Festival!
Read More Celebrate the end of farm season with fun experiences for the whole family. Try new activities to support your well-being. Connect with others in a beautiful outdoor space. Free meals available with registration. This event is free and open to everyone!
Read More [https://web.cvent.com/event/19422342-be4f-417d-9fc3-6a6bf883e794/summary]
https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992 [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/ [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] Read More [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RCDC.jpeg] Join the Roanoke City Democrats!
Roanoke City Democratic Committee meetings are now in-person and open to non-members. We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month. This month we are meeting at 6 pm at the Main Library (706 S Jefferson St, Roanoke, VA 24016). Sign up for meeting reminders and other information here [https://www.roanokedemocrats.com/subscribe] .
Join us for a social hour every first Thursday of the month at Leonore Restaurant, 128 Campbell St. SW, 5-7 pm.
Join Roanoke Young Dems! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RYD.png]
Meetings occur on the first Monday and third Sunday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies.
Contact: YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com [YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com] to get involved!
Donate Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samrasoul]
Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime.
My very best,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-07-29%20at%203.44.06%20PM%20%281%29.png]
Del. Sam Rasoul
