name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I had to do what’s right for America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
Please read my heartfelt note.
| Fellow American,
---
“America first” is not just a slogan.
---
It’s an _oath_ of leadership to the American people.
---
**That’s why I had to do what’s right for America and withdraw my nomination for U.N. Ambassador to remain in the House and _protect_ our razor-thin Majority.**
---
Our country stands on the horizon of a new “Golden Age.” We cannot let the Democrats flip the House and rob us of this historic opportunity to Make America Great Again!
---
_The President _entrusted_ me to protect the House. Now, I’m entrusting YOU._
---
My Senior Advisor, Alex, gave me a special list of top donors – some of whom have been with us since Day One and helped me become the youngest woman elected to Congress in 2014.
---
When I say “top” donors, these are not _necessarily_ the biggest donors, but the loyal ones who never gave up and never lost sight of our mission to put _America_ first.
---
You were on the list, Fellow American.
---
**With the sacrifice I just made, you can be certain that I’m going ALL IN to win. And now, I need you to join me.**
---
**That’s why I’m entrusting you with a 500% match to help us level the playing field against the Left’s Soros-funded Money Machine.**
---
_So, are you with me?_
---
[**Please make a contribution of ANY amount to claim your 500% match – and together, we’ll defend the President’s House Majority.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f462cb37a3674549b883fffea85f9603&_e=-b-LSMfa1WSB_JPNUgPXagY3yCvsFc2DP2GNmkNW93z-x_DiaFRjyMN9PSTBlpldJZcEcjDVdIqEEMibEZsSXqMsLT5jqm7yOS-rLngq4cjZK53H1JEpcRJbYXkKONFWf3hijBNE1iAgafhzJwOzxv_dePFOZ2NENG6CE7h4WCbxCzajW7T78yeX2XqfxjKfv8w3uZLXnoabS8HTbHkLAEF6oN_rUak3nD6WUh4g9P6IJ97LMLWRXTWsj-wEclvfpijEZRlx3OgA6rbylLY7CIXfxdHYIsepwXAcmkb9VLz5L2d5yMyMF-00EJ6ygT_y4g92nn3mrRAAILeE42MbD8phdpkpXA9Qa-ft2AR1oYY%3D)
---

[CONTRIBUTE >>](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f462cb37a3674549b883fffea85f9603&_e=-b-LSMfa1WSB_JPNUgPXagY3yCvsFc2DP2GNmkNW93z-x_DiaFRjyMN9PSTBlpldJZcEcjDVdIqEEMibEZsSXqMsLT5jqm7yOS-rLngq4cjZK53H1JEpcRJbYXkKONFWf3hijBNE1iAgafhzJwOzxv_dePFOZ2NENG6CE7h4WCbxCzajW7T78yeX2XqfxjKfv8w3uZLXnoabS8HTbHkLAP9kKZxbxl9DeqbHttCib2GYABI0vUhiYW2wsC9BKh1uzlvwk6CiruywAdhxBs3tQXFPf5gwhox4oYk8Sqh5JFwcssBvC9hZ_C_sHg0KJ1KiXOTIMJHFMjy15QZM9zF9zrPF1y6c3k0rzqKsJWtvo4Q%3D)
---

Thank you and God Bless,
---

clean_body: Please read my heartfelt note. | Fellow American, “America first” is not just a slogan. It’s an oath of leadership to the American people. That’s why I had to do what’s right for America and withdraw my nomination for U.N. Ambassador to remain in the House and protect our razor-thin Majority. Our country stands on the horizon of a new “Golden Age.” We cannot let the Democrats flip the House and rob us of this historic opportunity to Make America Great Again! The President entrusted me to protect the House. Now, I’m entrusting YOU. My Senior Advisor, Alex, gave me a special list of top donors – some of whom have been with us since Day One and helped me become the youngest woman elected to Congress in 2014. When I say “top” donors, these are not necessarily the biggest donors, but the loyal ones who never gave up and never lost sight of our mission to put America first. You were on the list, Fellow American. With the sacrifice I just made, you can be certain that I’m going ALL IN to win. And now, I need you to join me. That’s why I’m entrusting you with a 500% match to help us level the playing field against the Left’s Soros-funded Money Machine. So, are you with me? Thank you and God Bless, Rep. Elise Stefanik Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

Friend, my friend Cory Booker just held the Senate floor for over 25 hours straight – making a historic stand on behalf of the American people, who are being directly harmed by Donald Trump and Elon Musk's reckless and extreme policies.
I am in awe of Cory and his strength. And I was proud to join him on the Senate floor to support him and speak specifically about how Trump's tariffs can and will have a devastating impact on Nevada's middle-class families, small businesses, and tourism industry.

**Now, it's time for _all_ of us to continue what Cory started with his record-breaking speech. It's time for _all_ of us to keep speaking out, keep fighting back, and keep putting our whole hearts into flipping the Senate so we can stop Trump's dangerous agenda once and for all.**

body:
Can I count on you to step up?
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1103%2E400544%2ETtUwxV)
This is huge:
A few weeks ago, me and my team set a big goal to raise $150,000 online before our first state reporting deadline on Monday, April 7. But thanks to supporters like you, we reached it with four days left to go. 💪
**Now, we’re going even bigger so we can post the fiercest fundraising report possible.**
**That’s why today, we’re setting a stretch goal of $250,000 — it’s very ambitious and could come up short.** But, if everyone reading this email pitched in $5 or more, we’d hit our goal before Monday at midnight.

name: Andy Roth
subject: Arizona = Freedom Caucus State?
body:

Dear Friend, Big things are happening in Arizona, and we have a massive tax battle in South Carolina. Let's dive into it.
---
|
---
**ARIZONA** It's time to turn Arizona RED. The state is already home to some great patriots representing it in Congress - including House Freedom Caucus members Reps. Andy Biggs, Eli Crane, and Paul Gosar. ...And our **Arizona Freedom Caucus** , led by State Senator Jake Hoffman, is exerting its amazing influence in the state capitol. ...And former AZFC member, Justin Heap, is Maricopa County's recorder - he's in charge of voter registration and all elections in one of the country's largest counties.But more needs to happen to turn Arizona from purple into a brick red, freedom-loving state.**The good news is that the wheels are in motion to make that happen.** Earlier this year, Congressman Biggs announced that he's running for Governor, clearing the conservative lane to challenge the weak Democrat incumbent, Gov. Katie Hobbs.Plus, AZ Freedom Caucus member, State Rep. Alex Kolodin, earlier this week announced that he's running for Secretary of State. Kolodin is an election attorney and his deepest passion is election integrity reform, something that Arizona desperately needs.Not settling for just those two races, the Arizona Freedom Caucus is trying to recruit conservative candidates for other key positions, too - including the congressional seat vacated by Biggs, the Treasurer, and the Attorney General. The Democrats are having an absolute fit over this. When Kolodin announced his candidacy, the largest media outlet - the liberal _Arizona Republic_ \- ran [this headline](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjnjdpqYq68qyJptPtsImLJVwOCQbrHMtoZLZAmVVOAxTR4XNcCheVIXd-2Fh8bfkvgWg-2FWvTH7BqdKIXGd6tzMog92fuvMG0PV4IggrkeOARgAjJK0oN3nM14NyLQzfaW6wHoWVsZBR7pxMjcCs36X6EEfGBUHCltOBO81y6Zs1vXR1SvG6B7atS4G-2FkGTTS9Z4g-3D-3DGuWg_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerrTf3uAvwIC5YDX7SYsGsYq9URu-2Fw0fNTx1nQ3ahwLhbKtQVUVC60Y1DZgiYCKXejTB14aO8bv4UxRFj59O3TGrpvDKxoeg-2BVMJJXizFZ2pgkqs-2FK1eCO0k6IF0iEoLb0C1vE5-2BPz1vuam0S0Ehtnk4RMwaIBYkZO8EmtzzLEfXiKLPzqRzMeFjCyGvCwjGZtwhSi6U6aD6t8oCVbRwy1EnOZW2zQszv1Jf2SfmUlv74-3D):**"Alexander Kolodin seeks secretary of state post under Freedom Caucus banner"** And a local political media group is equating the AZFC to the mafia that is looking for "ring kissers" to pursue its agenda. Check this one out (TFW means "That feeling when"):
---
[](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjqGq4xZnjl9Yeu-2F8NGB0vPWEDz9w-2BTfephB7HUTitJiVpuGq67ypZXSP-2FVyShidSVQp99GqQnqAnhdfLBy6xvz3NbMN3rQuw8uGu9EYk3UwJcmigdvbCooF7z21VBJymRg-3D-3D05QF_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerrTf3uAvwIC5YDX7SYsGsYq9URu-2Fw0fNTx1nQ3ahwLhbKtQVUVC60Y1DZgiYCKXejTB14aO8bv4UxRFj59O3TGg3hIzzknXqJLpaFmdxBRag3nykcQ5HSebJ8QUhOmzdUYPATH1-2FbSiFSUvgAHEtxoJImh-2FcAzxavuC-2FnBgl0lafSE6LxRHdderW-2FDi307ElXb4lacuZreiJOr4VTWzFwP6lL46-2Fi-2FFSnwxBj6J04Dnc-3D)
---
**Bottom Line: Our state freedom caucuses are planting the seeds to retake each and every one of our 50 states. **So far, our **Wyoming Freedom Caucus** has successfully taken control of the Wyoming State House, our **Louisiana Freedom Caucus** has made the Bayou State arguably the most conservative state in the Union, and if we're able to get Biggs, Kolodin, and other freedom-loving patriots elected into office, we will make Arizona great again.**THIS IS HOW WE WIN.**
---
|
---
**SOUTH CAROLINA** "Republican" leaders in South Carolina recently announced plans to consider consequential tax reform to lower the state's top tax rate from over 6% ultimately down to 2.49%.The **South Carolina Freedom Caucus** initially liked the sound of that. They have been pushing for pro-growth tax reform since they were formed in 2022.But sadly the Columbia Swamp - to no one's surprise - is using smoke and mirrors. The tax bill that they offered would actually raise taxes on over 60% of residents, mostly people in the lower and middle-income tax brackets. The optics on this are terrible. In the midst of persistent inflation and uncertainty, the tone-deaf RINOs in charge are basically saying, "We want those who can least afford it to pay more taxes to satisfy our egregious spending habit, which we refuse to stop doing."One insider even told SC Freedom Caucus member, Josiah Magnuson, that "people aren't going to know they got hit with any tax increases in 2026, so we'll be fine for re-election." Imagine having that kind of belittling attitude towards the voters.When the details of the tax bill (HB 4216) were released, our South Carolina Freedom Caucus immediately called them out on it. They sounded the alarm, alerted the public, and convinced 9 of their colleagues (at last count) to remove their names as co-sponsors of the bill. **The pressure worked. **Just yesterday, Leadership announced that they are postponing consideration of the bill due to the aggressive pushback. Now it's up to them to work with the SC Freedom Caucus to produce a REAL pro-growth tax reform bill that will benefit everyone. Lower the rates (or repeal the income tax all together) and cut spending!
---
|
---
|
---
**CELEBRATING WINS: **With their 2025 legislation session over, the **South Dakota Freedom Caucus** is celebrating their victories, which includes killing over $240 million in tax hikes, banning eminent domain abuse, and expanding gun rights. [Check it out](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTji3-2Bfpk4rqiviUWmSBgwSZLv1rG7ntheb0FmLGWU1Nbe9BF1snrLR1z7cwcPcc6oTEYBA-2Bu4iee3bDSP3x7Ta88-3DqAPu_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerrTf3uAvwIC5YDX7SYsGsYq9URu-2Fw0fNTx1nQ3ahwLhbKtQVUVC60Y1DZgiYCKXejTB14aO8bv4UxRFj59O3TGlZrVXIZ9yU8saKRCorXHGnhqV9y27CVP81NhA5kQFT89GpFlsp9Zk3Po36BF7nwZRpp9zF2I-2BRwRUh4bYchWetX6QAsgJAB4j4FZpOWJZ8LsLnjDh9Mwdid4iYQieRcA72K-2BXjUnEHTinBjv0sAlzw-3D). [Watch it here](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjvpgx-2BqUdst4LmtGP-2F4sRdQfVTX8eUZtPoSvuS7n5SGKKQrrQ519SUwpf3uNPjWkmA-3D-3D-TwU_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerrTf3uAvwIC5YDX7SYsGsYq9URu-2Fw0fNTx1nQ3ahwLhbKtQVUVC60Y1DZgiYCKXejTB14aO8bv4UxRFj59O3TGvgx5-2Bn6ezJgLf4uQAAgNGpLZ92L2tYYhd9hsttrHE5VQYdjQLaf-2F6IJ7y5ASsG3dQZFaMWpvxtyWT6Ch6cySawB1-2FunZha3WzeA-2F1AaeRjAkSxK1GOFq6qM73YhaWEykNoJrTA4ow5usNywFUtB26Q-3D).**GIANFORTE = BIG SPENDER** : The **Montana Freedom Caucus** is calling out "Republican" Governor Greg Gianforte for bragging about a 1% tax cut while simultaneously trying to grow government spending by 10%. [Read it here](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjmuAKmNlhopAWiF8Etm8k1CjmoBKVJLd8jr-2BKBS0ezp-2FTV1WHshVKb6yBHQhTbb-2FAKwbdeg0S9MLAu-2FINuS1Y8U-3DvHyp_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerrTf3uAvwIC5YDX7SYsGsYq9URu-2Fw0fNTx1nQ3ahwLhbKtQVUVC60Y1DZgiYCKXejTB14aO8bv4UxRFj59O3TGubpiX6JAeLQVFF7SWg6slKKAfPu6B0-2BRQ1G0KEH-2F19SJiXiJ2kZY9Lnjn0oPwIxwZ-2BSjE6vr3cSP6zBa1ylNDrB-2FjJTMtbvg7saunetkVGwB-2Bt0UuoQkHOOi3rqx3QeSXfRqqM8EoIxRn7xDlW-2FNG4-3D).

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: I just introduced legislation to defund DOGE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Elon Musk’s so-called “Department of Government Efficiency” — DOGE — has been a disaster.
It’s not saving money. It’s not making government more efficient.
It’s slashing funding for cancer research. It’s laying off air traffic controllers. It’s gutting the VA and taking down critical government websites for no reason. Not to mention shuttering USAID — putting our national security at risk! — and initiating mass layoffs at HHS.
And through it all, Elon Musk’s companies keep raking in billions in federal contracts, profiting off the very government he’s trying to tear down.
Enough.
I just introduced the Delete DOGE Act to shut it down — and stop Elon Musk from gutting government services millions of people rely on while his companies cash in.
The disasters of DOGE keep getting worse. It “accidentally” eliminated funding for Ebola and bird flu prevention. It laid off the workers who answer the VA’s suicide crisis line. It fired nuclear bomb specialists — only for the Department of Energy to have to rehire them (and provide back-pay for the time they weren’t working, too).
This is not how a functioning government operates — and even though we’re in the minority, Democrats can’t just stand by and watch this chaos unfold.
I’m proud to have introduced the Delete DOGE Act, and I hope you’ll help me build strong public momentum behind the bill by adding your name to support it today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/8UzfJu8GXkq2fy6fVWGDSw2]
My bill would:
* Prohibit any federal funds from being used to implement, administer, or enforce the executive orders establishing DOGE.
* Rescind unobligated funds currently available to DOGE and its associated entities.
* Restrict future expenditures or transfers of federal funds for DOGE-related projects or personnel.
Let me be clear: I’m not saying there are no improvements or efficiencies to be made in the federal government — far from it. I’m fully supportive of thoughtful and purposeful audits and reform of government agencies and efforts. But what DOGE is doing isn’t reform — it’s sabotage.
As elected leaders, members of Congress owe it to the American people to take action against the recklessness and danger DOGE is spreading. I hope my GOP colleagues will find the courage to publicly stand up to Elon Musk (they certainly don’t have good things to say about him in private) and help us restore stability, accountability, and public trust in government.
If you agree that this is a critical priority, add your name to support the Delete DOGE Act, and help me push for its consideration in the House. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/8UzfJu8GXkq2fy6fVWGDSw2]
Thank you,
Sara

California’s 51st District

name: Nellie Pou
subject: I'm so grateful to you 🙏
body:
Hundreds of donors rallied to help us hit our first end-of-quarter deadline of this campaign.

| |
---
Hi team, I want to send my sincerest thanks to all of you. In the last few weeks, we've been working overtime to end the first quarter of our campaign in the strongest possible position. These numbers are reported publicly, and Mike Johnson and the NRCC will look at them. We already know we're a top target for them since my election was closer than expected and Donald Trump won in NJ-09. But because so many of you stepped up, my team tells me we were able to pass our online fundraising goal. That matters. Hitting each of our goals gives us the tools to fight back against the relentless attacks that started from the moment I cast my first votes on the floor of the House. To win in this tough race, we have to be able to hire staff, organize, and deliver for NJ-09 — all at the same time. But rest assured that important work is already underway. If you missed out on your chance to give last month, help us get ahead on April's goal. Here's a link: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=thank_you](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105108196/537388612/-200729754?amp;refcode=250403_np_ty_l1&ms=250403_np_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDQzMWU2NjgtYTcxMC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5EscmPpGsWOFmRoUNplNwXhJBtTltS2ZsOREKtfRFwg=)** In this fight with you, Congresswoman Nellie Pou
| | |
---|---|---

### About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105108197/537388613/-3691057?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=4431e668-a710-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=250403_np_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDQzMWU2NjgtYTcxMC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5EscmPpGsWOFmRoUNplNwXhJBtTltS2ZsOREKtfRFwg=) | [Give Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105108198/537388614/-3691057?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=4431e668-a710-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=250403_np_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDQzMWU2NjgtYTcxMC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5EscmPpGsWOFmRoUNplNwXhJBtTltS2ZsOREKtfRFwg=)

subject: We're facing two serious challenges.

I've been a combat pilot. An astronaut. I'm a father, a husband, and a grandfather. A senator. And now, I'm honored to be one of your DSCC Vice Chairs, working to win back a Democratic Senate majority.

**Through it all, I've learned the importance of asking for help when it's needed --_especially_ when faced with a difficult situation.**

**[So I'll be blunt with you:_Your country_ needs your help right now to flip the Senate blue >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250403-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250403-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19748%2E9716520%2EqPlO0M)**

| [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=13&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250403-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250403-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19748%2E9716520%2EqPlO0M)
---

Falling short of that mission is _not an option_ if we want to stop Donald Trump's chaotic and illegal acts. **But Democrats are facing two serious challenges that could keep us out of the majority:**
1. National Republicans just spent over $500 million to take back the Senate -- and now they're saying they'll spend at _least_ that much on just TWO of their top target races.

2. Trump now controls _all_ the power of the American presidency, and he's using it to attack and intimidate -- making our job as Democrats even harder.

**We need an _immediate_ surge of resources to fight back and win.** But right now, we're falling short of our critical $50,000 fundraising goal -- and at this crucial early stage in the fight, failure to launch would spell disaster.

**[So I'm humbly asking you: Will you chip in $5 today to help us flip the Senate? Your contribution before midnight would mean the world to me >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=14&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250403-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250403-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19748%2E9716520%2EqPlO0M)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Thank you so much for having my back,

Mark Kelly

Vice Chair, DSCC

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250403-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250403-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19748%2E9716520%2EqPlO0M)

Former U.S. Navy combat pilot, engineer, and NASA astronaut Mark Kelly is a senator from Arizona and a Vice Chair of the DSCC. He's fighting to lower costs for Arizonans, hold Trump accountable, and create good-paying jobs.

**[Will you answer Mark Kelly's call to fight back against National Republicans and flip the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250403-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250403-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19748%2E9716520%2EqPlO0M)**

clean_body: | | | | | I've been a combat pilot. An astronaut. I'm a father, a husband, and a grandfather. A senator. Through it all, I've learned the importance of asking for help when it's needed --especially when faced with a difficult situation. | Falling short of that mission is not an option if we want to stop Donald Trump's chaotic and illegal acts. But Democrats are facing two serious challenges that could keep us out of the majority: 1. National Republicans just spent over $500 million to take back the Senate -- and now they're saying they'll spend at least that much on just TWO of their top target races. 2. Trump now controls all the power of the American presidency, and he's using it to attack and intimidate -- making our job as Democrats even harder. We need an immediate surge of resources to fight back and win. But right now, we're falling short of our critical $50,000 fundraising goal -- and at this crucial early stage in the fight, failure to launch would spell disaster. We need your help to fight for the Senate. This week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.

I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.

What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.

I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.

It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.

It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.

We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend.

name: Steve Andersen
subject: FWD I Urgently Need to Hear From You…Yes or No?
body:
I urgently need to know...YES or NO...if you support ramping up our work to help President Trump shut down the Deep State and end illegal immigration.

| Dear Fellow American,

I think that Tom's message from last week is so important that I want to be sure you saw it.

The Left is pulling out all its weapons to sabotage President Trump's efforts to fulfill his campaign promises...especially his promises to end illegal immigration and dismantle the Deep State!

[Your special gift today will be a huge help to us as we keep fighting for you, and for the rule of law.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73165&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

Thank you so much for considering our request for your support!

Sincerely,

Steve Andersen
Director of Development
Judicial Watch

| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73165&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

As America's preeminent government watchdog,_we are supporting President Trump when he stands with us_ in fighting _for_ the rule of law and _against_ government secrecy and corruption!

And believe me...he needs all the help he can get, especially Judicial Watch's _unmatched ability to investigate government corruption, and cut through Deep State secrecy using the legal system and the courts_!

[That's why I am counting on hearing from you today!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73165&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73165&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

**[Your YES _and_ your best contribution today will help us judge:](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73165&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)**

* _How aggressively_ we continue to use open records laws to expose **Deep State****corruption and government infiltration** by the Soros network...which is essential to rooting it out!

* _How aggressively_ we continue to **expose liberal efforts to sabotage Trump 's****crackdown on illegal immigration** _and_ develop legal strategies to challenge illegal state and local "sanctuary" policies, which are on the rise again.

* _And how aggressively_ we can pursue our litigation to expose all the facts and hold accountable those who **politically weaponized federal government****agencies against opponents of the Biden administration** ...so that America never goes down that unconstitutional path again!

Thank you very much for your interest in Judicial Watch and our work. I deeply hope you will decide to support our work with a contribution today!

Thomas Fitton
President

name: Chris Pappas
subject: I’m running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
I’m no stranger to tough electoral fights. Now, I’m ready to take on the fight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105109415/537390379/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.03_Pappas1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTg2Y2FiYS1hODEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uQUqqlwkt0nXYkqvPZzoxF3qYhDNMAyzVTiIfhJUhys=&emci=7a791167-9510-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8186caba-a810-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) | Peter, I’m Congressman Chris Pappas, and Emily Randall said I could reach out with some big news: **I’m officially running to be New Hampshire’s next U.S. Senator.** I’m going to share more about why I’m in this race, but if you’re already on board, [_**split a contribution to my campaign and Emily Randall today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105109417/537390380/-1184271011?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.03_Pappas1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTg2Y2FiYS1hODEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uQUqqlwkt0nXYkqvPZzoxF3qYhDNMAyzVTiIfhJUhys=) I’m running for Senate because at this pivotal moment, our economy, our democracy, and our way of life are on the line. New Hampshire deserves a Senator who is grounded in the people, places, and values of this state – and one who is ready to lead on day one. Our country is at a crossroads, and the decisions we make now will have generational impacts. You can count on me to continue taking on big fights and to confront the Trump Administration, self-dealing billionaires, and extreme politicians who are threatening our future and our ability to get things done for New Hampshire. [_**Peter, can I count on you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign with a $10 contribution, split between my campaign and Emily's right now? We can’t win this race without major grassroots support.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105109419/537390381/-1184271011?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.03_Pappas1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTg2Y2FiYS1hODEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uQUqqlwkt0nXYkqvPZzoxF3qYhDNMAyzVTiIfhJUhys=) **These fights are deeply personal to me.** My family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in Manchester 108 years ago, a small business that remains at the heart of the community today. Running that small business showed me the power of hard work and serving others, but the opportunity that my ancestors and so many others like them sought has never been further away – and the Trump Administration is too busy cutting deals for their billionaire buddies to give a damn. I’m also openly gay and happily married to my husband, Vann. With the current wave of hateful policies leveled at the LGBTQ+ community, I know how important representation is at this moment. **If elected, I’d be the first openly gay male U.S. Senator in history** – a badge of honor I’d wear proudly as I advocate for full equality. I am the proud product of public education, and I come from a family of business owners _(my grandfather invented the chicken tender at the restaurant – seriously!)_. I understand firsthand the need to support neighborhood schools and small businesses in our community. **These are the lifeblood of our economy and the pillars of opportunity for everyone.** My life experiences are what led me to successfully run for four terms in Congress and win in one of the “swingiest” districts in the nation. Before I won my election in 2018, no one had managed to hold the seat for more than one term for more than a decade. I’m no stranger to tough electoral fights. **Now, I’m ready to take on the fight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue.** We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines of the big fights ahead – not with so much at stake, from the rising costs debilitating working families to the threats to the future of our democracy. We’ve taken on big fights together in Congress. Now it’s time to win this critical Senate seat so we can keep standing up to the Trump Administration and the self-dealing billionaires threatening our future. Can I count on you to join the fight? [_**Peter, if you’re with me, let’s make a powerful statement together and prove that we’re ready to win this race. Become a Founding Donor with a $10 donation to my campaign and Emily Randall now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105109422/537390382/-1184271011?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.03_Pappas1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTg2Y2FiYS1hODEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uQUqqlwkt0nXYkqvPZzoxF3qYhDNMAyzVTiIfhJUhys=) [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105109424/537390383/-1184271011?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.03_Pappas1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTg2Y2FiYS1hODEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uQUqqlwkt0nXYkqvPZzoxF3qYhDNMAyzVTiIfhJUhys=) Thank you again to Emily for letting me reach out today. With gratitude, Chris [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105109425/537390384/-1184271011?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.03_Pappas1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTg2Y2FiYS1hODEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uQUqqlwkt0nXYkqvPZzoxF3qYhDNMAyzVTiIfhJUhys=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105109426/537390385/-1245362970?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.03_Pappas1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTg2Y2FiYS1hODEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uQUqqlwkt0nXYkqvPZzoxF3qYhDNMAyzVTiIfhJUhys=) [VOLUNTEER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105109428/537390386/1475719955?contactdata=JhgEM+oRKCvQX5GmqPEt7O/tw81LpDYkDZEU6XnngRPiPENvgS0JCJNdIvPZ66AzOoO5SsWWlA0ASFd8Wd1quQ==&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.03_Pappas1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTg2Y2FiYS1hODEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uQUqqlwkt0nXYkqvPZzoxF3qYhDNMAyzVTiIfhJUhys=&emci=7a791167-9510-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8186caba-a810-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) [MEET EMILY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105109429/537390387/1277404761?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.03_Pappas1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTg2Y2FiYS1hODEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uQUqqlwkt0nXYkqvPZzoxF3qYhDNMAyzVTiIfhJUhys=&emci=7a791167-9510-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8186caba-a810-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) [ENDORSE EMILY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105109430/537390388/-346104935?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.03_Pappas1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTg2Y2FiYS1hODEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uQUqqlwkt0nXYkqvPZzoxF3qYhDNMAyzVTiIfhJUhys=&emci=7a791167-9510-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8186caba-a810-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442)

name: Cory Booker
subject: I’m tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.
#

Family, it’s Cory.
This week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.
I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.
What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.
I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.
It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.
It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.
We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend.

clean_body: This is a moment where we must all speak up. Family, it’s Cory. This week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. Marlene Galán-Woods is a former journalist, a community leader, and a fierce defender of reproductive freedom. She has what it takes to defeat anti-choice extremist Rep. David Schweikert and fight for hardworking Arizonans.

Last cycle, Marlene lost a crowded primary in this district by less than 1,800 votes. She was the _only_ candidate that Republicans spent against because they knew she was best positioned to defeat Schweikert.

This cycle, David Schweikert's seat has been rated a "TOSS-UP" – and it will be one of the most important seats at play in the fight for the House majority.

clean_body: 1️⃣ of 3️⃣ seats we need to flip → | = Peter, I'm proud to introduce our first red-to-blue U.S. House flip endorsement of the cycle: Marlene Galán-Woods. = = | = Marlene Galán-Woods is a former journalist, a community leader, and a fierce defender of reproductive freedom. She has what it takes to defeat anti-choice extremist Rep. David Schweikert and fight for hardworking Arizonans. Last cycle, Marlene lost a crowded primary in this district by less than 1,800 votes. She was the only candidate that Republicans spent against because they knew she was best positioned to defeat Schweikert. This cycle, David Schweikert's seat has been rated a "TOSS-UP" – and it will be one of the most important seats at play in the fight for the House majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Interim Vice President of Federal and Gubernatorial Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Mississippi leads on income tax elimination!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/incometaxeliminated?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, **Mississippi’s decision to eliminate the income tax is a massive win for our state. **

Since the bill was signed into law last week, there has been enormous interest across the country. I wanted to share with you a sample of some of the press coverage: CLICK ON THE IMAGES BELOW TO READ MORE
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=87b92c3364&e=5703353baa)

Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell

subject: Thank you so much, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|

Hi Peter, If you’re anything like me, your inbox has probably been full of fundraising emails from political campaigns leading up to Monday’s FEC deadline. I know these messages can be overwhelming, so today, I wanted to reach out and **thank you** for your support before our deadline. I’m so proud to be able to say that our report to the FEC will show a grassroots team that is fighting together to defend our progressive values and protect our families and our communities from the Trump administration’s cruel policies. But Peter, our work is _nowhere near over. _ This week, House Republicans caused chaos in Congress instead of getting to work for the American people. After trying and failing to block new mothers in Congress from proxy voting, House GOP leaders decided to cancel votes for the rest of the week. I promise to continue fighting back against their political stunts so we can deliver for AZ-03, but this isn’t a battle I can take on alone. You’re an essential part of this team, Peter — and I can’t thank you enough for your continued support. Thank you for standing with me, Yassamin | [DONATE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105113272/537398257/-1866165361?refcode=AU_YA_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20250403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWUzMmFmMy1hYzEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c6_9QiksSx2jNNPZBnKjjho4xLU_m257sndB1oQ4P4U=)

| | Peter,You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff. As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over one billion dollars.It’s a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my home safe is the best job in the world.
---
| | Throughout my career in law enforcement, I have fought back against the pro-criminal policies coming out of Sacramento. We have held the line and kept Riverside County safe. Now, the threat that the Democrat leadership poses to our communities is graver than ever before.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: This revival mission needs you!
body:
It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.

| | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate...
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate......to Jesus.And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created _Saving the Easter Bunny_ , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "_Mouse in the House_ ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ big-time. **[And today I'm hoping you'll help them kick it into high gear before orders start pouring in by rushing back your best "Prepare the Way" gift.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/UZmGE603aLi3Kdxy7UaJIAvvBMBMAS7_-4vu00Y43FYwKvIwOW4PgDb7IeVyYDV_jKh0Sm8sA4fb2qg_upMP4lSyhoYZkHT3hf44fJDoVEuIPa_3ZFJR1MmuCDmF7-rP-zZycVkx532xPW630HTYLWXd1Vu_-2wgRGNh698m0uhBAiZApvP3v7AGQCYDlDq4tPqoDTPnnfVe6d8MExsQtmdNZco4dzzp9stbrmHaqmcEGyvxBCXOtdm537GqnOwinaaNf400_mL06vXdd4zwe_dO4v9-mvxtuh52f6HEJBRcSghPM90Mf9SL9J28PfJFYmUgG8qQb2SCqnlUg0kSJ5R3PLBLXeFnwJufoIgIL8gplAertZwDIl0evokkONGIZ_mab-5qumCzA205CEaXLN8Pb4PP3n1OBOKVAg8vLMynvqUVS5_-kM55OMPyC660AGceTIn2bA/Nl_nB5GtWPNO0t8ueTimXpQ2FManX0oM/7)** No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done:
---
>>> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ and a 17-city church tour.
---
And listen to this...**[**Your "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100 or more, not only helps fund this revival campaign that makes Jesus the reason for the Easter season once more...**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/uX2azNZq9GzEJNm5TsogATrkRETtwhrXJxQZvrv5eUyYUz0oIPGDc1kH5PQmAylCYHpP8C5u9PPHyASINYIs4ehctJ55kl2tVWp3J26fRXHLyHdc8vMfAD08Gnlrazfpvniu10BEtqRF3LaJZmcjvKFvTkIgVGIN-th9cK7_0ZGAJ6QRhwPEk4at0vLVTkRQCkq5zuupzqrzk3JUqOendpvSHEB90FQ0lfr5pb3QqCdo87JngcJ-_vSP7u2Sdf2v41qHzh-2g7vJqwZXf8QhF-eBSMf5IIvc-HdY-x4GwaAzIJmqGBIJ_pjQL144B6UZNDPq8qh61-7h3BoQ43PIofJs67pw4sQN60MXwafT98a1WiN0rTS9jH3yBQC6XUYkVoPlHS4BDDoTpATphFp9GSX83nLbjmAfh5hhfhvRJEXrKqPcjIH8Lzagnv_qLLbgJAwUQxQGRg/fVu2Lypp2ihfW3jVy7mVveBE-2Xs5K7O/7)** Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you **[contribute $100 or more to the "Prepare the Way" revival](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/Lu7soRID5mPqFAFEWFcXoHzawbBzz0JcfC69Bl7vIHbQJYTQmig7vxqPTM4WMVHwfJX4g8AY5_gwdmkeb5UshRKYaac_V5pJPEKnv-jC24R5lXjJnVjvvjSmhAtWObWHRjZjpS6-yd5n2RWRFuEu5j5rqOZ3OGdHQmqsYPIMcHL1STBpSkuCPq9a8N7ZoUIpUuypc77MsdUkbLEliVc5bA00ntunu1fvZS74t1GgAz_YmH3sE1GC1cims06mOEW237t1gm5gKosMpOSdAOmWXOy2I9C_YVBUvo5OCPuxtPA9G2W10G9ItwVgLxxmmBjeQGrskNr3YwbbmnJIUelG0ZCFR-5ElPhw5jvs_xrIbkpKP2OOlYsThzr451ZNi7VTGgJld8fLCYnCb5dms6CtbxG28pbsF1Ss_AheN2-xL9D7wVVtjmy0gHIZ0XsbA5y4iWk6h5zNJw/eCj0frPa0SdSgcoWvWDGUF3cihL7C-lY/7)** , Brave Books will send you _Saving the Easter Bunny_ absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep _Saving the Easter Bunny_ for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. **[**What's most important is that you rush back your best "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100, or more right away.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/biYZeFD63EiLgQtSgHss9qfvUB_BO2kVksxHjGRUXl6yBSnQXpDAF4qap7vQYn55HI2cCXrBpO4z3xdvrTVFnsnXiuE1nNaONLJ12dJU8N7WcKzTZG0leRZAjh2fYGvcOmoFokFD35yyG7RIR3RicQnZhxMz8UGt-LhJNcVxQr42_DSdhm227yRYS_knpTgD_EzgMl_kvAhcMGHpDqW1-mIlX_dpobBMJzgt55JbHpTQ82ap9fnthudq7kUMAYRQamW4ftn5cA00iIuN_0r65i95lAI4RNMDaaXlMhT_C8G9iF1bRb-_0Ls7aCYis1-BNFFhEErQYsSXbVh6BG7eT5tHQXYiAcDCbmx1B11EhX_F_St6GJHY7Fd8_g87jCG029WGbOu9N5HUH6r3jibmZDt-y7MouwcoDlZrfHflSR8150Nnp9DgIWWn--plZmEqvBSfmiG3Ow/zlZNqnVLxmCl1__3hidosLhv3eXUZBWE/7)** Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America.
---
May God bless you this coming Easter season,
---

clean_body: It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away. | | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate... | | | | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate......to Jesus.And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created Saving the Easter Bunny , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "Mouse in the House ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of Saving the Easter Bunny big-time. No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done: >> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of Saving the Easter Bunny and a 17-city church tour. And listen to this... Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you , Brave Books will send you Saving the Easter Bunny absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep Saving the Easter Bunny for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America. May God bless you this coming Easter season, | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. # THURSDAY, April 3, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** We work hard to deliver our news to you free so please support our sponsors. Todays message is from [BOXABL, meet the company that is poised to transform American housing,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvrDAMwPFPEzZOjh0SGDI86cR2b30jCsQcfgKCIHdtv33FterW1T9Ltv7_bt0tyCzr_W9Y2OcxdZGjDCFz7MCUQCVWnS6iH5mRqWCvnSEHVFe6mHwwGGikYMkQANoA1g0RcdTNCLEZCvEIWIEB0g4qsJcaGud67kennXWVUQY4Sk775X-SNU88zh_pyftlSEsx-ynnTdEfha3Ctk_voZ9PUdjK-uQjn0DtIy_dkR77wIquvASZFdpzuHCUx6LougWJ5Rb2vPJ-TLJ9-xCWLch9fW38oK6hpKb-CtBptABIrm5ssfu4vck8y2GdMnA_T70-zb-3e3r8DAAA__-E_XBn) here is your opportunity to be a part of it. -Cole, _CEO_
* * *
[ ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvrDAMwPFPEzZOjh0SGDI86cR2b30jCsQcfgKCIHdtv33FterW1T9Ltv7_bt0tyCzr_W9Y2OcxdZGjDCFz7MCUQCVWnS6iH5mRqWCvnSEHVFe6mHwwGGikYMkQANoA1g0RcdTNCLEZCvEIWIEB0g4qsJcaGud67kennXWVUQY4Sk775X-SNU88zh_pyftlSEsx-ynnTdEfha3Ctk_voZ9PUdjK-uQjn0DtIy_dkR77wIquvASZFdpzuHCUx6LougWJ5Rb2vPJ-TLJ9-xCWLch9fW38oK6hpKb-CtBptABIrm5ssfu4vck8y2GdMnA_T70-zb-3e3r8DAAA__-E_XBn) The U.S. is short 2.3M homes, making the need for affordable, efficient housing solutions greater than ever. That's why [BOXABL rethought home construction](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvrDAMwPFPEzZOjh0SGDI86cR2b30jCsQcfgKCIHdtv33FterW1T9Ltv7_bt0tyCzr_W9Y2OcxdZGjDCFz7MCUQCVWnS6iH5mRqWCvnSEHVFe6mHwwGGikYMkQANoA1g0RcdTNCLEZCvEIWIEB0g4qsJcaGud67kennXWVUQY4Sk775X-SNU88zh_pyftlSEsx-ynnTdEfha3Ctk_voZ9PUdjK-uQjn0DtIy_dkR77wIquvASZFdpzuHCUx6LougWJ5Rb2vPJ-TLJ9-xCWLch9fW38oK6hpKb-CtBptABIrm5ssfu4vck8y2GdMnA_T70-zb-3e3r8DAAA__-E_XBn) with assembly-line technology, building homes in hours, not months. With this breakthrough approach, BOXABL factories can make a home in nearly four hours - ready to be shipped to its final destination. These foldable homes come fully equipped with plumbing, electrical, and HVAC, offering a fast, scalable solution to housing woes. One of the U.S.'s top homebuilders is even investing in BOXABL. It's no wonder BOXABL has become [popular in both the housing and investment communities.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvrDAMwPFPEzZOjh0SGDI86cR2b30jCsQcfgKCIHdtv33FterW1T9Ltv7_bt0tyCzr_W9Y2OcxdZGjDCFz7MCUQCVWnS6iH5mRqWCvnSEHVFe6mHwwGGikYMkQANoA1g0RcdTNCLEZCvEIWIEB0g4qsJcaGud67kennXWVUQY4Sk775X-SNU88zh_pyftlSEsx-ynnTdEfha3Ctk_voZ9PUdjK-uQjn0DtIy_dkR77wIquvASZFdpzuHCUx6LougWJ5Rb2vPJ-TLJ9-xCWLch9fW38oK6hpKb-CtBptABIrm5ssfu4vck8y2GdMnA_T70-zb-3e3r8DAAA__-E_XBn) **A Revolutionary Solution** [BOXABL is transforming home construction ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvrDAMwPFPEzZOjh0SGDI86cR2b30jCsQcfgKCIHdtv33FterW1T9Ltv7_bt0tyCzr_W9Y2OcxdZGjDCFz7MCUQCVWnS6iH5mRqWCvnSEHVFe6mHwwGGikYMkQANoA1g0RcdTNCLEZCvEIWIEB0g4qsJcaGud67kennXWVUQY4Sk775X-SNU88zh_pyftlSEsx-ynnTdEfha3Ctk_voZ9PUdjK-uQjn0DtIy_dkR77wIquvASZFdpzuHCUx6LougWJ5Rb2vPJ-TLJ9-xCWLch9fW38oK6hpKb-CtBptABIrm5ssfu4vck8y2GdMnA_T70-zb-3e3r8DAAA__-E_XBn)with revolutionary technology. By introducing assembly-line efficiency to the industry, BOXABL's patented, foldable homes - called Casitas - are factory-built in nearly 4 hours, ready to be shipped to their destination. Here's what makes BOXABL's homes unique:
* **Pre-fitted systems:** Plumbing, electrical, and HVAC are built-in and ready to go.
* **Foldable innovation:** The foldable design eliminates the transportation issues modular homes often face.
* **Speed and scalability:** Factory production allows BOXABL to build homes faster, more affordably, and at scale.

BOXABL isn't just solving inefficiencies - it's changing the way homes are built, making them affordable, fast, and accessible. **Incredible Market Demand and Traction**
* **190,000+ reservations*:** Potential buyers are lining up for the Casita.
* **Proven production:** Over 600 homes built and delivered so far.
* **Backed by industry leaders:** BOXABL has earned a strategic partnership and investment from a leading home builder.

With these achievements, BOXABL is already disrupting a $5T global housing industry that's long overdue for innovation. **A New Opportunity to Invest** BOXABL's last $75M investment round sold out fast. But now, investors have [a second chance to join the journey.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvrDAMwPFPEzZOjh0SGDI86cR2b30jCsQcfgKCIHdtv33FterW1T9Ltv7_bt0tyCzr_W9Y2OcxdZGjDCFz7MCUQCVWnS6iH5mRqWCvnSEHVFe6mHwwGGikYMkQANoA1g0RcdTNCLEZCvEIWIEB0g4qsJcaGud67kennXWVUQY4Sk775X-SNU88zh_pyftlSEsx-ynnTdEfha3Ctk_voZ9PUdjK-uQjn0DtIy_dkR77wIquvASZFdpzuHCUx6LougWJ5Rb2vPJ-TLJ9-xCWLch9fW38oK6hpKb-CtBptABIrm5ssfu4vck8y2GdMnA_T70-zb-3e3r8DAAA__-E_XBn) Now, BOXABL is scaling production to bring affordable, high-quality housing to the masses. With patented technology, massive potential market demand, and a growing track record, they're not just solving the housing crisis - they're looking to reshape the industry. This is [your opportunity to invest](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvrDAMwPFPEzZOjh0SGDI86cR2b30jCsQcfgKCIHdtv33FterW1T9Ltv7_bt0tyCzr_W9Y2OcxdZGjDCFz7MCUQCVWnS6iH5mRqWCvnSEHVFe6mHwwGGikYMkQANoA1g0RcdTNCLEZCvEIWIEB0g4qsJcaGud67kennXWVUQY4Sk775X-SNU88zh_pyftlSEsx-ynnTdEfha3Ctk_voZ9PUdjK-uQjn0DtIy_dkR77wIquvASZFdpzuHCUx6LougWJ5Rb2vPJ-TLJ9-xCWLch9fW38oK6hpKb-CtBptABIrm5ssfu4vck8y2GdMnA_T70-zb-3e3r8DAAA__-E_XBn) in a company aiming to turn one of the world's most important industries on its head. clean_body: Meet the company poised to transform American housing. | | | | | | THURSDAY, April 3, 2025 ---|--- Good Afternoon! We work hard to deliver our news to you free so please support our sponsors. Todays message is from here is your opportunity to be a part of it. -Cole, CEO The U.S. is short 2.3M homes, making the need for affordable, efficient housing solutions greater than ever. That's why with assembly-line technology, building homes in hours, not months. With this breakthrough approach, BOXABL factories can make a home in nearly four hours - ready to be shipped to its final destination. These foldable homes come fully equipped with plumbing, electrical, and HVAC, offering a fast, scalable solution to housing woes. One of the U.S.'s top homebuilders is even investing in BOXABL. It's no wonder BOXABL has become A Revolutionary Solution revolutionary technology. By introducing assembly-line efficiency to the industry, BOXABL's patented, foldable homes - called Casitas - are factory-built in nearly 4 hours, ready to be shipped to their destination. Here's what makes BOXABL's homes unique: Pre-fitted systems: Plumbing, electrical, and HVAC are built-in and ready to go. Foldable innovation: The foldable design eliminates the transportation issues modular homes often face. Speed and scalability: Factory production allows BOXABL to build homes faster, more affordably, and at scale. BOXABL isn't just solving inefficiencies - it's changing the way homes are built, making them affordable, fast, and accessible. Incredible Market Demand and Traction 190,000+ reservations: Potential buyers are lining up for the Casita. Proven production: Over 600 homes built and delivered so far. Backed by industry leaders: BOXABL has earned a strategic partnership and investment from a leading home builder. With these achievements, BOXABL is already disrupting a $5T global housing industry that's long overdue for innovation. A New Opportunity to Invest BOXABL's last $75M investment round sold out fast. But now, investors have Now, BOXABL is scaling production to bring affordable, high-quality housing to the masses. With patented technology, massive potential market demand, and a growing track record, they're not just solving the housing crisis - they're looking to reshape the industry. This is in a company aiming to turn one of the world's most important industries on its head. Don't miss your chance to own a piece of the future. Fellow American,

I know firsthand what it takes to win tough races.

And make no mistake—Thom Tillis is facing one of the toughest.

The radical Left is already mobilizing nationwide, pouring dark money and resources into their effort to undermine President Trump and his Republican allies.

Their goal? _**Flip critical Senate seats and derail the America First agenda.**_

[**North Carolina is at the center of their fight and Senator Thom Tillis is their number ONE target. in 2026.**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=fb9bccf0a80a4eb9b7898bb354385e7e&_e=8J-Jj6XePNbSw_s_DDW1ObpaTqyEV7AcPgrp4jjLEqeu6LYvt6b7SyqIdfQt8FHw9zWJQVVTvFWfjPb2FhcL1p5uZkJZleqTCHXn2DF5qoyeADFQ7yrdRNo1ro5HkNc0BqFTEolTNfqpvlZcVcP-PQCW2wuuVxWzExexz3FE724lCtdp9_nDwO06mF4r_AQFMDZ5zevkIIXKdRHEl0XFaJIyQzsn_kNY4Upddal1WHXqdU0WuJsu_UoycGla4R9WlEgrZ4vril4az5uvApq3hmBMj7ZngNHAxRbFf-b8lP3JLHOZ7LsY_nZOVmWH_7iQcE36CGq1gukiHC2yuROtuTCyIxF7j9fwUsFmx6xQojeef3AvAnOTQ37CVANbLmBc0Yw9BwSckNBbCUlTSettaKMQ9nVHP_W-WiRFmUOvlB0%3D)

Democrats are wasting no time—activists and outside money are already flooding the state.

We cannot afford to fall behind. A Republican majority is crucial to securing our border, rebuilding our economy, and ensuring President Trump’s policies succeed.

That’s why I’m asking you to stand with me and support Senator Tillis.

[**Contribute today to help defend our Republican majority in the Senate**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=fb9bccf0a80a4eb9b7898bb354385e7e&_e=8J-Jj6XePNbSw_s_DDW1ObpaTqyEV7AcPgrp4jjLEqeu6LYvt6b7SyqIdfQt8FHw9zWJQVVTvFWfjPb2FhcL1p5uZkJZleqTCHXn2DF5qoyeADFQ7yrdRNo1ro5HkNc0BqFTEolTNfqpvlZcVcP-PQCW2wuuVxWzExexz3FE724lCtdp9_nDwO06mF4r_AQFMDZ5zevkIIXKdRHEl0XFaJIyQzsn_kNY4Upddal1WHXqdU0WuJsu_UoycGla4R9WashWPsGiuKVhGkF0gX0fnVu5BxoKvPbzwrOaEFLIxOnsWTLUx5jI_jPWZ6qHj9wLnL5rkQuWaZVyo-bgOetx5kLZLHE_gUhwg7Mr7_Ph8eO4l5Jq_VAL1ywlHclNEuM3JoMdeROVRwUvYDzc561ljveUXzo-_E1rB_Y4QKYszsk%3D)
This will be one of the most important and expensive Senate races in the country, and every dollar we raise NOW helps us fight back.

If we let the Left outspend and outorganize us at this critical moment, we give them the advantage—and they’ll use it to go on the attack.

[**Please consider rushing a contribution of $15, $35, or $50 now to help my friend Thom Tillis prepare for the fight ahead.**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=fb9bccf0a80a4eb9b7898bb354385e7e&_e=8J-Jj6XePNbSw_s_DDW1ObpaTqyEV7AcPgrp4jjLEqeu6LYvt6b7SyqIdfQt8FHw9zWJQVVTvFWfjPb2FhcL1p5uZkJZleqTCHXn2DF5qoyeADFQ7yrdRNo1ro5HkNc0BqFTEolTNfqpvlZcVcP-PQCW2wuuVxWzExexz3FE724lCtdp9_nDwO06mF4r_AQFMDZ5zevkIIXKdRHEl0XFaJIyQzsn_kNY4Upddal1WHXqdU0WuJsu_UoycGla4R9WQ7AD1aOPfRP4X3hpof3ApkZebVqKiwNsqvoYHliEOhqT9C9edm2me1cN8fiI-d3RZpAmvIGGmzAoOVUC1-ZxMLqCobhwuFM8KQGGy_OhwspBmGknLPIyHBmLnGUPc5Qm-_lFhyJg8K5twJd9EOfol1t5WNDxZPunhUKhO2blUQk%3D)

Together, we will keep President Trump’s Senate majority.

For America,

_**Steve Daines (R-MT)**_

# [What cuts at the Department of Education mean for student loans ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2052568&post_id=160504085&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwNTA0MDg1LCJpYXQiOjE3NDM3MDAzNDksImV4cCI6MTc0NjI5MjM0OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNTI1NjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.PksWg_kJB0Oj6R7T83YzFUK9hqTsGffvMcyYC8veq0E)
### As both a consumer protection attorney and parent, I'm worried about these cuts.
| | [Katie Porter](https://substack.com/@katieporter)

| Apr 3

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/katieporteroc/p/what-cuts-at-the-department-of-education?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

As if sending a child to college isn't expensive or scary enough, Trump's dismantling of the Department of Education threatens new challenges.
This is the season of admission letters and decisions among families about how to pay for college. Many households are counting on federal student aid, including Pell Grants, work-study eligibility, and federal loans, to fund college. **The gateway to getting federal aid is the FAFSA form, administered by the Department of Education.**
I hustled to fill out my son's form for his sophomore year of college--and successfully nagged (I mean, "reminded") him to complete his part. I highly recommend others do the same. **Given Trump 's cuts and attacks, this isn't the year to procrastinate until the last minute!**
A new report shows that the Federal Student Aid workforce is [half](https://substack.com/redirect/391764e2-4b63-413f-a819-38259adae535?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the size it was when Trump took office. A former financial aid official warned, "I expect we will see issues wherein these complex, intertwined technology systems cannot be adequately managed . . . This puts critical functions, like the FAFSA, aid disbursement, and loan repayment at risk."
**It 's likely these Trump cuts will cause delays and headaches for families and for colleges.**
But as a consumer protection attorney, I know the harm won't end there. If students are unable to get federally backed loans, scammers and bad actors will look to take advantage of desperate students. For-profit companies could pop up offering to "help" students get financial aid, a process that should be free and easy.
Reporting also shows that people whose job it was to hold student loan servicers accountable no longer work at FSA. This means even folks who are many years out of college could run into errors or overcharges when repaying loans. **Even worse, we could see a future subprime student lending crisis if federal aid is eliminated.**
This is yet another issue voters should get loud about. This should not be a Republican or Democrat issue. Every elected official should want talented and motivated students to have access to federal loans and grants. Higher education isn't for everyone, but there is no doubt that our economy needs more engineers, health care workers, scientists, teachers, and other careers that require college.
--Katie Porter
**Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026 FFPC #1479597**

Peter,

As you know, Monday was the first real stress test of the 2026 election cycle - _**and we failed it.**_

Out of the more than 20,000 emails I sent asking for help, _**just nine supporters answered the call.
**_
I’m not here to make anyone feel bad; the point of my email today is to remind you that I don’t email for the sake of emailing. **[We’re reaching out because we really need help.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8a95735c7a394099813308da3d4b0d4e&_e=pyqrbshvckCrsSDm_ku8qtGiKn_V4UBeyXEJP8wtOqAC01Hp9eDptUk8hBho1ArxiqsOt4piAwfZxAEEUX75IqNl7VWbFbl3F45sT6qEyeoonJyBPAlpW9EkJ6ekYRkX-UXhPzyBtNoP8tMbeJikJbwEuGPIYV71PN4wW0_uI0d48q6_xBiXD7zd3Ts29cstb6KgVgN8JR8tpp3U91j5b0UBWvK0cBGjuN2VXjVJHjolc2ermXaJhTmLjjNZGjT7HgPFYeRrzBmBeQ3wYDULC5lYcPP0w1vPg9RwtUw8wHGUjyl-9ni3sOib2wWbUqm5gooWqDqHMkDreZZeNbrJiWvP4LTWJLmpSi5j1a_JK5i1pSlG3F7YKxb0aATyc3niEN0IOkSZxTVoXYkeV-nLoD0TzQGjvRGLRyKvawZcmdxa7OKycDiB_mrOktuoldUmRO4o4GnC856X7uWMSQM95g%3D%3D) **

If you can, please make a generous donation right now to help compensate for the lack of participation in Monday's fundraising drive.

As I said to you then and am repeating now, **[I’m being targeted by George Soros, and my re-election isn’t a certainty.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8a95735c7a394099813308da3d4b0d4e&_e=pyqrbshvckCrsSDm_ku8qtGiKn_V4UBeyXEJP8wtOqAC01Hp9eDptUk8hBho1ArxiqsOt4piAwfZxAEEUX75IqNl7VWbFbl3F45sT6qEyeoonJyBPAlpW9EkJ6ekYRkX-UXhPzyBtNoP8tMbeJikJbwEuGPIYV71PN4wW0_uI0d48q6_xBiXD7zd3Ts29cstb6KgVgN8JR8tpp3U91j5b0UBWvK0cBGjuN2VXjVJHjolc2ermXaJhTmLjjNZGjT7HgPFYeRrzBmBeQ3wYDULC5lYcPP0w1vPg9RwtUw8wHGUjyl-9ni3sOib2wWbUqm5nbYIonQUMOyi-TgnAjGjtz-PI6w2nldAYb0ducl6YQaBQiJNlw156pSbxBukDK3GcpeuO44QtS8MDlUzvc_YFf2HbvsjfPLnO5RGC0IXItnOYNqKC0S8zl9gN83iarWiFV6XL-AlirfeUCXs6CJd9w%3D%3D) **

Sincerely,
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8a95735c7a394099813308da3d4b0d4e&_e=pyqrbshvckCrsSDm_ku8qtGiKn_V4UBeyXEJP8wtOqAC01Hp9eDptUk8hBho1ArxiqsOt4piAwfZxAEEUX75IqNl7VWbFbl3F45sT6qEyeoonJyBPAlpW9EkJ6ekYRkX-UXhPzyBtNoP8tMbeJikJbwEuGPIYV71PN4wW0_uI0d48q6_xBiXD7zd3Ts29cstb6KgVgN8JR8tpp3U91j5b0UBWvK0cBGjuN2VXjVJHjolc2ermXaJhTmLjjNZGjT7HgPFYeRrzBmBeQ3wYDULC5lYcPP0w1vPg9RwtUw8wHGUjyl-9ni3sOib2wWbUqm5RjO73W-p_6hQ0XX4e5J4Aeuov2wz_vvyTX206-rbG5-rdUr1E_CFSIEOO1e6DYXCG0Zsjk-olyOySOkrM7bH5Y-jatHUTmvQvlJx_c0JKFn6Tu7OVFGMdNd43LfcjSeJ8u6m05tW7GWkBAIaenff8g%3D%3D)
Beth Van Duyne
Member of Congress, TX-24

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration?

**Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.**

She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country.

**Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans.

name: Save Social Security via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Save Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis — Donald
Trump & Elon Musk’s full-blown attack on Social Security will start to
take effect in days.

For the first time in history, as of April 14, seniors will no longer be
able to call the Social Security Administration toll-free number and
complete an application for retirement benefits. It comes on the heels of
Trump also planning to shut down 47 Social Security field offices and lay
off up to half the agency’s staff.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23194?source=email-20250403&t=1011&akid=8043%2E5885482%2ElUMZD2 ]Bernie Tweet about social security cuts

This is targeted sabotage that will impact the lives of millions of people
who depend on Social Security, and lawmakers in Congress need to act
immediately to use their power to stop this outrageous cruelty.

Bernie Sanders is leading the charge to stop Musk & Trump’s assault on
Social Security. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23194?source=email-20250403&t=1012&akid=8043%2E5885482%2ElUMZD2 ]Will you sign the petition now to stand with Bernie
and save Social Security?

you can bet he and his billionaire buddies would love nothing more than to
replace it with private investment accounts and profit off our retirement.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23194?source=email-20250403&t=1014&akid=8043%2E5885482%2ElUMZD2 ]Bernie Tweet about Musk's Ponzi Scheme Comment

That’s the plan: Defund the agency. Create chaos. Then say government
doesn’t work — and sell it off.

Our Revolution is organizing a grassroots campaign to stop Musk and
Trump’s cuts, protect Social Security, and defend the right of every
American to access the benefits they’ve earned.

As the cuts to Social Security access begin, we need to mobilize an
overwhelming public outcry to convince just a few swing Republicans or a
filibuster-ready group of Democrats to block Musk’s devastating plans for
Social Security.
