name: Kirk Cameron
subject: This revival mission needs you!
body:
It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.

| | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate...
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate......to Jesus.And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created _Saving the Easter Bunny_ , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "_Mouse in the House_ ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ big-time. **[And today I'm hoping you'll help them kick it into high gear before orders start pouring in by rushing back your best "Prepare the Way" gift.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/EEVmPSbl0wHytg3b4kFfEGMGEW9uh9Mfm_KB3pR4ICUEfEJM_TFLbXefsaIUdIkc3zQD6RfrpaN4YjwswFWxaKUfdKB2QG-_lrAlAUTuiKI_ozun2KFCK24js-warpc7TTqV7Oi6uiFV2T-J0oLHRZtzRnmclQRVZXy0EMpum0qlgWy8doe9_2cAdDDd355ERUW3AsRguGfGoJnniXY8LYs6TuhBXMv8kdYTTVvCYORUDVnJTMjox0hUNA9VQO_BK7pZtsF2DIGQyUK9kK3EN4AJg3Sih6k8-qdEFwYEl-wIBoJD0-TnTtf3gbGdsGfgmjq1eYR3r8W4F2cfxQxQ1n0ZnNr30g807o4nztJU6KzpuiMgVwgfy99aDddix0WpaYTBmeND1614izq4-yBT4EV85gllnliLKM4PeBtxrrhy38wmy2Cx8zAhPSS4VTijCUnroCxx0A/Jt8Y3Abb3Xx-GQ8L6CFWpoDj7QBq1kPW/7)** No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done:
---
>>> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ and a 17-city church tour.
---
And listen to this...**[**Your "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100 or more, not only helps fund this revival campaign that makes Jesus the reason for the Easter season once more...**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/obRTM9R9Tdx8jbGHZll5jys0BxnYMzHMZGKh5Xy-DPeqk_z96djqW1ADFLaujiUkZhmGcD0jJkzUx16Hh37JcUIv_qqsCxTBZNF242sbbdoxgMtju-ocTYEESb8WViShmf6n_qUSgpdTL9pkXyGh8uJZMIKOnlyiWCzvhf2UiKvEfcrNlPTn6VRisTMGDo_cwIWQifcxjspZ_ZNfyQDZbdMUiUWteexsdnGomeqlrxT2bI9qvJjdte9JxYezB3oTa6Z5zBkugAadhKc3gNAm0vrbjO_7DL4-uLGKanCR1BaTx8DYV9Hyicf0yQciEXUldUVzHkHdhQv-oev9U1iCd2j9xbl1eW-unFsQavQOp0nPo_Mgz0lspYz5ICvhbiAs3ZmgMcTKD26Rxzokd_nNodclgLoaCkJjH1B4OWfIqF_dWVqgLX0zUEBkZZ-23vVWzOgR6ZyFQA/4b5KTivkiavlOTAYYGiSiaowyBzC-XUI/7)** Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you **[contribute $100 or more to the "Prepare the Way" revival](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/CQs8Dki__rvoydKijqbGdVFET8m0PXGmeD16gGYAvD3h0zf2-q2fyyUNASAwPiJMb4RPsfcoOUzA90B0HNlInC8c8Xw05A2Ry-grQ06YUrPSjF45qOJcbTqlaurFJJyu24QVuaarFpcOeYixJcFeZxuDp5UNBa-0DOJwXy85aeqr8Tn4pj-sqpJen0g4EMXJP8c44k6HeiiJG5Cnfe0JM2NK0m2wXpBQnQO23aGsp7I_faJNnqAyNyvm2Rwa4u8Vsz-c_JFzHWAcam5vBj-83b-5qtIAkZ7nRJrLD0ryCmbZ06dfvU2oVFc5Es7uox4XK7IEvr2CEiprpgXlnlXBFHAdb2FDpIplrQ7G_Tw325niad5rgBJy4n97FcSX40ZgKC7RdXC6lXaKw3IoZK47PIpZs1yC4Andie_JqRfuMHJUWLFijHuMLRThJ8QRKNkuIhaH9tDbEA/RsITKmLMCZzD-tE-vu6iZ2emngQex_NI/7)** , Brave Books will send you _Saving the Easter Bunny_ absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep _Saving the Easter Bunny_ for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. **[**What's most important is that you rush back your best "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100, or more right away.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/P-lk1aZ-NWLnr-Fg7UjqBZGbuq2mbhvfx4YrTJLz3QsV5ZYOjBp8-jFq457JLjR4O13egR1-Fm5-NqVtAfwVq6jCs_YCk2mZUFuh_GIY9lI26gcsIIsxKozrvVm9989X6YamM7y_K0A_80bB69Q96oHTPDhGJ1RE5RjOR8fHQCPLieVNP1XlXKJwi7kXuz5QkYmRha4ol846MBO9iiCpeWpbErA06XNE3BnOvKouQMKoyk06t0q3CTyodpCYFAY6DfPovqjddSiDwRHi1UyKrgAIEPQ9ufOZtN39JYF-2MO1IrrLFeoM3lw5XRjgil9nWRSsBfCRBihiXat4rW6lYs2kFf9YRsfO4RyP4xW4j5ldOW8v3AIZZ6OGsztryMxqm8-Nubs1YtEbb6BOgdXeJt4fF-SddvNmOuvGk7FwYAH3SjAKLLKCTZ0NlZcIul2z0-wL4t-MDQ/8y_lILFzX4dazHRG_Rd_-qXJ9AXiu9sE/7)** Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America.
---
May God bless you this coming Easter season,
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father

But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done: >> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of Saving the Easter Bunny and a 17-city church tour. And listen to this... Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you , Brave Books will send you Saving the Easter Bunny absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep Saving the Easter Bunny for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America. May God bless you this coming Easter season, | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. Brave Books is focused on sparking historic revival this Easter! They've launched a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate -- to Jesus. As a special thank you for your gift of $100 or more we'll send you your very own copy of Saving the Easter Bunny for your family. Thank you! | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | As we start the New Year, I have big news to share with you. But first, I want to say something about the victories you helped us accomplish in 2024. Pop Acta Media | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

---
Hey Derek, Team Fetterman here with a quick question – **what do you think of DOGE?**
**Everyone seems to have an opinion, but we honestly want to know what *you* think.[We're running a live poll, so can you take like six seconds and let us know before the midnight deadline?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50860?code=jtk17-su-fl&email=&zip=&t=2&akid=9990%2E434096%2EH34Lsc)**

No wonder that sh*t is unpopular. 👇

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/gEZE-ofJn3dPPOffOZjm5ZmLmqLAhyBUH2ExA4QjfngK0fd5EiPMXgCbOwpOaqdsxbINr9rT_HaboUWzBueUYk1357L9FFoVQ2QyPGybK02412wEUwS7WF1HRDiGtRIpUFyTLuOX-bnJf5sJJAVfkkV9myS2u5vCMInv5km1hhNp7DzkBs_tX_RIi8gMJRKG6x_XbY5vGknEW_nj21Dow5Q3w03bn5UO7scyzVast-S-TisXwZedC7XoIVwt7G9eqMVzH6VeAa5vA5Co9Wh2iM-5QB8vaH_PPOA2qV-E7MhqgwJVDkR39ZCo07Lln8TkDRmKTycbdRBke_AdGKQo9kGjavRQ8FZwjS-dILE3A4N0A-4KV_0O8QUgN0zFLApxyta1ZTEDo6gY125180BGPed37hDpoc1NLONuNkRqIg/aZp-UJR9WQkJpyVV7Rbq_rNe8KhFbiMw/7)

The American People voted to root out waste, fraud, and abuse. Before we sign off - just keep this in mind: Everybody needs allies, even the most powerful people in America. President Trump and Elon Musk are working to SAVE the country but they can't do it without the support of the American People. So if you voted for President Trump ... If you approve of Elon Musk and DOGE's work so far... And if you're sick of the Liberal Mob's Trump/Musk temper tantrums... "We’re asking you to do your part and respond right here and now." For America, House GOP | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105115189/537404819/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Yzk3MmM1NS1iMTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXbWl8x1BPWGrLPMhuPoNpaCyyo0RmyGCw6Y25xD-BI=)

Peter, it's Cory. This week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.
|

| | It's Cory. This week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What's clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. clean_body: This is a moment where we must all speak up. | | | It's Cory. This week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What's clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. = = With love and gratitude, Cory Booker | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by Andy Kim for New Jersey P.O. Box 211 Marlton, NJ 08053 United States Email is an important way for Andy Kim to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

Friend, This Saturday will be the single largest protest of the billionaire takeover of our democracy. I’ll be rallying with thousands of everyday people here in Michigan at one of our Hands Off rallies to protest Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s attacks on Social Security, Medicaid, SNAP, veterans’ services, public education, immigrants, and our free speech rights. [**There are over 800 rallies planned across the country. Together, we’ve been showing up outside of post offices, Social Security field offices, Veterans Affairs medical facilities, and the offices of members of Congress to protest the dismantling of the services that our communities rely on.
Trump’s billionaire cabinet doesn’t care if Social Security checks are delayed or if people simply don’t get them. They don’t care if people lose their healthcare or nutrition benefits. All they care about is profiting off of our government and renewing their tax scam, which allows billionaires and major corporations to avoid paying their fair share in taxes.
[**Don’t miss this critical moment to make our voices heard together. Click here to find a Hands Off rally near you.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMa2J2F9-GOeJSFpuNdJr44EvlRK8N53_ZicvQ4jtoUtRGtCLgOLiBoVx2VK6PzszBD3SceKA7SIn0NFQwXD0HNhjDrfVCOL6_BaLpTRqXWhNZuoAeFuUnRVmSj6l3FATX5_uKRlLJkimvcjx-LRGZOIAHX2gf3p8VQurcKsgZRkNrS2BrcwNcsoX1gpobYHHOfOyuKZAq3m7CZ1wQJWrAnqc010RujCmQmrrP-HEmXHVqOfzr9H6Xp2w7_st302g_7mL3EX61UsIvog3iqFBRdOSBytMES1NZCFjIPTcoymHDioZbP0evXVu-S4D5hEj-RdpAGsro3BzE_c8r5r9qbg/4fc/lPIGqo8ERHmcB2XEtCHDiA/h4/h001.5YYYHaRwHZ6hSa8hWWT3doQlV_CvZ3mDg0V5D88B2dQ)
Thank you for your activism as we demand a government that is of, by, and for the people, not the billionaires.
Always serving you,
Rashida

clean_body: Trump’s billionaire cabinet doesn’t care if Social Security checks are delayed or if people simply don’t get them. | | | Friend, This Saturday will be the single largest protest of the billionaire takeover of our democracy. I’ll be rallying with thousands of everyday people here in Michigan at one of our Hands Off rallies to protest Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s attacks on Social Security, Medicaid, SNAP, veterans’ services, public education, immigrants, and our free speech rights. | Together, we’ve been showing up outside of post offices, Social Security field offices, Veterans Affairs medical facilities, and the offices of members of Congress to protest the dismantling of the services that our communities rely on. Trump’s billionaire cabinet doesn’t care if Social Security checks are delayed or if people simply don’t get them. They don’t care if people lose their healthcare or nutrition benefits. All they care about is profiting off of our government and renewing their tax scam, which allows billionaires and major corporations to avoid paying their fair share in taxes. Thank you for your activism as we demand a government that is of, by, and for the people, not the billionaires. Always serving you, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Family, it's Cory. This week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. name: Chris Pappas
subject: I’m running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I’ll always put New Hampshire first.
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6da02785-f495-409c-aab1-3a0a2c3bd495/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
[](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta6031691-09c3-4ad4-827f-b4f8562b3c79/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
| Peter, I’m Congressman Chris Pappas, and Blue Amp Action said I could reach out with some big news: I’m officially running to be New Hampshire’s next U.S. Senator. I’m going to share more about why I’m in this race, but if you’re already on board, [split a contribution to my campaign and Blue Amp Action today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T789087e8-9d6e-4353-a917-4c70c46e3dd1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’m running for Senate because at this pivotal moment, our economy, our democracy, and our way of life are on the line. New Hampshire deserves a Senator who is grounded in the people, places, and values of this state – and one who is ready to lead on day one. Our country is at a crossroads, and the decisions we make now will have generational impacts. You can count on me to continue taking on big fights and to confront the Trump Administration, self-dealing billionaires, and extreme politicians who are threatening our future and our ability to get things done for New Hampshire. [Peter, can I count on you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign with a $10 contribution, split between my campaign and Blue Amp Action right now? We can’t win this race without major grassroots support.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9db2f88b-2fdd-453f-a326-0bac2b29d02d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) These fights are deeply personal to me. My family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in Manchester 108 years ago, a small business that remains at the heart of the community today. Running that small business showed me the power of hard work and serving others, but the opportunity that my ancestors and so many others like them sought has never been further away – and the Trump Administration is too busy cutting deals for their billionaire buddies to give a damn. I’m also openly gay and happily married to my husband, Vann. With the current wave of hateful policies leveled at the LGBTQ+ community, I know how important representation is at this moment. If elected, I’d be the first openly gay male U.S. Senator in history – a badge of honor I’d wear proudly as I advocate for full equality. I am the proud product of public education, and I come from a family of business owners (my grandfather invented the chicken tender at the restaurant – seriously!). I understand firsthand the need to support neighborhood schools and small businesses in our community. These are the lifeblood of our economy and the pillars of opportunity for everyone. My life experiences are what led me to successfully run for four terms in Congress and win in one of the “swingiest” districts in the nation. Before I won my election in 2018, no one had managed to hold the seat for more than one term for more than a decade. I’m no stranger to tough electoral fights. Now I’m ready to take on the fight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue. We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines of the big fights ahead – not with so much at stake, from the rising costs debilitating working families to the threats to the future of our democracy. We’ve taken on big fights together in Congress. Now it’s time to win this critical Senate seat so we can keep standing up to the Trump Administration and the self-dealing billionaires threatening our future. Can I count on you to join the fight? [Peter, if you’re with me, let’s make a powerful statement together and prove that we’re ready to win this race. Become a Founding Donor with a $10 donation to my campaign and Blue Amp Action now.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T933148be-976b-448a-be7a-e48bee25b7cf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you again to Blue Amp Action for letting me reach out today. With gratitude, Chris

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20250403_pappaslaunch_b3_f1_s1_c1_92op_n-t1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tde5108cc-4833-489e-a211-c851ddd0889d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Team ODP
subject: "Fighting for Ohioans"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
How is that possible when they’re nowhere to be found?
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105115760/537406142/-2078928068?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Where_250403_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjA4MGU4ZC1iMjEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V8CqbCiokOffjCx3J3te5GrN1JpvV8KWsycTl2qLZ3w=) Can’t get a hold of Ohio’s senators, team?

**Moreno and Husted are reportedly STILL out of reach for Ohioans.**

They claim to be “fighting for Ohioans...” but how is that possible when they’re hiding from their constituents and only coming up for air when Trump needs them to reach for their rubber stamps?

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: What we need right now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=190%2E181023%2EXAgJ_8)
Team,
Voters across the country are hungry for leaders who will _actually_ do something to address our biggest problems. Leaders who will call out corruption and wrongdoing when they see it.
Leaders like Senator Cory Booker, who stood up (literally) to the bullies and billionaires working to dismantle our federal government. For _25 hours_ he shared the stories of millions of Americans who are struggling to make ends meet.
Or leaders like Judge Susan Crawford, who stood strong in the face of _$25 million_ in spending by Elon Musk in support of her conservative opponent and won a seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court. She ran a campaign focused on defending our rights and freedoms while her opponent was focused on rolling back our rights.
**I will be the kind of leader Michiganders need and deserve.**
I’m not afraid of anyone, no matter how rich or powerful they may be, who threatens the safety of hard-working Michiganders. I will _always_ fight for what’s right, no matter what challenges come our way.
[**If you’re ready for that kind of leadership in Michigan, will you chip in to support my campaign for governor? Your support means so much to me and will help boost our vision for the future of our state.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q22025.rGq0NW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250403_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=190%2E181023%2EXAgJ_8)

name: Austin Davis
subject: Thanks for an incredible quarter, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Austin Davis

Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania Blue up and down the ballot. | | Peter, thanks to your help, we finished the first quarter of the year in a great place. We’re building a winning foundation here, and supporters like you are what makes this team work. I want you to know that grassroots power really makes an impact, and it’s because of you that I’m able to keep fighting for Pennsylvania. **As your Lieutenant Governor, I’m standing up for federal workers, minority owned business, environmental protections, and healthcare access.** But under the Trump administration, it makes me a target. I’m not going to let that slow me down, but it also means we have to keep our grassroots fundraising efforts strong. Pennsylvania is going to be a battleground state in this next election. We’re going to be facing Republican money at every turn, so we need to be able to match their effort dollar for dollar. [**If you’re with us, chip in now so we can get a head start on April fundraising!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105116503/537408829/1861023790?amount=10&source=sbd_ad_em_fr_040325_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTMwMGM2ZC1iNDEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ENLL482u97aljEbRM_SZ__QSJmDqCBoeecOE-ydmSU=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105116504/537408830/1861023790?amount=10&source=sbd_ad_em_fr_040325_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTMwMGM2ZC1iNDEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ENLL482u97aljEbRM_SZ__QSJmDqCBoeecOE-ydmSU=) Thank you, Peter! name: Brad Finstad
subject: Promises Made, Promises Kept
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ28YCGIy40Aggm6Q9ngafaSPDlvontXzjN-0Ok2LXCbviua9fuYhEtHoD6Ns)
---
| Dear Friend,
---
We’re not even at the 100-day mark of President Trump’s second term and already we’re seeing major action on the promises he campaigned on.
\- Improving government efficiency through the bold DOGE initiative with Elon Musk \- Signing the Laken Riley Act into law to protect Americans from violent illegal immigrants \- Ending DEI mandates and restoring merit and common sense in federal agencies \- Putting America First from our borders to our energy policy
But the work isn’t finished, and we want to hear from you.
**[Take our official First 100 Days poll and tell us how you think President Trump and the Republican majority are doing so far.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ28YCGIy40Aggm6Q9ngafaSPDlvontXzjN-0Ok2LXCbviua9fuYhEtHoD6Ns)****[](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ28YCGIy40AggnKQ9vrBVZCUKfH6CAX6Uwoec_OMEvG_qdtuLLdZSPCkWYWQ)**[********](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ28YCGIy40AggnKQ9vrBVZCUKfH6CAX6Uwoec_OMEvG_qdtuLLdZSPCkWYWQ)
---
[](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ28YCGIy40Aggm6Q9ngafaSPDlvontXzjN-0Ok2LXCbviua9fuYhEtHoD6Ns)
---
| [TAKE THE POLL ](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ28YCGIy40Aggm6Q9ngafaSPDlvontXzjN-0Ok2LXCbviua9fuYhEtHoD6Ns)
---
Let’s be clear, the radical left is already trying to downplay these wins. They’re desperate to rewrite the narrative before the momentum becomes unstoppable. That’s why your voice now matters more than ever.
This isn’t just a poll, it’s a message to Washington that conservatives are watching, engaged, and ready to hold the line. **[Take our official First 100 Days poll and tell us how you think President Trump and the Republican majority are doing so far.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ28YCGIy40Aggm6Q9ngafaSPDlvontXzjN-0Ok2LXCbviua9fuYhEtHoD6Ns)**
Thank you,
---

name: Chris Pappas
subject: I’m running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
I’ll always put New Hampshire first. |
#
---
I'm Congressman Chris Pappas, and Nikki said I could reach out with some big news: **I’m officially running to be New Hampshire’s next U.S. Senator.** I’m going to share more about why I’m in this race, but if you’re already on board, **[split a contribution to my campaign and Nikki's today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105117453/537411940/797216279?amount=&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC120_20250403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTE5NTM4Ni1iNTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lubig1LJYibu2eDTNsOAn91M05CMGDxKE4OB3Pz7kUk=)** I’m running for Senate because at this pivotal moment, our economy, our democracy, and our way of life are on the line. New Hampshire deserves a Senator who is grounded in the people, places, and values of this state – and one who is ready to lead on day one. Our country is at a crossroads, and the decisions we make now will have generational impacts. You can count on me to continue taking on big fights and to confront the Trump Administration, self-dealing billionaires, and extreme politicians who are threatening our future and our ability to get things done for New Hampshire. **[Can I count on you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign with a $10 contribution, split between my campaign and Nikki's right now? We can’t win this race without major grassroots support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105117454/537411947/797216279?amount=10&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC120_20250403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTE5NTM4Ni1iNTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lubig1LJYibu2eDTNsOAn91M05CMGDxKE4OB3Pz7kUk=)** **These fights are deeply personal to me.** My family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in Manchester 108 years ago, a small business that remains at the heart of the community today. Running that small business showed me the power of hard work and serving others, but the opportunity that my ancestors and so many others like them sought has never been further away – and the Trump Administration is too busy cutting deals for their billionaire buddies to give a damn. I’m also openly gay and happily married to my husband, Vann. With the current wave of hateful policies leveled at the LGBTQ+ community, I know how important representation is at this moment. **If elected, I’d be the first openly gay male U.S. Senator in history** – a badge of honor I’d wear proudly as I advocate for full equality. I am the proud product of public education, and I come from a family of business owners (_my grandfather invented the chicken tender at the restaurant – seriously!_). I understand firsthand the need to support neighborhood schools and small businesses in our community. **These are the lifeblood of our economy and the pillars of opportunity for everyone.** My life experiences are what led me to successfully run for four terms in Congress and win in one of the “swingiest” districts in the nation. Before I won my election in 2018, no one had managed to hold the seat for more than one term for more than a decade. I’m no stranger to tough electoral fights. **Now I’m ready to take on the fight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue.** We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines of the big fights ahead – not with so much at stake, from the rising costs debilitating working families to the threats to the future of our democracy. We’ve taken on big fights together in Congress. Now it’s time to win this critical Senate seat so we can keep standing up to the Trump Administration and the self-dealing billionaires threatening our future. Can I count on you to join the fight? **[If you’re with me, let’s make a powerful statement together and prove that we’re ready to win this race. Become a Founding Donor with a $10 donation to my campaign and Nikki's now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105117455/537411949/797216279?amount=10&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC120_20250403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTE5NTM4Ni1iNTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lubig1LJYibu2eDTNsOAn91M05CMGDxKE4OB3Pz7kUk=)** Thank you again to Nikki for letting me reach out today. With gratitude, Chris [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105117456/537411950/797216279?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC120_20250403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTE5NTM4Ni1iNTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lubig1LJYibu2eDTNsOAn91M05CMGDxKE4OB3Pz7kUk=)
Nikki for Congress
PO Box 5171
Springfield, IL 62705
United States ****[Nikkiforcongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105117457/537411952/-927342243?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC120_20250403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTE5NTM4Ni1iNTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lubig1LJYibu2eDTNsOAn91M05CMGDxKE4OB3Pz7kUk=&emci=2be7371d-0b10-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=31195386-b510-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=13891387) ** | [info@nikkiforcongress.com](mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com)** | **Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
---
**This email was sent to**dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://go.nikkiforcongress.com/p/e8jmxCqJNkS72mawkeDcaA2?unsubscribedata=9pzyC1N5rKjHw%2FXEd0fxEP33sLsdYQwTZ%2B67ZIsRJ7ixlFQVe%2BUBybt42WFDSaC2j6LN29gZ6qJwhS85GjUZHDF0sd6h%2F1E8Yl05s4AsJHYENlU3pJ6DjQVRA5QnRmJYWv4Kwb2VZuLvgYhNm9urv28CehfE7NyIanO1K4FQrsLXq48Alvfsbt4AFICBLMyPdIaudNewKj0DoTUbOUPfnL0mRcGIfuW8jLK3sO4gAsqf5i9q5DHKh04Suj%2B32vcwmnuTept8VLxsioNfQKhq6C7a5ykVWn3tORScR%2B92aXn6MhnP5cz%2BJWUcfOxJVDFE0dN3WstljCgV06OuHv359NODN4IMWturxDFH8%2Fe%2Bd7a8BxHR%2Fb3ghbAFLm%2BsswJRyeF3Iu0uOWi1%2FZrbPvvT4keXXvqFW28bYGdlg02V17ZFWu%2F8BDLcgt9lX80PVmuw)**
** **

name: Cory Booker
subject: I spoke for over 25 hours straight on the Senate floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up. |
#
---
_Peter, I’m passing along a message from my friend Senator Cory Booker, who stood on the Senate floor earlier this week for 25 hours (!) to deliver a historic speech highlighting the disastrous actions of this Trump Administration. I was proud to go to the Senate floor to support Senator Booker’s remarkable feat. Please read his message below._ _— Dan_
* * *
Peter, it's Cory. Earlier this week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. **[If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Dan Goldman today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105117468/537412132/1701407202?amount=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzE5NTM4Ni1iNTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9-s9D00gmq6o3LF7JNx8Q2GbDUQ11eos1xz-60ulZ90=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Dan Goldman and Cory Booker will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105117470/537412161/1525867728?express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzE5NTM4Ni1iNTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9-s9D00gmq6o3LF7JNx8Q2GbDUQ11eos1xz-60ulZ90=)

clean_body: This is a moment where we must all speak up. | Peter, I’m passing along a message from my friend Senator Cory Booker, who stood on the Senate floor earlier this week for 25 hours (!) to deliver a historic speech highlighting the disastrous actions of this Trump Administration. I was proud to go to the Senate floor to support Senator Booker’s remarkable feat. Please read his message below. — Dan Peter, it's Cory. Earlier this week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Dan Goldman and Cory Booker will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = With love and gratitude, Cory Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: Sharice Davids
subject: I won’t go down without a fight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Over the last few months, we’ve seen an avalanche of reprehensible attacks on our rights

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105117559/537412402/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTI1YWRhYy1iNTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pDK-G3VMtbLmAWlIZfebtLWpbhCMJ38duYP6FXyKJdw=) Hey there, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you. Over the last week, my team and I reached out to you, well, a lot. Because of the generosity of supporters like you, we reached our FEC fundraising goal with just a few hours to spare. And most importantly, that support is now playing a critical role to power my fight in Congress. It’s no secret that in the last three months, we’ve seen an avalanche of reprehensible attacks on our rights, our democracy, and our values. Whether it’s Elon Musk’s efforts to gut care for veterans like my mother or threatening massive cuts to Medicaid and Social Security, these reckless actions are having devastating impacts on our communities here in KS-03. But I won’t go down without a fight. I was elected to Congress to represent hardworking Kansans — not the interests of billionaires like Donald Trump and Elon Musk. That’s why I refuse to sit quietly on the sidelines as these extreme politicians try to raise everyday costs, slash affordable health care, and profit off the people’s government. But this fight isn’t mine alone. If we want to stop this administration’s attacks on working families, we _all_ need to step up. That means making noise, standing our ground, and fighting back against every one of their attempts to harm the American people. Despite the difficult moment we find ourselves in, your support has made a difference. We’ve stopped President Trump’s plan to freeze federal spending, and even forced his administration to re-hire thousands of critical federal workers that were previously terminated. I know that if we continue to use our voices, we can slow down, or even stop, their extreme proposals. [_**So if you didn’t get the chance to chip in last month, will you support my work to continue pushing back against extremism by pitching in today? Every donation sends a clear message to National Republicans that this team will not back down from any fight that comes our way.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105117560/537412403/213558093?refcode=email_040325_Thank-you&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTI1YWRhYy1iNTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pDK-G3VMtbLmAWlIZfebtLWpbhCMJ38duYP6FXyKJdw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105117562/537412404/213558093?refcode=email_040325_Thank-you&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTI1YWRhYy1iNTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pDK-G3VMtbLmAWlIZfebtLWpbhCMJ38duYP6FXyKJdw=)

name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: We just went toe to toe with Mike Johnson. And we won.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
Nine Republicans joined every Democrat in Congress to send a clear message to Mike Johnson and House GOP leadership

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105117610/537412487/-2140435400?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODE5NTM4Ni1iNTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vt4XD8-dRnQxa617gE5Ttd-ckFwZ7gZ-ERqW8tjishs=)
---
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105117612/537412488/149292893?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250403_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODE5NTM4Ni1iNTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vt4XD8-dRnQxa617gE5Ttd-ckFwZ7gZ-ERqW8tjishs=)** Hey, New Dems said I could reach out with some news:

This week, Speaker Mike Johnson held a vote on the House floor to kill my resolution to allow new parents in Congress to vote remotely while raising their newborn children. **But it failed. Mike Johnson lost, and common sense won.**

Nine Republicans joined every Democrat in Congress to send a clear message to Mike Johnson and House GOP leadership: **The status quo is not acceptable.**

It’s not acceptable that people from middle-class families, and especially young women, have been deterred from running for Congress. It’s not acceptable that Congress has been dominated by the interests of older, wealthy men. And it’s not acceptable that Mike Johnson tried a desperate, last-second procedural gimmick to silence our voices.

Over the last three months, I went toe-to-toe with the Speaker of the House and all the power he wields. And together, we showed Mike Johnson that nobody fights harder than a mom.

**But this fight isn’t done. Next up is officially passing this resolution and making sure Congress actually reflects the people we serve. Mike Johnson will fight until the bitter end to prevent us from modernizing Congress, so I need your support more than ever before.**

**[If you believe in my work to make Washington more welcoming to young people and regular families, will you pitch in a split donation between me and New Dems? clean_body: Nine Republicans joined every Democrat in Congress to send a clear message to Mike Johnson and House GOP leadership | = = Hey, New Dems said I could reach out with some news: This week, Speaker Mike Johnson held a vote on the House floor to kill my resolution to allow new parents in Congress to vote remotely while raising their newborn children. But it failed. Mike Johnson lost, and common sense won. Nine Republicans joined every Democrat in Congress to send a clear message to Mike Johnson and House GOP leadership: The status quo is not acceptable. It’s not acceptable that people from middle-class families, and especially young women, have been deterred from running for Congress. It’s not acceptable that Congress has been dominated by the interests of older, wealthy men. And it’s not acceptable that Mike Johnson tried a desperate, last-second procedural gimmick to silence our voices. Over the last three months, I went toe-to-toe with the Speaker of the House and all the power he wields. And together, we showed Mike Johnson that nobody fights harder than a mom. But this fight isn’t done. Next up is officially passing this resolution and making sure Congress actually reflects the people we serve. Mike Johnson will fight until the bitter end to prevent us from modernizing Congress, so I need your support more than ever before. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Brittany Pettersen and New Dems will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Brittany Pettersen | | Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund www.newdemactionfund.com Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 910 17th St NW Suite 1050, Washington, DC 20006 In 2022, NewDems flipped more competitive seats from red-to-blue than any other ideological caucus. name: Lateefah Simon
subject: I can’t help but feel grateful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Hi Friend,
I can’t help but feel grateful. This past Monday was one of my most important fundraising deadlines—my first-ever end-of-quarter deadline since entering office—and you all delivered.
We met our fundraising goal and, for that, I can’t thank you enough.
This campaign isn’t powered by corporate PACs, mega-donors, or special interests. It’s built by, for, and with the community. Real people, real voices, real power. And together, we’re only getting stronger.
The best way to keep growing is by organizing—bringing in our friends, family, and neighbors. Because here’s the truth: Donald Trump is gutting our government, agency by agency. His administration is actively dismantling the very institutions that protect our rights before our very eyes, but we don’t have to sit back and watch.
We can fight back. We can change direction and alter the course of our nation’s future. Donate today to support my mission and reject every single aspect of Trump’s extremist agenda >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_las_email-25q2?refcode=x_250403_thankyou_act]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_las_email-25q2?refcode=x_250403_thankyou_act]
Thank you for being in this with me, always,
Lateefah

Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s fighting this fight from the Capitol. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a proven champion.

name: Sofia, All On The Line
subject: These Florida bills are a clear attack on democracy. We’re fighting back.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Donate and help power our work fighting back against attempts to undermine our democracy.
|
---

**State lawmakers are trying to make it significantly harder for Floridians to put constitutional amendments on the ballot. We’re fighting back.**
Peter,
Citizen-led democracy is under attack in my home state of Florida, where extremist lawmakers are trying to make it nearly impossible for everyday people to put constitutional amendments on the ballot.
Multiple bills would place extreme barriers on the initiative process, including:
• Requiring a $1 million bond in order to start collecting signatures
• Imposing excessive fines for small violations in the process
• Creating new layers of government review before signature petitions can even move forward
• Reducing the number of days a sponsor would have to deliver signatures from 30 to 10
All in all, they’d create an uphill battle for grassroots movements like ours seeking to make change. Floridians have a long history of using the ballot initiative process to drive meaningful reform — including on redistricting in 2010. These bills represent an attempt to shut down that process, silence voters, and attack our democracy.
**We still have time to fight back, but we have to move fast — the state house is set to vote on one of these proposals _today._**
**All On The Line has mobilized Floridians to contact their lawmakers and call on them to oppose these pieces of legislation. And we need your help to sustain our work pushing back against similar anti-democracy efforts across the country.**
**[Rush a $15 donation today to help ensure we can continue our work for fair maps and a truly representative democracy in Florida and nationwide.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105118153/537414436/-877614143?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_FLBills_email_20250403-AOTL-Tier1-FLBills-SP_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250403-AOTL-Tier1-FLBills-SP_&utm_campaign=FLBills&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhMTk1Mzg2LWI1MTAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2scJ72Y5_CipInoCqceWFpbNbUW29NCl5ZG5rFu_kVA=)**

The new proposed obstacles aren’t about election integrity — they’re about limiting public participation.
They’re about keeping power out of the hands of the people.
And they don’t seem to have popular support. A GOP pollster found that 55% of the state’s **Republicans** oppose making it more difficult to put constitutional amendments on the ballot — just 17% support it. And nearly 3 in 4 Republican primary voters broadly favor the current citizen-led system.
**Here’s something else you should know: protecting the constitutional amendment process is critical for fair maps going forward.**
To back up a little: Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, initiated a recent legal challenge to Florida’s congressional map, which clearly violates the state constitution — specifically one of the amendments passed by voters in 2010 — by diluting the political power of Black Floridians.
We are still awaiting the results of that challenge. Either way, fair maps advocates like All On The Line will rely on direct democracy as a backstop to ensure we have fair maps and a fair redistricting process for 2030 and beyond.
**But if the legislature makes it virtually impossible to do that type of organizing, they could push reform out of reach and lock manipulated maps into place for years to come.**
**We must stop Florida lawmakers’ calculated attempts to subvert the will of voters. So we’re doing everything we can to prevent these bills from passing.**
[**Will you make a donation now to help fight back against attacks on our democracy and our freedom to make our voices heard, in Florida and beyond?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105118160/537414445/-877614143?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_FLBills_email_20250403-AOTL-Tier1-FLBills-SP_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250403-AOTL-Tier1-FLBills-SP_&utm_campaign=FLBills&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhMTk1Mzg2LWI1MTAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2scJ72Y5_CipInoCqceWFpbNbUW29NCl5ZG5rFu_kVA=)
We’ll keep you updated on what comes next.
Thanks,
Sofia Pedroso
Digital Director, All On The Line

There are times this fight for a popular vote system feels impossible. But friend, we can assure you it's not.
There are a number of ways it can be done. A constitutional amendment, the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact (NPVIC), and more.
What we really need is the will to do it -- and that will is growing nationwide. 17 states plus Washington, DC have joined the NPVIC. Those states would likely also pass the amendment to the Constitution.
Momentum is growing as more and more Americans see the need for a popular vote to elect the president. 63% of Americans think the way we elect a president needs to be changed -- a number that's grown over the last decade and is likely higher now than when polled last summer.

It’s the biggest tool the opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to take away this dangerous mechanism that enabled the January 6th insurrection before it happens again.
Vote suppressors have proven there’s no length they won’t go to in order to win, including gaming this antiquated system. clean_body: Voter Action Project [=] There are times this fight for a popular vote system feels impossible. But friend, we can assure you it's not. There are a number of ways it can be done. A constitutional amendment, the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact (NPVIC), and more. What we really need is the will to do it -- and that will is growing nationwide. 17 states plus Washington, DC have joined the NPVIC. Those states would likely also pass the amendment to the Constitution. Momentum is growing as more and more Americans see the need for a popular vote to elect the president. 63% of Americans think the way we elect a president needs to be changed -- a number that's grown over the last decade and is likely higher now than when polled last summer. name: Cory Booker
subject: I spoke for over 25 hours straight on the Senate floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up
This is a crucial moment in our fight to protect the American people and our democracy. Please add your name before midnight tonight.
|
---
| Family, it’s Cory.

This week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.

**I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.**

What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.

I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.

It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.

It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.

[**_If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Kirsten Gillibrand today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105118805/537416494/-486209955?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.03_Cory-Booker-Split-2_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC-ND_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGIyZmUzNC1iNzEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OiNUDyNgEUyBqxU-nDJBZU0mruRJVa4Ob7LFlQE6WL4=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Cory Booker and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105118806/537416495/-486209955?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.03_Cory-Booker-Split-2_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC-ND_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGIyZmUzNC1iNzEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OiNUDyNgEUyBqxU-nDJBZU0mruRJVa4Ob7LFlQE6WL4=)

clean_body: This is a moment where we must all speak up This is a crucial moment in our fight to protect the American people and our democracy. Please add your name before midnight tonight. | | Family, it’s Cory. This week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Cory Booker and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = With love and gratitude, Cory = * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8fae01484308412f843fadbf55b1e1a9&_e=mhOyUVaFn5hefxXnzg8lnsM1Bp7N-I0_VqW2_86CfpJy37X-X_Jk365-oufSaE73QG5rAw2OBabTLj9n9NFcp5yXpmZod2-62A78AFWlf1oCR9GWnQNXdcnVGf1YhYR-r6inZDs3EBRz-k0YdbNBha5eY3pQKhNARvtOKKxj4uKxotDVdROp7DlyUoeeCnoIVkaOhmRZVyjqS1A9I2s4X5aufwVt6SuBRM5DBjHAg65u46FethSoY4o57ufxp8yZstxe40bDf88qrGC1NlNO0Dv0PjA3uHxZmtJ07F6-4iTcGJPRXTZrXcYX_jdCkEGrpKmc5bMeLBuB6qoEChWpSjRMKTgiueBcSEWCqE7u_VOX-HbITfzndZt69cGjC-L-) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge. clean_body: I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. | | | | | Dear Friend, I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: | | | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach in his commentary, - Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge. - Thanks, Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world. | Peter,
Your name just came up.
The MassGOP team just presented me with my [birthday card signed by all of YOU](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iCMrErIfPR6viT4LNm12LfAaJzsPtD09P7IJgOA0J0xrLQcjpNdTwhAu3p9gVpdm86b3ttTKuqnHSVWo6GxL7kqMveGBrQ6DjbV29KWs3NOnnpyhJgQfsz5-DZLG9UHfZRD2Fht1rURgUuNYHiaCbanL_11YqyKAJ9aGHPUqC2SQNbx0XYlhRs6aHwUpPPMTFhErbEe5G-E=&c=vfHMgR2onme4IwSkDq8l8RSKn5KAECMLPz7rjSs7tPefB9cexmJtlg==&ch=gSvVXpTOC8nkpYdqhkdsQhVADT-yD_GXTbw-WME_N4abbSHZPqmhnA==)[ ](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iCMrErIfPR6viT4LNm12LfAaJzsPtD09P7IJgOA0J0xrLQcjpNdTwhAu3p9gVpdm86b3ttTKuqnHSVWo6GxL7kqMveGBrQ6DjbV29KWs3NOnnpyhJgQfsz5-DZLG9UHfZRD2Fht1rURgUuNYHiaCbanL_11YqyKAJ9aGHPUqC2SQNbx0XYlhRrrBf9yfQW9hTmv5YGJrRzQ=&c=vfHMgR2onme4IwSkDq8l8RSKn5KAECMLPz7rjSs7tPefB9cexmJtlg==&ch=gSvVXpTOC8nkpYdqhkdsQhVADT-yD_GXTbw-WME_N4abbSHZPqmhnA==)and I owe you a big THANK YOU!
Having your continued support is key to strengthening & growing our Party here in Massachusetts -- especially with 2 winnable special elections coming up this spring.
In just three months time, we could add 2 more Republicans to our team on Beacon Hill.
So, thank you for being a part of it and for fighting for our shared values every single day.
Together, we will continue fighting for Massachusetts one race, one candidate, and most importantly - one victory - at a time.
THANK YOU!
---
| | |
---

Amy Carnevale
Chair, MassGOP

Dear Peter, Our voices are more impactful when we’re together and in person! Can you join us in Salem on April 17 to tell our state lawmakers why we need green neighborhoods with safe sidewalks, bike paths, public transit, and the freedom to choose how we get around? **Move Oregon Forward Advocacy Day****Thursday, April 17****9 a.m. to 5 p.m.****Oregon State Capitol, Salem**
---
[**RSVP here**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105120281/537420075/1378362462?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3OGIyYmI5LWI5MTAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nEnnrACT2KVaai9fy_7hte0ennIM5Le0PJqIVjTPx2w=&emci=4f1bdc13-0010-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=878b2bb9-b910-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
OLCV has teamed up with [Move Oregon Forward](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105120283/537420077/-1295365595?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3OGIyYmI5LWI5MTAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nEnnrACT2KVaai9fy_7hte0ennIM5Le0PJqIVjTPx2w=&emci=4f1bdc13-0010-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=878b2bb9-b910-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230), a coalition of transportation, climate, and environmental justice organizations from across the state, to achieve our transportation goals. On April 17 we’re rallying at the state capital to build momentum and power for a transportation system that is safer, more equitable, and more affordable for all Oregonians. As lawmakers consider changing how we fund our transportation system, we need to ensure that every dollar delivers on our safety and climate goals while expanding financially sustainable and well-maintained transportation choices. We're ready to support funding ideas that reflect our values, as long as they’re fair and don't add to the burden working people already face. We look forward to an exciting and inspiring day of community, engagement, and transit justice advancement. Every Oregonian deserves clean air, healthy, vibrant communities, and the chance to thrive. **[**Peter, will you add your voice and join us in Salem?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105120285/537420079/1378362462?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3OGIyYmI5LWI5MTAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nEnnrACT2KVaai9fy_7hte0ennIM5Le0PJqIVjTPx2w=&emci=4f1bdc13-0010-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=878b2bb9-b910-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)**

body:
We’ll cut straight to the chase – without you on our team, we can’t invest in state races. If we can’t invest, then we can’t compete. And if we can’t compete? We can’t win. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**What happens if a grassroots Democrat doesn’t activate their 2025 membership?** ****
1. Our DLCC membership team will stay stagnant at just over 10,000 members – which won’t be nearly enough to counteract right-wing billionaires’ spending.
2. State Democrats in places like your state and beyond won’t have the resources they need to compete against our opponents in upcoming special elections.
3. Expanding economic opportunity, protecting workers’ rights, and building a better future for people like you will become much, _much_ more difficult if Republicans keep amassing power.

**Listen, all you really need to know is this:** Without you on our team, we can’t invest in state legislative races. If we can’t invest, then we can’t compete. And if we can’t compete? _We can’t win._ [It’s simple – we need you to join the ranks of 10,000+ grassroots members who are fighting to ensure state Democrats have the tools they need to fight back against a MAGA takeover in the states. Will you chip in $10 to become a 2025 member today? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDThSmlGL5SZKXg4BDovnS04gHNgK48n_8LBY9zspddgFIQ3hvVL5FRiRmTjiagKXc43KZsk2mQ0MHJXbgspZZPi3Kat9gWjcAfJ7DJgjtCfQC1oMaLhH_Z482zCS_0A5qhgIGKsJUTL9AJS5zeINij6xf9ZVYw2SqZmAARAsNIABRFcaAJir3egqkBRFU-Hhc36WwjxnFiBjW3CtYxK9NBwa-lRZgtDGlNwHah6AVkroMwLE_8LdkNb8ccz7tnKWPH1Cv7lZdJSOVjynEE7aixVltIQQBhViTHcbiSDJAwBBwqndk6WOck8SszuUFDuRHs_FILVPW5Zc1du0X6Ksest-A2_yMBUEGPWxrxndGior7IpnQXgwK9NOvqUb5RjwGJZ9p20yeHIDU4uBCpVBSz1DISdXVmFuMdVManCxOOGzhafd_5LPidVasgP2ZS4Xyeyp_y5bbuvlwpO-swZ3fw2wdjQO2L_T2kqyvZoliBjLdZcWf3R0-23Sqdmh-CI9pmVzKo6j76uiUfYy5pTEZviwtqQoxODgXqllp7pG-XcFbDtMuk5LJMXTmEXfSmdFxM6eGjHUK-J41yZH24qLqU4QJdqei3-OaIFF9b30fx03hTXVjGu2veA56l7W-hXrqzLa0eeDMjwV0LkVcH0HJggRZ1xckGkI6dAmepR-XC2zsUVz7E8KXMPdUOuX1xLhcFP81_BEaR9gZLrGlmDJE-g/4fc/I4kVlMdiQiShP36uk9yJKQ/h0/h001.aOEqlHlRuaIWdAE3uWhCGe8VSgOJbCe81p6eHd6fki0) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

subject: Let's get one thing straight…
body:
Rep. Mikie Sherrill is ready to prove the skeptics wrong. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105120730/537421508/1606434486?refcode=WUEFH411_20250403_MikieSplit_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055909&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjA5YjZhOS1iYTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9zIOCOMgxeDpYFffLW0j_69mD-XXym2UNifqrD2zifU=) Peter, Democratic pro-choice women have to overcome all kinds of barriers when running for office, including the myth of "electability." [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105120731/537421510/1606434486?refcode=WUEFH411_20250403_MikieSplit_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055909&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjA5YjZhOS1iYTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9zIOCOMgxeDpYFffLW0j_69mD-XXym2UNifqrD2zifU=) Women candidates often face questions about how "electable" they are. Men running for office simply don’t get asked that question.

Let's get one thing straight, Peter:

**Women candidates are electable if you elect them.**

Rep. Mikie Sherrill (NJ-GOV) is proof of that.

**Mikie was told during her first U.S. House run in 2018 that "people didn't think a woman could win in New Jersey." _She proved them wrong — flipping a long-time Republican seat and winning by 15 percentage points!!_**

Now, she's ready to prove the skeptics wrong again.

Mikie is the only woman — and the front runner — in the crowded New Jersey Democratic primary for governor, and we know she is _best_ positioned to win in November. clean_body: Rep. Mikie Sherrill is ready to prove the skeptics wrong. | = Peter, Democratic pro-choice women have to overcome all kinds of barriers when running for office, including the myth of "electability." = Women candidates often face questions about how "electable" they are. Men running for office simply don’t get asked that question. Let's get one thing straight, Peter: Women candidates are electable if you elect them. Rep. Mikie Sherrill (NJ-GOV) is proof of that. Mikie was told during her first U.S. House run in 2018 that "people didn't think a woman could win in New Jersey." She proved them wrong — flipping a long-time Republican seat and winning by 15 percentage points!! Now, she's ready to prove the skeptics wrong again. Mikie is the only woman — and the front runner — in the crowded New Jersey Democratic primary for governor, and we know she is best positioned to win in November. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Interim Vice President of Federal and Gubernatorial Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Autism Health Inc.
subject: There is still time to Register for the AHS Conference
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **Join Us for the Autism Health Summit in San Diego!**
---
| [ ](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=2024e21bb5&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| In celebration of Autism Awareness Month, we invite you to join us at the **Autism Health Summit** , happening **April 11-13, 2025** , at the **Town & Country Resort in San Diego, CA**. This transformative event brings together world-renowned experts, healthcare professionals, and families for a weekend of connection, learning, and empowerment.
### **Featured Speakers Include:**
* **Del Bigtree** – Emmy Award-winning journalist and medical freedom advocate
* **Dr. Peter McCullough** – Renowned Cardiologist and researcher
* **Dr. Sabine Hazan** – Microbiome researcher and gastroenterologist
* **Dr. Brian Hooker** – Scientist and Chief Scientific Officer of CHD
* **Dr. Dayan Goodenowe** – Neuroscientist and expert in plasmalogen research

### **Special Highlights:**
* **Mesenchymal Stem Cell Therapy Clinic** available on-site
* **CME credits** for healthcare professionals
* Sponsor exhibits, networking, and family-focused resources

### **Register Today & Save $50**
Use promo code **AHS50** for **$50 off** your in-person ticket.
---
| [REGISTER NOW](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=adbdeea49f&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER NOW")
---
| Together, we can create real change for individuals and families living with autism. Whether you join us in person or support from afar, thank you for being a part of this important movement.
---
|
---
| **Give Hope, Create Change**
---
|
---
| April is **Autism Awareness Month! **A time to honor the strength, resilience, and uniqueness of individuals on the autism spectrum disorder and to recognize the families, caregivers, and professionals who support them every day. At **Autism Health Inc.** , we are committed to turning awareness into **action** by providing vital resources, education, and support to families across the country. One of the most impactful ways to support this mission is through **donations**. For just the price of a cup of coffee each month, you can help change a life. Your **recurring donation** helps fund scholarships for families in need, brings in world-renowned speakers, and ensures access to cutting-edge health solutions.
