name: Cory Booker
subject: I spoke for over 25 hours straight on the Senate floor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2_spl_cab?refcode=X_250403_filibuster_act_spl_cab [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2_spl_cab?refcode=X_250403_filibuster_act_spl_cab]
Hi friends, it’s Michael.
This past week, my good friend Cory Booker broke the record for the longest speech on the U.S. Senate floor to protest the Trump administration’s disregard for justice, democracy, and decency.
I am grateful for Cory's leadership in this moment in our history, and I wanted to share a note from him:
Family, it’s Cory.
This week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.
I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.
What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.
I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.
It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.
It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.
We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend.
If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Michael Bennet today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2_spl_cab?refcode=X_250403_filibuster_act_spl_cab]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2_spl_cab?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=X_250403_filibuster_act_spl_cab] MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2_spl_cab?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_250403_filibuster_act_spl_cab]
With love and gratitude,
Cory

clean_body: This is a moment where we must all speak up. Family, it's Cory. Earlier this week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = With love and gratitude, Cory | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Hillsdale College via Victory Mailings
subject: Russia and the United States
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1lmu9k9xyf51tzohp4m12ybp9i5iipm7omokzmxkaln12hcubbeoznbyo4abk8hu5ppgelqx621e6en7z13&__stmp=su5ob8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su5ob8&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkr00exeacftwzpykhdbnuhhriyqlu72kg9ati3mx5fz1yuhgp8lpejkc5rcz6ky5ag06q336u3p07lz7qkyvrki6anneoma5ufcf086zk2rhfexnr1jgjmbf2a6nqj4lvq1htv3jlvvsv95qgx9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su5ob8&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su5ob8&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su5ob8&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su5ob8&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkr00exeacftwzpykhdbnuhhbvah7m4jcdt472sjdurthj8fwwi5woqsiavs3epa1xio6juk95jaonbu0w2u628yhx4mbmxa29axzu8f0q3k6dtepo5wtiiltlk3e8sbnf3qzk63f198k8osov15&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su5ob8&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su5ob8&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Chris Pappas
subject: I’m running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
I’ll always put New Hampshire first. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105122252/537426206/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc3NTdlYy1iZDEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aw4kaWeW1_Qqee8NQvhOI-1qBB-r-fCjBbYoOW-mNOc=)
---
Peter, I'm Congressman Chris Pappas, and Becca said I could reach out with some big news: **I’m officially running to be New Hampshire’s next U.S. Senator.** I’m going to share more about why I’m in this race, but if you’re already on board, **[please split a contribution to my campaign and Becca's today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105122253/537426207/-1147903723?amount=&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc3NTdlYy1iZDEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aw4kaWeW1_Qqee8NQvhOI-1qBB-r-fCjBbYoOW-mNOc=)** New Hampshire deserves a Senator who is grounded in the people, places, and values of this state – and one who is ready to lead on day one. You can count on me to continue taking on big fights and to confront the Trump Administration, self-dealing billionaires, and extreme politicians who are threatening our future and our ability to get things done for New Hampshire. **[Peter, can I count on you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign with a $10 contribution, split between my campaign and Becca's right now? We can’t win this race without major grassroots support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105122254/537426208/-1147903723?amount=10&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc3NTdlYy1iZDEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aw4kaWeW1_Qqee8NQvhOI-1qBB-r-fCjBbYoOW-mNOc=)** **These fights are deeply personal to me.** My family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in Manchester 108 years ago, a small business that remains at the heart of the community today. Running that small business showed me the power of hard work and serving others, but the opportunity that my ancestors and so many others like them sought has never been further away – and the Trump Administration is too busy cutting deals for their billionaire buddies to give a damn. I’m also openly gay and happily married to my husband, Vann. With the current wave of hateful policies leveled at the LGBTQ+ community, I know how important representation is at this moment. **If elected, I’d be the first openly gay male U.S. Senator in history** – a badge of honor I’d wear proudly as I advocate for full equality. I am the proud product of public education, and I come from a family of business owners (_my grandfather invented the chicken tender at the restaurant – seriously!_). I understand firsthand the need to support neighborhood schools and small businesses in our community. **These are the lifeblood of our economy and the pillars of opportunity for everyone.** My life experiences are what led me to successfully run for four terms in Congress and win in one of the “swingiest” districts in the nation. **I’m ready to take on the fight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue.** We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines of the big fights ahead – not with so much at stake, from the rising costs debilitating working families to the threats to the future of our democracy. We’ve taken on big fights together in Congress. Now it’s time to win this critical Senate seat so we can keep standing up to the Trump Administration and the self-dealing billionaires threatening our future. Can I count on you to join the fight? **[Peter, If you’re with me, let’s make a powerful statement together and prove that we’re ready to win this race. Become a Founding Donor with a $10 donation to my campaign and Becca's now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105122255/537426209/-1147903723?amount=10&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc3NTdlYy1iZDEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aw4kaWeW1_Qqee8NQvhOI-1qBB-r-fCjBbYoOW-mNOc=)** Thank you again to Becca for letting me reach out today. With gratitude, Chris [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105122256/537426210/-1147903723?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc3NTdlYy1iZDEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aw4kaWeW1_Qqee8NQvhOI-1qBB-r-fCjBbYoOW-mNOc=)
**[beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com](mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com)** | **Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
P.O. Box 291
Burlington, VT 05402
---

** **

name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: No BS, I’m running for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I’m launching my campaign for the U.S. Senate. Point blank, we need new leaders in Washington who will call out the BS
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T484603fc-56ec-4faa-af5f-92e6c367565e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27b5d0cb-2560-47ec-9129-072e90113495/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
| Peter, I’m launching my campaign for the U.S. Senate. Point blank, we need new leaders in Washington who will call out the bullshit. [I’m going to share more about why I’m running. But before I do, if you’re like me and are done with the BS coming from Washington, please split a gift between our campaign and Blue Amp Action now. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0e279641-5e7b-40b3-9429-36163cdc503d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Now I want to tell you a story. I never thought I’d be in politics. But after the 2016 election, like a lot of us, I was fed up. Politics should be about service, not self-interest. And not building up your own power by tearing others down. So I googled “how to run for office.” Seriously. I took on a state Senate race in Michigan no one thought we could win. I took on an incumbent state Senator who refused to do anything about the epidemic of gun violence, who sided with corporate polluters over protecting our clean water, and who didn’t represent us. Democrats and Republicans counted me out because I was young. Because I had never run for office before. Because it “wasn’t my turn.” But with the help of over 500(!) local volunteers, I swung a Republican-held state Senate seat 20 points and flipped a district that included Mitt Romney’s hometown. That victory sent me to the Michigan State Senate. _My approach in the Michigan State Senate is the same approach I’ll take in the U.S. Senate: no bullshit._ Voters know BS. I’ve called BS out in the State Senate and that’s what I’ll do as U.S. Senator. Right now, we’re at a crossroads. Donald Trump and Elon Musk are trying to overwhelm us. That’s their plan; they want us to feel powerless. But we are not powerless. The reality is there’s a lot in common between this moment today and that moment in 2016 when I googled how to run for office. But what that means is that we know exactly how to rise to this moment. This is not a moment for weakness. This is the time to put our heads down and get to work. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. This moment, and what happens next, is on all of us. I will never try to convince you that I have all the answers. Just voting for the right person isn’t going to fix everything. But together, I know we can show Michigan — and the rest of the country — how powerful we really are. Let’s create the future we want to see, together. [So please join me in building that future: make a contribution of whatever you can, split between our campaign and Blue Amp Action to become a founding donor of my campaign for U.S. Senate.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta82f6d6e-3db1-417d-8136-8e98d5dd281a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26ca1490-2d84-45a7-988a-52f4160e74aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | Thank you, Mallory
---
|
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20250403_mcmorrowlaunch_b4_f1_s1_c1_92op_n-t1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d3eaa49-4cc5-448b-a082-e00f1e06d7ad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=b10f49e1-a2a2-4df1-9913-a7c3e7f79788&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=b10f49e1-a2a2-4df1-9913-a7c3e7f79788&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Wes Moore
subject: It’s history.
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105123694/537430626/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjA4YWU0Yy1jMDEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IG0nxZA4j4cMtF0fxLKdfPSQNuDHZRCRL8mu0xwLClo=&emci=bc14a546-c010-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=5b08ae4c-c010-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=24635485)
I started the morning of January 18, 2023 on the docks in Annapolis. Members of my incoming administration, Black leaders, and Maryland dignitaries were there to hold a wreath laying to remember the history of what was once one of the country’s first and largest slave ports. We then marched from the docks to the State House where I was inaugurated as Maryland’s first Black governor. Believe it or not, I got a lot of pushback about this. People were not pleased about me shedding light on this part of our history. But it’s important. **Loving your country does not mean lying about its history, diminishing those who have helped build it, or challenging what makes our story so unique in world history in the first place.** That’s why I can’t agree with the Trump Administration’s definition of “making America great again.” Because it is centered on erasing what makes us who we are in the first place. Just take the administration’s latest orders whitewashing the history told at the Smithsonian museums, specifically the National Museum of African American History and Culture. **We need to focus not on eliminating our history, but on lifting it up and celebrating it. We need to come to a shared understanding that the American mosaic is big, broad, and beautiful.** Remembering where we came from isn’t indoctrination. _**It’s history.**_ It’s what we should be celebrating, flaws and all, because knowing our history gives us our strength. Elevate, Wes
---

subject: Thank you isn't enough, but that's where I'll start.

body:
If we want to stay ahead, we need to build on this momentum.
I’m so proud of y’all, Peter!

Thanks to this team, we've hit our crucial March monthly fundraising goal.

Your support fuels our work and helps us fight for a government that serves its people — not just the wealthy and powerful.

I started In This Together PAC to do the hard work to elect common-sense, honest leaders who will put people first. And with you by my side through thick and thin, together, _we've accomplished a lot, and are going to accomplish so much more._

But unfortunately, this work doesn’t stop for anyone, and it won't slow down just because we met one goal. We still have more to do, and the stakes are too high for us to slow down now. name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Tariff Update: The Trump Tax is Here
body:
Tariffs are becoming an economic disaster for MAGA, and it is going to start hurting American families.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x08wd-w2j90c-kyd76rh7/)
---
# **The Trump Tax**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x08wd-w2j90d-kyd76rh8/)
---
| | | | Dear friend, Donald Trump’s reckless tariffs are nothing short of an economic disaster for working Americans. With a **10% baseline tax on ALL imports,** and even steeper tariffs on key trade partners like China, Japan, and the European Union, **prices on everyday goods are about to skyrocket.** From groceries to cars to home essentials, American families are being forced to pay the price for Trump’s failed economic policies. **Who benefits from this? Not you.** Wall Street billionaires, corporate elites, and Trump’s inner circle will find ways to profit, while the rest of us struggle to afford basic necessities. Economists warn that these tariffs will **fuel inflation, push the U.S. closer to recession, and add thousands of dollars in extra costs per household.** Meanwhile, major automakers like Stellantis are already laying off American workers and closing plants in Canada and Mexico, proof that Trump’s “America First” agenda is nothing but an empty slogan. But it doesn’t stop there. **Trump’s tariffs are shattering global alliances, alienating our closest allies, and making America weaker on the world stage.** Germany has already projected a **€750 billion economic loss** from these tariffs, and key allies like Canada and Mexico are looking for new trade partners, because Trump has proven the U.S. can’t be trusted. Even Japan and South Korea, two of America’s strongest allies, are being hit with massive tariffs while they stand against rising threats from China and North Korea. This is a betrayal of our allies, an insult to our workers, and a direct attack on middle-class Americans. Let’s be clear: **Trump is not fighting for you.** His policies are designed to benefit the ultra-wealthy while crushing small businesses, driving up consumer costs, and putting American jobs at risk. He doesn’t care about working families, and he never has. [**_We must mobilize now to stop this economic disaster. Stand with us to defend American workers, protect our economy, and hold Trump accountable. Chip in now to help us stop Trump’s reckless economic policies before they do irreversible damage. America’s future depends on it._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x08wd-w2j90e-kyd76rh9/) In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team
---
| [Chip in $10](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x08wd-w2j90f-kyd76rh0/)
---
| [$26 for 2026](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x08wd-w2j90g-kyd76rh1/)
---
| [Chip in $100](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x08wd-w2j90h-kyd76rh2/)
---
| [RUSH $250](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x08wd-w2j90i-kyd76rh3/)
---
Thank you for your support in this pivotal time.
---
| | | | |
---
**No Dem Left Behind PAC** P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003
---

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Adelita Grijalva is running in AZ's 7th Congressional District, and she needs your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hey there, Friend.
There's going to be a special election to fill the open seat in Arizona's 7th Congressional District this year. Gabby and I are throwing our support behind Adelita Grijalva, and as she kicks off her campaign, I'd really appreciate it if you could send a donation her way.
Adelita is as Southern Arizona as it gets. She grew up here, she went to public school and the U of A here, and she’s spent her career helping Tucson kids and working families get ahead. With Donald Trump and Elon Musk going after services like Social Security that folks depend on and undermining the rule of law, we need bold leaders who understand what matters to our community and are willing to fight for it.
Gabby and I know that Adelita is the right person for the job, and we’re excited to support her campaign for Congress.
[**If you're with us, and you want to help Adelita win this campaign and represent this district in the House, make a donation to her campaign. Anything helps, and early support is critical in a race like this.](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-grijalva.-Hpb09&refcode=em250403-1-90&t=1&akid=6034%2E6688874%2EppjbkO)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $10](https://act.markkelly.com/go/2678?c0=mek-em-grijalva.wXaLBE&refcode=em250403-1-90&t=20&akid=6034%2E6688874%2EppjbkO)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-grijalva.zRkiFA&refcode=em250403-1-90&t=21&akid=6034%2E6688874%2EppjbkO)**

clean_body: Hey there, Friend. There's going to be a special election to fill the open seat in Arizona's 7th Congressional District this year. Gabby and I are throwing our support behind Adelita Grijalva, and as she kicks off her campaign, I'd really appreciate it if you could send a donation her way. Adelita is as Southern Arizona as it gets. She grew up here, she went to public school and the U of A here, and she’s spent her career helping Tucson kids and working families get ahead. With Donald Trump and Elon Musk going after services like Social Security that folks depend on and undermining the rule of law, we need bold leaders who understand what matters to our community and are willing to fight for it. Gabby and I know that Adelita is the right person for the job, and we’re excited to support her campaign for Congress. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | | | ** Thanks for your help, I really appreciate it. Mark Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

subject: I spoke for over 25 hours straight on the Senate floor
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.| | |
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105126006/537437994/1895221529?refcode=250403em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGFkYTM2Zi1jNjEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H04LtZsygsVCsKIggqjEVCgrDRcOrcRW7hBg18SIcIE=)

Peter, it's Cory Booker.
---
This week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda, and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. [**If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and****Tobias Read****today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105126010/537437996/1895221529?refcode=250403em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGFkYTM2Zi1jNjEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H04LtZsygsVCsKIggqjEVCgrDRcOrcRW7hBg18SIcIE=)

---
Peter - Thank you for opening this email. It may be hard to believe, but under 30% of conservatives who get messages from me even bother to open them!

Numbers like that make it tough for conservatives like me because we rely on texts, emails, letters, and phone calls to keep in touch with supporters. So, I just want to start by saying thanks so much for reading this!

You may not know me, but my name is Winsome Earle-Sears.
---
[](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/Va-GNwHITmDr9LCRHy4TL2UFaRykIxHWx6uwhlg8VPQz5zBtfcnn9NsJbXZINS4Gm7PjwwSb_rQxCWpUQb57D0GS1Myijxa-ZVrkhCkQaRNrx8-v2tYvYUZZYjJGjJ9W_GUGknbRkLThEpGmQxWAnOaHslXUcoI17kclAiy1UiY-U4ZvZE7pUVlb8ZxyrvXK4H6xDLOhRPa8XUvkKxVpHgg8ugvSuKkkLfOdQbNz1H2AlI86XkjnHmnjAyHBAfY3lTo7pglGNZy6vxj58VXC9X44pcS4P4MugR6QqWM7o65K0FKc1deVEZFnnE3n3qQwtR2nV8jlwjBddLVFNNH47f_1UArEtdb6J8MS5PIbYHOi5r-76kKx-74iiBW1cd1BU6BY1GZFE1g130_k2GEAHU9yZpDZM_01Tdd02wwD_TNsnKvMKPhRtlgRKbtcafcYwuuyG-0sVqUmaVxq1j8043WZpV4PnewyfWd-hM-PjwHNgdkumMPl_2oIJ1o9JWhewYJRzx7xMtAKigc_6TeAlNIMPEGQvK7LysEQkLOMy_VDciIFiVTgIozPWleyG6mnJFVj/DHc3khb5n_b5kl1n7OklGkcvtG3xpZ-J/7)
---
_U.S. Marine Corporal Winsome Earle-Sears_
---
I served our nation in the US Marine Corps as an electrician & a diesel mechanic. I kept my brothers & sisters on the move and equipped to DEFEND our nation from terrorists & communists. It was during my service that I learned what real leadership and sacrifice are. _**I am forever grateful that I had the privilege to serve and defend our nation, Peter.**_

There's a saying: _Once a Marine, always a Marine._ Every Marine shares the same spirit of duty and service that inspired me to join--to defend our neighbors and our nation. That's why, today, I'm still serving my country.

But now, I'm fighting for my friends' and neighbors' freedoms as a civilian. In 2021, I decided to run for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia because I saw that our nation needed a strong Christian, someone who has served this great country, to step up and LEAD!

**And after a historic and hard-fought battle, my team and I won by LESS THAN 1.6% of the vote!!** Now, Democrats want me _GONE_. It doesn't matter that I'm a patriotic Marine, a strong Christian, and a mom & grandma; _the Left can 't stand me because I am a proud and unapologetic conservative!_

Now I'm running for Governor, and polls show this race could be _EVEN CLOSER_! I know my team, and I have a tough battle ahead of us. We're putting everything we've got into defending our values and showing the Left that they can't buy this election; losing simply is not an option, Peter.

clean_body: | | | | | | | Peter - Thank you for opening this email. It may be hard to believe, but under 30% of conservatives who get messages from me even bother to open them! Numbers like that make it tough for conservatives like me because we rely on texts, emails, letters, and phone calls to keep in touch with supporters. So, I just want to start by saying thanks so much for reading this! You may not know me, but my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. U.S. Marine Corporal Winsome Earle-Sears I served our nation in the US Marine Corps as an electrician & a diesel mechanic. I kept my brothers & sisters on the move and equipped to DEFEND our nation from terrorists & communists. It was during my service that I learned what real leadership and sacrifice are. I am forever grateful that I had the privilege to serve and defend our nation, Peter. There's a saying: Once a Marine, always a Marine. Every Marine shares the same spirit of duty and service that inspired me to join--to defend our neighbors and our nation. That's why, today, I'm still serving my country. But now, I'm fighting for my friends' and neighbors' freedoms as a civilian. In 2021, I decided to run for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia because I saw that our nation needed a strong Christian, someone who has served this great country, to step up and LEAD! And after a historic and hard-fought battle, my team and I won by LESS THAN 1.6% of the vote!! Now, Democrats want me GONE. It doesn't matter that I'm a patriotic Marine, a strong Christian, and a mom & grandma; the Left can 't stand me because I am a proud and unapologetic conservative! Now I'm running for Governor, and polls show this race could be EVEN CLOSER! I know my team, and I have a tough battle ahead of us. We're putting everything we've got into defending our values and showing the Left that they can't buy this election; losing simply is not an option, Peter. I'm running a campaign that is FOR the people and BY the people. Liberal billionaires & Hollywood elites aren't bankrolling me; I'm counting on grassroots patriots like you to help me win! And the fact is , if we don't have the support of every conservative reading this email, I have no idea how my team and I are going to keep up with the millions and MILLIONS of dollars the Democrats have stacked against us, Peter! So please do not sit on the sidelines - make a donation to support me today, Peter! Thanks so much for your support, Winsome Earle-Sears US Marine Corporal | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. |

name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: We just went toe to toe with Mike Johnson. And we won.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Nine Republicans joined every Democrat in Congress to send a clear message to Mike Johnson and House GOP leadership
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250403-1?refcode=em20250403-1873&amount=5&refcode2=1873_21716_QxjT2a&akid=1873%2E21716%2EQxjT2a)
Hey, Sarah McBride said I could reach out with some news:
This week, Speaker Mike Johnson held a vote on the House floor to kill my resolution to allow new parents in Congress to vote remotely while raising their newborn children. **But it failed. Mike Johnson lost, and common sense won.**
Nine Republicans joined every Democrat in Congress to send a clear message to Mike Johnson and House GOP leadership: **The status quo is not acceptable.**
It’s not acceptable that people from middle-class families, and especially young women, have been deterred from running for Congress. It’s not acceptable that Congress has been dominated by the interests of older, wealthy men. And it’s not acceptable that Mike Johnson tried a desperate, last-second procedural gimmick to silence our voices.
Over the last three months, I went toe-to-toe with the Speaker of the House and all the power he wields. And together, we showed Mike Johnson that nobody fights harder than a mom.
**But this fight isn’t done. Next up is officially passing this resolution and making sure Congress actually reflects the people we serve. Mike Johnson will fight until the bitter end to prevent us from modernizing Congress, so I need your support more than ever before.**
[**If you believe in my work to make Washington more welcoming to young people and regular families, will you pitch in a split donation between me and Sarah McBride? Grassroots support is essential in this fight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250403-1?refcode=em20250403-1873&amount=5&refcode2=1873_21716_QxjT2a&akid=1873%2E21716%2EQxjT2a)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250403-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250403-1873&refcode2=1873_21716_QxjT2a&akid=1873%2E21716%2EQxjT2a)**
Thank you,
Brittany Pettersen
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250403-1&t=1&refcode2=1873_21716_QxjT2a&akid=1873%2E21716%2EQxjT2a)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1873%2E21716%2EQxjT2a)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1873%2E21716%2EQxjT2a)

name: Cory Booker
subject: I’m tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.

| Peter, it’s Cory.

This week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.

I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.

What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.

I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.

It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.

It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.

We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend.

[_**If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Rep. Laura Gillen today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105127030/537440941/178836851?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-04-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWMyNDFiMC1jODEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n4ZMXLDVdk0Ry4V7CxyukyB-X8WOvrgXcu5-OGUNZdE=)

name: Official Department of Government Efficiency Poll
subject: The Left just secured a temporary restraining order against DOGE.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Fellow American,

Democrat Attorneys General just won a temporary **[RESTRAINING ORDER](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4d31f76bf3e047fdab67e6461a4ddba6&_e=DENgZ1Up-2JyYpz6NCSaQBl2J-QEsRa7bA7z_oVJG6h5oczlKefvW3USfhIrpDupuOpeIXLQRtVUNfr2ld3Kf8eJpatOj08pCVL4sXVlbDsVLCcCurMvLueJoQ02bU6gdRDcQOl8csXn3LSor_7PjwiC_mbjkc-2H_F8B7NckN5VQHwVXb7oi82rflIegEQCDNwKlnNXaV4OyzRMUPC_Eq9HwlDY1ZzTLj0NK4_iCbMMAqbmdEZ3MR-n7g70zG-G46atdnTnz3Th81gcN1v8JWEmoea19-oSlQ6APkuki3jLx_ZzZJpBkh8ksLiTL-9UBU8enQf2dQ5gsDqipbW3sPK1BkEOD8LkbSNqiNz8yKacJBqMM7QTmE1Qy0zbJco0u1HCxWwaAyj2xDmbD2VXi86H17uX7Ffl-arPe-2rM98wyluF9BO1o_KNspArHoFPwaDJEcHtGzvfNhg-e8PjxCT71MsUndTAcM2TrqG71yw%3D)** from a Biden judge against the Department of Government Efficiency!

The Left is going to truly extreme lengths to shutter DOGE and stop them from uncovering waste, fraud, and corruption within the federal government.

_Clearly, they 're terrified of DOGE exposing just how shamelessly the Democrats and the Deep State have been robbing the American people blind for years!_

Now more than ever, we need to know if Americans like _YOU_ still support Elon Musk and DOGE...

**[But according to our data, you still haven't submitted your response to the Senate GOP's Official DOGE Poll!](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4d31f76bf3e047fdab67e6461a4ddba6&_e=DENgZ1Up-2JyYpz6NCSaQBl2J-QEsRa7bA7z_oVJG6h5oczlKefvW3USfhIrpDupuOpeIXLQRtVUNfr2ld3Kf8eJpatOj08pCVL4sXVlbDsVLCcCurMvLueJoQ02bU6gdRDcQOl8csXn3LSor_7PjwiC_mbjkc-2H_F8B7NckN5VQHwVXb7oi82rflIegEQCDNwKlnNXaV4OyzRMUPC_Eq9HwlDY1ZzTLj0NK4_iCbMMAqbmdEZ3MR-n7g70zG-G46atdnTnz3Th81gcN1v8JWEmoea19-oSlQ6APkuki3jLx_ZzZJpBkh8ksLiTL-9UNvJg5iZ-Rwo6nYsU22UcKyouSBWbjgdLiDATqWT083cXCCxOeHQOMvMbDbiFD6lXiNOZuBEOhxvBCHT8EoHK_MWlhfXoTNmPWbuv9mxCdqwZF6PwySHxS1vfHRAW7M3Vx2JyGjdsUfV6dYx3CVYazSh4AMSAzrH7YHovAvj25mI%3D)**

name: Cory Booker
subject: I spoke for over 25 hours straight on the Senate floor
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105127635/537443104/1402496680?refcode=em-4.3.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzViOWY3OC1jYTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygKSnkKNjjPzi63MT5-ui63Pw-HS7xe6zFB0Y4Ndw34=) Hi, it’s Cory. This week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. Participate in the Changemaker AI Contest!

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mark_cuban_x_young_forwardists&n=1)
---
| Peter \-- **🎉********YOU HEARD US, IT'S REAL!****🎉** The**Young Forwardists** are proud to announce that we are collaborating with**Mark Cuban** to**co-host** the [Changemaker AI Contest!](https://home.forwardparty.com/changemaker_ai_contest?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mark_cuban_x_young_forwardists&n=2) You might be thinking, "Is it still April Fools Day? Is this real? What do I do? How's Mark involved?!" Well, for most of April, **YOU** will be able to compete and **make the best AI-generated meme**. After the contest ends, **Mark** **Cuban** will join the **Young** **Forwardists** to **JUDGE THE BEST SUBMISSIONS!** Three talented winners will win a **paid summer internship & the BEST submission will receive a private call with Mark Cuban! 💸💸** ******"What does this contest look like?"** From April 3rd to April 21st, join the fun! Participating is super easy. Just launch your favorite AI image generator and cook up a funny meme to fit one of our three categories:
* Political Humor
* Election Season Antics
* Visionary Creativity

**Post** **your submission** on your **favorite** **social** **media** **platform** with the hashtag **#FWDChangemaker** and the **hashtag of your AI Meme Category** (ex. #FWDChangemaker #PoliticalHumor). Stay tuned to our social media channels for announcements on upcoming Flash Challenges and more chances to win! **"What happens after April 21st?"** We**** will be on**Twitch** and**Zoom** later this month to announce the winners! The Young Forwardists will collect your submissions and feature the best **top-tier memes**! [RSVP](https://home.forwardparty.com/changemaker_ai_contest?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mark_cuban_x_young_forwardists&n=3) & come show your support. Let's see how your submission does! 🔥🔥 See the full list of contest requirements and internship details here: | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/changemaker_ai_contest?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mark_cuban_x_young_forwardists&n=4 "🤞🗳️ Submission Page 🗳️🤞") [🤞🗳️ Submission Page 🗳️🤞](https://home.forwardparty.com/changemaker_ai_contest?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mark_cuban_x_young_forwardists&n=4)
---
We can't wait to see you what you create! For contest updates make sure to follow us on social media!
* [Instagram](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fUZo6C2MJ4RIIkFGFLNgB538tr9lQLN8sf_8UFvjM4hEAV2pckBRlF7ixidMjgWI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mark_cuban_x_young_forwardists&n=5)
* [TikTok](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fUZo6C2MJ4RIIkFGFLNgB538tr9lQLN8sf_8UFvjM4hEAV2pckBRlF7ixidMjgWI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mark_cuban_x_young_forwardists&n=6)
* [X](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fUZo6C2MJ4RIIkFGFLNgB538tr9lQLN8sf_8UFvjM4hEAV2pckBRlF7ixidMjgWI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mark_cuban_x_young_forwardists&n=7)
* [Bluesky](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fUZo6C2MJ4RIIkFGFLNgB538tr9lQLN8sf_8UFvjM4hEAV2pckBRlF7ixidMjgWI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mark_cuban_x_young_forwardists&n=8)
* [YouTube](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fUZo6C2MJ4RIIkFGFLNgB538tr9lQLN8sf_8UFvjM4hEAV2pckBRlF7ixidMjgWI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mark_cuban_x_young_forwardists&n=9)

Make sure you [RSVP](https://home.forwardparty.com/changemaker_ai_contest?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mark_cuban_x_young_forwardists&n=10) for the announcement event and share the contest!
Best of luck to all competitors!
Young Forwardists

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I'm officially the Democratic nominee!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
I’m honored to share that I’m officially the Democratic nominee in the November 2025 election for the Governor’s office in Virginia!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105129956/537448575/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGEzNjJjY2QtY2UxMC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M4DfzhSz-xVZG1S6euoBzrgi8zvpgzV9AtKZO1dwSyM=)

| Peter, it’s Abigail Spanberger.

I’m honored to share that I’m officially the Democratic nominee in the November 2025 election for the Governor’s office in Virginia! I’m grateful for the grassroots support from volunteers and contributors like you who have made this possible. Every dollar we raised, every phone call we made, and every conversation we had was only possible because of you.

The Virginia Governor’s race is one of the most competitive races in the country right now, and it’s being called a _**total toss-up by experts.**_ All eyes are on us to see if we have what it takes to win this race — and set the stage for 2026 and beyond.

That’s why we need to continue building on the strong foundation that we’ve built so far: your contribution will help us continue mobilizing volunteers, knocking on doors, and holding events. **We need to reach voters across the Commonwealth to show them that I’m running to stand up for the people of Virginia, not stand by as chaos and division are spread.**

[_**Will you contribute to my campaign today to help us continue this momentum and flip the Governor’s office blue?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105129957/537448576/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGEzNjJjY2QtY2UxMC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M4DfzhSz-xVZG1S6euoBzrgi8zvpgzV9AtKZO1dwSyM=)

clean_body: I’m honored to share that I’m officially the Democratic nominee in the November 2025 election for the Governor’s office in Virginia! | = | Peter, it’s Abigail Spanberger. I’m honored to share that I’m officially the Democratic nominee in the November 2025 election for the Governor’s office in Virginia! I’m grateful for the grassroots support from volunteers and contributors like you who have made this possible. Every dollar we raised, every phone call we made, and every conversation we had was only possible because of you. The Virginia Governor’s race is one of the most competitive races in the country right now, and it’s being called a total toss-up by experts. All eyes are on us to see if we have what it takes to win this race — and set the stage for 2026 and beyond. That’s why we need to continue building on the strong foundation that we’ve built so far: your contribution will help us continue mobilizing volunteers, knocking on doors, and holding events. We need to reach voters across the Commonwealth to show them that I’m running to stand up for the people of Virginia, not stand by as chaos and division are spread. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: Chris Pappas
subject: I’m running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
I’ll always put New Hampshire first.
| [ ](https://takano4ca.us/l/zb2oDdTz0t4d?t=Bi5kswijfg5g)
---
Peter, I’m Congressman Chris Pappas, and **Mark Takano** said I could reach out with some big news:

**I’m officially running to be New Hampshire’s next U.S. Senator.** I’m going to share more about why I’m in this race, but if you’re already on board, [**split a contribution to my campaign and Mark Takano today.**](https://takano4ca.us/l/FaOZpkEZUSPh)

I’m running for Senate because at this pivotal moment, our economy, our democracy, and our way of life are on the line. New Hampshire deserves a Senator who is grounded in the people, places, and values of this state – and one who is ready to lead on day one.

Our country is at a crossroads, and the decisions we make now will have generational impacts. You can count on me to continue taking on big fights and to confront the Trump Administration, self-dealing billionaires, and extreme politicians who are threatening our future and our ability to get things done for New Hampshire.

[**Peter, can I count on you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign with a $7 contribution, split between my campaign and Mark Takano right now? We can’t win this race without major grassroots support.**](https://takano4ca.us/l/OCnPzkB3npz3)

**These fights are deeply personal to me.** My family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in Manchester 108 years ago, a small business that remains at the heart of the community today. Running that small business showed me the power of hard work and serving others, but the opportunity that my ancestors and so many others like them sought has never been further away – and the Trump Administration is too busy cutting deals for their billionaire buddies to give a damn.

I’m also openly gay and happily married to my husband, Vann. With the current wave of hateful policies leveled at the LGBTQ+ community, I know how important representation is at this moment. **If elected, I’d be the first openly gay male U.S. Senator in history** – a badge of honor I’d wear proudly as I advocate for full equality.

I am the proud product of public education, and I come from a family of business owners _(my grandfather invented the chicken tender at the restaurant – seriously!)_. I understand firsthand the need to support neighborhood schools and small businesses in our community. **These are the lifeblood of our economy and the pillars of opportunity for everyone.**

My life experiences are what led me to successfully run for four terms in Congress and win in one of the “swingiest” districts in the nation. Before I won my election in 2018, no one had managed to hold the seat for more than one term for more than a decade. I’m no stranger to tough electoral fights. **Now I’m ready to take on the fight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue.**

We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines of the big fights ahead – not with so much at stake, from the rising costs debilitating working families to the threats to the future of our democracy. We’ve taken on big fights together in Congress. Now it’s time to win this critical Senate seat so we can keep standing up to the Trump Administration and the self-dealing billionaires threatening our future. Can I count on you to join the fight?

[**Peter, if you’re with me, let’s make a powerful statement together and prove that we’re ready to win this race. Become a Founding Donor with a $7 donation to my campaign and Mark Takano now.**](https://takano4ca.us/l/cDL4G4Pz5Xb4)

Thank you again to Mark Takano for letting me reach out today.

With gratitude,

Chris [](https://takano4ca.us/l/whga0b4UzW8U)
---
| | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517
www.marktakano.com

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://takano4ca.us/l/oBy6qE03tVOU?t=oP8PZjK3okCA). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact, make a[monthly contribution by clicking here](https://takano4ca.us/l/5qjT9uxgKD2s?t=eAB4N652u08l).**

[Click here](https://takano4ca.us/fewer-emails?t=RAl4HIqutdS1) to receive fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://takano4ca.us/l/ncQ0PqGeGjuF). | | [Peter: Donate One a Month to Help Mark »](https://takano4ca.us/l/iOxhHSrX5xF8?t=bkDZRW4rdBJS)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://takano4ca.us/l/eIod3xI2hGMa?t=t5YpG0UW0Ahw)

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: We’re officially in overtime.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND
body:
We're in the locker room right now, and just like in football, we're making adjustments we need to come out strong in overtime.
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=4d9731d85b214316856c298de6bc54fd&_e=Q9eydxQGpeXzewQzzbNI7g9qe0BPq9YKP8ZbW4oy2-9d1ZQ2eMztRj2gmQtw4Y2T9_UhkKLsabsFbVi_qy4USS62hua9f-bmmLAlKnQhuwiXKzFHclgaZRQ3qoBgrtb3T443WeRG33BJlTrk5LwUg7xsGZJM1yhVUeOUQ5jPwTrUrIHtK8HDBq0gCXjPgVXHTx5SKpSGz_cDiXMC4yJ-UznZvEZ-pj-vBXCKbycr23mVl3ycn7x4fIl4pcf2ynnFNV0sCmj-Tc5XWOzNoInvEf1KmwwIDmXfQuJqs1oDy3kqEdl6bczzenIKU1YMWsmwW70ELK9UHK0SOlNZ9AAjCA%3D%3D)
---
Team, I'm coming to you with a bit of tough news--w _e didn 't quite hit our fundraising goal by the end of regulation. We came up a few yards short._

**We 're officially in overtime.**

But let me tell you something: This game isn't over. We're in the locker room right now, and just like in football, we're making adjustments we need to come out strong in overtime. We've got plenty of fight left, and I'm not backing down. Neither should you.

**The Radical Left is out there running plays to try and stop us, and we know they 're not going to quit. But neither are we. We've fought hard, and now it's time to dig in, give everything we've got, and get back on track.**

I know many of you have already made your plays, and I can't thank you enough, but if you can, [**I need you to step up once more and help us power through this crucial moment. Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=4d9731d85b214316856c298de6bc54fd&_e=Q9eydxQGpeXzewQzzbNI7g9qe0BPq9YKP8ZbW4oy2-9d1ZQ2eMztRj2gmQtw4Y2T9_UhkKLsabsFbVi_qy4USS62hua9f-bmmLAlKnQhuwiXKzFHclgaZRQ3qoBgrtb3T443WeRG33BJlTrk5LwUg7xsGZJM1yhVUeOUQ5jPwTrUrIHtK8HDBq0gCXjPgVXHjtyU6rYam5yuFD5Va3AN1lblngKh0H63_DXknZG5cMa4hFdbBwqbCL41Eaoo08KysKZcnGzpPSvKiwfi_rY2RVJIPj2caHdoSi1NTnV3cPlF2EkvLdQpvhhs0UHv8ous8dgeT0zd5mhkw_pecgg9sg%3D%3D)

name: Cory Booker
subject: I’m tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent.
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105131066/537452263/-1723582506?&refcode=E12844-20250403-BookerResend-Image-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGUwZTAwN2EtZDExMC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PzOo2d3zsqZrtHOSyzlOaoA6uuM4oa_HUhHmiBGGFLw=) Peter, it’s Cory. This week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. clean_body: This is a moment where we must all speak up. | | = Peter, it’s Cory. This week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- With love and gratitude, Cory *

My situation is in your hands, Fellow American. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I was working hard in our capital. **Seriously** _**, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!**_
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Fellow American. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage._If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short. _ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**

I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 |

Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

Jason is focused on delivering results for working families — but he wants to hear directly from you about what issues impact you most.

As Jason keeps up the fight in Congress to protect our democracy, lower costs for the American people, and hold the extreme Trump administration accountable, your input is critical. That’s why we’ve launched our April Priorities Survey — so Jason can keep fighting for the issues that matter most to you.

Will you take a few minutes to share your thoughts with Jason? [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/apr-priorities-survey]

TAKE THE SURVEY [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/apr-priorities-survey]

Jason has never been one to sit on the sidelines, and he knows that real leadership requires listening. Your voice and thoughts will help shape his work in Washington — so please, let him know what’s on your mind today. Thanks for taking the time to respond.

— Team Crow

Greenwood Village, CO 80112

name: Amanda Chase
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase 2025
body:
Thank you
| | |
---
| |
---

---
| |
---

---
|

---
| WE DID IT!
---
|
# CONGRATULATIONS
---
|
# WE SUBMITTED OUR PETITIONS AND PAPERWORK TODAY
# TO RUN FOR GOVERNOR
---
|
Dear Hello After months of receiving your calls to run for Virginia Governor, five weeks ago, I accepted your request to finish the 15 month race for Governor that I began in 2020. Many of you said you wanted to have a say in who your next governor would be, and you wanted to have a choice. I'm honored that you asked me, yet again. Thank you.
For the past 5 weeks, we've been working in the trenches right along beside you. And what a joy. We've had so much fun traveling the state and getting to know so many of you. Your commitment and work ethic are inspiring. Thanks to many of you for giving up your vacation to collect signatures so that we could accomplish our mission. It was a grind. Many of you sacrificed time, energy and talents.
To be honest, this morning we weren't sure if we would get across the finish line. It's been a scramble to say the least. We've tried hard to keep the faith but we knew with entering the race 5 weeks before the deadline, time was not on our side. I truly believed that if I was supposed to be on the ballot, God would make a way. Then, the Fed Ex envelopes starting arriving just as we were ready to head out the door. On top of that, several of you dropped off your petitions at the State Board of Elections ahead of us. I was still counting signatures in the back seat of my car on the almost two hour trip from Appomattox to Richmond.
At approximately 4:40pm today, with only 20 minutes to spare until the deadline, we officially submitted all of our petitions and a filing fee of $3,500 to the Virginia State Board of Elections, to run for Virginia Governor.
I want to thank all of our hard working, committed volunteers across the state for their tireless drive and determination to collect the necessary signatures to get my name on the ballot. I'm honored by your relentless support and commitment to ensure Republican Primary voters have a choice on Tuesday, June 19.

---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
|
# PLEASE GIVE GENEROUSLY
---
| If you would like to chip in to help pay for the filing fee, please consider chipping in [here](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YaP8rzjoeUqE_LjCHSM-_ni3_b107SDgD7o83rbI9x5tte6v6QSD5EY0wdjtk01vRgpR01eWl3dJcFGPIKC4RiRd7N_WXEWWzCnhI8QJUffpTI4lg5bsRLYhakGLATMSgTX2TRmiqbm1APEn8I76l8vOBMqH3rSR7sjCKjhctaA=&c=rtYSL0sYsTwyEFY3V99_H2F__h19-mS_lAgpMelSSO5vv-vs-nl_Aw==&ch=5Mh1nupniInr7PCgClVpYeAgkmu3OEdk3PKEAtLqIhpfbep-GBzPuw==).
Abigail Spanberger has raised over $15 million dollars for her campaign for governor, but the people are not with her. She's out of touch with most Virginians. And I'm not intimidated by her. Once people realize where she gets her money her campaign is going to implode.
Please give your best donation to help pay for gas to travel the state. Thankfully, many across the state already know me. So we don't have to spend as much as our opponents who have no statewide name ID.
Our campaign is run by volunteers not paid campaign staff and operatives. But we do have to pay event fees for gun shows, entrance to events and office supplies. Any contribution you can make is greatly appreciated.

clean_body: Thank you | | | | | | | | | WE DID IT! | CONGRATULATIONS | WE SUBMITTED OUR PETITIONS AND PAPERWORK TODAY TO RUN FOR GOVERNOR | Dear Hello After months of receiving your calls to run for Virginia Governor, five weeks ago, I accepted your request to finish the 15 month race for Governor that I began in 2020. Many of you said you wanted to have a say in who your next governor would be, and you wanted to have a choice. I'm honored that you asked me, yet again. Thank you. For the past 5 weeks, we've been working in the trenches right along beside you. And what a joy. We've had so much fun traveling the state and getting to know so many of you. Your commitment and work ethic are inspiring. Thanks to many of you for giving up your vacation to collect signatures so that we could accomplish our mission. It was a grind. Many of you sacrificed time, energy and talents. To be honest, this morning we weren't sure if we would get across the finish line. It's been a scramble to say the least. We've tried hard to keep the faith but we knew with entering the race 5 weeks before the deadline, time was not on our side. I truly believed that if I was supposed to be on the ballot, God would make a way. Then, the Fed Ex envelopes starting arriving just as we were ready to head out the door. On top of that, several of you dropped off your petitions at the State Board of Elections ahead of us. I was still counting signatures in the back seat of my car on the almost two hour trip from Appomattox to Richmond. At approximately 4:40pm today, with only 20 minutes to spare until the deadline, we officially submitted all of our petitions and a filing fee of $3,500 to the Virginia State Board of Elections, to run for Virginia Governor. I want to thank all of our hard working, committed volunteers across the state for their tireless drive and determination to collect the necessary signatures to get my name on the ballot. I'm honored by your relentless support and commitment to ensure Republican Primary voters have a choice on Tuesday, June 19. | | | | | | | | | PLEASE GIVE GENEROUSLY | If you would like to chip in to help pay for the filing fee, please consider chipping in ==. Abigail Spanberger has raised over $15 million dollars for her campaign for governor, but the people are not with her. She's out of touch with most Virginians. And I'm not intimidated by her. Once people realize where she gets her money her campaign is going to implode. Please give your best donation to help pay for gas to travel the state. Thankfully, many across the state already know me. So we don't have to spend as much as our opponents who have no statewide name ID. Our campaign is run by volunteers not paid campaign staff and operatives. But we do have to pay event fees for gun shows, entrance to events and office supplies. Any contribution you can make is greatly appreciated. | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase 2025 | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 250 | Appomattox, VA 24522 US | | | | | | |

# _Announcement!_
# We are going to Columbia University to confront the radical protesters who have taken over campus!
You remember **[our DOGE Patrol video](https://substack.com/redirect/5f686d96-3e48-4ff3-8c57-897ca793a345?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that took YouTube and **[TikTok by storm](https://substack.com/redirect/12cc7df5-cdff-4390-883f-9fa911aaad47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , now I (Matt Miller) am going to do it again: confront the left on their own turf at Columbia University in NYC!
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5f686d96-3e48-4ff3-8c57-897ca793a345?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**Thank you for your support,** the independent journalism we do would not be possible without PATRIOTS like you willing to join in on the fight!

# Auto worker TAKES OVER Trump's tariff speech, no one expected what happens next...
President Donald Trump turned the mic and podium over to Brian Pannebecker, a retired auto worker from Michigan, to explain to the press and the American people why reciprocal tariffs are America's best chance for economic prosperity.
**[What Trump does after the speech](https://substack.com/redirect/3544e3bb-61aa-41f0-bfa7-9b6cbcbe47ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is an incredible MAGA move:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/3544e3bb-61aa-41f0-bfa7-9b6cbcbe47ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3544e3bb-61aa-41f0-bfa7-9b6cbcbe47ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Brian, I'd like to have you come up here for a sec,... he understands this business a lot better than the economists, Brian say a few words please," Trump said.
Pannebecker came to the stage, and just went off... "I have watched plant after plant in Detroit close, there are now plants sitting idle and underutilized and Donald Trump's policies are going to bring product back into those underutilized plants, there's going to be new investment,... we support Donald Trump's polices on tariffs 100%!!"
Watch the must-see moment here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/3544e3bb-61aa-41f0-bfa7-9b6cbcbe47ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# MAGA senator WRECKS Kaitlan Collins on tariffs during live CNN sparring match
GOP Senator Bernie Moreno **[clashed with CNN's Kaitlan Collins](https://substack.com/redirect/c07581b6-9177-4919-99b2-ef5cbd94bea6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on tariffs during a live CNN showdown, Wednesday evening.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/c07581b6-9177-4919-99b2-ef5cbd94bea6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c07581b6-9177-4919-99b2-ef5cbd94bea6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The left-wing media is capitalizing this week on the dropping stock market and economic anxiety amid President Trump's tariff roll out.
Sen. Moreno **[went on CNN to push back against the network's anti-tariff drum-beating](https://substack.com/redirect/c07581b6-9177-4919-99b2-ef5cbd94bea6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and present the president's case for his actions.
"Ultimately what we are looking to do is very simple," Moreno started. "We need cars made here in America that are sold here in America. It's extremely important that that happens to rebuild our middle class, to rebuild our industrial sector, to rebuild cities like the ones I represent in Ohio."
The senator continued to explain that the American middle class is the vital customer base for these American-made products, "Henry Ford taught us that, pay your workers well and they can buy the products that they make."
Collins refered to former Vice President Mike Pence's X post, bashing Trump's tariff plan as "the largest peacetime tax hike in U.S. history."
"These Tariffs are nearly 10x the size of those imposed during the Trump-Pence Administration and will cost American families over $3,500 per year," his post claimed.
"President Trump and Vice President Vance were hired by the American people to lower costs," Collins said. "What happens if their policies raise them?"
**["Mike Pence never ran a business,"](https://substack.com/redirect/c07581b6-9177-4919-99b2-ef5cbd94bea6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Moreno fired back. "He has no idea what this stuff is about,... These career politicians are part of the problem, they actually don't know how businesses work. What the president is doing is reversing he policies of people like Mike Pence who sold this country out!"
Watch Moreno school Collins on Trump's tariffs:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/c07581b6-9177-4919-99b2-ef5cbd94bea6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

"President Trump and Vice President Vance were hired by the American people to lower costs," Collins said. "What happens if their policies raise them?" Moreno fired back. "He has no idea what this stuff is about,... These career politicians are part of the problem, they actually don't know how businesses work. What the president is doing is reversing he policies of people like Mike Pence who sold this country out!" Watch Moreno school Collins on Trump's tariffs: | | POLL Do you stand with Trump on tariffs? | ? ? ? PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication.
