Abigail has spent nearly her entire career in service of Virginia and of our country. First as a federal law enforcement officer, then as a CIA case officer, and most recently as a champion for Virginians in Congress. **She knows what it means to fight for this Commonwealth, and she’s never backed down from doing what’s right — _even when it’s the hardest thing to do._**
**That’s the kind of leadership we need right now.**
Electoral experts like Cook Political Report are already calling this race a toss-up. National Republicans are pouring millions into Virginia to keep control in Richmond — but we’re not going to let them. This campaign is about protecting our rights, uplifting our communities, and rejecting the chaos that is trying to take hold in Richmond.

She knows what it means to fight for this Commonwealth, and she’s never backed down from doing what’s right — even when it’s the hardest thing to do. That’s the kind of leadership we need right now. Electoral experts like Cook Political Report are already calling this race a toss-up. National Republicans are pouring millions into Virginia to keep control in Richmond — but we’re not going to let them. This campaign is about protecting our rights, uplifting our communities, and rejecting the chaos that is trying to take hold in Richmond. = ************=********** It’s time to get to work. Thank you, Sen. Lamont Bagby** Chairman Democratic Party of Virginia [content goes here] Forwarded this email? If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand. to sign up for only the most important updates, or you can . I was in attendance at the rose garden for President Trump's Liberation Day speech. The president unveiled 8 pages of new tariffs on about 90 countries in an effort to balance a trading disparity the U.S. has gotten accustomed to for decades. While this feels like a massive shake-up in the moment, the reality is President Trump is securing wealth and prosperity for generations to come. Cory Booker gave a 25 hour speech that basically did nothing. The media hyped him up for his 4 day fast and the support he got from his tennis shoes but the reality is the main headline was that he didn't go to the bathroom the entire time. A California judge released an incredible video on guns and actually pleads the case for protecting the 2nd amendment. Lesley Stahl asked the most embarrassing question in 60 Minutes history to a recently released hostage of Hamas. Amber Rufflin is bitter she got fired from the White House Correspondents Association dinner and Jasmine Crockett admits she was a DEI hire. Make sure to stay till the end for this week's winners and losers!
Featuring:
**Tom LoBianco**
Politics Reporter

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: A Historic Day in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105132238/537456553/623074613?refcode=jtk1401-fr-nd1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI2ZDI5MGItZDcxMC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SEO3CRSzEhC4HTIOw3_nto5SdqOvfx6r4cede3ihDrY=&emci=7e407f36-9d10-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=9b6d290b-d710-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9329426)
Friend,

Two days ago, Sen. Cory Booker made a record-breaking 25-hour speech – where he held the Senate floor to not only block Trump’s agenda in Congress but also expose Trump and his allies for the sheer destruction they are inflicting on the American people. Sen. Booker’s action was emblematic of what’s become an all-too-common phrase in public life:_standing up and speaking truth to power._
I had the honor of bearing witness to Sen. Booker’s physical and moral stamina and allowing the Senator from New Jersey a small respite by asking him a question I hear often from my constituents in Connecticut: _What can we do? _
The answer was simple: _Do something._
That’s precisely what Sen. Booker’s 25-hour speech was all about. Doing something, fighting back, sounding the alarm. Because complacency is not an option. Not when the American people are contending with so many real-life problems. Together, each of us has a responsibility to _do something_ , no matter how big or small. No matter if it’s in the halls of Congress or in your community or at the ballot box. If everyone of us truly _does something_ , it will make the difference.
Because while Sen. Booker’s speech is the kindling of a flame, our work does not end there. In addition to supporting Sen. Booker’s speech, on the same day I was proud to join Sen. Ruben Gallego in a commitment to block the Trump administration’s VA nominees. We will do so by objecting to unanimous consent to the nominations to the Department of Veterans Affairs until we have answers and accountability from the Trump administration about their drastic and harmful cuts to VA funding and firing of thousands of VA employees.
As Sen. Booker told me, we must get creative, use every tool possible and hold the Trump administration accountable. I remain committed to standing up for each and every American, from our veterans to those reliant on Medicaid or Social Security and everyone who believes in a fair and just society.
Together, we must leave the United States of America better than we found it. I’m proud to have you with me in this fight.
Thank you,

Dick

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Take your hands off SNAP!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
I am proud to introduce this bill to protect SNAP.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105132440/537456830/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250403SNAP_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzZkMjkwYi1kNzEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ag9_wqJauyXA8a0UYUJ-Xp4dV9nPPf4WoWg-9CxyueI=) Peter,

I vowed to fight back against the Trump agenda, and here is one example of what I have been up to:

**I am proud to have introduced the Hunger Free Future Act, a bill to protect SNAP from Republican plans to cut vital food assistance.**

As a reminder, the House Republican budget resolution, passed in February, calls for $230 billion in cuts to SNAP. My bill would block Republican efforts to fund tax cuts by making backdoor cuts to SNAP benefits through so-called reforms to the Thrifty Food Plan.

**Here’s my message to Donald Trump and Elon Musk: Take your hands off SNAP!**

[**With this bill, we are making it clear that we won't stand by as Republicans gut food assistance to help the ultra-wealthy buy another yacht. It isn’t just wrong—it’s heartless, gutless, and shameless. Help support our work to put guardrails on the Trump administration by pitching in $5 or more today→**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105132442/537456832/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250403SNAP_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzZkMjkwYi1kNzEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ag9_wqJauyXA8a0UYUJ-Xp4dV9nPPf4WoWg-9CxyueI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105132444/537456834/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250403SNAP_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_EB1&express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode2=EL1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzZkMjkwYi1kNzEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ag9_wqJauyXA8a0UYUJ-Xp4dV9nPPf4WoWg-9CxyueI=)**

clean_body: I am proud to introduce this bill to protect SNAP. = Peter, I vowed to fight back against the Trump agenda, and here is one example of what I have been up to: I am proud to have introduced the Hunger Free Future Act, a bill to protect SNAP from Republican plans to cut vital food assistance. As a reminder, the House Republican budget resolution, passed in February, calls for $230 billion in cuts to SNAP. My bill would block Republican efforts to fund tax cuts by making backdoor cuts to SNAP benefits through so-called reforms to the Thrifty Food Plan. Here’s my message to Donald Trump and Elon Musk: Take your hands off SNAP! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Together, we will fight this every step of the way. name: PragerU
subject: “Fact-checker” NewsGuard comes after PragerU again
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
-------------------------

[PragerU]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1dca868d785b48e8833ff580dab9f97a-a392b42562f246f69e15ef3c54ba8578/63]

[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1dca868d785b48e8833ff580dab9f97a-a392b42562f246f69e15ef3c54ba8578/63]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1dca868d785b48e8833ff580dab9f97a-a392b42562f246f69e15ef3c54ba8578/63]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1dca868d785b48e8833ff580dab9f97a-a392b42562f246f69e15ef3c54ba8578/63]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1dca868d785b48e8833ff580dab9f97a-a392b42562f246f69e15ef3c54ba8578/63]BIG
TECH FACT-CHECKERS ARE AFTER PRAGERU AGAIN!
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1dca868d785b48e8833ff580dab9f97a-a392b42562f246f69e15ef3c54ba8578/63]

NewsGuard, one of Big Tech’s self-declared and left-wing funded
“fact-checkers,” is targeting PragerU—again!

After years of smearing our reputation, falsely accusing our videos of
advancing _“inaccurate, misleading, and unsubstantiated claims,”_
pressuring tech platforms to cancel us, and costing us hundreds of
thousands—if not millions—of dollars, NewsGuard refuses to leave
us alone.

They recently reached out AGAIN to inform us they are “updating”
their rating of PragerU (currently a low score of 57 points out of
100).

[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1dca868d785b48e8833ff580dab9f97a-a392b42562f246f69e15ef3c54ba8578/63]

EXPOSE NEWSGUARD
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1dca868d785b48e8833ff580dab9f97a-a392b42562f246f69e15ef3c54ba8578/63]

This is the same NewsGuard that claims to fight misinformation but
avoids transparency themselves. We believe the American public
deserves answers.

That’s why I responded to NewsGuard by inviting co-CEOs Steven Brill
and Gordon Crovitz to sit down with me for a recorded and transparent
interview. Despite offering multiple times to respectfully ask and
answer each other’s questions, NewsGuard’s CEOs have failed to
accept my invitation.

LIKE MANY OTHER THINGS IN AMERICA, IT’S TIME TO EXPOSE THE TRUTH.
NEWSGUARD HAS BEEN INTIMIDATING CONSERVATIVE MEDIA COMPANIES,
ATTEMPTING TO CONTROL INFORMATION. WE WILL NOT ALLOW THEM TO
INTIMIDATE US WITH THEIR BASELESS RATINGS.
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1dca868d785b48e8833ff580dab9f97a-a392b42562f246f69e15ef3c54ba8578/63]

Even Mark Zuckerberg (whether you trust him or not) has acknowledged
the bias of so-called “fact-checkers,” and Meta plans to phase
them out. Meanwhile, Steven Brill told NPR that the idea they should
ease up on fact-checking is _“just plain ridiculous” _and accuses
Zuckerberg of _“living in an alternate universe.”_

PragerU sounded the alarm about NewsGuard long ago—and they are
finally starting to be exposed! But now is not the time to take our
foot off the gas. We must continue to apply pressure and reveal their
blatant censorship and intimidation tactics. THAT IS WHY WE NEED YOUR
HELP!
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1dca868d785b48e8833ff580dab9f97a-a392b42562f246f69e15ef3c54ba8578/63]

SUPPORT PRAGERU
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1dca868d785b48e8833ff580dab9f97a-a392b42562f246f69e15ef3c54ba8578/63]

Despite NewsGuard’s continued threats, PRAGERU HAS BEEN SOUNDING THE
ALARM ABOUT THEIR SUPPRESSION OF FREE SPEECH FOR YEARS.
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1dca868d785b48e8833ff580dab9f97a-a392b42562f246f69e15ef3c54ba8578/63]
Now EVERYONE is talking about NewsGuard’s nefarious agenda.

Here are just a few highlights:

* Mike Benz, a former State Department official, accused NewsGuard
of blacklisting media outlets, censoring what students can learn in
K-12 schools.
* House Oversight Committee Chair James Comer (R-Ky.) launched an
official congressional investigation into NewsGuard.
* Media outlets from The Daily Wire to The Federalist and Newsmax
have reported on NewsGuard’s censorship and intimidation tactics.
* The “Twitter Files” (internal Twitter documents leaked by Elon
Musk to a few journalists) confirm what PragerU has been saying all
along—Big Tech has colluded with Big Government via fact-checkers
like NewsGuard.
* Congressional hearings were held by the “House Subcommittee on
the Weaponization of the Federal Government” on this matter.
* Journalists Michael Shellenberger (who starred in several PragerU
videos) and Matt Taibbi testified in these hearings and have been
relentlessly attacked for exposing this collusion—our own government
has interrogated and threatened journalists who are simply telling the
truth!
* State of Florida CFO Jimmy Patronis has been warning businesses
about NewsGuard's nefarious tactics!
* Word has been spreading like wildfire online...millions now know
that our government has not allowed dissent and used taxpayer dollars
(Biden’s Department of Defense paid NewsGuard $750K in 2021) to
censor the American people!

PragerU has pulled back the curtain. We've opened millions of eyes to
these cold hard facts: Our own government was pressuring—and
paying—Big Tech to use "fact-checkers" like NewsGuard to slap a
“misinformation” label on anything they disagree with and
“redirect” people to powerful elite-approved websites to be
reeducated with the “correct” information.

EXPOSE NEWSGUARD
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1dca868d785b48e8833ff580dab9f97a-a392b42562f246f69e15ef3c54ba8578/63]

We will not let NewsGuard and their cronies get away with this.
We’re not going to let them suppress free speech, conceal
information, and control what you can and cannot see, all while
keeping you completely in the dark.

There might be severe consequences for us for pushing against
NewsGuard. But if we don’t do it, who will?

Third-party fact-checkers and their “partners” have a lot of money
and power. But we have you! Times are changing for the better in
America, but to keep this momentum going, we must strike while the
iron is hot.

DONATE NOW TO HELP US EXPOSE NEWSGUARD.
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1dca868d785b48e8833ff580dab9f97a-a392b42562f246f69e15ef3c54ba8578/63]

Let’s protect our freedom of speech.

We’re willing to take the risk.

We’re putting everything on the line.

But we need your help.

Please join in the fight and help us.

Sincerely,

Marissa Streit, PragerU CEO

DONATE NOW
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1dca868d785b48e8833ff580dab9f97a-a392b42562f246f69e15ef3c54ba8578/63]

Copyright © 2025 PragerU

All rights reserved.

Privacy Policy [https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1dca868d785b48e8833ff580dab9f97a-108b5cd5510a4ceeb4ed1dd75a4cc4b8/63]

DCDailyJournal.com

Click Here to Unsubscribe Or Report as Spam
[https://paramountcomm.app.optipub.com/messages/opt-outs/1dca868d785b48e8833ff580dab9f97a?op-notrack]

This email was directed to dpwillis67@gmail.com only | Our Privacy Policy can be
found by clicking here
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1dca868d785b48e8833ff580dab9f97a-447513e27bb243faad28788feeb7d868/63].

525-K East Market Street # 114
City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

© Copyright DCDailyJournal.com All Rights Reserved.

name: The Squad
subject: It’s time to show Trump and Musk we’re unstoppable. Are you in?
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250403-1299-foote&t=1001&akid=1299%2E342411%2Ew-KkTD ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Last quarter, our Squad saw a surge of grassroots support unlike ever
before.

Donors from every corner of the country chipped in to support our Squad
amidst the third month of Trump’s chaos, and together we were able to show
the far-right just how unified our movement truly is.

Now, a new quarter is upon us, and that means new plans, new goals, and a
whole lot of energy to fuel this movement. We know the fight isn’t over.
Trump and his MAGA cronies are relentless in their attacks on our
democracy. But we’re not backing down either. Together, we have the power
to fight back, to push for legislation that puts people first — not
profits.

It’s time to show Trump, Elon Musk, and anyone else trying to buy our
democracy that they can’t control us with their money. Our freedom, our
democracy, and our future are worth far more than any check they could
write.

We can’t do it without you. Your support powers this movement, and as we
embark on this new month, we need your help to continue the fight.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250403-movement.HQWOyw&refcode=em20250403-1299&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1299%2E342411%2Ew-KkTD ]Chip in today to support our Squad as they embark on a new month, and a
new quarter of holding our leaders accountable, calling out corruption,
and showing up for working people.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250403-movement.HQWOyw&refcode=em20250403-1299&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1299%2E342411%2Ew-KkTD ]Contribute ››

Together,

The Squad

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1299%2E342411%2Ew-KkTD

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Team Jayapal
subject: They spoke up. Now they’re being punished.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Silencing dissent is straight out of the authoritarian playbook. We must act now to fight back.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250403-4917-footer&t=1&akid=4917%2E420207%2EM0dekr)
This is URGENT, Peter:
**The Trump administration is detaining and deporting student activists for speaking out in support of peace.**
We’ve seen this before — authoritarians crack down on dissent when they fear the power of the people. Now students are being targeted, their visas revoked, and their futures put in jeopardy.
**We cannot let this stand.**
[**Peter, will you sign on to our petition demanding the Trump administration immediately release these students and stop weaponizing immigration laws to silence free speech?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/student-detention-petition-20250403?source=em20250403-4917&akid=4917%2E420207%2EM0dekr)
**[👉 Sign The Petition 👈](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/student-detention-petition-20250403?source=em20250403-4917&akid=4917%2E420207%2EM0dekr)**
This administration wants to send a message: Stay silent, or face the consequences.
**But here’s our message back: We will not be intimidated. And we will ALWAYS stand up for what’s right.**
[**Add your name to our petition now, and let’s show Trump and his allies that we won’t back down.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/student-detention-petition-20250403?source=em20250403-4917&akid=4917%2E420207%2EM0dekr)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: reaching every voter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105133665/537461274/765428386?refcode=ea.1abfccb6-db10-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.1abfccb6-db10-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWJmY2NiNi1kYjEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C87ic_17tprVr6f3OMITzsJDUtWwCKM7WMIIUwdPbBg=) Peter, it’s Abigail Spanberger. I’m honored to share that I’m officially the Democratic nominee in the November 2025 election for the Governor’s office in Virginia! As I look ahead to November 2025, there’s no doubt my race will be a close one — just like my races in 2018, 2020, and 2022. However, now I am running for an even bigger seat and to represent even more Virginians (well, all of them!). To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia. Already, I’m hearing directly from voters on the issues that are most important to them — supporting our public schools, protecting our democracy, reducing gun violence, safeguarding voting rights and reproductive rights, and so much more. From Carroll County to Chesapeake to Charlottesville and everywhere in between — I can’t wait to meet everyone! Since I’m now running to represent the entire Commonwealth, not just the Seventh District, I have many new voters, community leaders, and organizations to meet, and I need your support to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to reach every voter across our Commonwealth. **[That’s why I’m asking you to invest in my campaign today as we build the strongest foundation possible. Even $5 or $10 makes a big difference!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105133666/537461275/765428386?refcode=ea.1abfccb6-db10-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.1abfccb6-db10-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWJmY2NiNi1kYjEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C87ic_17tprVr6f3OMITzsJDUtWwCKM7WMIIUwdPbBg=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105133667/537461276/765428386?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.1abfccb6-db10-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.1abfccb6-db10-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWJmY2NiNi1kYjEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C87ic_17tprVr6f3OMITzsJDUtWwCKM7WMIIUwdPbBg=)

clean_body: | = Peter, it’s Abigail Spanberger. I’m honored to share that I’m officially the Democratic nominee in the November 2025 election for the Governor’s office in Virginia! As I look ahead to November 2025, there’s no doubt my race will be a close one — just like my races in 2018, 2020, and 2022. However, now I am running for an even bigger seat and to represent even more Virginians (well, all of them!). To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia. Already, I’m hearing directly from voters on the issues that are most important to them — supporting our public schools, protecting our democracy, reducing gun violence, safeguarding voting rights and reproductive rights, and so much more. From Carroll County to Chesapeake to Charlottesville and everywhere in between — I can’t wait to meet everyone! Since I’m now running to represent the entire Commonwealth, not just the Seventh District, I have many new voters, community leaders, and organizations to meet, and I need your support to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to reach every voter across our Commonwealth. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thank you, Abigail mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: This week's results in Wisconsin and Florida:
body:
---
Derek, I want to share a quick update on this week’s special elections in Wisconsin and Florida:
* **In Wisconsin,** Judge Susan Crawford defeated the Elon Musk-backed candidate in a landslide, despite Musk pouring tens of millions of dollars into the race. This race determined control of the Wisconsin Supreme Court, which is expected to decide soon on a total abortion ban. The stakes couldn’t have been any higher and Musk did everything he could to sway the court his way. _Voters rejected him._
* **In Florida,** Democrats historically over-performed — with Gay Valimont claiming the best performance from a Democrat in Florida’s 1st District this century, and Josh Weil massively over-performing in a Trump +30 district.

These races proved what we’ve seen over and over again this year: people are already fed up with Trump’s chaos agenda and they’re voting for a change. That’s why Democrats have won or over-performed in nearly every special election race this year, including this week’s. Supporters like you have helped us channel the energy we’re seeing on the ground. The DNC invested in both Wisconsin and Florida — and thousands of people pitched in in response to emails just like this one, helping raise hundreds of thousands of dollars for both states’ parties. And we’re just getting started, Derek. We’re holding People’s Town Halls in every state in the country, giving an opportunity for Americans — regardless of how they voted — to speak out about what is happening right now in Washington and how it personally affects them. We’re ratcheting up our fight against Trump in the courts to stop his hostile takeover of the FEC — America’s federal elections watchdog — and we’ve sued Donald Trump and DOGE for their attacks on voting rights and attempts to access sensitive voter information. And of course, we’re working to win more and more races ahead of the midterms next year. We’ve gained huge momentum already by winning in places like Wisconsin and Pennsylvania and now we’ve got our eyes set on the Virginia and New Jersey gubernatorial races in November. Thank you for everything you’re doing to help support Democrats in this fight. I hope you’re as ready as I am to keep working, and I’ll have more updates to share soon. Ken Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250402_3119_fr&refcode2=3119_22930333_q2X5l5&akid=3119%2E22930333%2Eq2X5l5)
---

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Ritchie
subject: Republicans hate our seniors.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
67 million Americans on Medicare would lose access to telehealth because of Republicans

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105133941/537462384/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2RlMDA1OC1kZDEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OAPZk9QmhRECBXrypdRPKZhDKURVFLrq_yaXnxJoVV0=)
---
**Donald Trump and Elon Musk want to force 67 million Americans on Medicare to lose access to telehealth.** These 67 million Americans are made up of Democrats _and_ Republicans, of poor people _and_ rich people.

This means 67 million senior citizens would need to drive or be driven _to and from_ appointments, and risk getting unnecessarily exposed to sickness at in person appointments.

Telehealth care is just the tip of the iceberg. Trump and Musk are coming after all of our benefits. Peter, these Republican-led efforts to dismantle and defund Medicare don’t just hurt GOP enemies — _they hurt everyone._

[The time has come for Congressional Republicans to join Congressional Democrats in PERMANENTLY extending access to Medicare Telehealth. That’s why I’m calling on House Republicans to join us in the common-sense fight to defend social safety nets like Medicare, and I need your support: Will you add your name to my petition? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105133943/537462385/150078713?refcode=RTFC_20250403_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2RlMDA1OC1kZDEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OAPZk9QmhRECBXrypdRPKZhDKURVFLrq_yaXnxJoVV0=&emci=b69b4edd-fa0b-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=57de0058-dd10-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=34594689) | [SAVE MEDICARE BENEFITS: ADD YOUR NAME TO RITCHIE’S PETITION »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105133945/537462387/150078713?refcode=RTFC_20250403_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2RlMDA1OC1kZDEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OAPZk9QmhRECBXrypdRPKZhDKURVFLrq_yaXnxJoVV0=&emci=b69b4edd-fa0b-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=57de0058-dd10-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=34594689)

We’re in this together,

_Ritchie_
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: 67 million Americans on Medicare would lose access to telehealth because of Republicans | = Donald Trump and Elon Musk want to force 67 million Americans on Medicare to lose access to telehealth. These 67 million Americans are made up of Democrats and Republicans, of poor people and rich people. This means 67 million senior citizens would need to drive or be driven to and from appointments, and risk getting unnecessarily exposed to sickness at in person appointments. Telehealth care is just the tip of the iceberg. Trump and Musk are coming after all of our benefits. Peter, these Republican-led efforts to dismantle and defund Medicare don’t just hurt GOP enemies — they hurt everyone. | We’re in this together, Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. ## “Votes are more powerful than dollars. This election was a battle between Musk Money and democracy, and today’s victory is a testament to the real power of the people.”

— Attorney General Eric Holder, April 1, 2025
Here’s some great news for democracy, Peter: **On Tuesday, Judge Susan Crawford — who we’ve endorsed as a Democracy Defender — won a hotly contested race for a seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court.** Her victory solidifies a pro-democracy majority on the state’s highest court, which will likely rule on critical issues like gerrymandered maps, voting rights, and abortion rights in the years ahead. **This is a massive success for our movement to defend our democracy and ensure fair electoral maps.** It’s proof that we can win — and _keep_ winning — despite massive outside spending from Elon Musk’s political machine. Thank you for everything you’ve done to help power this team to victory — grassroots support is a critical piece of our 10 Year Plan to secure fair maps across the country. If you’re feeling energized by this win and want to make sure we can keep fighting the next battles for our democracy — with critical elections coming up this year in Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Virginia — [**then please consider a contribution of $30 or more right now in celebration of this week’s victory and power our movement for fair maps in the fights ahead.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105133961/537462407/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_WIWin_email_20250403-NDRC-Tier1-WIWin_75&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250403-NDRC-Tier1-WIWin_75&utm_campaign=WIWin&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3YmMzYzNkLWRkMTAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4yFaaaQOtgKbQuhXsU049XqmnQqWb0HauQxNvEwSqJQ=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The biggest winners on Tuesday were folks in Wisconsin who will get a strong, pro-democracy justice on their state supreme court.
**The next-biggest winners were people across the country who care about democracy and will benefit from a state supreme court justice who supports fair representation.** Remember, these elections have nationwide ramifications. It was a state supreme court ruling in North Carolina allowing the use of a gerrymandered map that helped Republicans pick up three congressional seats in the state last year — when they only won control of the House of Representatives by three seats.
Speaking of North Carolina:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105133968/537462414/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_WIWin_email_20250403-NDRC-Tier1-WIWin_75&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250403-NDRC-Tier1-WIWin_75&utm_campaign=WIWin&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3YmMzYzNkLWRkMTAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4yFaaaQOtgKbQuhXsU049XqmnQqWb0HauQxNvEwSqJQ=)

It’s a good reminder for the North Carolina GOP, who continue to deny the results of November’s election after multiple recounts confirmed the victory of Democracy Defender Allison Riggs.
**From Wisconsin and North Carolina to Ohio and Florida, the fight for fair maps and fair elections is happening every day at the state level — and we will keep pouring our time and resources into making sure democracy wins.**
[**Rush a donation of $30 or more right now to power our work supporting fair maps in the elections to come >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105133969/537462415/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_WIWin_email_20250403-NDRC-Tier1-WIWin_75&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250403-NDRC-Tier1-WIWin_75&utm_campaign=WIWin&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3YmMzYzNkLWRkMTAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4yFaaaQOtgKbQuhXsU049XqmnQqWb0HauQxNvEwSqJQ=)

clean_body: Chip in to keep the momentum going | “Votes are more powerful than dollars. This election was a battle between Musk Money and democracy, and today’s victory is a testament to the real power of the people.” — Attorney General Eric Holder, April 1, 2025 Here’s some great news for democracy, Peter: On Tuesday, Judge Susan Crawford — who we’ve endorsed as a Democracy Defender — won a hotly contested race for a seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court. Her victory solidifies a pro-democracy majority on the state’s highest court, which will likely rule on critical issues like gerrymandered maps, voting rights, and abortion rights in the years ahead. This is a massive success for our movement to defend our democracy and ensure fair electoral maps. It’s proof that we can win — and keep winning — despite massive outside spending from Elon Musk’s political machine. Thank you for everything you’ve done to help power this team to victory — grassroots support is a critical piece of our 10 Year Plan to secure fair maps across the country. If you’re feeling energized by this win and want to make sure we can keep fighting the next battles for our democracy — with critical elections coming up this year in Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Virginia — = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The biggest winners on Tuesday were folks in Wisconsin who will get a strong, pro-democracy justice on their state supreme court. The next-biggest winners were people across the country who care about democracy and will benefit from a state supreme court justice who supports fair representation. Remember, these elections have nationwide ramifications. It was a state supreme court ruling in North Carolina allowing the use of a gerrymandered map that helped Republicans pick up three congressional seats in the state last year — when they only won control of the House of Representatives by three seats. Speaking of North Carolina: = It’s a good reminder for the North Carolina GOP, who continue to deny the results of November’s election after multiple recounts confirmed the victory of Democracy Defender Allison Riggs. From Wisconsin and North Carolina to Ohio and Florida, the fight for fair maps and fair elections is happening every day at the state level — and we will keep pouring our time and resources into making sure democracy wins. = Thanks for everything you do. Enjoy this week’s win — and let’s keep working! The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

body:
| | | Friend, It’s official — I am honored to be your Republican Nominee for Attorney General in Virginia. But now,_the real work begins._ We’re entering the fight of our lives to **keep Virginia safe** , **defend the rule of law** , and **stop the far-left’s dangerous agenda**. The stakes couldn’t be higher — and we’re going to need every ounce of support to win this race. **[**Can I count on you to pitch in right now and help us build the momentum we need to win in November?**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/9hJ8q7omyYubJWJUpfu6vYB2WFQ1WIlZRp3-OmIs3FyaI-8q_pKH5zFgEXdFu3e6kpDylPktFjtdKqqxvRRR0pNSUxWCA1LTqsOpcedyQR_FDcMjU62De6bYqH9gfdFR18CZxHmI4udZcfPb9XuZJasMAIPcA36amkSUlCfVnzbyeeV5J5RipepjaeqmqYTrxeW1Z4TDQwvniNU7DsYHP1EU6rHFTbHLeQhHGSoAoUkKbwEg8U0jc13q5NTojP9fi4RDzVMmDjEcYyq8JVy4054epzinGkr0S4gdO6B_HLKXcS8bdhFDCSb7AqosGwpIXPmO43lsangmyzMEej7d_zkuYHZYVLDnMSzTOVSoT_VXb1j8yzpChdXZlMc/a1qOQnhXVHezIWYRtIRg8iBn462_6Pqp/7)** Thank you for standing with me,Jason Miyares

clean_body: | | | Friend, It’s official — I am honored to be your Republican Nominee for Attorney General in Virginia. But now,the real work begins. We’re entering the fight of our lives to keep Virginia safe , defend the rule of law , and stop the far-left’s dangerous agenda. The stakes couldn’t be higher — and we’re going to need every ounce of support to win this race. Thank you for standing with me,Jason Miyares Virginia Attorney General | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Dr. Ami Bera
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Hi Peter,

Thank you. Because of your incredible support, we hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal — and sent a powerful message to Republicans in the process.

As a doctor, I’ve spent my career standing up for **science, public health, and the truth.** Now, as DCCC Frontline Co-Chair, **I’m working to hold this reckless Administration accountable and help Democrats take back the House majority in 2026.**

Your support makes that possible.

**At a time when science is being sidelined, experienced public servants are being pushed out, and oversight has all but disappeared, your donation fuels the fight for competence, accountability, and basic decency in our government.**

I’m deeply grateful — and I’m honored to have you in this fight with me.

Thank you again, Peter.

Be well,

Dr. Ami Bera
---

| | HANDS OFF is a nationwide day of protest. Information about how to participate in your area can be found by contacting your local Democrat Party office or through [mobilize](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b5PNtIDrI/c?w=ti0NuUN-n0CWBNuscwnoOJSJO-IMh8nRn9tmpqUgwRc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9iaWxpemUudXMvIiwiciI6IjVlMDc0NDEwLWVlNGQtNDg3Ni04YjUxLWI3NzNmNWQ2YWRmNCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9).
---
| | | |
---
| | What is the solution? Goodness knows we don’t need anymore problems. As I see, hear and feel the palpable tension among my neighbors I am forever looking for a solution and it may be in sight. Tragically the damage done before the cure may be so damning and entrenched that it will take great will for many years just to undo what has been done in a few short weeks.
We know there is a project 2025 which provides a, supposedly, well thought out roadmap for the far-rights future. But it is being implemented by some of the most incompetent people on the planet. I say that out of fact not anger, bitterness or desire to ridicule. They are just a bunch of buffoons and so if they don’t knock us back to the stone age by destroying our economy, causing some horrendous environmental disaster or, heaven forbid, blow us all up we can win this.
---
| | [](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b5PNtIDrI/c?w=wbXSKzRneFKpGVBEJ8Aq3R_E2-mpT8t9KsBAs4jEQyU.)
---
| | Why do I remain optimistic? Because despite the political ignorance of American citizens the game that the far-right has been playing so successfully in the past is now catching up with them. Their dumbed down drum beat of Democrat doom is showing wear. With an electorate where a third do not vote at all, I would venture a guess that less than 10%, probably far less than 10%, are sufficiently politically aware to make an informed decision that has made the lies of the far-right believable fallacies. It does not stretch our imagination to know how this was possible. If the only context you have is your own life and you live in let’s say Yakima County where the fentanyl incidence are twice the state average and wages are half the state average it is pretty easy to conclude that things are not good and when someone gives you a justification to believe that then it is easy to make that belief your reality. The mistake that the far-right has made is believing that ignorance is the same as stupid; it is not.
---
| |
---
| | If you have this large group of people whose political belief system was based on ludicrous and contradicting lies shored up by bullying and vilifying marginalized groups and Democrats who are now faced with losing their jobs, family members deported, losing access to their children’s healthcare, rising food and gas prices and, OMG, a war with Canada! This goes beyond a wakeup call - this is a – before your morning coffee bitch slaps both ways. As the reality of the far-right starts hitting home the ignorant become enlightened. Join us Saturday April 5th[mobilize](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b5PNtIDrI/c?w=vY_qSHTgGYuTJd4fAtJ7QWJQR-vAT9ilW1eIoNpWAJs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9iaWxpemUudXMvIiwiciI6IjllMmY3NzlmLWEyMWEtNGQ2NS1iNmIyLTA3NmRkYjljNzM4MCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9) The signs of our success are there and they are getting brighter and more frequent. From the floundering of our local politicians like Congressional District 4 Representative Dan Newhouse’s silly attempts to spin MAGA driven legislation which will have catastrophic consequences to his constituents, us, to newly minted and hubris abundant Congressional District 5 Michael Baumgartner going to the media to bad mouth his constituents saying he “does not represent them” to tangible victories such as the Wisconsin Supreme Court win where voter turnout was estimated to be up by 50% and the victories in Florida in Districts 1 and 6 where 47’s 30 point lead last November was whittled away to barely double digits during this last special election. Now is our time to keep the pressure on, continue to exploit the weaknesses and highlight the devastating direct effects on our lives. Make it real! See you April 5th!
---
| | | |
---
| | Potpourri
---
| | An Economical Economics Lesson by Don Hinman But wait, a lesson that Democrats must learn is to keep it simple. In business, we used to call it the KISS principle: Keep It Simple Stupid. This has little to do with the intellect of the people you are communicating with and more to do with being an effective and successful communicator. Please read this [piece](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b5PNtIDrI/c?w=gd6zcKY5NCNoaEToRWw9ltwV4Wu_9G-RLHiXe1-slm8.) by Don Hinman, where he takes what could be a complex issue and makes it accessible to everyone. Don is no slouch, he could have written a textbook, but instead, he chose to be succinct, brief, and use practical examples. We are so proud of our Shirley Grossman Before you check out, click on the excellent resource page our advisory board member Shirley Grossman compiled. It is a comprehensive “go-to” reference for the Spokane area. Nicely done, Shirley. [https://www.saveusa.me/](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b5PNtIDrI/c?w=cvSEh4oYA1JU4c8fAbsGDpvojrQQn4sBTIPT0FDVIms.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2F2ZXVzYS5tZS8iLCJyIjoiNmFlYjk5ODEtZDVhMS00NjEzLTg5MTctZmJhN2IwYmM0MDYxIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0)

| | As Democrats, we have been given two once in a generation opportunities to win Congressional District 4 since Jay Inslee held the position more than thirty years ago. The first was when I, Doug White, ran in 2022, when Loren Culp made a Democratic victory possible. A similar scenario played out in Congressional District 3, where Democrat Marie Gluesenkamp Perez captured the "not so crazy" vote against Joe Kent and won. She has now proved that she, and we, can hold that seat with a reelection in 2024. The second is looking more and more like 2026. A path to victory is becoming clearer for 2026, and I will write more on this because my vision forward is stronger than ever, and I hope yours is too.

This goes beyond a wakeup call - this is a – before your morning coffee bitch slaps both ways. As the reality of the far-right starts hitting home the ignorant become enlightened. Join us Saturday April 5th The signs of our success are there and they are getting brighter and more frequent. From the floundering of our local politicians like Congressional District 4 Representative Dan Newhouse’s silly attempts to spin MAGA driven legislation which will have catastrophic consequences to his constituents, us, to newly minted and hubris abundant Congressional District 5 Michael Baumgartner going to the media to bad mouth his constituents saying he “does not represent them” to tangible victories such as the Wisconsin Supreme Court win where voter turnout was estimated to be up by 50% and the victories in Florida in Districts 1 and 6 where 47’s 30 point lead last November was whittled away to barely double digits during this last special election. Now is our time to keep the pressure on, continue to exploit the weaknesses and highlight the devastating direct effects on our lives. Make it real! See you April 5th! | | | | | | Potpourri | | An Economical Economics Lesson by Don Hinman But wait, a lesson that Democrats must learn is to keep it simple. In business, we used to call it the KISS principle: Keep It Simple Stupid. This has little to do with the intellect of the people you are communicating with and more to do with being an effective and successful communicator. Please read this by Don Hinman, where he takes what could be a complex issue and makes it accessible to everyone. Don is no slouch, he could have written a textbook, but instead, he chose to be succinct, brief, and use practical examples. We are so proud of our Shirley Grossman Before you check out, click on the excellent resource page our advisory board member Shirley Grossman compiled. It is a comprehensive “go-to” reference for the Spokane area. Nicely done, Shirley. | | | | | | Senator Patty Murray(509) 453-7462 Senator Maria Cantwell(509) 946 - 8106 Representative Dan Newhouse CD 4(509) 713-7374 Representative Michael Baumgartner CD 5(509) 353-2374 | | As Democrats, we have been given two once in a generation opportunities to win Congressional District 4 since Jay Inslee held the position more than thirty years ago. The first was when I, Doug White, ran in 2022, when Loren Culp made a Democratic victory possible. A similar scenario played out in Congressional District 3, where Democrat Marie Gluesenkamp Perez captured the "not so crazy" vote against Joe Kent and won. She has now proved that she, and we, can hold that seat with a reelection in 2024. The second is looking more and more like 2026. A path to victory is becoming clearer for 2026, and I will write more on this because my vision forward is stronger than ever, and I hope yours is too. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | This email was sent from .

name: Brianna Brown, Texas Organizing Project
subject: Announcing a BIG win for our movement
body:
https://organizetexas.org/ [https://organizetexas.org/]
Peter,
We're thrilled to share that Drucilla Tigner has been selected as Texas For All's new Executive Director! Texas For All [https://tx4all.org/] [https://tx4all.org/] [https://tx4all.org/] is a powerful coalition of organizations across the state aiming to create a Texas that lives up to its promise and truly works for everyone – no matter their age, race, gender, or where they call home.
For more than 13 years, Drucilla has organized, advocated, and built progressive political power in Texas to protect our freedoms. From countering attacks on reproductive freedom at the ACLU of Texas to running some of the largest voter engagement programs in Planned Parenthood Texas Votes’ history, Drucilla knows that cultivating people-power in our communities is key to winning sustained progressive change. As the chair of Texas For All's c4 board, I'm excited to see her experience, tenacity, and vision shine in this new role.
At this volatile political moment, Drucilla's leadership will be crucial as our groups collectively push back against extremism, inspire voters, and fight for a state where ALL have freedom and access to justice – not just those with wealth, power, and influence. With TOP being a proud member of Texas For All, we ask you to support the coalition's vital work by pitching in with a donation to Texas For All today. Every dollar ensures that the coalition has the resources to organize, mobilize, and win.
Donate to Texas For All here! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tx4all?refcode=ws_pop]
We'll see you in the physical and digital streets, as we counter right-wing hate and divisiveness with unbreakable solidarity and community-building.
Keep Pushing,
Brianna Brown
Co-Executive Director, Texas Organizing Project
C4 Board Chair, Texas For All

name: Katie Porter
subject: Tariffs: an explainer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
an update as of April 3rd
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39609%2E3422442%2EKw-dQU)
Dear Derek,
With all the news about tariffs, I know it’s easy to get lost. Here’s what you need to know.
**What is a tariff?**
A tariff is a tax on goods coming in from foreign countries. So, a 10 percent tariff on Colombia means that imports from Colombia, such as coffee, will go up in price by 10 percent, and your morning latte or afternoon cold brew will now cost more.
**Who pays for tariffs?**
We do. Businesses pass along the cost of tariffs onto consumers. The White House has said they’re projecting $6 trillion of revenue from non-auto tariffs in the next decade—that is coming directly out of our pockets. An independent analysis from Yale estimates that the average household will pay at least $3,400 annually for the tariffs announced yesterday.
**Will tariffs come back down?**
Normally, tariffs are adjusted as part of trade negotiations. That is, we agree to lower tariffs on foreign goods if other countries agree to lower their tariffs on American goods. But, the Trump Administration has said that these new tariffs are not part of a negotiation. That means they want to make prices go up permanently.
**Why is the stock market tanking?**
Higher prices as a result of tariffs will make it harder for companies to do business and for consumers to make purchases. If we continue down this path, we could be headed for a recession. Some economists are even putting the chance of a recession as high as 40 or 50 percent.
**Is there anything we can do?**
It isn’t hopeless! This week, four Republican Senators crossed party lines to help pass a resolution repealing Trump’s tariffs on Canada. But, the House is unlikely to take up this legislation—for now. Congress can act, but we need to speak up and get our elected representatives to make this a real priority.
I hope you were able to learn something about tariffs. Please share this information with your family and friends who could benefit from this explainer.
**[And, if you liked how I broke this issue down, I’d be so appreciative if you’d pitch in $5 to my campaign, so I can keep bringing a teacher’s perspective to politics.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250403_2_ak?refcode=em20250403-39609&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39609_3422442_Kw-dQU&akid=39609%2E3422442%2EKw-dQU)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250403_2_ak?refcode=em20250403-39609&refcode2=39609_3422442_Kw-dQU&akid=39609%2E3422442%2EKw-dQU)
More soon,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250403-39609&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39609_3422442_Kw-dQU&akid=39609%2E3422442%2EKw-dQU)**

We launched the Gulf of America Hat to celebrate MAGA—and let me tell you, it’s been a RECORD-BREAKING success. They’re almost SOLD OUT, and I don’t want you to miss your chance to own this piece of history. Take a look for yourself before they’re gone: —BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE FROM TRUMP— NEW MAGA HAT RELEASE! Friend, Renaming the Gulf of Mexico to the GULF OF AMERICA was one of the first things I did when I stepped into the Oval Office! I’m proud to tell you that these are 100% Made in the USA, and they’re going to be a VERY LIMITED RUN \- we only have 1,000 left! SO, if you want to get your hands on the first ever GULF OF AMERICA hat and support President Trump, you need to Sincerely, Donald J. name: Chris Pappas
subject: I’m running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Friend, I’m Congressman Chris Pappas, and Rep. Zoe Lofgren said I could reach out with some bignews:
I’m officially running to be New Hampshire’s next U.S. Senator. I’m going to share more about why I’m in this race, but if you’re already on board, split a contribution to my campaign and Rep. Zoe Lofgren today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zl-pappas-split-2025?refcode=partner_ms_cp_em_zoelofgren_EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-04-03_SPL_ZOL_ES-20687&amount=25]
I’m running for Senate because at this pivotal moment, our economy, our democracy, and our way of life are on the line. New Hampshire deserves a Senator who is grounded in the people, places, and values of this state – and one who is ready to lead on day one.
Our country is at a crossroads, and the decisions we make now will have generational impacts. You can count on me to continue taking on big fights and to confront the Trump Administration, self-dealing billionaires, and extreme politicians who are threatening our future and our ability to get things done for New Hampshire.
Friend, can I count on you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign with a $25 contribution, split between my campaign and Rep. Zoe Lofgren right now? We can’t win this race without major grassroots support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zl-pappas-split-2025?refcode=partner_ms_cp_em_zoelofgren_EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-04-03_SPL_ZOL_ES-20687&amount=25]
These fights are deeply personal to me. My family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in Manchester 108 years ago, a small business that remains at the heart of the community today. Running that small business showed me the power of hard work and serving others, but the opportunity that my ancestors and so many others like them sought has never been further away – and the Trump Administration is too busy cutting deals for their billionaire buddies to give a damn.
I’m also openly gay and happily married to my husband, Vann. With the current wave of hateful policies leveled at the LGBTQ+ community, I know how important representation is at this moment. If elected, I’d be the first openly gay male U.S. Senator in history – a badge of honor I’d wear proudly as I advocate for full equality.
I am the proud product of public education, and I come from a family of business owners (my grandfather invented the chicken tender at the restaurant – seriously!) . I understand firsthand the need to support neighborhood schools and small businesses in our community. These are the lifeblood of our economy and the pillars of opportunity for everyone.
My life experiences are what led me to successfully run for four terms in Congress and win in one of the “swingiest” districts in the nation. Before I won my election in 2018, no one had managed to hold the seat for more than one term for more than a decade. I’m no stranger to tough electoral fights. Now I’m ready to take on the fight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue.
We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines of the big fights ahead – not with so much at stake, from the rising costs debilitating working families to the threats to the future of our democracy. We’ve taken on big fights together in Congress. Now it’s time to win this critical Senate seat so we can keep standing up to the Trump Administration and the self-dealing billionaires threatening our future. Can I count on you to join the fight?
Friend, if you’re with me, let’s make a powerful statement together and prove that we’re ready to win this race. Become a Founding Donor with a $25 donation to my campaign and Rep. Zoe Lofgren now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zl-pappas-split-2025?refcode=partner_ms_cp_em_zoelofgren_EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-04-03_SPL_ZOL_ES-20687&amount=25]
Thank you again to Rep. Zoe Lofgren for letting me reach out today.
With gratitude,
Chris

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zl-pappas-split-2025?refcode=partner_ms_cp_em_zoelofgren_EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-04-03_SPL_ZOL_ES-20687&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zl-pappas-split-2025?refcode=partner_ms_cp_em_zoelofgren_EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-04-03_SPL_ZOL_ES-20687&amount=25]
Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help.
Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q12025?refcode=emfooter&amount=25]
Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
Lofgren for Congress
PO Box 913
San Jose, CA 95113
United States

name: Suhas Subramanyam
subject: Abigail Spanberger is the Democrat running to flip the Governor's office
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Suhas for Virginia
body:
secure.actblue.com/donate/sva-em-nov-24?refcode=march [secure.actblue.com/donate/sva-em-nov-24?refcode=march]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP47/1/105057/images/Screenshot%202025-04-03%20at%203.51.49%E2%80%AFPM.png]
Team, it's Abigail Spanberger.
I'm honored to share that I'm officially the Democratic nominee in the November 2025 election for the Governor's office in Virginia! I'm grateful for the grassroots support from volunteers and contributors like you who have made this possible. Every dollar we raised, every phone call we made, and every conversation we had was only possible because of you.
The Virginia governor's race is one of the most competitive races in the country right now, and it's being called a total toss-up by experts. All eyes are on us to see if we have what it takes to win this race -- and set the stage for 2026 and beyond.
That's why we need to continue building on the strong foundation that we've built so far: your contribution will help us continue mobilizing volunteers, knocking on doors, and holding events. We need to reach voters across the Commonwealth to show them that I'm running to stand up for the people of Virginia, not stand by as chaos and division are spread.
Will you split a donation between my campaign and Suhas Subramanyam today to help us continue this momentum and flip the Governor's office blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abigailandsuhas]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
$10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abigailandsuhas?refcode=10&amount=10] $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abigailandsuhas?refcode=25&amount=25] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abigailandsuhas?refcode=50&amount=50]
$75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abigailandsuhas?refcode=75&amount=75] $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abigailandsuhas?refcode=100&amount=100] Other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abigailandsuhas?refcode=other]
Thank you,
Abigail Spanberger
Suhas Subramanyam has dedicated his life to public service as a State Senator, and a former Obama White House advisor, Capitol Hill staffer, and volunteer firefighter/EMT. In Richmond, he has worked across the aisle to pass gun violence prevention bills and protect democracy. Suhas resides in Ashburn, Virginia (in VA-10) with his wife, Miranda, and their two daughters.

Peter, it’s Abigail Spanberger. I’m honored to share that I’m officially the Democratic nominee in the November 2025 election for the Governor’s office in Virginia! I’m grateful for the grassroots support from volunteers and contributors like you who have made this possible. Every dollar we raised, every phone call we made, and every conversation we had was only possible because of you. The Virginia governor’s race is one of the most competitive races in the country right now, and it’s being called a _**total toss-up by experts.**_ All eyes are on us to see if we have what it takes to win this race — and set the stage for 2026 and beyond. That’s why we need to continue building on the strong foundation that we’ve built so far: your contribution will help us continue mobilizing volunteers, knocking on doors, and holding events. **We need to reach voters across the Commonwealth to show them that I’m running to stand up for the people of Virginia, not stand by as chaos and division are spread.** **[Will you split a donation between my campaign and Tina Kotek today to help us continue this momentum and flip the Governor’s office blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105134897/537465018/-1685201645?refcode=AU_TK_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzkwNTY5OS1kZjEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L9denFNkrHFXB7cmrCwayaDVReMrduwUxWqZN1ZF_zs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Abigail Spanberger and Tina Kotek will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105134898/537465019/-1685201645?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_TK_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzkwNTY5OS1kZjEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L9denFNkrHFXB7cmrCwayaDVReMrduwUxWqZN1ZF_zs=)

I’m grateful for the grassroots support from volunteers and contributors like you who have made this possible. Every dollar we raised, every phone call we made, and every conversation we had was only possible because of you. The Virginia governor’s race is one of the most competitive races in the country right now, and it’s being called a total toss-up by experts. All eyes are on us to see if we have what it takes to win this race — and set the stage for 2026 and beyond. That’s why we need to continue building on the strong foundation that we’ve built so far: your contribution will help us continue mobilizing volunteers, knocking on doors, and holding events. We need to reach voters across the Commonwealth to show them that I’m running to stand up for the people of Virginia, not stand by as chaos and division are spread. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Abigail Spanberger and Tina Kotek will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Why we didn’t go into Florida:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter,
This week, Democratic voters delivered a powerful message thanks to your support:
In Wisconsin, we won by 10 points against $21 million from Elon Musk and the full weight of Donald Trump’s political machine!!
At GOTV PAC, we invested in Wisconsin because we knew it was a winnable race. We saw the polling. We saw the organizing on the ground. And we knew that with your support, we could apply our voter turn out program to help hold a seat that mattered.
And we were right!
At the same time, we also looked hard at the special elections in Florida. And while there was undeniable momentum building for Democrats—especially in places like Escambia County, where Trump once dominated—we made the call to sit that one out.
Why? Because we’re committed to something too rare in politics: honesty.
We don’t chase headlines. We don’t take on long shots just to pad an email. We only go in when we believe we can win—and make a real difference for Democratic candidates. That’s how we’ve won every single race we’ve invested in this year.
That’s the trust we’ve built with you—and we’re not about to break it.
Now, we want to let you know that we’re applying that same strategy and focus to our next target: the Pennsylvania Supreme Court.
Just like Wisconsin, this court will shape redistricting, voting rights, and state-level battles that will define the next decade. If we lose ground in Pennsylvania, we risk losing the very infrastructure Democrats need to win back the House and defend our democracy.
We’ve shown we know how to win these fights. But we can’t do it without your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04032025&amount=25]

GOTV PAC

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

We need to reach voters across the Commonwealth to show them that I’m running to stand up for the people of Virginia, not stand by as chaos and division are spread. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Abigail Spanberger and Fight Like Hell PAC will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
