# [Manhattan Needs a New District Attorney](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=160540425&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwNTQwNDI1LCJpYXQiOjE3NDM3MjE2MzIsImV4cCI6MTc0NjMxMzYzMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.aAVY7X6zRAxhs5ZTyLhQAAlKJxJEzKjKHQe7IZUN8AE)
### Maud Maron Enters the Ring to Restore Law and Order
| | [Jonathan Goldstein](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81)
---
| Apr 3| | | ∙| | Guest post
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=160540425&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwNTQwNDI1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0MzcyMTYzMiwiZXhwIjoxNzQ2MzEzNjMyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTQ1NDg1MyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ZTVQlHAHwM5CPwL_MbVIkfgTz-xJ9W7rqyTW-7bzNYU&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=160540425&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwNTQwNDI1LCJpYXQiOjE3NDM3MjE2MzIsImV4cCI6MTc0NjMxMzYzMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.aAVY7X6zRAxhs5ZTyLhQAAlKJxJEzKjKHQe7IZUN8AE&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=160540425&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwNTQwNDI1LCJpYXQiOjE3NDM3MjE2MzIsImV4cCI6MTc0NjMxMzYzMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.aAVY7X6zRAxhs5ZTyLhQAAlKJxJEzKjKHQe7IZUN8AE)
---
| | [](https://substack..8FhCYBwvbfKk7-6fukZjAsZ_qG-0Gv4y9MP42Gz7As0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/drmichaelgoldstein4ct/p/manhattan-needs-a-new-district-attorney?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Last night at a Young Jewish Conservatives event, with Sidney Rosenberg as the Main Event, Sid gave a roaring endorsement for Maud Maron running for Manhattan District Attorney to challenge the master of lawlessness and lawfare himself - Alvin Bragg. He said "**there 's no one more dangerous**"... then Bragg
[Pledge your support](https://substack..CG2EtCX64547F4yUqs_VAoI1MUWgGgjhJE2wCt7KPQs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=160540425)

Here is Sid supporting Maud:
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b95f4173-ffaa-4dfc-926f-418e09e014a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Video Taken by Jonathan Goldstein ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/6528a92d-b9a1-4a38-8ac8-3ffac385bbdf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

I had the opportunity to speak with and interview Maud. Like Sid Rosenberg, she was also a lifelong Democrat who found her way to common sense conservativism and is now a Republican for life.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d0e5e2fb-8589-4e94-9a2b-bf94c3a8978e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

I asked Maud, a former defense attorney of over 20 years why she is stepping up to fight the uphill battle to challenge the democrat machine as a lifelong democrat?

Her main point was public safety: "wanting to be safer on the streets and the subways is normal, healthy, and definitely not racist."

**She is right on that one.** You can't spin crime when we want "our children safe on the subways or commuters or tourists or anyone safe walking down the street...it's really not a color thing as people of every color want safety."

Maud noted that in 2021 when Bragg got elected, the conversation about safety spun into a race and color war. While black men of a certain age group are disproportionately likely to commit certain crimes. Maud notes that "it's also true that black people of every age are disproportionally likely to be victims of crimes." It is time to protect the victims.
**" So if you're trying to be this great leftist anti-racist person, and you support defund the police and social work over police work (Like Bragg), you are actually creating more black victims of crime."
**
Maud is not afraid to reject these narratives and return New York to a civil society of law and order by looking at the actual crime data. **" Alvin Bragg's policies made all of us less safe and we need to reverse those policies and go back to the proven law enforcement policies that we know make us safer."** She is a fighter and her website even has the boxing card with a section called "[Maud vs. Bragg](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8a9d7c6b-609c-4e9a-936e-cc9b8851e6d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" Here is the undercard:
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/afee9749-8a16-4b52-b3f3-254ac17b3905?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Maud was a defense lawyer for 20 years. She credits that experience from the importance of protecting people's constitutional rights. She views being a prosecutor as an incredibly important job, and "Alvin Bragg has been acting like a social worker and not a prosecutor. .. In an adversarial system, which is what our criminal justice system is, you need to have both sides" which is not happening under Bragg.

Maud views prosecutorial discretion from two important viewpoints: to look at the victims of crimes and to prevent future victims contrasted with compelling cases about why a defendant needs a second chance or needs an alternative to incarceration.
Alternatives to incarceration cannot "be your default position because then you are abandoning your actual job to do justice" which is to deter future behavior by "locking up the bad guy."

Maud sees her role if elected as triage given the limited resources and "public safety is a great place to start" if she is elected. She recalled the Bloomberg era not so long ago and "in 2017, **we had zero homicides on the subway. "** Maud knows that "NYC is capable of that safety record once again with good policing and **Why wouldn't we do that kind of good policing again? "**

We know it works and Maud Maron is the district attorney this city needs.
She is a grassroots fighter collecting petition signatures last night to get on the ballot and turned in those signatures today. _**She does not rely on others to get the job done; she rolls up her sleeves and will certainly be a fighter for NYC.**_
If you have businesses and friends in Manhattan, Maud Maron needs your help in this political off-year so spread the word. Her website is [here](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/55bc7080-4fda-4b7b-9e5b-8ffc3869a3b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**A change of district attorneys will protect the future victims from the future perpetrators wherever they may be.**
**Thank you for your continued support and please reach out for assistance. Please subscribe and spread the word as we need your support to grow this message**
[ Pledge your support](https://substack..CG2EtCX64547F4yUqs_VAoI1MUWgGgjhJE2wCt7KPQs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=160540425)
Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein
_The father-son team continues on_ so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT together in a meaningful way and impact out neighbors in New York

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105135361/537466436/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDY3NTJiMS1lMTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8dz_mKOTwuTQRZ3lzbTs-l9VN_mRKb5tXMR2cO3h3u0=)
---
Peter, Last night, Senator Thom Tillis once again showed his true colors by saying one thing and doing another. He spoke out against Trump’s tariff plan, claiming concern for North Carolina’s hardworking families and farmers, but when it came time to take action, he voted to support those very tariffs. _This betrayal means higher prices for everyday necessities and significant financial strain for North Carolina’s working families._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105135364/537466444/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDY3NTJiMS1lMTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8dz_mKOTwuTQRZ3lzbTs-l9VN_mRKb5tXMR2cO3h3u0=) President Trump’s sweeping tariffs will take a sledgehammer to U.S. trade policy, sending markets into a downward spiral and costing American families an average of $3,500 per year. **The direct impact on North Carolinians is immense, with families struggling to afford groceries and farmers facing unpredictable prices and retaliatory tariffs. Tillis’s alignment with Trump’s destructive policies shows us where his loyalties lie.** North Carolina deserves better. We need a leader who will genuinely stand up for our values, not just pay lip service while voting against our well-being. It's time for a leadership change that prioritizes the needs of North Carolinians. **[We’re on to Tillis and his deceptive games, and we need your support to hold him accountable. Will you consider making a contribution to help us expose his betrayals and fight for the leadership North Carolina deserves?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105135365/537466445/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDY3NTJiMS1lMTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8dz_mKOTwuTQRZ3lzbTs-l9VN_mRKb5tXMR2cO3h3u0=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue, your donation to Wiley Nickel will process immediately:_ **** | | **[DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105135366/537466446/-1960556440?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDY3NTJiMS1lMTEwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8dz_mKOTwuTQRZ3lzbTs-l9VN_mRKb5tXMR2cO3h3u0=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, Last night, Senator Thom Tillis once again showed his true colors by saying one thing and doing another. He spoke out against Trump’s tariff plan, claiming concern for North Carolina’s hardworking families and farmers, but when it came time to take action, he voted to support those very tariffs. This betrayal means higher prices for everyday necessities and significant financial strain for North Carolina’s working families. = President Trump’s sweeping tariffs will take a sledgehammer to U.S. trade policy, sending markets into a downward spiral and costing American families an average of $3,500 per year. The direct impact on North Carolinians is immense, with families struggling to afford groceries and farmers facing unpredictable prices and retaliatory tariffs. Tillis’s alignment with Trump’s destructive policies shows us where his loyalties lie. North Carolina deserves better. We need a leader who will genuinely stand up for our values, not just pay lip service while voting against our well-being. It's time for a leadership change that prioritizes the needs of North Carolinians. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue, your donation to Wiley Nickel will process immediately: ** | | = = | = = | = = Thank you — let's get to work. name: VoteVets HQ
subject: These are not the firings we asked for.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
This is absolutely ridiculous and in any other administration the entire top level of the defense and intelligence operation would be out on the street.
#
You may have seen some headlines about Trump firing members of his national security team.
[](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250403_vv_em_hegseth_resign/?refcode=em250403-1-90&akid=34312%2E3013755%2E6XFhz-)
Let’s be clear: These are not the firings we are demanding.
Trump’s listening to Laura Loomer here, one of the biggest conspiracy theorist provocateurs on the far-right. He’s doing nothing about the actual problem — that his national security team is discussing classified information on unsecured devices and putting our Troops' lives at risk.
He has done nothing about NSA Mike Waltz, who invited Jeff Goldberg to the Signal group to begin with. It’s been confirmed since the story broke that Waltz has used Signal for at least 20 additional group chats on highly sensitive international security issues, and they probably still are. The incompetence and carelessness is absolutely staggering.
Trump hasn’t done anything about Pete Hegseth, either. This guy had his office issue a waiver allowing the use of Signal within the Department of Defense — seemingly days after the Department of Defense issues a memo identifying Signal as a massive security risk that can be accessed by our adversaries. Hegseth is the guy that sent the classified information in the first place, and Trump has done nothing!
This is absolutely ridiculous and in any other administration the entire top level of the defense and intelligence operation would be out on the street. Instead, the dumbest and most careless people to ever lead the finest Military in the world are still on the job. It feels like the news cycle is moving on, but we can’t let this go.
[**Please — whether you’ve signed it or not by now — join VoteVets and add your name DEMANDING that Hegseth resign or be fired. We have to keep the pressure on.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250403_vv_em_hegseth_resign/?refcode=em250403-1-90&akid=34312%2E3013755%2E6XFhz-)
| [HEGSETH: RESIGN](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250403_vv_em_hegseth_resign/?source=em250403-1-90&akid=34312%2E3013755%2E6XFhz-)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.

name: Team Bonta
subject: Rob’s bill to sharpen the teeth of our antitrust laws
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
Too many wealthy corporations see penalties for breaking the law as the cost of doing business. Our Attorney General is working to fix that.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250403&t=1&akid=1722%2E1088799%2EaDoxdS)
America is in a “New Gilded Age.” Greedy billionaires and large corporations are once again colluding to overpower our democracy, exploit workers, and fix prices to hurt consumers.
Over 100 years ago, during the first Gilded Age, Californians put a stop to monopolies’ and cartels’ intolerable practices by passing antitrust laws like the Cartwright Act, which outlawed anti-competitive practices that restrict trade, prevent competition, or fix prices.
But today, California is the fifth largest economy in the world, and home to some of the world’s wealthiest companies. **Far too many are all too content to violate our antitrust laws, simply seeing financial penalties as the cost of doing business.**
That’s why Attorney General Rob Bonta and State Senator Melissa Hurtado (D-Bakersfield) introduced Senate Bill 763. Their legislation would sharpen the teeth of our existing state laws by dramatically increasing penalties when corporations illegally profit at the cost of workers, consumers, and honest businesses.
**[Will you sign your name to support the Attorney General’s bill to strengthen our antitrust laws and hold corporations accountable when they hurt Californians?](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/em-20250403-support-sb763/?source=em20250403-1722&akid=1722%2E1088799%2EaDoxdS)**
**[Sign On](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/em-20250403-support-sb763/?source=em20250403-1722&akid=1722%2E1088799%2EaDoxdS)**
Onward,
Team Bonta
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250403&t=3&refcode2=1722_1088799_aDoxdS&akid=1722%2E1088799%2EaDoxdS)**

name: Elizabeth Guzman
subject: It’s official: I’m the Democratic nominee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6E3r-8BahUSFbwOkWs5ux9sbOWeqUvPa3f-KA6ceeXNtOrN9TFHeuot3Rhe9ovvr_Q1OSE0XqAXz8dpBRNsh8Jnh8BnvY1jaySvCDJgvnNnYEIaX2MC6nSdGMtZNmVdwI9K4Or4fZ5_6KxEZPdPNyA53FA3frQR4eiTYEUpJrO66HNiyivpoGmVFZ90OIVC48L2YvziQsQePQ5-RzQcuZBrwS7AzTfl3MIZhP2TiY1YS/4fc/HbyYs-vKRxqEYeDeGmhqbg/h0/h001.8YPafqnVWWupcufabgOP_by_0IcpzO9wxVpW1QUFFpc)
Big news: with the close of candidate filing, I just became the official Democratic nominee for Virginia's 22nd House of Delegates District.
You should know:
* VA Democrats hold a razor-thin **51-49 majority** in the House of Delegates, up for election THIS November.
* Trump and Musk have **FIRED thousands of my Northern Virginia neighbors** , and we’re ready to fight back.
* My red-to-blue district **rejected Donald Trump** \- and Republicans will spend _millions_ to defeat us in this toss-up race.

**After big wins in Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, and more, Democrats are looking next to Virginia to defeat Trump and Musk.**
**I'll tell you what's at stake in a moment,[but if you're ready to launch our general election campaign strong, pitch in here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqV4L1yibpnnxAqS2wxuS2391adw55EaVet93JJXLwbcl4Y2X2ny7zvNHM4TiWSkviGD0mMOw0bwi-xezY7v7Np700rpHkJWjhgYljB65kgwPlTec9z6lqL8M2hOB5gIhgtKrJZTGMAcont5trbUfyovMaThW5-dKgNYeRHl6rCGupS0okH2S5A57giN2IhEN73u3BUVJ5YPqpHo1SOpfHKbyW6wbVIhS-zS0t_MHvLbsLvv9JatgH60k9WYqWki4mixpGeVbCPKXDqPliglwphbMuKSUBvc7Y55mqygYkrFw/4fc/HbyYs-vKRxqEYeDeGmhqbg/h1/h001.10ERf3xD_y8EZ42u6ay0K_5khRyQptaw9RYMYYaJZwI)**
When I first immigrated to the US as a single mom, I worked minimum wage jobs.
I hadn't imagined that after finishing my education and becoming a social worker that I'd be elected.
But in America, public office isn't just for the wealthy or the elite.
It's for _anyone_ that works hard to earn the trust of the people.
**In 2017, I stood up to Trump, running for and winning a seat in the Virginia House of Delegates.**
In six years of service, I voted to:
* expand Medicaid to 600,000 Virginians
* raise the minimum wage
* give teachers and firefighters the right to unionize
* keep Virginia the ONLY state in the South where abortion rights were safe.

**Now, I'm running to return to the House of Delegates, where we need Democrats to stand up _more than ever_.**
****Let’s show Trump, Musk, and MAGA that we’re fighting back by winning November’s Virginia General Assembly elections.
**[Launch our general election campaign strong and flip VA-HD22 red to blue. Donate to our movement today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqdxB9B_-Pj2UssOlSG4Io0evX2PNn_AWmY41uED1Qod-cHbX4srZhtLXhbV-RGgdnodpF17bneoDKp9_miyn0tcGhGnciRscnziy7x1DJnLl5Gaqz77qTH7iceetL5n9_FLSxLEVXWsU5hYUIQIkiBn7RuVqsBC66oH-u6u9tvESAckBR4qbVKfdHwRXp8WI3MWLCUAFhQiLJcBJ8A6a0NjEmuv78DKIYeYVp3Mx85XgN5OJyNW_Be2ziS51C8_HQvw-t2DSsiC_eZqznKkY-eGz3pyWTga7ENS3lHuPe5YQ/4fc/HbyYs-vKRxqEYeDeGmhqbg/h2/h001.qlqEK8v-BIRgQaWLCdz8FZYA57wmE6Tom3xisvI-Nuo)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. Beto just held a town hall with Tim Walz in Fort Bend—it was incredible and possible because of this team’s grassroots support.
We’re hoping he can hit the road again soon, but we need the resources to fill up the gas tank.
